authors_text: Shuhao Cui,Xuan Jin,Shuhui Wang,Yuan He,Qingming Huang
title: Heuristic Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 启发式域适应
abstract: In visual domain adaptation (DA), separating the domain-specific characteristics from the domain-invariant representations is an ill-posed problem. Existing methods apply different kinds of priors or directly minimize the domain discrepancy to address this problem, which lack flexibility in handling real-world situations. Another research pipeline expresses the domain-specific information as a gradual transferring process, which tends to be suboptimal in accurately removing the domain-specific properties. In this paper, we address the modeling of domain-invariant and domain-specific information from the heuristic search perspective. We identify the characteristics in the existing representations that lead to larger domain discrepancy as the heuristic representations. With the guidance of heuristic representations, we formulate a principled framework of Heuristic Domain Adaptation (HDA) with well-founded theoretical guarantees. To perform HDA, the cosine similarity scores and independence measurements between domain-invariant and domain-specific representations are cast into the constraints at the initial and final states during the learning procedure. Similar to the final condition of heuristic search, we further derive a constraint enforcing the final range of heuristic network output to be small. Accordingly, we propose Heuristic Domain Adaptation Network (HDAN), which explicitly learns the domain-invariant and domain-specific representations with the above mentioned constraints. Extensive experiments show that HDAN has exceeded state-of-the-art on unsupervised DA, multi-source DA and semi-supervised DA. The code is available at https://github.com/cuishuhao/HDA.
summary: In visual domain adaptation (DA), separating the domain-specific characteristics from the domain-invariant representations is an ill-posed problem. Existing methods apply different kinds of priors or directly minimize the domain discrepancy to address this problem, which lack flexibility in handling real-world situations. Another research pipeline expresses the domain-specific information as a gradual transferring process, which tends to be suboptimal in accurately removing the domain-specific properties. In this paper, we address the modeling of domain-invariant and domain-specific information from the heuristic search perspective. We identify the characteristics in the existing representations that lead to larger domain discrepancy as the heuristic representations. With the guidance of heuristic representations, we formulate a principled framework of Heuristic Domain Adaptation (HDA) with well-founded theoretical guarantees. To perform HDA, the cosine similarity scores and independence measurements between domain-invariant and domain-specific representations are cast into the constraints at the initial and final states during the learning procedure. Similar to the final condition of heuristic search, we further derive a constraint enforcing the final range of heuristic network output to be small. Accordingly, we propose Heuristic Domain Adaptation Network (HDAN), which explicitly learns the domain-invariant and domain-specific representations with the above mentioned constraints. Extensive experiments show that HDAN has exceeded state-of-the-art on unsupervised DA, multi-source DA and semi-supervised DA. The code is available at https://github.com/cuishuhao/HDA.
abstract_zh: 在视觉域适应（DA）中，将域特定特征与域不变表示分离是一个不适定问题。现有的方法应用不同类型的先验或直接最小化域差异来解决这个问题，在处理实际情况时缺乏灵活性。另一个研究流程将特定于领域的信息表示为一个逐渐的传输过程，这在准确删除特定于领域的属性方面往往不是最理想的。在本文中，我们从启发式搜索的角度解决了领域不变和领域特定信息的建模问题。我们将现有表示中导致较大域差异的特征识别为启发式表示。在启发式表示的指导下，我们制定了具有充分理论保证的启发式域适应（HDA）的原则框架。为了执行 HDA，域不变和域特定表示之间的余弦相似性得分和独立性测量被纳入学习过程中初始和最终状态的约束中。与启发式搜索的最终条件类似，我们进一步推导出一个约束，强制启发式网络输出的最终范围较小。因此，我们提出了启发式域适应网络（HDAN），它明确地学习具有上述约束的域不变和特定于域的表示。大量实验表明，HDAN 在无监督 DA、多源 DA 和半监督 DA 方面已经超过了最先进的水平。代码可在 https://github.com/cuishuhao/HDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于启发式搜索的领域自适应方法（HDA），旨在有效分离领域特有特征和领域不变表示，以提升视觉领域自适应的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法在处理实际场景时缺乏灵活性，且难以准确去除领域特有属性，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 通过启发式搜索视角建模领域不变与领域特有信息，利用启发式表示指导框架设计，结合余弦相似度与独立性约束，并提出Heuristic Domain Adaptation Network（HDAN）实现目标。
AI.result: HDAN在无监督、多源和半监督领域自适应任务中均超越了现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了理论支撑的启发式领域自适应方法，通过约束设计有效提升了领域不变表示的学习效果。

authors_text: Sarah Radway,Anthony Luo,Carmine Elvezio,Jenny Cha,Sophia Kolak,Elijah Zulu,Sad Adib
title: Beyond LunAR: An augmented reality UI for deep-space exploration missions
title_zh: Beyond LunAR：用于深空探索任务的增强现实用户界面
abstract: As space exploration efforts shift to deep space missions, new challenges emerge regarding astronaut communication and task completion. While the round trip propagation delay for lunar communications is 2.6 seconds, the time delay increases to nearly 22 minutes for Mars missions. This creates a need for astronaut independence from earth-based assistance, and places greater significance upon the limited communications that are able to be delivered. To address this issue, we prototyped an augmented reality user interface for the new xEMU spacesuit, intended for use on planetary surface missions. This user interface assists with functions that would usually be completed by flight controllers in Mission Control, or are currently completed in manners that are unnecessarily difficult. We accomplish this through features such as AR model-based task instruction, sampling task assistance, note taking, and telemetry monitoring and display.
summary: As space exploration efforts shift to deep space missions, new challenges emerge regarding astronaut communication and task completion. While the round trip propagation delay for lunar communications is 2.6 seconds, the time delay increases to nearly 22 minutes for Mars missions. This creates a need for astronaut independence from earth-based assistance, and places greater significance upon the limited communications that are able to be delivered. To address this issue, we prototyped an augmented reality user interface for the new xEMU spacesuit, intended for use on planetary surface missions. This user interface assists with functions that would usually be completed by flight controllers in Mission Control, or are currently completed in manners that are unnecessarily difficult. We accomplish this through features such as AR model-based task instruction, sampling task assistance, note taking, and telemetry monitoring and display.
abstract_zh: 随着太空探索工作转向深空任务，宇航员通信和任务完成方面出现了新的挑战。月球通信的往返传播延迟为 2.6 秒，而火星任务的时间延迟增加到近 22 分钟。这就需要宇航员独立于地球上的援助，并且更加重视能够提供的有限通信。为了解决这个问题，我们为新型 xEMU 宇航服设计了增强现实用户界面原型，旨在用于行星表面任务。该用户界面协助完成通常由任务控制中的飞行控制器完成的功能，或者目前以不必要的困难方式完成的功能。我们通过基于 AR 模型的任务指导、采样任务辅助、笔记以及遥测监控和显示等功能来实现这一目标。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种增强现实用户界面，用于支持深空探索任务中宇航员的自主操作。
AI.motivation: 深空任务通信延迟极高（如火星任务达22分钟），需减少对地球控制中心的依赖，提升宇航员任务自主性。
AI.method: 为新型xEMU宇航服开发AR界面，集成模型化任务指导、采样协助、笔记记录及遥测监控功能。
AI.result: 原型验证了AR界面在行星表面任务中可替代地面控制功能，简化复杂操作流程。
AI.conclusion: AR界面能有效提升深空任务中宇航员的自主性与任务效率，降低通信延迟影响。

authors_text: Konstantin Makarychev,Miklos Z. Racz,Cyrus Rashtchian,Sergey Yekhanin
title: Batch Optimization for DNA Synthesis
title_zh: DNA 合成的批量优化
abstract: Large pools of synthetic DNA molecules have been recently used to reliably store significant volumes of digital data. While DNA as a storage medium has enormous potential because of its high storage density, its practical use is currently severely limited because of the high cost and low throughput of available DNA synthesis technologies. We study the role of batch optimization in reducing the cost of large scale DNA synthesis, which translates to the following algorithmic task. Given a large pool $\mathcal{S}$ of random quaternary strings of fixed length, partition $\mathcal{S}$ into batches in a way that minimizes the sum of the lengths of the shortest common supersequences across batches. We introduce two ideas for batch optimization that both improve (in different ways) upon a naive baseline: (1) using both $(ACGT)^{*}$ and its reverse $(TGCA)^{*}$ as reference strands, and batching appropriately, and (2) batching via the quantiles of an appropriate ordering of the strands. We also prove asymptotically matching lower bounds on the cost of DNA synthesis, showing that one cannot improve upon these two ideas. Our results uncover a surprising separation between two cases that naturally arise in the context of DNA data storage: the asymptotic cost savings of batch optimization are significantly greater in the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ do not contain repeats of the same character (homopolymers), as compared to the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ are unconstrained.
summary: Large pools of synthetic DNA molecules have been recently used to reliably store significant volumes of digital data. While DNA as a storage medium has enormous potential because of its high storage density, its practical use is currently severely limited because of the high cost and low throughput of available DNA synthesis technologies. We study the role of batch optimization in reducing the cost of large scale DNA synthesis, which translates to the following algorithmic task. Given a large pool $\mathcal{S}$ of random quaternary strings of fixed length, partition $\mathcal{S}$ into batches in a way that minimizes the sum of the lengths of the shortest common supersequences across batches. We introduce two ideas for batch optimization that both improve (in different ways) upon a naive baseline: (1) using both $(ACGT)^{*}$ and its reverse $(TGCA)^{*}$ as reference strands, and batching appropriately, and (2) batching via the quantiles of an appropriate ordering of the strands. We also prove asymptotically matching lower bounds on the cost of DNA synthesis, showing that one cannot improve upon these two ideas. Our results uncover a surprising separation between two cases that naturally arise in the context of DNA data storage: the asymptotic cost savings of batch optimization are significantly greater in the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ do not contain repeats of the same character (homopolymers), as compared to the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ are unconstrained.
abstract_zh: 最近，大量合成 DNA 分子已被用来可靠地存储大量数字数据。虽然DNA作为存储介质因其高存储密度而具有巨大潜力，但由于现有DNA合成技术的高成本和低通量，其实际应用目前受到严重限制。我们研究批量优化在降低大规模 DNA 合成成本中的作用，这转化为以下算法任务。给定一个固定长度的随机四元字符串的大型池 $\mathcal{S}$，将 $\mathcal{S}$ 划分为多个批次，以最小化批次间最短公共超序列的长度之和。我们引入了两种批量优化的想法，它们都在朴素基线的基础上（以不同的方式）进行了改进：（1）使用 $(ACGT)^{*}$ 及其反向 $(TGCA)^{*}$ 作为参考链，并适当地进行批处理，以及 (2) 通过适当的链排序的分位数进行批处理。我们还证明了 DNA 合成成本的渐近匹配下限，表明人们无法改进这两种想法。我们的结果揭示了 DNA 数据存储环境中自然出现的两种情况之间令人惊讶的区别：与 $\mathcal{S}$ 中的字符串不受约束的情况相比，在 $\mathcal{S}$ 中的字符串不包含相同字符（均聚物）重复的情况下，批量优化的渐近成本节省显着更大。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过批次优化降低大规模DNA合成成本，提出两种分组策略以最小化超序列长度总和。
AI.motivation: DNA存储具有高密度潜力，但受限于合成技术的高成本与低吞吐量，需优化合成流程以提升可行性。
AI.method: 提出两种优化方法：1）利用正向(ACGT)*和反向(TGCA)*参考链进行分组；2）基于字符串排序的分位数分组策略。
AI.result: 证明两种方法达到渐近最优下界，发现无同聚物字符串的批次优化成本节约显著高于无约束字符串情况。
AI.conclusion: 批次优化策略有效降低DNA合成成本，且在无重复字符场景中效果更优，为DNA存储技术提供理论支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究如何通过批次优化降低大规模DNA合成成本，提出两种分组策略以最小化超序列长度总和。

search_text: Batch Optimization for DNA Synthesis DNA 合成的批量优化 Large pools of synthetic DNA molecules have been recently used to reliably store significant volumes of digital data. While DNA as a storage medium has enormous potential because of its high storage density, its practical use is currently severely limited because of the high cost and low throughput of available DNA synthesis technologies. We study the role of batch optimization in reducing the cost of large scale DNA synthesis, which translates to the following algorithmic task. Given a large pool $\mathcal{S}$ of random quaternary strings of fixed length, partition $\mathcal{S}$ into batches in a way that minimizes the sum of the lengths of the shortest common supersequences across batches. We introduce two ideas for batch optimization that both improve (in different ways) upon a naive baseline: (1) using both $(ACGT)^{*}$ and its reverse $(TGCA)^{*}$ as reference strands, and batching appropriately, and (2) batching via the quantiles of an appropriate ordering of the strands. We also prove asymptotically matching lower bounds on the cost of DNA synthesis, showing that one cannot improve upon these two ideas. Our results uncover a surprising separation between two cases that naturally arise in the context of DNA data storage: the asymptotic cost savings of batch optimization are significantly greater in the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ do not contain repeats of the same character (homopolymers), as compared to the case where strings in $\mathcal{S}$ are unconstrained. 最近，大量合成 DNA 分子已被用来可靠地存储大量数字数据。虽然DNA作为存储介质因其高存储密度而具有巨大潜力，但由于现有DNA合成技术的高成本和低通量，其实际应用目前受到严重限制。我们研究批量优化在降低大规模 DNA 合成成本中的作用，这转化为以下算法任务。给定一个固定长度的随机四元字符串的大型池 $\mathcal{S}$，将 $\mathcal{S}$ 划分为多个批次，以最小化批次间最短公共超序列的长度之和。我们引入了两种批量优化的想法，它们都在朴素基线的基础上（以不同的方式）进行了改进：（1）使用 $(ACGT)^{*}$ 及其反向 $(TGCA)^{*}$ 作为参考链，并适当地进行批处理，以及 (2) 通过适当的链排序的分位数进行批处理。我们还证明了 DNA 合成成本的渐近匹配下限，表明人们无法改进这两种想法。我们的结果揭示了 DNA 数据存储环境中自然出现的两种情况之间令人惊讶的区别：与 $\mathcal{S}$ 中的字符串不受约束的情况相比，在 $\mathcal{S}$ 中的字符串不包含相同字符（均聚物）重复的情况下，批量优化的渐近成本节省显着更大。 本文研究如何通过批次优化降低大规模DNA合成成本，提出两种分组策略以最小化超序列长度总和。 Konstantin Makarychev,Miklos Z. Racz,Cyrus Rashtchian,Sergey Yekhanin cs.DS,cs.IT,math.CO,math.PR,q-bio.QM

title: Inter-layer Transition in Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 神经架构搜索中的层间转换
abstract: Differential Neural Architecture Search (NAS) methods represent the network architecture as a repetitive proxy directed acyclic graph (DAG) and optimize the network weights and architecture weights alternatively in a differential manner. However, existing methods model the architecture weights on each edge (i.e., a layer in the network) as statistically independent variables, ignoring the dependency between edges in DAG induced by their directed topological connections. In this paper, we make the first attempt to investigate such dependency by proposing a novel Inter-layer Transition NAS method. It casts the architecture optimization into a sequential decision process where the dependency between the architecture weights of connected edges is explicitly modeled. Specifically, edges are divided into inner and outer groups according to whether or not their predecessor edges are in the same cell. While the architecture weights of outer edges are optimized independently, those of inner edges are derived sequentially based on the architecture weights of their predecessor edges and the learnable transition matrices in an attentive probability transition manner. Experiments on five benchmarks confirm the value of modeling inter-layer dependency and demonstrate the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Differential Neural Architecture Search (NAS) methods represent the network architecture as a repetitive proxy directed acyclic graph (DAG) and optimize the network weights and architecture weights alternatively in a differential manner. However, existing methods model the architecture weights on each edge (i.e., a layer in the network) as statistically independent variables, ignoring the dependency between edges in DAG induced by their directed topological connections. In this paper, we make the first attempt to investigate such dependency by proposing a novel Inter-layer Transition NAS method. It casts the architecture optimization into a sequential decision process where the dependency between the architecture weights of connected edges is explicitly modeled. Specifically, edges are divided into inner and outer groups according to whether or not their predecessor edges are in the same cell. While the architecture weights of outer edges are optimized independently, those of inner edges are derived sequentially based on the architecture weights of their predecessor edges and the learnable transition matrices in an attentive probability transition manner. Experiments on five benchmarks confirm the value of modeling inter-layer dependency and demonstrate the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 差分神经架构搜索（NAS）方法将网络架构表示为重复代理有向无环图（DAG），并以差分方式交替优化网络权重和架构权重。然而，现有方法将每条边（即网络中的一层）上的架构权重建模为统计独立变量，忽略了 DAG 中边之间由其定向拓扑连接引起的依赖性。在本文中，我们首次尝试通过提出一种新颖的层间转换 NAS 方法来研究这种依赖性。它将架构优化转化为顺序决策过程，其中对连接边的架构权重之间的依赖性进行显式建模。具体来说，根据其前驱边是否在同一单元中，将边分为内组和外组。虽然外边缘的体系结构权重是独立优化的，但内边缘的体系结构权重是基于其前任边缘的体系结构权重和可学习的转移矩阵以注意力概率转移方式顺序推导的。五个基准的实验证实了建模层间依赖关系的价值，并证明所提出的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的神经网络架构搜索（NAS）方法，通过建模层间依赖关系来改进现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有差分NAS方法将网络边的架构权重视为独立变量，忽略了DAG拓扑结构导致的边间依赖关系，限制了搜索效果。
AI.method: 提出Inter-layer Transition方法，将边分为内外组：外边独立优化，内边通过前驱边权重与可学习转换矩阵进行顺序推导，采用注意力概率机制建模依赖。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证了层间依赖建模的有效性，所提方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模层间依赖可提升NAS性能，提出的顺序决策框架有效捕捉架构权重的拓扑相关性。

title: Feature Learning in Infinite-Width Neural Networks
title_zh: 无限宽度神经网络中的特征学习
comment: 4th paper in the Tensor Programs series. Appearing in ICML 2021
comments: 4th paper in the Tensor Programs series. Appearing in ICML 2021
abstract: As its width tends to infinity, a deep neural network's behavior under gradient descent can become simplified and predictable (e.g. given by the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK)), if it is parametrized appropriately (e.g. the NTK parametrization). However, we show that the standard and NTK parametrizations of a neural network do not admit infinite-width limits that can learn features, which is crucial for pretraining and transfer learning such as with BERT. We propose simple modifications to the standard parametrization to allow for feature learning in the limit. Using the *Tensor Programs* technique, we derive explicit formulas for such limits. On Word2Vec and few-shot learning on Omniglot via MAML, two canonical tasks that rely crucially on feature learning, we compute these limits exactly. We find that they outperform both NTK baselines and finite-width networks, with the latter approaching the infinite-width feature learning performance as width increases. More generally, we classify a natural space of neural network parametrizations that generalizes standard, NTK, and Mean Field parametrizations. We show 1) any parametrization in this space either admits feature learning or has an infinite-width training dynamics given by kernel gradient descent, but not both; 2) any such infinite-width limit can be computed using the Tensor Programs technique. Code for our experiments can be found at github.com/edwardjhu/TP4.
summary: As its width tends to infinity, a deep neural network's behavior under gradient descent can become simplified and predictable (e.g. given by the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK)), if it is parametrized appropriately (e.g. the NTK parametrization). However, we show that the standard and NTK parametrizations of a neural network do not admit infinite-width limits that can learn features, which is crucial for pretraining and transfer learning such as with BERT. We propose simple modifications to the standard parametrization to allow for feature learning in the limit. Using the *Tensor Programs* technique, we derive explicit formulas for such limits. On Word2Vec and few-shot learning on Omniglot via MAML, two canonical tasks that rely crucially on feature learning, we compute these limits exactly. We find that they outperform both NTK baselines and finite-width networks, with the latter approaching the infinite-width feature learning performance as width increases. More generally, we classify a natural space of neural network parametrizations that generalizes standard, NTK, and Mean Field parametrizations. We show 1) any parametrization in this space either admits feature learning or has an infinite-width training dynamics given by kernel gradient descent, but not both; 2) any such infinite-width limit can be computed using the Tensor Programs technique. Code for our experiments can be found at github.com/edwardjhu/TP4.
abstract_zh: 由于其宽度趋于无穷大，如果适当参数化（例如 NTK 参数化），深度神经网络在梯度下降下的行为可以变得简化且可预测（例如由神经正切核（NTK）给出）。然而，我们表明神经网络的标准和 NTK 参数化不允许学习特征的无限宽度限制，这对于预训练和迁移学习（例如 BERT）至关重要。我们建议对标准参数化进行简单修改，以允许在极限范围内进行特征学习。使用“张量程序”技术，我们得出了此类限制的明确公式。在 Word2Vec 和通过 MAML 在 Omniglot 上进行的小样本学习（这两个主要依赖于特征学习的规范任务）中，我们精确地计算了这些限制。我们发现它们的性能优于 NTK 基线和有限宽度网络，后者随着宽度的增加而接近无限宽度特征学习性能。更一般地说，我们对神经网络参数化的自然空间进行分类，该空间概括了标准、NTK 和平均场参数化。我们展示了 1）这个空间中的任何参数化要么允许特征学习，要么具有由内核梯度下降给出的无限宽度训练动态，但不能两者兼而有之； 2) 任何此类无限宽度限制都可以使用张量程序技术来计算。我们的实验代码可以在 github.com/edwardjhu/TP4 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无限宽度神经网络中特征学习的可行性，提出改进的参数化方法并验证其在预训练和迁移学习任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 标准及NTK参数化无法在无限宽度下实现特征学习，而特征学习对预训练和迁移学习（如BERT）至关重要，需寻找新的参数化方案。
AI.method: 通过修改标准参数化并结合Tensor Programs技术，推导无限宽度下的显式公式，在Word2Vec和Omniglot任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 新方法在两项任务中超越NTK基线和有限宽度网络，且有限宽度网络性能随宽度增加逼近无限宽度表现。
AI.conclusion: 分类了参数化空间，证明其中任意参数化仅支持特征学习或核梯度下降，且Tensor Programs可计算无限宽度极限。

search_text: Feature Learning in Infinite-Width Neural Networks 无限宽度神经网络中的特征学习 As its width tends to infinity, a deep neural network's behavior under gradient descent can become simplified and predictable (e.g. given by the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK)), if it is parametrized appropriately (e.g. the NTK parametrization). However, we show that the standard and NTK parametrizations of a neural network do not admit infinite-width limits that can learn features, which is crucial for pretraining and transfer learning such as with BERT. We propose simple modifications to the standard parametrization to allow for feature learning in the limit. Using the *Tensor Programs* technique, we derive explicit formulas for such limits. On Word2Vec and few-shot learning on Omniglot via MAML, two canonical tasks that rely crucially on feature learning, we compute these limits exactly. We find that they outperform both NTK baselines and finite-width networks, with the latter approaching the infinite-width feature learning performance as width increases. More generally, we classify a natural space of neural network parametrizations that generalizes standard, NTK, and Mean Field parametrizations. We show 1) any parametrization in this space either admits feature learning or has an infinite-width training dynamics given by kernel gradient descent, but not both; 2) any such infinite-width limit can be computed using the Tensor Programs technique. Code for our experiments can be found at github.com/edwardjhu/TP4. 由于其宽度趋于无穷大，如果适当参数化（例如 NTK 参数化），深度神经网络在梯度下降下的行为可以变得简化且可预测（例如由神经正切核（NTK）给出）。然而，我们表明神经网络的标准和 NTK 参数化不允许学习特征的无限宽度限制，这对于预训练和迁移学习（例如 BERT）至关重要。我们建议对标准参数化进行简单修改，以允许在极限范围内进行特征学习。使用“张量程序”技术，我们得出了此类限制的明确公式。在 Word2Vec 和通过 MAML 在 Omniglot 上进行的小样本学习（这两个主要依赖于特征学习的规范任务）中，我们精确地计算了这些限制。我们发现它们的性能优于 NTK 基线和有限宽度网络，后者随着宽度的增加而接近无限宽度特征学习性能。更一般地说，我们对神经网络参数化的自然空间进行分类，该空间概括了标准、NTK 和平均场参数化。我们展示了 1）这个空间中的任何参数化要么允许特征学习，要么具有由内核梯度下降给出的无限宽度训练动态，但不能两者兼而有之； 2) 任何此类无限宽度限制都可以使用张量程序技术来计算。我们的实验代码可以在 github.com/edwardjhu/TP4 找到。 本文研究了无限宽度神经网络中特征学习的可行性，提出改进的参数化方法并验证其在预训练和迁移学习任务中的有效性。 Greg Yang,Edward J. Hu cs.LG,cond-mat.dis-nn,cs.NE

authors_text: Huangxing Lin,Yihong Zhuang,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding,Yizhou Yu,Xiaoqing Liu,John Paisley
title: Adaptive noise imitation for image denoising
title_zh: 用于图像去噪的自适应噪声模拟
abstract: The effectiveness of existing denoising algorithms typically relies on accurate pre-defined noise statistics or plenty of paired data, which limits their practicality. In this work, we focus on denoising in the more common case where noise statistics and paired data are unavailable. Considering that denoising CNNs require supervision, we develop a new \textbf{adaptive noise imitation (ADANI)} algorithm that can synthesize noisy data from naturally noisy images. To produce realistic noise, a noise generator takes unpaired noisy/clean images as input, where the noisy image is a guide for noise generation. By imposing explicit constraints on the type, level and gradient of noise, the output noise of ADANI will be similar to the guided noise, while keeping the original clean background of the image. Coupling the noisy data output from ADANI with the corresponding ground-truth, a denoising CNN is then trained in a fully-supervised manner. Experiments show that the noisy data produced by ADANI are visually and statistically similar to real ones so that the denoising CNN in our method is competitive to other networks trained with external paired data.
summary: The effectiveness of existing denoising algorithms typically relies on accurate pre-defined noise statistics or plenty of paired data, which limits their practicality. In this work, we focus on denoising in the more common case where noise statistics and paired data are unavailable. Considering that denoising CNNs require supervision, we develop a new \textbf{adaptive noise imitation (ADANI)} algorithm that can synthesize noisy data from naturally noisy images. To produce realistic noise, a noise generator takes unpaired noisy/clean images as input, where the noisy image is a guide for noise generation. By imposing explicit constraints on the type, level and gradient of noise, the output noise of ADANI will be similar to the guided noise, while keeping the original clean background of the image. Coupling the noisy data output from ADANI with the corresponding ground-truth, a denoising CNN is then trained in a fully-supervised manner. Experiments show that the noisy data produced by ADANI are visually and statistically similar to real ones so that the denoising CNN in our method is competitive to other networks trained with external paired data.
abstract_zh: 现有去噪算法的有效性通常依赖于准确的预定义噪声统计数据或大量配对数据，这限制了它们的实用性。在这项工作中，我们重点关注噪声统计数据和配对数据不可用的更常见情况下的去噪。考虑到去噪 CNN 需要监督，我们开发了一种新的自适应噪声模拟（ADANI）算法，该算法可以从自然噪声图像中合成噪声数据。为了产生真实的噪声，噪声生成器将不成对的噪声/干净图像作为输入，其中噪声图像是噪声生成的指导。通过对噪声的类型、级别和梯度施加明确的约束，ADANI 的输出噪声将与引导噪声相似，同时保持图像原始干净的背景。将 ADANI 输出的噪声数据与相应的地面实况相耦合，然后以完全监督的方式训练去噪 CNN。实验表明，ADANI 生成的噪声数据在视觉上和统计上与真实数据相似，因此我们方法中的去噪 CNN 与使用外部配对数据训练的其他网络相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预定义噪声统计或配对数据的自适应噪声模仿（ADANI）算法，用于解决图像去噪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪算法依赖准确的噪声统计或大量配对数据，限制了其在实际场景中的应用。
AI.method: 开发ADANI算法，通过噪声生成器从未配对的噪声/干净图像中合成符合约束条件的噪声数据，保持图像背景清洁，并利用生成数据训练监督去噪CNN。
AI.result: ADANI生成的噪声在视觉和统计特性上接近真实噪声，其训练的CNN性能可与使用外部配对数据的方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: ADANI有效解决了无配对数据和噪声统计的去噪难题，提升了算法的实用性和适应性。

authors_text: Jiayi Yang,Lei Deng,Yukuan Yang,Yuan Xie,Guoqi Li
title: Training and Inference for Integer-Based Semantic Segmentation Network
title_zh: 基于整数的语义分割网络的训练和推理
abstract: Semantic segmentation has been a major topic in research and industry in recent years. However, due to the computation complexity of pixel-wise prediction and backpropagation algorithm, semantic segmentation has been demanding in computation resources, resulting in slow training and inference speed and large storage space to store models. Existing schemes that speed up segmentation network change the network structure and come with noticeable accuracy degradation. However, neural network quantization can be used to reduce computation load while maintaining comparable accuracy and original network structure. Semantic segmentation networks are different from traditional deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) in many ways, and this topic has not been thoroughly explored in existing works. In this paper, we propose a new quantization framework for training and inference of segmentation networks, where parameters and operations are constrained to 8-bit integer-based values for the first time. Full quantization of the data flow and the removal of square and root operations in batch normalization give our framework the ability to perform inference on fixed-point devices. Our proposed framework is evaluated on mainstream semantic segmentation networks like FCN-VGG16 and DeepLabv3-ResNet50, achieving comparable accuracy against floating-point framework on ADE20K dataset and PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset.
summary: Semantic segmentation has been a major topic in research and industry in recent years. However, due to the computation complexity of pixel-wise prediction and backpropagation algorithm, semantic segmentation has been demanding in computation resources, resulting in slow training and inference speed and large storage space to store models. Existing schemes that speed up segmentation network change the network structure and come with noticeable accuracy degradation. However, neural network quantization can be used to reduce computation load while maintaining comparable accuracy and original network structure. Semantic segmentation networks are different from traditional deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) in many ways, and this topic has not been thoroughly explored in existing works. In this paper, we propose a new quantization framework for training and inference of segmentation networks, where parameters and operations are constrained to 8-bit integer-based values for the first time. Full quantization of the data flow and the removal of square and root operations in batch normalization give our framework the ability to perform inference on fixed-point devices. Our proposed framework is evaluated on mainstream semantic segmentation networks like FCN-VGG16 and DeepLabv3-ResNet50, achieving comparable accuracy against floating-point framework on ADE20K dataset and PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，语义分割一直是研究和工业界的一个主要课题。然而，由于逐像素预测和反向传播算法的计算复杂性，语义分割对计算资源的要求很高，导致训练和推理速度慢，并且存储模型的存储空间很大。现有的加速分割网络的方案改变了网络结构并带来了明显的精度下降。然而，神经网络量化可用于减少计算负载，同时保持可比的精度和原始网络结构。语义分割网络在很多方面与传统的深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）不同，并且这个主题在现有的工作中还没有得到彻底的探讨。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于分割网络训练和推理的新量化框架，其中参数和操作首次被限制为基于 8 位整数的值。数据流的完全量化以及批量归一化中平方和根运算的删除使我们的框架能够在定点设备上执行推理。我们提出的框架在 FCN-VGG16 和 DeepLabv3-ResNet50 等主流语义分割网络上进行了评估，在 ADE20K 数据集和 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上实现了与浮点框架相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于8位整数的语义分割网络量化框架，通过全量化数据流和优化批归一化操作，实现低计算负载下的高效训练与推理。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割网络因计算复杂度高导致资源消耗大，传统加速方法牺牲准确率，而量化方法在保持结构和精度的同时未被充分探索。
AI.method: 首次约束参数和操作为8位整数，全量化数据流并移除批归一化中的平方/根号运算，使框架适配定点设备。
AI.result: 在FCN-VGG16和DeepLabv3-ResNet50网络上，ADE20K和PASCAL VOC 2012数据集的准确率与浮点框架相当。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效降低计算负载且保持精度，为语义分割的定点设备部署提供了新方案，推动了量化研究在分割领域的应用。

authors_text: Yuqing Wang,Zhaoliang Xu,Xinlong Wang,Chunhua Shen,Baoshan Cheng,Hao Shen,Huaxia Xia
title: End-to-End Video Instance Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行端到端视频实例分割
abstract: Video instance segmentation (VIS) is the task that requires simultaneously classifying, segmenting and tracking object instances of interest in video. Recent methods typically develop sophisticated pipelines to tackle this task. Here, we propose a new video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, termed VisTR, which views the VIS task as a direct end-to-end parallel sequence decoding/prediction problem. Given a video clip consisting of multiple image frames as input, VisTR outputs the sequence of masks for each instance in the video in order directly. At the core is a new, effective instance sequence matching and segmentation strategy, which supervises and segments instances at the sequence level as a whole. VisTR frames the instance segmentation and tracking in the same perspective of similarity learning, thus considerably simplifying the overall pipeline and is significantly different from existing approaches. Without bells and whistles, VisTR achieves the highest speed among all existing VIS models, and achieves the best result among methods using single model on the YouTube-VIS dataset. For the first time, we demonstrate a much simpler and faster video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, achieving competitive accuracy. We hope that VisTR can motivate future research for more video understanding tasks.
summary: Video instance segmentation (VIS) is the task that requires simultaneously classifying, segmenting and tracking object instances of interest in video. Recent methods typically develop sophisticated pipelines to tackle this task. Here, we propose a new video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, termed VisTR, which views the VIS task as a direct end-to-end parallel sequence decoding/prediction problem. Given a video clip consisting of multiple image frames as input, VisTR outputs the sequence of masks for each instance in the video in order directly. At the core is a new, effective instance sequence matching and segmentation strategy, which supervises and segments instances at the sequence level as a whole. VisTR frames the instance segmentation and tracking in the same perspective of similarity learning, thus considerably simplifying the overall pipeline and is significantly different from existing approaches. Without bells and whistles, VisTR achieves the highest speed among all existing VIS models, and achieves the best result among methods using single model on the YouTube-VIS dataset. For the first time, we demonstrate a much simpler and faster video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, achieving competitive accuracy. We hope that VisTR can motivate future research for more video understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 视频实例分割（VIS）是需要同时对视频中感兴趣的对象实例进行分类、分割和跟踪的任务。最近的方法通常开发复杂的管道来解决此任务。在这里，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新视频实例分割框架，称为 VisTR，它将 VIS 任务视为直接的端到端并行序列解码/预测问题。给定一个由多个图像帧组成的视频剪辑作为输入，VisTR 直接按顺序输出视频中每个实例的掩码序列。其核心是一种新的、有效的实例序列匹配和分割策略，它在序列级别作为一个整体来监督和分割实例。 VisTR 从相似性学习的相同角度构建实例分割和跟踪，从而大大简化了整个流程，并且与现有方法显着不同。没有花里胡哨的东西，VisTR在所有现有VIS模型中实现了最高的速度，并且在YouTube-VIS数据集上使用单一模型的方法中取得了最好的结果。我们首次展示了一个基于 Transformer 构建的更简单、更快速的视频实例分割框架，实现了具有竞争力的准确性。我们希望 VisTR 能够推动未来更多视频理解任务的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的端到端视频实例分割框架VisTR，通过序列级匹配与分割策略简化流程并提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割方法依赖复杂流水线，而VisTR通过统一序列学习视角简化任务，实现更高效准确的分割与跟踪。
AI.method: VisTR将视频帧序列输入Transformer，直接输出实例掩码序列，核心采用序列级实例匹配与分割策略，基于相似性学习统一处理分割和跟踪。
AI.result: VisTR在YouTube-VIS数据集上以单模型取得最佳性能，速度优于所有现有方法，准确率具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: VisTR验证了基于Transformer的简单高效视频实例分割框架的可行性，为未来视频理解研究提供新方向。

search_text: End-to-End Video Instance Segmentation with Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行端到端视频实例分割 Video instance segmentation (VIS) is the task that requires simultaneously classifying, segmenting and tracking object instances of interest in video. Recent methods typically develop sophisticated pipelines to tackle this task. Here, we propose a new video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, termed VisTR, which views the VIS task as a direct end-to-end parallel sequence decoding/prediction problem. Given a video clip consisting of multiple image frames as input, VisTR outputs the sequence of masks for each instance in the video in order directly. At the core is a new, effective instance sequence matching and segmentation strategy, which supervises and segments instances at the sequence level as a whole. VisTR frames the instance segmentation and tracking in the same perspective of similarity learning, thus considerably simplifying the overall pipeline and is significantly different from existing approaches. Without bells and whistles, VisTR achieves the highest speed among all existing VIS models, and achieves the best result among methods using single model on the YouTube-VIS dataset. For the first time, we demonstrate a much simpler and faster video instance segmentation framework built upon Transformers, achieving competitive accuracy. We hope that VisTR can motivate future research for more video understanding tasks. 视频实例分割（VIS）是需要同时对视频中感兴趣的对象实例进行分类、分割和跟踪的任务。最近的方法通常开发复杂的管道来解决此任务。在这里，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新视频实例分割框架，称为 VisTR，它将 VIS 任务视为直接的端到端并行序列解码/预测问题。给定一个由多个图像帧组成的视频剪辑作为输入，VisTR 直接按顺序输出视频中每个实例的掩码序列。其核心是一种新的、有效的实例序列匹配和分割策略，它在序列级别作为一个整体来监督和分割实例。 VisTR 从相似性学习的相同角度构建实例分割和跟踪，从而大大简化了整个流程，并且与现有方法显着不同。没有花里胡哨的东西，VisTR在所有现有VIS模型中实现了最高的速度，并且在YouTube-VIS数据集上使用单一模型的方法中取得了最好的结果。我们首次展示了一个基于 Transformer 构建的更简单、更快速的视频实例分割框架，实现了具有竞争力的准确性。我们希望 VisTR 能够推动未来更多视频理解任务的研究。 本文提出基于Transformer的端到端视频实例分割框架VisTR，通过序列级匹配与分割策略简化流程并提升效率。 Yuqing Wang,Zhaoliang Xu,Xinlong Wang,Chunhua Shen,Baoshan Cheng,Hao Shen,Huaxia Xia cs.CV

title: SwitchX: Gmin-Gmax Switching for Energy-Efficient and Robust Implementation of Binary Neural Networks on ReRAM Xbars
title_zh: SwitchX：Gmin-Gmax 切换，用于在 ReRAM Xbar 上实现二元神经网络的节能且稳健的实现
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems on 30 Nov 2022
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems on 30 Nov 2022
abstract: Memristive crossbars can efficiently implement Binarized Neural Networks (BNNs) wherein the weights are stored in high-resistance states (HRS) and low-resistance states (LRS) of the synapses. We propose SwitchX mapping of BNN weights onto ReRAM crossbars such that the impact of crossbar non-idealities, that lead to degradation in computational accuracy, are minimized. Essentially, SwitchX maps the binary weights in such manner that a crossbar instance comprises of more HRS than LRS synapses. We find BNNs mapped onto crossbars with SwitchX to exhibit better robustness against adversarial attacks than the standard crossbar-mapped BNNs, the baseline. Finally, we combine SwitchX with state-aware training (that further increases the feasibility of HRS states during weight mapping) to boost the robustness of a BNN on hardware. We find that this approach yields stronger defense against adversarial attacks than adversarial training, a state-of-the-art software defense. We perform experiments on a VGG16 BNN with benchmark datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 & TinyImagenet) and use Fast Gradient Sign Method and Projected Gradient Descent adversarial attacks. We show that SwitchX combined with state-aware training can yield upto ~35% improvements in clean accuracy and ~6-16% in adversarial accuracies against conventional BNNs. Furthermore, an important by-product of SwitchX mapping is increased crossbar power savings, owing to an increased proportion of HRS synapses, that is furthered with state-aware training. We obtain upto ~21-22% savings in crossbar power consumption for state-aware trained BNN mapped via SwitchX on 16x16 & 32x32 crossbars using the CIFAR-10 & CIFAR-100 datasets.
summary: Memristive crossbars can efficiently implement Binarized Neural Networks (BNNs) wherein the weights are stored in high-resistance states (HRS) and low-resistance states (LRS) of the synapses. We propose SwitchX mapping of BNN weights onto ReRAM crossbars such that the impact of crossbar non-idealities, that lead to degradation in computational accuracy, are minimized. Essentially, SwitchX maps the binary weights in such manner that a crossbar instance comprises of more HRS than LRS synapses. We find BNNs mapped onto crossbars with SwitchX to exhibit better robustness against adversarial attacks than the standard crossbar-mapped BNNs, the baseline. Finally, we combine SwitchX with state-aware training (that further increases the feasibility of HRS states during weight mapping) to boost the robustness of a BNN on hardware. We find that this approach yields stronger defense against adversarial attacks than adversarial training, a state-of-the-art software defense. We perform experiments on a VGG16 BNN with benchmark datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 & TinyImagenet) and use Fast Gradient Sign Method and Projected Gradient Descent adversarial attacks. We show that SwitchX combined with state-aware training can yield upto ~35% improvements in clean accuracy and ~6-16% in adversarial accuracies against conventional BNNs. Furthermore, an important by-product of SwitchX mapping is increased crossbar power savings, owing to an increased proportion of HRS synapses, that is furthered with state-aware training. We obtain upto ~21-22% savings in crossbar power consumption for state-aware trained BNN mapped via SwitchX on 16x16 & 32x32 crossbars using the CIFAR-10 & CIFAR-100 datasets.
abstract_zh: 忆阻交叉开关可以有效地实现二值化神经网络（BNN），其中权重存储在突触的高电阻状态（HRS）和低电阻状态（LRS）中。我们提出将 BNN 权重映射到 ReRAM 交叉开关上的 SwitchX 映射，从而最大限度地减少交叉开关非理想性（导致计算精度下降）的影响。本质上，SwitchX 以这样的方式映射二进制权重，即交叉开关实例包含比 LRS 突触更多的 HRS。我们发现使用 SwitchX 映射到交叉开关的 BNN 比标准交叉开关映射的 BNN（基线）表现出更好的对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性。最后，我们将 SwitchX 与状态感知训练相结合（进一步提高权重映射过程中 HRS 状态的可行性），以提高 BNN 在硬件上的鲁棒性。我们发现，这种方法比对抗性训练（一种最先进的软件防御）能够更有效地防御对抗性攻击。我们使用基准数据集（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 TinyImagenet）在 VGG16 BNN 上进行实验，并使用快速梯度符号方法和投影梯度下降对抗攻击。我们证明，与传统 BNN 相比，SwitchX 与状态感知训练相结合，可以在干净准确度上提高约 35%，在对抗准确度上提高约 6-16%。此外，SwitchX 映射的一个重要副产品是由于 HRS 突触比例增加而增加了交叉开关功耗，而状态感知训练进一步促进了这一点。对于使用 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 数据集通过 SwitchX 在 16x16 和 32x32 交叉开关上映射的状态感知训练 BNN，我们获得了约 21-22% 的交叉开关功耗节省。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SwitchX映射方法，通过优化二值神经网络（BNN）在忆阻器交叉阵列上的权重分布，提升能效与对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器交叉阵列实现BNN时存在非理想特性导致精度下降和对抗攻击脆弱性，需设计更鲁棒的映射方案以提升硬件实现效果。
AI.method: SwitchX通过增加高阻态（HRS）突触比例映射BNN权重，并结合状态感知训练优化HRS可行性，降低计算误差与功耗。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100等数据集上，SwitchX结合状态感知训练使干净准确率提升35%，对抗准确率提升6-16%，16x16/32x32交叉阵列功耗降低21-22%。
AI.conclusion: SwitchX映射联合状态感知训练在硬件层面显著优于软件对抗训练，同时实现能效优化，为鲁棒BNN硬件部署提供新思路。

authors_text: Kavisha Vidanapathirana,Peyman Moghadam,Ben Harwood,Muming Zhao,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes
title: Locus: LiDAR-based Place Recognition using Spatiotemporal Higher-Order Pooling
title_zh: 轨迹：使用时空高阶池化的基于激光雷达的位置识别
abstract: Place Recognition enables the estimation of a globally consistent map and trajectory by providing non-local constraints in Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM). This paper presents Locus, a novel place recognition method using 3D LiDAR point clouds in large-scale environments. We propose a method for extracting and encoding topological and temporal information related to components in a scene and demonstrate how the inclusion of this auxiliary information in place description leads to more robust and discriminative scene representations. Second-order pooling along with a non-linear transform is used to aggregate these multi-level features to generate a fixed-length global descriptor, which is invariant to the permutation of input features. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI dataset. Furthermore, Locus is demonstrated to be robust across several challenging situations such as occlusions and viewpoint changes in 3D LiDAR point clouds. The open-source implementation is available at: https://github.com/csiro-robotics/locus .
summary: Place Recognition enables the estimation of a globally consistent map and trajectory by providing non-local constraints in Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM). This paper presents Locus, a novel place recognition method using 3D LiDAR point clouds in large-scale environments. We propose a method for extracting and encoding topological and temporal information related to components in a scene and demonstrate how the inclusion of this auxiliary information in place description leads to more robust and discriminative scene representations. Second-order pooling along with a non-linear transform is used to aggregate these multi-level features to generate a fixed-length global descriptor, which is invariant to the permutation of input features. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI dataset. Furthermore, Locus is demonstrated to be robust across several challenging situations such as occlusions and viewpoint changes in 3D LiDAR point clouds. The open-source implementation is available at: https://github.com/csiro-robotics/locus .
abstract_zh: 位置识别通过在同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 中提供非局部约束，能够估计全局一致的地图和轨迹。本文提出了 Locus，这是一种在大规模环境中使用 3D LiDAR 点云的新颖地点识别方法。我们提出了一种提取和编码与场景中的组件相关的拓扑和时间信息的方法，并演示了在位置描述中包含这种辅助信息如何导致更鲁棒和更有辨别力的场景表示。使用二阶池化和非线性变换来聚合这些多级特征以生成固定长度的全局描述符，该描述符对于输入特征的排列是不变的。所提出的方法优于 KITTI 数据集上最先进的方法。此外，Locus 经证明在多种具有挑战性的情况下（例如 3D LiDAR 点云中的遮挡和视点变化）具有鲁棒性。开源实现位于：https://github.com/csiro-robotics/locus。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D激光雷达点云的场景识别方法Locus，通过融合时空信息生成鲁棒的全局描述符，用于大规模环境下的同时定位与建图（SLAM）。
AI.motivation: 传统场景识别方法在复杂环境（如遮挡、视角变化）下表现不足，需通过引入拓扑与时间信息提升特征描述的区分度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用二阶池化与非线性变换聚合多级特征，生成对输入特征排列不变的固定长度全局描述符，结合时空高阶信息增强场景表征。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上优于现有方法，且在遮挡、视角变化等挑战性场景中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: Locus通过时空信息融合有效提升了激光雷达场景识别的准确性与鲁棒性，适用于大规模SLAM的实际应用。

search_text: Locus: LiDAR-based Place Recognition using Spatiotemporal Higher-Order Pooling 轨迹：使用时空高阶池化的基于激光雷达的位置识别 Place Recognition enables the estimation of a globally consistent map and trajectory by providing non-local constraints in Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (SLAM). This paper presents Locus, a novel place recognition method using 3D LiDAR point clouds in large-scale environments. We propose a method for extracting and encoding topological and temporal information related to components in a scene and demonstrate how the inclusion of this auxiliary information in place description leads to more robust and discriminative scene representations. Second-order pooling along with a non-linear transform is used to aggregate these multi-level features to generate a fixed-length global descriptor, which is invariant to the permutation of input features. The proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the KITTI dataset. Furthermore, Locus is demonstrated to be robust across several challenging situations such as occlusions and viewpoint changes in 3D LiDAR point clouds. The open-source implementation is available at: https://github.com/csiro-robotics/locus . 位置识别通过在同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 中提供非局部约束，能够估计全局一致的地图和轨迹。本文提出了 Locus，这是一种在大规模环境中使用 3D LiDAR 点云的新颖地点识别方法。我们提出了一种提取和编码与场景中的组件相关的拓扑和时间信息的方法，并演示了在位置描述中包含这种辅助信息如何导致更鲁棒和更有辨别力的场景表示。使用二阶池化和非线性变换来聚合这些多级特征以生成固定长度的全局描述符，该描述符对于输入特征的排列是不变的。所提出的方法优于 KITTI 数据集上最先进的方法。此外，Locus 经证明在多种具有挑战性的情况下（例如 3D LiDAR 点云中的遮挡和视点变化）具有鲁棒性。开源实现位于：https://github.com/csiro-robotics/locus。 本文提出了一种基于3D激光雷达点云的场景识别方法Locus，通过融合时空信息生成鲁棒的全局描述符，用于大规模环境下的同时定位与建图（SLAM）。 Kavisha Vidanapathirana,Peyman Moghadam,Ben Harwood,Muming Zhao,Sridha Sridharan,Clinton Fookes cs.RO

title: Blind signal decomposition of various word embeddings based on join and individual variance explained
title_zh: 基于连接和个体方差的各种词嵌入的盲信号分解解释
abstract: In recent years, natural language processing (NLP) has become one of the most important areas with various applications in human's life. As the most fundamental task, the field of word embedding still requires more attention and research. Currently, existing works about word embedding are focusing on proposing novel embedding algorithms and dimension reduction techniques on well-trained word embeddings. In this paper, we propose to use a novel joint signal separation method - JIVE to jointly decompose various trained word embeddings into joint and individual components. Through this decomposition framework, we can easily investigate the similarity and difference among different word embeddings. We conducted extensive empirical study on word2vec, FastText and GLoVE trained on different corpus and with different dimensions. We compared the performance of different decomposed components based on sentiment analysis on Twitter and Stanford sentiment treebank. We found that by mapping different word embeddings into the joint component, sentiment performance can be greatly improved for the original word embeddings with lower performance. Moreover, we found that by concatenating different components together, the same model can achieve better performance. These findings provide great insights into the word embeddings and our work offer a new of generating word embeddings by fusing.
summary: In recent years, natural language processing (NLP) has become one of the most important areas with various applications in human's life. As the most fundamental task, the field of word embedding still requires more attention and research. Currently, existing works about word embedding are focusing on proposing novel embedding algorithms and dimension reduction techniques on well-trained word embeddings. In this paper, we propose to use a novel joint signal separation method - JIVE to jointly decompose various trained word embeddings into joint and individual components. Through this decomposition framework, we can easily investigate the similarity and difference among different word embeddings. We conducted extensive empirical study on word2vec, FastText and GLoVE trained on different corpus and with different dimensions. We compared the performance of different decomposed components based on sentiment analysis on Twitter and Stanford sentiment treebank. We found that by mapping different word embeddings into the joint component, sentiment performance can be greatly improved for the original word embeddings with lower performance. Moreover, we found that by concatenating different components together, the same model can achieve better performance. These findings provide great insights into the word embeddings and our work offer a new of generating word embeddings by fusing.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自然语言处理（NLP）已成为人类生活中最重要的领域之一，有着广泛的应用。作为最基础的任务，词嵌入领域仍然需要更多的关注和研究。目前，有关词嵌入的现有工作重点是在训练有素的词嵌入上提出新颖的嵌入算法和降维技术。在本文中，我们提出使用一种新颖的联合信号分离方法 - JIVE 将各种经过训练的词嵌入联合分解为联合和单独的组件。通过这个分解框架，我们可以很容易地研究不同词嵌入之间的相似性和差异性。我们对在不同语料库和不同维度上训练的 word2vec、FastText 和 GLoVE 进行了广泛的实证研究。我们根据 Twitter 和斯坦福情感树库上的情感分析比较了不同分解组件的性能。我们发现，通过将不同的词嵌入映射到联合组件中，对于性能较低的原始词嵌入，可以大大提高情感性能。此外，我们发现通过将不同的组件连接在一起，同一模型可以获得更好的性能。这些发现为词嵌入提供了深刻的见解，我们的工作提供了一种通过融合生成词嵌入的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用JIVE方法对多种词嵌入进行联合与个体成分分解，以提升情感分析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有词嵌入研究侧重于算法创新和降维技术，缺乏对不同嵌入间相似性与差异性的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用联合信号分离方法JIVE，将word2vec、FastText和GLoVE等词嵌入分解为联合成分和个体成分，并通过情感分析验证效果。
AI.result: 联合成分映射显著提升低性能嵌入的情感分析效果，组合不同成分可使模型性能进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解词嵌入提供了新视角，并提出了通过融合生成更优嵌入的可行路径。

title: Soft-Robust Algorithms for Batch Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于批量强化学习的软鲁棒算法
abstract: In reinforcement learning, robust policies for high-stakes decision-making problems with limited data are usually computed by optimizing the percentile criterion, which minimizes the probability of a catastrophic failure. Unfortunately, such policies are typically overly conservative as the percentile criterion is non-convex, difficult to optimize, and ignores the mean performance. To overcome these shortcomings, we study the soft-robust criterion, which uses risk measures to balance the mean and percentile criterion better. In this paper, we establish the soft-robust criterion's fundamental properties, show that it is NP-hard to optimize, and propose and analyze two algorithms to approximately optimize it. Our theoretical analyses and empirical evaluations demonstrate that our algorithms compute much less conservative solutions than the existing approximate methods for optimizing the percentile-criterion.
summary: In reinforcement learning, robust policies for high-stakes decision-making problems with limited data are usually computed by optimizing the percentile criterion, which minimizes the probability of a catastrophic failure. Unfortunately, such policies are typically overly conservative as the percentile criterion is non-convex, difficult to optimize, and ignores the mean performance. To overcome these shortcomings, we study the soft-robust criterion, which uses risk measures to balance the mean and percentile criterion better. In this paper, we establish the soft-robust criterion's fundamental properties, show that it is NP-hard to optimize, and propose and analyze two algorithms to approximately optimize it. Our theoretical analyses and empirical evaluations demonstrate that our algorithms compute much less conservative solutions than the existing approximate methods for optimizing the percentile-criterion.
abstract_zh: 在强化学习中，通常通过优化百分位数标准来计算针对有限数据的高风险决策问题的稳健策略，从而最大限度地减少灾难性失败的可能性。不幸的是，这样的策略通常过于保守，因为百分位标准是非凸的，难以优化，并且忽略平均性能。为了克服这些缺点，我们研究了软鲁棒标准，它使用风险度量来更好地平衡均值和百分位标准。本文建立了软鲁棒准则的基本性质，证明了其优化是NP难的，并提出并分析了两种近似优化算法。我们的理论分析和实证评估表明，与现有的优化百分位数标准的近似方法相比，我们的算法计算出的保守解要少得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出软鲁棒准则及两种算法，用于改进批量强化学习中过于保守的鲁棒策略优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统百分位准则优化的鲁棒策略因非凸性、忽略平均性能而过于保守，需更平衡的优化方法。
AI.method: 基于风险度量建立软鲁棒准则，设计两种近似优化算法并进行理论分析与实验验证。
AI.result: 算法在保持鲁棒性的同时显著降低保守性，优于现有百分位准则优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 软鲁棒准则能有效平衡均值与风险，提出的算法为高风险决策问题提供更优解决方案。

To overcome these shortcomings, we study the soft-robust criterion, which uses risk measures to balance the mean and percentile criterion better. In this paper, we establish the soft-robust criterion's fundamental properties, show that it is NP-hard to optimize, and propose and analyze two algorithms to approximately optimize it. Our theoretical analyses and empirical evaluations demonstrate that our algorithms compute much less conservative solutions than the existing approximate methods for optimizing the percentile-criterion. 在强化学习中，通常通过优化百分位数标准来计算针对有限数据的高风险决策问题的稳健策略，从而最大限度地减少灾难性失败的可能性。不幸的是，这样的策略通常过于保守，因为百分位标准是非凸的，难以优化，并且忽略平均性能。为了克服这些缺点，我们研究了软鲁棒标准，它使用风险度量来更好地平衡均值和百分位标准。本文建立了软鲁棒准则的基本性质，证明了其优化是NP难的，并提出并分析了两种近似优化算法。我们的理论分析和实证评估表明，与现有的优化百分位数标准的近似方法相比，我们的算法计算出的保守解要少得多。 本文提出软鲁棒准则及两种算法，用于改进批量强化学习中过于保守的鲁棒策略优化问题。 Elita A. Lobo,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Marek Petrik cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Aayush Prakash,Shoubhik Debnath,Jean-Francois Lafleche,Eric Cameracci,Gavriel State,Stan Birchfield,Marc T. Law
title: Self-Supervised Real-to-Sim Scene Generation
title_zh: 自监督实景到模拟场景生成
abstract: Synthetic data is emerging as a promising solution to the scalability issue of supervised deep learning, especially when real data are difficult to acquire or hard to annotate. Synthetic data generation, however, can itself be prohibitively expensive when domain experts have to manually and painstakingly oversee the process. Moreover, neural networks trained on synthetic data often do not perform well on real data because of the domain gap. To solve these challenges, we propose Sim2SG, a self-supervised automatic scene generation technique for matching the distribution of real data. Importantly, Sim2SG does not require supervision from the real-world dataset, thus making it applicable in situations for which such annotations are difficult to obtain. Sim2SG is designed to bridge both the content and appearance gaps, by matching the content of real data, and by matching the features in the source and target domains. We select scene graph (SG) generation as the downstream task, due to the limited availability of labeled datasets. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements over leading baselines in reducing the domain gap both qualitatively and quantitatively, on several synthetic datasets as well as the real-world KITTI dataset.
summary: Synthetic data is emerging as a promising solution to the scalability issue of supervised deep learning, especially when real data are difficult to acquire or hard to annotate. Synthetic data generation, however, can itself be prohibitively expensive when domain experts have to manually and painstakingly oversee the process. Moreover, neural networks trained on synthetic data often do not perform well on real data because of the domain gap. To solve these challenges, we propose Sim2SG, a self-supervised automatic scene generation technique for matching the distribution of real data. Importantly, Sim2SG does not require supervision from the real-world dataset, thus making it applicable in situations for which such annotations are difficult to obtain. Sim2SG is designed to bridge both the content and appearance gaps, by matching the content of real data, and by matching the features in the source and target domains. We select scene graph (SG) generation as the downstream task, due to the limited availability of labeled datasets. Experiments demonstrate significant improvements over leading baselines in reducing the domain gap both qualitatively and quantitatively, on several synthetic datasets as well as the real-world KITTI dataset.
abstract_zh: 合成数据正在成为解决监督式深度学习可扩展性问题的一种有前途的解决方案，特别是当真实数据难以获取或难以注释时。然而，当领域专家必须手动且艰苦地监督该过程时，合成数据生成本身就可能非常昂贵。此外，由于域差距，在合成数据上训练的神经网络通常在真实数据上表现不佳。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了 Sim2SG，一种用于匹配真实数据分布的自监督自动场景生成技术。重要的是，Sim2SG 不需要来自现实世界数据集的监督，因此适用于难以获得此类注释的情况。 Sim2SG 旨在通过匹配真实数据的内容以及匹配源域和目标域中的特征来弥合内容和外观差距。由于标记数据集的可用性有限，我们选择场景图（SG）生成作为下游任务。实验表明，在几个合成数据集以及现实世界的 KITTI 数据集上，在定性和定量上缩小领域差距方面，与领先基线相比有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sim2SG方法，通过自监督学习实现从真实数据到合成数据的场景生成，以缩小领域差距。
AI.motivation: 合成数据虽能解决监督学习的可扩展性问题，但人工生成成本高且存在领域差距，导致模型在真实数据上表现不佳。
AI.method: Sim2SG采用自监督学习框架，无需真实数据标注，通过匹配内容和跨领域特征来同时缩小内容和外观差距。
AI.result: 在多个合成数据集和真实世界KITTI数据集上，Sim2SG在定性和定量指标上均显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Sim2SG有效解决了合成数据与真实数据间的领域差距问题，为无监督场景生成提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Junfan Lin,Zhongzhan Huang,Keze Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Weiwei Chen,Liang Lin
title: Continuous Transition: Improving Sample Efficiency for Continuous Control Problems via MixUp
title_zh: 连续过渡：通过 MixUp 提高连续控制问题的样本效率
abstract: Although deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been successfully applied to a variety of robotic control tasks, it's still challenging to apply it to real-world tasks, due to the poor sample efficiency. Attempting to overcome this shortcoming, several works focus on reusing the collected trajectory data during the training by decomposing them into a set of policy-irrelevant discrete transitions. However, their improvements are somewhat marginal since i) the amount of the transitions is usually small, and ii) the value assignment only happens in the joint states. To address these issues, this paper introduces a concise yet powerful method to construct Continuous Transition, which exploits the trajectory information by exploiting the potential transitions along the trajectory. Specifically, we propose to synthesize new transitions for training by linearly interpolating the consecutive transitions. To keep the constructed transitions authentic, we also develop a discriminator to guide the construction process automatically. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves a significant improvement in sample efficiency on various complex continuous robotic control problems in MuJoCo and outperforms the advanced model-based / model-free RL methods. The source code is available.
summary: Although deep reinforcement learning (RL) has been successfully applied to a variety of robotic control tasks, it's still challenging to apply it to real-world tasks, due to the poor sample efficiency. Attempting to overcome this shortcoming, several works focus on reusing the collected trajectory data during the training by decomposing them into a set of policy-irrelevant discrete transitions. However, their improvements are somewhat marginal since i) the amount of the transitions is usually small, and ii) the value assignment only happens in the joint states. To address these issues, this paper introduces a concise yet powerful method to construct Continuous Transition, which exploits the trajectory information by exploiting the potential transitions along the trajectory. Specifically, we propose to synthesize new transitions for training by linearly interpolating the consecutive transitions. To keep the constructed transitions authentic, we also develop a discriminator to guide the construction process automatically. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves a significant improvement in sample efficiency on various complex continuous robotic control problems in MuJoCo and outperforms the advanced model-based / model-free RL methods. The source code is available.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度强化学习（RL）已成功应用于各种机器人控制任务，但由于样本效率较差，将其应用于现实世界任务仍然具有挑战性。为了克服这个缺点，一些工作侧重于在训练期间重用收集的轨迹数据，将它们分解为一组与政策无关的离散转换。然而，它们的改进有些微不足道，因为 i）转换的数量通常很小，并且 ii）值分配仅发生在联合状态中。为了解决这些问题，本文介绍了一种简洁而强大的方法来构造连续过渡，该方法通过利用沿轨迹的潜在过渡来利用轨迹信息。具体来说，我们建议通过线性插值连续的转换来合成新的转换以进行训练。为了保持构建的转换的真实性，我们还开发了一个鉴别器来自动指导构建过程。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在 MuJoCo 中各种复杂的连续机器人控制问题上实现了样本效率的显着提高，并且优于先进的基于模型/无模型的 RL 方法。源代码可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Continuous Transition的方法，通过线性插值和判别器指导提升连续控制问题的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过分解轨迹生成离散转移改进样本效率，但存在转移数量少且价值分配局限于联合状态的问题。
AI.method: 利用轨迹中的潜在连续转移，通过线性插值合成新转移，并引入判别器自动指导构造过程以保证真实性。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo多个复杂连续控制任务中显著提升样本效率，优于先进模型驱动/无模型强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 连续转移方法有效利用轨迹信息，为连续控制问题的样本效率提升提供了新思路。

title: Value Function Based Performance Optimization of Deep Learning Workloads
title_zh: 基于价值函数的深度学习工作负载性能优化
abstract: As machine learning techniques become ubiquitous, the efficiency of neural network implementations is becoming correspondingly paramount. Frameworks, such as Halide and TVM, separate out the algorithmic representation of the network from the schedule that determines its implementation. Finding good schedules, however, remains extremely challenging. We model this scheduling problem as a sequence of optimization choices, and present a new technique to accurately predict the expected performance of a partial schedule. By leveraging these predictions we can make these optimization decisions greedily and rapidly identify an efficient schedule. This enables us to find schedules that improve the throughput of deep neural networks by 2.6x over Halide and 1.5x over TVM. Moreover, our technique is two to three orders of magnitude faster than that of these tools, and completes in seconds instead of hours.
summary: As machine learning techniques become ubiquitous, the efficiency of neural network implementations is becoming correspondingly paramount. Frameworks, such as Halide and TVM, separate out the algorithmic representation of the network from the schedule that determines its implementation. Finding good schedules, however, remains extremely challenging. We model this scheduling problem as a sequence of optimization choices, and present a new technique to accurately predict the expected performance of a partial schedule. By leveraging these predictions we can make these optimization decisions greedily and rapidly identify an efficient schedule. This enables us to find schedules that improve the throughput of deep neural networks by 2.6x over Halide and 1.5x over TVM. Moreover, our technique is two to three orders of magnitude faster than that of these tools, and completes in seconds instead of hours.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习技术变得无处不在，神经网络实现的效率也相应变得至关重要。 Halide 和 TVM 等框架将网络的算法表示与决定其实现的时间表分开。然而，找到好的时间表仍然极具挑战性。我们将此调度问题建模为一系列优化选择，并提出了一种新技术来准确预测部分调度的预期性能。通过利用这些预测，我们可以贪婪地做出这些优化决策，并快速确定有效的时间表。这使我们能够找到将深度神经网络的吞吐量比 Halide 提高 2.6 倍、比 TVM 提高 1.5 倍的调度方案。此外，我们的技术比这些工具快两到三个数量级，并且在几秒钟而不是几小时内完成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于价值函数的深度学习工作负载性能优化方法，通过高效调度策略提升神经网络执行效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习技术普及，神经网络实现效率变得至关重要，但现有框架（如Halide、TVM）在调度优化上仍面临效率与效果的挑战。
AI.method: 将调度问题建模为优化选择序列，利用价值函数预测部分调度的性能，通过贪心策略快速决策生成高效调度方案。
AI.result: 在保持调度质量的同时，吞吐量较Halide提升2.6倍、较TVM提升1.5倍，且运行速度比现有工具快2-3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过价值函数预测与贪心决策机制，有效解决了深度学习工作负载的调度优化难题，显著提升了执行效率。

search_text: Value Function Based Performance Optimization of Deep Learning Workloads 基于价值函数的深度学习工作负载性能优化 As machine learning techniques become ubiquitous, the efficiency of neural network implementations is becoming correspondingly paramount. Frameworks, such as Halide and TVM, separate out the algorithmic representation of the network from the schedule that determines its implementation. Finding good schedules, however, remains extremely challenging. We model this scheduling problem as a sequence of optimization choices, and present a new technique to accurately predict the expected performance of a partial schedule. By leveraging these predictions we can make these optimization decisions greedily and rapidly identify an efficient schedule. This enables us to find schedules that improve the throughput of deep neural networks by 2.6x over Halide and 1.5x over TVM. Moreover, our technique is two to three orders of magnitude faster than that of these tools, and completes in seconds instead of hours. 随着机器学习技术变得无处不在，神经网络实现的效率也相应变得至关重要。 Halide 和 TVM 等框架将网络的算法表示与决定其实现的时间表分开。然而，找到好的时间表仍然极具挑战性。我们将此调度问题建模为一系列优化选择，并提出了一种新技术来准确预测部分调度的预期性能。通过利用这些预测，我们可以贪婪地做出这些优化决策，并快速确定有效的时间表。这使我们能够找到将深度神经网络的吞吐量比 Halide 提高 2.6 倍、比 TVM 提高 1.5 倍的调度方案。此外，我们的技术比这些工具快两到三个数量级，并且在几秒钟而不是几小时内完成。 本文提出基于价值函数的深度学习工作负载性能优化方法，通过高效调度策略提升神经网络执行效率。 Benoit Steiner,Chris Cummins,Horace He,Hugh Leather cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Multi-scale Adaptive Task Attention Network for Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本学习的多尺度自适应任务注意网络
abstract: The goal of few-shot learning is to classify unseen categories with few labeled samples. Recently, the low-level information metric-learning based methods have achieved satisfying performance, since local representations (LRs) are more consistent between seen and unseen classes. However, most of these methods deal with each category in the support set independently, which is not sufficient to measure the relation between features, especially in a certain task. Moreover, the low-level information-based metric learning method suffers when dominant objects of different scales exist in a complex background. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Multi-scale Adaptive Task Attention Network (MATANet) for few-shot learning. Specifically, we first use a multi-scale feature generator to generate multiple features at different scales. Then, an adaptive task attention module is proposed to select the most important LRs among the entire task. Afterwards, a similarity-to-class module and a fusion layer are utilized to calculate a joint multi-scale similarity between the query image and the support set. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks clearly show the effectiveness of the proposed MATANet compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The goal of few-shot learning is to classify unseen categories with few labeled samples. Recently, the low-level information metric-learning based methods have achieved satisfying performance, since local representations (LRs) are more consistent between seen and unseen classes. However, most of these methods deal with each category in the support set independently, which is not sufficient to measure the relation between features, especially in a certain task. Moreover, the low-level information-based metric learning method suffers when dominant objects of different scales exist in a complex background. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Multi-scale Adaptive Task Attention Network (MATANet) for few-shot learning. Specifically, we first use a multi-scale feature generator to generate multiple features at different scales. Then, an adaptive task attention module is proposed to select the most important LRs among the entire task. Afterwards, a similarity-to-class module and a fusion layer are utilized to calculate a joint multi-scale similarity between the query image and the support set. Extensive experiments on popular benchmarks clearly show the effectiveness of the proposed MATANet compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习的目标是用很少的标记样本对看不见的类别进行分类。最近，基于低级信息度量学习的方法已经取得了令人满意的性能，因为局部表示（LR）在可见类和不可见类之间更加一致。然而，这些方法大多数都是独立处理支持集中的每个类别，这不足以衡量特征之间的关系，特别是在某个任务中。此外，当复杂背景中存在不同尺度的主要对象时，基于低级信息的度量学习方法会受到影响。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种用于小样本学习的新型多尺度自适应任务注意网络（MATANet）。具体来说，我们首先使用多尺度特征生成器来生成不同尺度的多个特征。然后，提出了一个自适应任务注意模块来选择整个任务中最重要的LR。然后，利用类相似度模块和融合层来计算查询图像和支持集之间的联合多尺度相似度。对流行基准的大量实验清楚地表明了所提出的 MATANet 与最先进方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度自适应任务注意力网络（MATANet），用于解决少样本学习中类别关系建模不足和尺度差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于低层信息度量学习的方法在处理复杂背景下的多尺度目标时表现不足，且未能充分建模任务内类别间的特征关系。
AI.method: 通过多尺度特征生成器提取不同尺度特征，结合自适应任务注意力模块筛选关键局部表示，并利用相似度计算模块和融合层实现多尺度联合相似度计算。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，MATANet相较最先进方法展现出更优的少样本分类性能。
AI.conclusion: MATANet通过多尺度特征建模和任务注意力机制有效解决了少样本学习中的尺度差异与关系建模难题。

authors_text: Yixiong Zou,Shanghang Zhang,Guangyao Chen,Yonghong Tian,Kurt Keutzer,José M. F. Moura
title: Annotation-Efficient Untrimmed Video Action Recognition
title_zh: 注释高效的未修剪视频动作识别
abstract: Deep learning has achieved great success in recognizing video actions, but the collection and annotation of training data are still quite laborious, which mainly lies in two aspects: (1) the amount of required annotated data is large; (2) temporally annotating the location of each action is time-consuming. Works such as few-shot learning or untrimmed video recognition have been proposed to handle either one aspect or the other. However, very few existing works can handle both issues simultaneously. In this paper, we target a new problem, Annotation-Efficient Video Recognition, to reduce the requirement of annotations for both large amount of samples and the action location. Such problem is challenging due to two aspects: (1) the untrimmed videos only have weak supervision; (2) video segments not relevant to current actions of interests (background, BG) could contain actions of interests (foreground, FG) in novel classes, which is a widely existing phenomenon but has rarely been studied in few-shot untrimmed video recognition. To achieve this goal, by analyzing the property of BG, we categorize BG into informative BG (IBG) and non-informative BG (NBG), and we propose (1) an open-set detection based method to find the NBG and FG, (2) a contrastive learning method to learn IBG and distinguish NBG in a self-supervised way, and (3) a self-weighting mechanism for the better distinguishing of IBG and FG. Extensive experiments on ActivityNet v1.2 and ActivityNet v1.3 verify the rationale and effectiveness of the proposed methods.
summary: Deep learning has achieved great success in recognizing video actions, but the collection and annotation of training data are still quite laborious, which mainly lies in two aspects: (1) the amount of required annotated data is large; (2) temporally annotating the location of each action is time-consuming. Works such as few-shot learning or untrimmed video recognition have been proposed to handle either one aspect or the other. However, very few existing works can handle both issues simultaneously. In this paper, we target a new problem, Annotation-Efficient Video Recognition, to reduce the requirement of annotations for both large amount of samples and the action location. Such problem is challenging due to two aspects: (1) the untrimmed videos only have weak supervision; (2) video segments not relevant to current actions of interests (background, BG) could contain actions of interests (foreground, FG) in novel classes, which is a widely existing phenomenon but has rarely been studied in few-shot untrimmed video recognition. To achieve this goal, by analyzing the property of BG, we categorize BG into informative BG (IBG) and non-informative BG (NBG), and we propose (1) an open-set detection based method to find the NBG and FG, (2) a contrastive learning method to learn IBG and distinguish NBG in a self-supervised way, and (3) a self-weighting mechanism for the better distinguishing of IBG and FG. Extensive experiments on ActivityNet v1.2 and ActivityNet v1.3 verify the rationale and effectiveness of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在识别视频动作方面取得了巨大成功，但训练数据的收集和标注仍然相当费力，主要表现在两个方面：（1）所需标注数据量大； (2) 临时标注每个动作的位置非常耗时。诸如少样本学习或未经修剪的视频识别之类的工作已经被提出来处理一个方面或另一个方面。然而，很少有现有的作品能够同时处理这两个问题。在本文中，我们针对一个新问题“高效注释视频识别”，以减少对大量样本和动作位置的注释的要求。这个问题由于两个方面而具有挑战性：（1）未修剪的视频只有弱监督； （2）与当前兴趣动作（背景，BG）不相关的视频片段可能包含新颖类中的兴趣动作（前景，FG），这是一种广泛存在的现象，但在少样本未修剪视频识别中很少被研究。为了实现这一目标，通过分析BG的属性，我们将BG分为信息性BG（IBG）和非信息性BG（NBG），并提出（1）一种基于开放集检测的方法来查找NBG和FG，（2）一种以自监督方式学习IBG并区分NBG的对比学习方法，以及（3）一种用于更好地区分IBG和FG的自加权机制。 ActivityNet v1.2 和 ActivityNet v1.3 上的大量实验验证了所提出方法的基本原理和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效标注的未剪辑视频动作识别方法，旨在减少大规模样本和动作定位标注的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅解决标注数据量大或动作时间定位耗时的问题之一，而未同时处理两者，且未充分研究背景视频中可能包含新颖动作类别的挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析背景（BG）特性，将BG分为信息性背景（IBG）和非信息性背景（NBG），提出基于开放集检测的NBG与前景（FG）识别方法、对比学习的自监督IBG/NBG区分方法及自加权机制。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet v1.2和v1.3数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性，证明其能有效减少标注需求并提升识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过区分背景与前景并利用自监督学习，成功解决了未剪辑视频动作识别中的标注效率问题。

Such problem is challenging due to two aspects: (1) the untrimmed videos only have weak supervision; (2) video segments not relevant to current actions of interests (background, BG) could contain actions of interests (foreground, FG) in novel classes, which is a widely existing phenomenon but has rarely been studied in few-shot untrimmed video recognition. Extensive experiments on ActivityNet v1.2 and ActivityNet v1.3 verify the rationale and effectiveness of the proposed methods. 深度学习在识别视频动作方面取得了巨大成功，但训练数据的收集和标注仍然相当费力，主要表现在两个方面：（1）所需标注数据量大； (2) 临时标注每个动作的位置非常耗时。诸如少样本学习或未经修剪的视频识别之类的工作已经被提出来处理一个方面或另一个方面。然而，很少有现有的作品能够同时处理这两个问题。在本文中，我们针对一个新问题“高效注释视频识别”，以减少对大量样本和动作位置的注释的要求。这个问题由于两个方面而具有挑战性：（1）未修剪的视频只有弱监督； （2）与当前兴趣动作（背景，BG）不相关的视频片段可能包含新颖类中的兴趣动作（前景，FG），这是一种广泛存在的现象，但在少样本未修剪视频识别中很少被研究。为了实现这一目标，通过分析BG的属性，我们将BG分为信息性BG（IBG）和非信息性BG（NBG），并提出（1）一种基于开放集检测的方法来查找NBG和FG，（2）一种以自监督方式学习IBG并区分NBG的对比学习方法，以及（3）一种用于更好地区分IBG和FG的自加权机制。 ActivityNet v1.2 和 ActivityNet v1.3 上的大量实验验证了所提出方法的基本原理和有效性。 本文提出了一种高效标注的未剪辑视频动作识别方法，旨在减少大规模样本和动作定位标注的需求。 Yixiong Zou,Shanghang Zhang,Guangyao Chen,Yonghong Tian,Kurt Keutzer,José M. F. Moura cs.CV

authors_text: Hubert Lin,Mitchell van Zuijlen,Sylvia C. Pont,Maarten W. A. Wijntjes,Kavita Bala
title: What Can Style Transfer and Paintings Do For Model Robustness?
title_zh: 风格迁移和绘画对模型稳健性有何作用？
abstract: A common strategy for improving model robustness is through data augmentations. Data augmentations encourage models to learn desired invariances, such as invariance to horizontal flipping or small changes in color. Recent work has shown that arbitrary style transfer can be used as a form of data augmentation to encourage invariance to textures by creating painting-like images from photographs. However, a stylized photograph is not quite the same as an artist-created painting. Artists depict perceptually meaningful cues in paintings so that humans can recognize salient components in scenes, an emphasis which is not enforced in style transfer. Therefore, we study how style transfer and paintings differ in their impact on model robustness. First, we investigate the role of paintings as style images for stylization-based data augmentation. We find that style transfer functions well even without paintings as style images. Second, we show that learning from paintings as a form of perceptual data augmentation can improve model robustness. Finally, we investigate the invariances learned from stylization and from paintings, and show that models learn different invariances from these differing forms of data. Our results provide insights into how stylization improves model robustness, and provide evidence that artist-created paintings can be a valuable source of data for model robustness.
summary: A common strategy for improving model robustness is through data augmentations. Data augmentations encourage models to learn desired invariances, such as invariance to horizontal flipping or small changes in color. Recent work has shown that arbitrary style transfer can be used as a form of data augmentation to encourage invariance to textures by creating painting-like images from photographs. However, a stylized photograph is not quite the same as an artist-created painting. Artists depict perceptually meaningful cues in paintings so that humans can recognize salient components in scenes, an emphasis which is not enforced in style transfer. Therefore, we study how style transfer and paintings differ in their impact on model robustness. First, we investigate the role of paintings as style images for stylization-based data augmentation. We find that style transfer functions well even without paintings as style images. Second, we show that learning from paintings as a form of perceptual data augmentation can improve model robustness. Finally, we investigate the invariances learned from stylization and from paintings, and show that models learn different invariances from these differing forms of data. Our results provide insights into how stylization improves model robustness, and provide evidence that artist-created paintings can be a valuable source of data for model robustness.
abstract_zh: 提高模型稳健性的常见策略是通过数据增强。数据增强鼓励模型学习所需的不变性，例如水平翻转或颜色微小变化的不变性。最近的工作表明，任意风格迁移可以用作数据增强的一种形式，通过从照片创建类似绘画的图像来鼓励纹理的不变性。然而，风格化的照片与艺术家创作的绘画并不完全相同。艺术家在绘画中描绘出感知上有意义的线索，以便人类能够识别场景中的显着组成部分，这种强调在风格转移中并不强制执行。因此，我们研究风格迁移和绘画对模型鲁棒性的影响有何不同。首先，我们研究绘画作为基于风格化的数据增强的风格图像的作用。我们发现，即使没有绘画作为风格图像，风格迁移也能很好地发挥作用。其次，我们证明从绘画中学习作为感知数据增强的一种形式可以提高模型的鲁棒性。最后，我们研究了从风格化和绘画中学到的不变性，并表明模型从这些不同形式的数据中学习了不同的不变性。我们的结果提供了关于风格化如何提高模型稳健性的见解，并提供了证据表明艺术家创作的绘画可以成为模型稳健性的宝贵数据来源。

AI.tldr: 本文研究风格迁移和绘画在提升模型鲁棒性中的作用，比较两者作为数据增强方法的效果差异。
AI.motivation: 数据增强是提升模型鲁棒性的常用策略，但传统风格迁移生成的图像与艺术家创作的绘画在感知线索上存在差异，可能影响模型学习的不变性。
AI.method: 通过实验对比分析风格迁移（使用绘画和非绘画风格图像）与直接使用绘画作为感知数据增强的方法，研究其对模型鲁棒性的影响及学习到的不变性差异。
AI.result: 风格迁移在无绘画风格图像时仍有效，但使用绘画进行数据增强能进一步提升鲁棒性；两种方法使模型学习到不同的不变性。
AI.conclusion: 艺术家创作的绘画能提供独特的感知线索，作为数据增强手段可有效提升模型鲁棒性，且与风格迁移的学习机制存在本质差异。

authors_text: Eduardo C. Garrido-Merchán,Martin Molina,Francisco M. Mendoza
title: An Artificial Consciousness Model and its relations with Philosophy of Mind
title_zh: 人工意识模型及其与心灵哲学的关系
abstract: This work seeks to study the beneficial properties that an autonomous agent can obtain by implementing a cognitive architecture similar to the one of conscious beings. Along this document, a conscious model of autonomous agent based in a global workspace architecture is presented. We describe how this agent is viewed from different perspectives of philosophy of mind, being inspired by their ideas. The goal of this model is to create autonomous agents able to navigate within an environment composed of multiple independent magnitudes, adapting to its surroundings in order to find the best possible position in base of its inner preferences. The purpose of the model is to test the effectiveness of many cognitive mechanisms that are incorporated, such as an attention mechanism for magnitude selection, pos-session of inner feelings and preferences, usage of a memory system to storage beliefs and past experiences, and incorporating a global workspace which controls and integrates information processed by all the subsystem of the model. We show in a large experiment set how an autonomous agent can benefit from having a cognitive architecture such as the one described.
summary: This work seeks to study the beneficial properties that an autonomous agent can obtain by implementing a cognitive architecture similar to the one of conscious beings. Along this document, a conscious model of autonomous agent based in a global workspace architecture is presented. We describe how this agent is viewed from different perspectives of philosophy of mind, being inspired by their ideas. The goal of this model is to create autonomous agents able to navigate within an environment composed of multiple independent magnitudes, adapting to its surroundings in order to find the best possible position in base of its inner preferences. The purpose of the model is to test the effectiveness of many cognitive mechanisms that are incorporated, such as an attention mechanism for magnitude selection, pos-session of inner feelings and preferences, usage of a memory system to storage beliefs and past experiences, and incorporating a global workspace which controls and integrates information processed by all the subsystem of the model. We show in a large experiment set how an autonomous agent can benefit from having a cognitive architecture such as the one described.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在研究自主代理通过实施类似于有意识生物的认知架构可以获得的有益特性。在本文档中，提出了基于全局工作空间架构的自主代理的有意识模型。我们描述了如何从心灵哲学的不同角度看待这个代理人，并受到他们的想法的启发。该模型的目标是创建能够在由多个独立大小组成的环境中导航的自主代理，适应周围环境，以便根据其内部偏好找到最佳可能位置。该模型的目的是测试所合并的许多认知机制的有效性，例如用于幅度选择的注意机制、内心感受和偏好的拥有、使用记忆系统来存储信念和过去的经验，以及合并控制和集成模型所有子系统处理的信息的全局工作空间。我们在一个大型实验集中展示了自主代理如何从具有如上所述的认知架构中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局工作空间架构的人工意识模型，旨在使自主代理在复杂环境中通过模拟意识机制实现自适应导航。
AI.motivation: 通过模拟人类意识的认知架构，提升自主代理在多维度环境中的适应能力与决策效率，验证意识相关认知机制的有效性。
AI.method: 构建包含注意机制、情感偏好系统、记忆存储及全局工作空间的混合架构，通过大规模实验验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型能有效整合多源信息，基于内在偏好优化环境适应性，验证了意识机制对自主代理性能的提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 人工意识模型可作为研究意识本质的工具，同时为开发具备类人认知能力的自主系统提供可行架构方案。
