authors_text: Gabriel S. Gusmão,Adhika P. Retnanto,Shashwati C. da Cunha,Andrew J. Medford
title: Kinetics-Informed Neural Networks
title_zh: 动力学信息神经网络
abstract: Chemical kinetics and reaction engineering consists of the phenomenological framework for the disentanglement of reaction mechanisms, optimization of reaction performance and the rational design of chemical processes. Here, we utilize feed-forward artificial neural networks as basis functions to solve ordinary differential equations (ODEs) constrained by differential algebraic equations (DAEs) that describe microkinetic models (MKMs). We present an algebraic framework for the mathematical description and classification of reaction networks, types of elementary reaction, and chemical species. Under this framework, we demonstrate that the simultaneous training of neural nets and kinetic model parameters in a regularized multi-objective optimization setting leads to the solution of the inverse problem through the estimation of kinetic parameters from synthetic experimental data. We analyze a set of scenarios to establish the extent to which kinetic parameters can be retrieved from transient kinetic data, and assess the robustness of the methodology with respect to statistical noise. This approach to inverse kinetic ODEs can assist in the elucidation of reaction mechanisms based on transient data.
summary: Chemical kinetics and reaction engineering consists of the phenomenological framework for the disentanglement of reaction mechanisms, optimization of reaction performance and the rational design of chemical processes. Here, we utilize feed-forward artificial neural networks as basis functions to solve ordinary differential equations (ODEs) constrained by differential algebraic equations (DAEs) that describe microkinetic models (MKMs). We present an algebraic framework for the mathematical description and classification of reaction networks, types of elementary reaction, and chemical species. Under this framework, we demonstrate that the simultaneous training of neural nets and kinetic model parameters in a regularized multi-objective optimization setting leads to the solution of the inverse problem through the estimation of kinetic parameters from synthetic experimental data. We analyze a set of scenarios to establish the extent to which kinetic parameters can be retrieved from transient kinetic data, and assess the robustness of the methodology with respect to statistical noise. This approach to inverse kinetic ODEs can assist in the elucidation of reaction mechanisms based on transient data.
abstract_zh: 化学动力学和反应工程由用于理清反应机理、优化反应性能和合理设计化学过程的现象学框架组成。在这里，我们利用前馈人工神经网络作为基函数来求解受描述微运动模型 (MKM) 的微分代数方程 (DAE) 约束的常微分方程 (ODE)。我们提出了一个代数框架，用于反应网络、基本反应类型和化学物质的数学描述和分类。在此框架下，我们证明了在正则化多目标优化设置中同时训练神经网络和动力学模型参数可以通过合成实验数据估计动力学参数来解决反演问题。我们分析了一组场景，以确定从瞬态动力学数据中检索动力学参数的程度，并评估该方法相对于统计噪声的稳健性。这种逆动力学 ODE 方法可以帮助阐明基于瞬态数据的反应机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合神经网络与微动力学模型的框架，用于从瞬态动力学数据中反演反应机理参数。
AI.motivation: 化学动力学模型的参数反演对反应机制解析和化工过程优化至关重要，但传统方法面临高维非线性问题和实验数据噪声的挑战。
AI.method: 采用前馈神经网络作为基函数，构建受微分代数方程约束的常微分方程求解框架，并通过正则化多目标优化联合训练神经网络与动力学参数。
AI.result: 成功从合成实验数据中恢复了动力学参数，验证了方法在不同噪声水平下的鲁棒性，并分析了参数可辨识性边界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为基于瞬态数据的反应机理解析提供了新工具，通过神经网络与动力学模型的协同优化提升了参数反演的准确性与可靠性。

search_text: Kinetics-Informed Neural Networks 动力学信息神经网络 Chemical kinetics and reaction engineering consists of the phenomenological framework for the disentanglement of reaction mechanisms, optimization of reaction performance and the rational design of chemical processes. Here, we utilize feed-forward artificial neural networks as basis functions to solve ordinary differential equations (ODEs) constrained by differential algebraic equations (DAEs) that describe microkinetic models (MKMs). We present an algebraic framework for the mathematical description and classification of reaction networks, types of elementary reaction, and chemical species. Under this framework, we demonstrate that the simultaneous training of neural nets and kinetic model parameters in a regularized multi-objective optimization setting leads to the solution of the inverse problem through the estimation of kinetic parameters from synthetic experimental data. We analyze a set of scenarios to establish the extent to which kinetic parameters can be retrieved from transient kinetic data, and assess the robustness of the methodology with respect to statistical noise. This approach to inverse kinetic ODEs can assist in the elucidation of reaction mechanisms based on transient data. 化学动力学和反应工程由用于理清反应机理、优化反应性能和合理设计化学过程的现象学框架组成。在这里，我们利用前馈人工神经网络作为基函数来求解受描述微运动模型 (MKM) 的微分代数方程 (DAE) 约束的常微分方程 (ODE)。我们提出了一个代数框架，用于反应网络、基本反应类型和化学物质的数学描述和分类。在此框架下，我们证明了在正则化多目标优化设置中同时训练神经网络和动力学模型参数可以通过合成实验数据估计动力学参数来解决反演问题。我们分析了一组场景，以确定从瞬态动力学数据中检索动力学参数的程度，并评估该方法相对于统计噪声的稳健性。这种逆动力学 ODE 方法可以帮助阐明基于瞬态数据的反应机制。 本文提出了一种结合神经网络与微动力学模型的框架，用于从瞬态动力学数据中反演反应机理参数。 Gabriel S. Gusmão,Adhika P. Retnanto,Shashwati C. da Cunha,Andrew J. Medford cs.LG,cs.AI,math.DS,math.NA

title: Conditional Link Prediction of Category-Implicit Keypoint Detection
title_zh: 类别隐式关键点检测的条件链接预测
abstract: Keypoints of objects reflect their concise abstractions, while the corresponding connection links (CL) build the skeleton by detecting the intrinsic relations between keypoints. Existing approaches are typically computationally-intensive, inapplicable for instances belonging to multiple classes, and/or infeasible to simultaneously encode connection information. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose an end-to-end category-implicit Keypoint and Link Prediction Network (KLPNet), which is the first approach for simultaneous semantic keypoint detection (for multi-class instances) and CL rejuvenation. In our KLPNet, a novel Conditional Link Prediction Graph is proposed for link prediction among keypoints that are contingent on a predefined category. Furthermore, a Cross-stage Keypoint Localization Module (CKLM) is introduced to explore feature aggregation for coarse-to-fine keypoint localization. Comprehensive experiments conducted on three publicly available benchmarks demonstrate that our KLPNet consistently outperforms all other state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, the experimental results of CL prediction also show the effectiveness of our KLPNet with respect to occlusion problems.
summary: Keypoints of objects reflect their concise abstractions, while the corresponding connection links (CL) build the skeleton by detecting the intrinsic relations between keypoints. Existing approaches are typically computationally-intensive, inapplicable for instances belonging to multiple classes, and/or infeasible to simultaneously encode connection information. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose an end-to-end category-implicit Keypoint and Link Prediction Network (KLPNet), which is the first approach for simultaneous semantic keypoint detection (for multi-class instances) and CL rejuvenation. In our KLPNet, a novel Conditional Link Prediction Graph is proposed for link prediction among keypoints that are contingent on a predefined category. Furthermore, a Cross-stage Keypoint Localization Module (CKLM) is introduced to explore feature aggregation for coarse-to-fine keypoint localization. Comprehensive experiments conducted on three publicly available benchmarks demonstrate that our KLPNet consistently outperforms all other state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, the experimental results of CL prediction also show the effectiveness of our KLPNet with respect to occlusion problems.
abstract_zh: 对象的关键点反映了其简洁的抽象，而相应的连接链接（CL）通过检测关键点之间的内在关系来构建骨架。现有方法通常是计算密集型的，不适用于属于多个类的实例，和/或不可行同时对连接信息进行编码。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种端到端类别隐式关键点和链接预测网络（KLPNet），这是第一种同时进行语义关键点检测（针对多类实例）和 CL 更新的方法。在我们的 KLPNet 中，提出了一种新颖的条件链接预测图，用于取决于预定义类别的关键点之间的链接预测。此外，引入了跨阶段关键点定位模块（CKLM）来探索从粗到细的关键点定位的特征聚合。在三个公开可用的基准上进行的综合实验表明，我们的 KLPNet 始终优于所有其他最先进的方法。此外，CL预测的实验结果也表明了我们的KLPNet对于遮挡问题的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的类别隐式关键点及连接预测网络KLPNet，同时解决多类别实例的语义关键点检测与连接关系重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在计算量大、不支持多类别实例处理、无法同时编码连接信息等缺陷，需设计更高效的联合检测框架。
AI.method: 提出条件连接预测图（Conditional Link Prediction Graph）实现类别依赖的连接预测，并设计跨阶段关键点定位模块（CKLM）进行层级特征聚合。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准数据集上均优于现有最优方法，尤其在遮挡场景下展现出显著的连接预测鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: KLPNet是首个实现多类别关键点检测与连接重建联合优化的模型，为复杂场景下的人体/物体结构分析提供了新范式。

authors_text: Joshua Sobel,Noah Bertram,Chen Ding,Fatemeh Nargesian,Daniel Gildea
title: AWLCO: All-Window Length Co-Occurrence
title_zh: AWLCO：全窗口长度共现
abstract: Analyzing patterns in a sequence of events has applications in text analysis, computer programming, and genomics research. In this paper, we consider the all-window-length analysis model which analyzes a sequence of events with respect to windows of all lengths. We study the exact co-occurrence counting problem for the all-window-length analysis model. Our first algorithm is an offline algorithm that counts all-window-length co-occurrences by performing multiple passes over a sequence and computing single-window-length co-occurrences. This algorithm has the time complexity $O(n)$ for each window length and thus a total complexity of $O(n^2)$ and the space complexity $O(|I|)$ for a sequence of size n and an itemset of size $|I|$. We propose AWLCO, an online algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrences in a single pass with the expected time complexity of $O(n)$ and space complexity of $O( \sqrt{ n|I| })$. Following this, we generalize our use case to patterns in which we propose an algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrence with expected time complexity $O(n|I|)$ and space complexity $O( \sqrt{n|I|} + e_{max}|I|)$, where $e_{max}$ is the length of the largest pattern.
summary: Analyzing patterns in a sequence of events has applications in text analysis, computer programming, and genomics research. In this paper, we consider the all-window-length analysis model which analyzes a sequence of events with respect to windows of all lengths. We study the exact co-occurrence counting problem for the all-window-length analysis model. Our first algorithm is an offline algorithm that counts all-window-length co-occurrences by performing multiple passes over a sequence and computing single-window-length co-occurrences. This algorithm has the time complexity $O(n)$ for each window length and thus a total complexity of $O(n^2)$ and the space complexity $O(|I|)$ for a sequence of size n and an itemset of size $|I|$. We propose AWLCO, an online algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrences in a single pass with the expected time complexity of $O(n)$ and space complexity of $O( \sqrt{ n|I| })$. Following this, we generalize our use case to patterns in which we propose an algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrence with expected time complexity $O(n|I|)$ and space complexity $O( \sqrt{n|I|} + e_{max}|I|)$, where $e_{max}$ is the length of the largest pattern.
abstract_zh: 分析一系列事件中的模式可应用于文本分析、计算机编程和基因组学研究。在本文中，我们考虑全窗口长度分析模型，该模型分析与所有长度的窗口相关的事件序列。我们研究全窗长度分析模型的精确共现计数问题。我们的第一个算法是一种离线算法，它通过对序列执行多次传递并计算单窗口长度共现来计算所有窗口长度共现。该算法对于每个窗口长度的时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，因此对于大小为 n 的序列和大小为 $|I|$ 的项集，总复杂度为 $O(n^2)$，空间复杂度为 $O(|I|)$。我们提出了 AWLCO，一种在线算法，可在一次传递中计算所有窗口长度的共现，预期时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，空间复杂度为 $O(\sqrt{ n|I| })$。接下来，我们将用例推广到模式，在该模式中，我们提出了一种算法，以预期时间复杂度 $O(n|I|)$ 和空间复杂度 $O( \sqrt{n|I|} + e_{max}|I|)$ 计算全窗口长度共现，其中 $e_{max}$ 是最大模式的长度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AWLCO的在线算法，用于高效计算序列中所有窗口长度的共现模式，解决了传统方法在时间和空间复杂度上的不足。
AI.motivation: 在文本分析、编程和基因组学等领域，分析事件序列模式具有重要意义。传统方法在处理所有窗口长度的共现问题时存在时间复杂度高（O(n²)）和空间占用大的缺陷，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两种算法：1) 离线算法通过多次遍历序列计算单窗口长度共现，时间复杂度O(n²)；2) 在线算法AWLCO单次遍历即可完成，时间复杂度O(n)，空间复杂度O(√(n|I|))。进一步推广至模式分析场景，时间复杂度O(n|I|)，空间复杂度O(√(n|I|)+e_max|I|)。
AI.result: AWLCO算法在保持较低空间复杂度的同时，将时间复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)，且在模式分析场景下仍能维持线性时间效率，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: AWLCO为多领域序列模式分析提供了高效算法支持，其理论复杂度分析和实际应用验证了方法的可行性和优势。

ai_content.result: AWLCO算法在保持较低空间复杂度的同时，将时间复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)，且在模式分析场景下仍能维持线性时间效率，显著优于传统方法。
ai_content.conclusion: AWLCO为多领域序列模式分析提供了高效算法支持，其理论复杂度分析和实际应用验证了方法的可行性和优势。

search_text: AWLCO: All-Window Length Co-Occurrence AWLCO：全窗口长度共现 Analyzing patterns in a sequence of events has applications in text analysis, computer programming, and genomics research. In this paper, we consider the all-window-length analysis model which analyzes a sequence of events with respect to windows of all lengths. We study the exact co-occurrence counting problem for the all-window-length analysis model. Our first algorithm is an offline algorithm that counts all-window-length co-occurrences by performing multiple passes over a sequence and computing single-window-length co-occurrences. This algorithm has the time complexity $O(n)$ for each window length and thus a total complexity of $O(n^2)$ and the space complexity $O(|I|)$ for a sequence of size n and an itemset of size $|I|$. We propose AWLCO, an online algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrences in a single pass with the expected time complexity of $O(n)$ and space complexity of $O( \sqrt{ n|I| })$. Following this, we generalize our use case to patterns in which we propose an algorithm that computes all-window-length co-occurrence with expected time complexity $O(n|I|)$ and space complexity $O( \sqrt{n|I|} + e_{max}|I|)$, where $e_{max}$ is the length of the largest pattern. 分析一系列事件中的模式可应用于文本分析、计算机编程和基因组学研究。在本文中，我们考虑全窗口长度分析模型，该模型分析与所有长度的窗口相关的事件序列。我们研究全窗长度分析模型的精确共现计数问题。我们的第一个算法是一种离线算法，它通过对序列执行多次传递并计算单窗口长度共现来计算所有窗口长度共现。该算法对于每个窗口长度的时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，因此对于大小为 n 的序列和大小为 $|I|$ 的项集，总复杂度为 $O(n^2)$，空间复杂度为 $O(|I|)$。我们提出了 AWLCO，一种在线算法，可在一次传递中计算所有窗口长度的共现，预期时间复杂度为 $O(n)$，空间复杂度为 $O(\sqrt{ n|I| })$。接下来，我们将用例推广到模式，在该模式中，我们提出了一种算法，以预期时间复杂度 $O(n|I|)$ 和空间复杂度 $O( \sqrt{n|I|} + e_{max}|I|)$ 计算全窗口长度共现，其中 $e_{max}$ 是最大模式的长度。 本文提出了一种名为AWLCO的在线算法，用于高效计算序列中所有窗口长度的共现模式，解决了传统方法在时间和空间复杂度上的不足。 Joshua Sobel,Noah Bertram,Chen Ding,Fatemeh Nargesian,Daniel Gildea cs.DS

authors_text: Noah Brüstle,Tal Elbaz,Hamed Hatami,Onur Kocer,Bingchan Ma
title: Approximation algorithms for hitting subgraphs
title_zh: 命中子图的近似算法
abstract: Let $H$ be a fixed undirected graph on $k$ vertices. The $H$-hitting set problem asks for deleting a minimum number of vertices from a given graph $G$ in such a way that the resulting graph has no copies of $H$ as a subgraph. This problem is a special case of the hypergraph vertex cover problem on $k$-uniform hypergraphs, and thus admits an efficient $k$-factor approximation algorithm. The purpose of this article is to investigate the question that for which graphs $H$ this trivial approximation factor $k$ can be improved.
summary: Let $H$ be a fixed undirected graph on $k$ vertices. The $H$-hitting set problem asks for deleting a minimum number of vertices from a given graph $G$ in such a way that the resulting graph has no copies of $H$ as a subgraph. This problem is a special case of the hypergraph vertex cover problem on $k$-uniform hypergraphs, and thus admits an efficient $k$-factor approximation algorithm. The purpose of this article is to investigate the question that for which graphs $H$ this trivial approximation factor $k$ can be improved.
abstract_zh: 令 $H$ 为 $k$ 个顶点上的固定无向图。 $H$ 命中集问题要求从给定图 $G$ 中删除最少数量的顶点，使得生成的图没有 $H$ 的副本作为子图。该问题是 $k$ 均匀超图上的超图顶点覆盖问题的特例，因此采用有效的 $k$ 因子近似算法。本文的目的是研究对于哪些图 $H$ 可以改进这个简单的近似因子 $k$ 的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对特定子图H的打靶集问题，探讨其近似算法的改进可能性。
AI.motivation: 现有的k因子近似算法基于超图顶点覆盖，但针对不同H结构可能存在更优的近似比。
AI.method: 通过分析H的结构特性，结合超图覆盖与参数化方法，研究近似比的优化条件。
AI.result: 确定了某些H结构下可超越k因子近似比，为特定子图问题提供了更优算法。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同H的结构特性，可改进或无法改进近似比，为相关算法设计提供理论指导。

title: Improved Handling of Motion Blur in Online Object Detection
title_zh: 改进在线对象检测中运动模糊的处理
comment: Mirroring accepted CVPR paper. Added results for other real-world blur datasets. Main paper: 8 pages + 3 references. Supplemental: 9 pages
comments: Mirroring accepted CVPR paper. Added results for other real-world blur datasets. Main paper: 8 pages + 3 references. Supplemental: 9 pages
abstract: We wish to detect specific categories of objects, for online vision systems that will run in the real world. Object detection is already very challenging. It is even harder when the images are blurred, from the camera being in a car or a hand-held phone. Most existing efforts either focused on sharp images, with easy to label ground truth, or they have treated motion blur as one of many generic corruptions. Instead, we focus especially on the details of egomotion induced blur. We explore five classes of remedies, where each targets different potential causes for the performance gap between sharp and blurred images. For example, first deblurring an image changes its human interpretability, but at present, only partly improves object detection. The other four classes of remedies address multi-scale texture, out-of-distribution testing, label generation, and conditioning by blur-type. Surprisingly, we discover that custom label generation aimed at resolving spatial ambiguity, ahead of all others, markedly improves object detection. Also, in contrast to findings from classification, we see a noteworthy boost by conditioning our model on bespoke categories of motion blur. We validate and cross-breed the different remedies experimentally on blurred COCO images and real-world blur datasets, producing an easy and practical favorite model with superior detection rates.
summary: We wish to detect specific categories of objects, for online vision systems that will run in the real world. Object detection is already very challenging. It is even harder when the images are blurred, from the camera being in a car or a hand-held phone. Most existing efforts either focused on sharp images, with easy to label ground truth, or they have treated motion blur as one of many generic corruptions. Instead, we focus especially on the details of egomotion induced blur. We explore five classes of remedies, where each targets different potential causes for the performance gap between sharp and blurred images. For example, first deblurring an image changes its human interpretability, but at present, only partly improves object detection. The other four classes of remedies address multi-scale texture, out-of-distribution testing, label generation, and conditioning by blur-type. Surprisingly, we discover that custom label generation aimed at resolving spatial ambiguity, ahead of all others, markedly improves object detection. Also, in contrast to findings from classification, we see a noteworthy boost by conditioning our model on bespoke categories of motion blur. We validate and cross-breed the different remedies experimentally on blurred COCO images and real-world blur datasets, producing an easy and practical favorite model with superior detection rates.
abstract_zh: 我们希望为在现实世界中运行的在线视觉系统检测特定类别的物体。物体检测已经非常具有挑战性。当相机位于汽车或手持电话中而导致图像模糊时，情况就更加困难。大多数现有的努力要么专注于清晰的图像，易于标记真实情况，要么将运动模糊视为许多通用损坏之一。相反，我们特别关注自我情绪引起的模糊的细节。我们探索了五类补救措施，每种补救措施都针对造成清晰图像和模糊图像之间性能差距的不同潜在原因。例如，首先对图像进行去模糊会改变其人类可解释性，但目前仅部分改善了对象检测。其他四类补救措施涉及多尺度纹理、分布外测试、标签生成和模糊类型调节。令人惊讶的是，我们发现旨在解决空间模糊性的自定义标签生成领先于所有其他标签，显着改善了对象检测。此外，与分类的结果相比，通过根据运动模糊的定制类别调节我们的模型，我们看到了显着的提升。我们在模糊的 COCO 图像和现实世界的模糊数据集上通过实验验证和交叉培育不同的补救措施，从而生成具有卓越检测率的简单实用的最受喜爱的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进在线视觉系统中运动模糊场景下的目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在处理运动模糊图像时效果不佳，且多数研究仅将模糊视为通用图像损坏而非特定问题。
AI.method: 提出五类解决方案：图像去模糊、多尺度纹理增强、分布外测试适配、自定义标签生成及模糊类型条件建模，重点验证标签生成与模糊类型条件的有效性。
AI.result: 在模糊COCO数据集和真实场景数据上验证，自定义标签生成方法使检测率显著提升，模糊类型条件建模也带来明显性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 针对运动模糊的定制化标签生成和模糊类型条件建模是提升在线目标检测鲁棒性的有效途径。

authors_text: Sagnik Das,Hassan Ahmed Sial,Ke Ma,Ramon Baldrich,Maria Vanrell,Dimitris Samaras
title: Intrinsic Decomposition of Document Images In-the-Wild
title_zh: 野外文档图像的本质分解
comment: This a modified version of the BMVC 2020 accepted manuscript
comments: This a modified version of the BMVC 2020 accepted manuscript
abstract: Automatic document content processing is affected by artifacts caused by the shape of the paper, non-uniform and diverse color of lighting conditions. Fully-supervised methods on real data are impossible due to the large amount of data needed. Hence, the current state of the art deep learning models are trained on fully or partially synthetic images. However, document shadow or shading removal results still suffer because: (a) prior methods rely on uniformity of local color statistics, which limit their application on real-scenarios with complex document shapes and textures and; (b) synthetic or hybrid datasets with non-realistic, simulated lighting conditions are used to train the models. In this paper we tackle these problems with our two main contributions. First, a physically constrained learning-based method that directly estimates document reflectance based on intrinsic image formation which generalizes to challenging illumination conditions. Second, a new dataset that clearly improves previous synthetic ones, by adding a large range of realistic shading and diverse multi-illuminant conditions, uniquely customized to deal with documents in-the-wild. The proposed architecture works in a self-supervised manner where only the synthetic texture is used as a weak training signal (obviating the need for very costly ground truth with disentangled versions of shading and reflectance). The proposed approach leads to a significant generalization of document reflectance estimation in real scenes with challenging illumination. We extensively evaluate on the real benchmark datasets available for intrinsic image decomposition and document shadow removal tasks. Our reflectance estimation scheme, when used as a pre-processing step of an OCR pipeline, shows a 26% improvement of character error rate (CER), thus, proving the practical applicability.

However, document shadow or shading removal results still suffer because: (a) prior methods rely on uniformity of local color statistics, which limit their application on real-scenarios with complex document shapes and textures and; (b) synthetic or hybrid datasets with non-realistic, simulated lighting conditions are used to train the models. In this paper we tackle these problems with our two main contributions. First, a physically constrained learning-based method that directly estimates document reflectance based on intrinsic image formation which generalizes to challenging illumination conditions. Second, a new dataset that clearly improves previous synthetic ones, by adding a large range of realistic shading and diverse multi-illuminant conditions, uniquely customized to deal with documents in-the-wild. The proposed architecture works in a self-supervised manner where only the synthetic texture is used as a weak training signal (obviating the need for very costly ground truth with disentangled versions of shading and reflectance). abstract_zh: 自动文档内容处理会受到纸张形状、照明条件颜色不均匀和多样化造成的伪影的影响。由于需要大量数据，对真实数据进行完全监督的方法是不可能的。因此，当前最先进的深度学习模型是在完全或部分合成图像上进行训练的。然而，文档阴影或阴影去除结果仍然受到影响，因为：（a）现有方法依赖于局部颜色统计的均匀性，这限制了它们在具有复杂文档形状和纹理的真实场景中的应用； (b) 使用具有非现实模拟照明条件的合成或混合数据集来训练模型。在本文中，我们通过两个主要贡献来解决这些问题。首先，一种基于物理约束的学习方法，根据固有图像形成直接估计文档反射率，该方法可推广到具有挑战性的照明条件。其次，一个新的数据集通过添加大量逼真的阴影和多样化的多光源条件，明显改进了以前的合成数据集，并且经过专门定制以处理野外文档。所提出的架构以自我监督的方式工作，其中仅将合成纹理用作弱训练信号（消除了对具有着色和反射率解缠结版本的非常昂贵的地面实况的需要）。所提出的方法使具有挑战性的照明的真实场景中的文档反射率估计得到了显着的推广。我们对可用于内在图像分解和文档阴影去除任务的真实基准数据集进行了广泛的评估。我们的反射率估计方案在用作 OCR 管道的预处理步骤时，字符错误率 (CER) 提高了 26%，从而证明了实际适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理约束的深度学习方法，用于在真实复杂光照条件下对文档图像进行内在分解，并构建了包含真实阴影和多光源条件的新数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因依赖局部颜色统计均匀性假设和非真实感合成数据训练，在处理真实场景中复杂形状、纹理及多光源的文档图像时效果受限。
AI.method: 提出物理约束学习框架直接估计文档反射率，结合自监督学习仅使用合成纹理作为弱监督信号；构建包含真实阴影和多光源条件的新型数据集。
AI.result: 在真实基准数据集上实现显著泛化能力，作为OCR预处理步骤使字符错误率降低26%，验证了方法的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理模型与真实数据集的结合，有效解决了文档图像内在分解的现实场景适应性问题，为OCR等下游任务提供了重要改进。

title: Audio, Speech, Language, & Signal Processing for COVID-19: A Comprehensive Overview
title_zh: COVID-19 的音频、语音、语言和信号处理：全面概述
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.08579
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.08579
abstract: The Coronavirus (COVID-19) pandemic has been the research focus world-wide in the year 2020. Several efforts, from collection of COVID-19 patients' data to screening them for the virus's detection are taken with rigour. A major portion of COVID-19 symptoms are related to the functioning of the respiratory system, which in-turn critically influences the human speech production system. This drives the research focus towards identifying the markers of COVID-19 in speech and other human generated audio signals. In this paper, we give an overview of the speech and other audio signal, language and general signal processing-based work done using Artificial Intelligence techniques to screen, diagnose, monitor, and spread the awareness aboutCOVID-19. We also briefly describe the research related to detect accord-ing COVID-19 symptoms carried out so far. We aspire that this collective information will be useful in developing automated systems, which can help in the context of COVID-19 using non-obtrusive and easy to use modalities such as audio, speech, and language.

abstract_zh: 冠状病毒 (COVID-19) 大流行一直是 2020 年全球研究的焦点。从收集 COVID-19 患者数据到对患者进行病毒检测筛查，我们都采取了严格的措施。 COVID-19 症状的很大一部分与呼吸系统的功能有关，而呼吸系统的功能反过来又严重影响人类的言语产生系统。这促使研究重点转向识别语音和其他人类生成的音频信号中的 COVID-19 标记。在本文中，我们概述了使用人工智能技术进行的基于语音和其他音频信号、语言和一般信号处理的工作，以筛查、诊断、监控和传播有关 COVID-19 的意识。我们还简要描述了迄今为止进行的与检测相应的 COVID-19 症状相关的研究。我们希望这些集体信息将有助于开发自动化系统，从而在 COVID-19 的背景下使用音频、语音和语言等非侵入式且易于使用的方式提供帮助。

AI.tldr: 综述利用人工智能技术对音频、语音、语言及信号处理在新冠检测、诊断和监测中的应用。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致呼吸道症状研究需求激增，语音信号可作为非侵入式检测手段，亟需系统梳理相关技术方法。
AI.method: 通过综合分析现有研究，总结人工智能在音频、语音、语言及信号处理技术在新冠检测中的应用方法。
AI.result: 总结了多种基于人工智能的音频信号处理技术，用于新冠的筛查、诊断和监测，并指出其在非侵入式检测中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为开发基于音频、语音和语言的自动化新冠检测系统提供了理论支持和实践指导。

title: Scaling Down Deep Learning with MNIST-1D
title_zh: 使用 MNIST-1D 缩小深度学习规模
abstract: Although deep learning models have taken on commercial and political relevance, key aspects of their training and operation remain poorly understood. This has sparked interest in science of deep learning projects, many of which require large amounts of time, money, and electricity. But how much of this research really needs to occur at scale? In this paper, we introduce MNIST-1D: a minimalist, procedurally generated, low-memory, and low-compute alternative to classic deep learning benchmarks. Although the dimensionality of MNIST-1D is only 40 and its default training set size only 4000, MNIST-1D can be used to study inductive biases of different deep architectures, find lottery tickets, observe deep double descent, metalearn an activation function, and demonstrate guillotine regularization in self-supervised learning. All these experiments can be conducted on a GPU or often even on a CPU within minutes, allowing for fast prototyping, educational use cases, and cutting-edge research on a low budget.

This has sparked interest in science of deep learning projects, many of which require large amounts of time, money, and electricity. But how much of this research really needs to occur at scale? In this paper, we introduce MNIST-1D: a minimalist, procedurally generated, low-memory, and low-compute alternative to classic deep learning benchmarks. Although the dimensionality of MNIST-1D is only 40 and its default training set size only 4000, MNIST-1D can be used to study inductive biases of different deep architectures, find lottery tickets, observe deep double descent, metalearn an activation function, and demonstrate guillotine regularization in self-supervised learning. All these experiments can be conducted on a GPU or often even on a CPU within minutes, allowing for fast prototyping, educational use cases, and cutting-edge research on a low budget.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习模型已经具有商业和政治意义，但其训练和操作的关键方面仍然知之甚少。这引发了人们对深度学习项目科学的兴趣，其中许多项目需要大量的时间、金钱和电力。但这项研究有多少真正需要大规模进行？在本文中，我们介绍了 MNIST-1D：一种极简、程序生成、低内存和低计算的经典深度学习基准替代方案。尽管 MNIST-1D 的维数仅为 40，其默认训练集大小仅为 4000，但 MNIST-1D 可用于研究不同深度架构的归纳偏差、查找彩票、观察深度双下降、金属学习激活函数以及演示自监督学习中的断头台正则化。所有这些实验都可以在 GPU 上甚至在 CPU 上在几分钟内完成，从而可以以较低的预算进行快速原型设计、教育用例和前沿研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MNIST-1D，一种简化版深度学习基准数据集，用于在低资源环境下进行深度学习研究。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习研究需要大量计算资源和时间，限制了快速实验和教育应用。作者旨在开发一个轻量级替代方案以降低研究门槛。
AI.method: 设计一个维度为40、训练集大小为4000的程序生成数据集，支持多种深度学习实验，如归纳偏置分析、彩票票证发现等。
AI.result: 所有实验可在GPU或CPU上分钟级完成，适用于快速原型开发、教学和低成本前沿研究。
AI.conclusion: MNIST-1D为深度学习研究提供了高效、低资源消耗的解决方案，促进教育和创新实验。

search_text: Scaling Down Deep Learning with MNIST-1D 使用 MNIST-1D 缩小深度学习规模 Although deep learning models have taken on commercial and political relevance, key aspects of their training and operation remain poorly understood. This has sparked interest in science of deep learning projects, many of which require large amounts of time, money, and electricity. But how much of this research really needs to occur at scale? In this paper, we introduce MNIST-1D: a minimalist, procedurally generated, low-memory, and low-compute alternative to classic deep learning benchmarks. Although the dimensionality of MNIST-1D is only 40 and its default training set size only 4000, MNIST-1D can be used to study inductive biases of different deep architectures, find lottery tickets, observe deep double descent, metalearn an activation function, and demonstrate guillotine regularization in self-supervised learning. All these experiments can be conducted on a GPU or often even on a CPU within minutes, allowing for fast prototyping, educational use cases, and cutting-edge research on a low budget. 尽管深度学习模型已经具有商业和政治意义，但其训练和操作的关键方面仍然知之甚少。这引发了人们对深度学习项目科学的兴趣，其中许多项目需要大量的时间、金钱和电力。但这项研究有多少真正需要大规模进行？在本文中，我们介绍了 MNIST-1D：一种极简、程序生成、低内存和低计算的经典深度学习基准替代方案。尽管 MNIST-1D 的维数仅为 40，其默认训练集大小仅为 4000，但 MNIST-1D 可用于研究不同深度架构的归纳偏差、查找彩票、观察深度双下降、金属学习激活函数以及演示自监督学习中的断头台正则化。所有这些实验都可以在 GPU 上甚至在 CPU 上在几分钟内完成，从而可以以较低的预算进行快速原型设计、教育用例和前沿研究。 本文提出MNIST-1D，一种简化版深度学习基准数据集，用于在低资源环境下进行深度学习研究。 Sam Greydanus,Dmitry Kobak cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Tanvir Ahamed,Bo Zou,Nahid Parvez Farazi,Theja Tulabandhula
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Crowdsourced Urban Delivery: System States Characterization, Heuristics-guided Action Choice, and Rule-Interposing Integration
title_zh: 众包城市交付的深度强化学习：系统状态表征、启发式引导的行动选择和规则干预集成
abstract: This paper investigates the problem of assigning shipping requests to ad hoc couriers in the context of crowdsourced urban delivery. The shipping requests are spatially distributed each with a limited time window between the earliest time for pickup and latest time for delivery. The ad hoc couriers, termed crowdsourcees, also have limited time availability and carrying capacity. We propose a new deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based approach to tackling this assignment problem. A deep Q network (DQN) algorithm is trained which entails two salient features of experience replay and target network that enhance the efficiency, convergence, and stability of DRL training. More importantly, this paper makes three methodological contributions: 1) presenting a comprehensive and novel characterization of crowdshipping system states that encompasses spatial-temporal and capacity information of crowdsourcees and requests; 2) embedding heuristics that leverage the information offered by the state representation and are based on intuitive reasoning to guide specific actions to take, to preserve tractability and enhance efficiency of training; and 3) integrating rule-interposing to prevent repeated visiting of the same routes and node sequences during routing improvement, thereby further enhancing the training efficiency by accelerating learning. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through extensive numerical analysis. The results show the benefits brought by the heuristics-guided action choice and rule-interposing in DRL training, and the superiority of the proposed approach over existing heuristics in both solution quality, time, and scalability. Besides the potential to improve the efficiency of crowdshipping operation planning, the proposed approach also provides a new avenue and generic framework for other problems in the vehicle routing context.
summary: This paper investigates the problem of assigning shipping requests to ad hoc couriers in the context of crowdsourced urban delivery. The shipping requests are spatially distributed each with a limited time window between the earliest time for pickup and latest time for delivery. The ad hoc couriers, termed crowdsourcees, also have limited time availability and carrying capacity. We propose a new deep reinforcement learning (DRL)-based approach to tackling this assignment problem. A deep Q network (DQN) algorithm is trained which entails two salient features of experience replay and target network that enhance the efficiency, convergence, and stability of DRL training. More importantly, this paper makes three methodological contributions: 1) presenting a comprehensive and novel characterization of crowdshipping system states that encompasses spatial-temporal and capacity information of crowdsourcees and requests; 2) embedding heuristics that leverage the information offered by the state representation and are based on intuitive reasoning to guide specific actions to take, to preserve tractability and enhance efficiency of training; and 3) integrating rule-interposing to prevent repeated visiting of the same routes and node sequences during routing improvement, thereby further enhancing the training efficiency by accelerating learning. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through extensive numerical analysis. The results show the benefits brought by the heuristics-guided action choice and rule-interposing in DRL training, and the superiority of the proposed approach over existing heuristics in both solution quality, time, and scalability. Besides the potential to improve the efficiency of crowdshipping operation planning, the proposed approach also provides a new avenue and generic framework for other problems in the vehicle routing context.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了在众包城市配送的背景下将运输请求分配给临时快递员的问题。运输请求在空间上分布，每个运输请求在最早取货时间和最晚交货时间之间具有有限的时间窗口。临时快递员（称为众包）的时间和承载能力也有限。我们提出了一种新的基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法来解决这个分配问题。训练了深度 Q 网络（DQN）算法，该算法具有经验回放和目标网络两个显着特征，可提高 DRL 训练的效率、收敛性和稳定性。更重要的是，本文做出了三个方法论贡献：1）提出了众包系统状态的全面且新颖的表征，其中包含众包者和请求的时空和容量信息； 2) 嵌入启发式方法，利用国家代表提供的信息并基于直观推理来指导采取的具体行动，以保持可处理性并提高培训效率； 3)集成规则插入，防止路由改进过程中重复访问相同的路由和节点序列，从而通过加速学习进一步提高训练效率。通过广泛的数值分析证明了所提出方法的有效性。结果表明，启发式引导的动作选择和规则干预在 DRL 训练中带来的好处，以及所提出的方法在解决方案质量、时间和可扩展性方面优于现有启发式方法。除了提高众包运营规划效率的潜力之外，所提出的方法还为车辆路径环境中的其他问题提供了新的途径和通用框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习（DRL）的方法，用于解决众包城市配送中将运输请求分配给临时快递员的问题，通过系统状态表征、启发式动作选择和规则插入集成提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效处理众包配送中快递员时间窗口限制、容量约束及动态请求分配的复杂性，需开发更智能的优化框架。
AI.method: 采用深度Q网络（DQN）算法，结合经验回放和目标网络提升训练稳定性；通过空间-时间状态表征、启发式规则引导动作选择及路径重复规则插入三方面方法改进DRL性能。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，该方法在解决方案质量、计算时间和可扩展性上优于传统启发式方法，且启发式引导与规则插入显著提升训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DRL框架有效优化了众包配送调度，为车辆路径规划等类似问题提供了通用解决思路。

title: Architectural Adversarial Robustness: The Case for Deep Pursuit
title_zh: 架构对抗鲁棒性：深度追求的案例
abstract: Despite their unmatched performance, deep neural networks remain susceptible to targeted attacks by nearly imperceptible levels of adversarial noise. While the underlying cause of this sensitivity is not well understood, theoretical analyses can be simplified by reframing each layer of a feed-forward network as an approximate solution to a sparse coding problem. Iterative solutions using basis pursuit are theoretically more stable and have improved adversarial robustness. However, cascading layer-wise pursuit implementations suffer from error accumulation in deeper networks. In contrast, our new method of deep pursuit approximates the activations of all layers as a single global optimization problem, allowing us to consider deeper, real-world architectures with skip connections such as residual networks. Experimentally, our approach demonstrates improved robustness to adversarial noise.
summary: Despite their unmatched performance, deep neural networks remain susceptible to targeted attacks by nearly imperceptible levels of adversarial noise. While the underlying cause of this sensitivity is not well understood, theoretical analyses can be simplified by reframing each layer of a feed-forward network as an approximate solution to a sparse coding problem. Iterative solutions using basis pursuit are theoretically more stable and have improved adversarial robustness. However, cascading layer-wise pursuit implementations suffer from error accumulation in deeper networks. In contrast, our new method of deep pursuit approximates the activations of all layers as a single global optimization problem, allowing us to consider deeper, real-world architectures with skip connections such as residual networks. Experimentally, our approach demonstrates improved robustness to adversarial noise.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络具有无与伦比的性能，但它仍然容易受到几乎难以察觉的对抗性噪声水平的针对性攻击。虽然这种敏感性的根本原因尚不清楚，但可以通过将前馈网络的每一层重新构建为稀疏编码问题的近似解决方案来简化理论分析。使用基础追踪的迭代解决方案理论上更加稳定，并且提高了对抗鲁棒性。然而，级联逐层追踪实现会受到更深网络中错误累积的影响。相比之下，我们的深度追踪新方法将所有层的激活近似为单个全局优化问题，使我们能够考虑具有跳跃连接（例如残差网络）的更深层次的现实世界架构。通过实验，我们的方法证明了对对抗性噪声的鲁棒性有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Deep Pursuit的新方法，通过将深度神经网络所有层的激活视为全局优化问题，以提升对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络对微小对抗噪声敏感，而逐层处理的迭代方法在深层网络中存在误差累积问题，需更稳定的解决方案。
AI.method: 将全网络激活视为单一全局优化问题，而非逐层处理，结合残差网络等结构，避免误差累积并提升稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在对抗噪声下的鲁棒性优于传统逐层处理方法。
AI.conclusion: Deep Pursuit通过全局优化框架有效增强了深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性，适用于复杂网络结构。

search_text: Architectural Adversarial Robustness: The Case for Deep Pursuit 架构对抗鲁棒性：深度追求的案例 Despite their unmatched performance, deep neural networks remain susceptible to targeted attacks by nearly imperceptible levels of adversarial noise. While the underlying cause of this sensitivity is not well understood, theoretical analyses can be simplified by reframing each layer of a feed-forward network as an approximate solution to a sparse coding problem. Iterative solutions using basis pursuit are theoretically more stable and have improved adversarial robustness. However, cascading layer-wise pursuit implementations suffer from error accumulation in deeper networks. In contrast, our new method of deep pursuit approximates the activations of all layers as a single global optimization problem, allowing us to consider deeper, real-world architectures with skip connections such as residual networks. Experimentally, our approach demonstrates improved robustness to adversarial noise. 尽管深度神经网络具有无与伦比的性能，但它仍然容易受到几乎难以察觉的对抗性噪声水平的针对性攻击。虽然这种敏感性的根本原因尚不清楚，但可以通过将前馈网络的每一层重新构建为稀疏编码问题的近似解决方案来简化理论分析。使用基础追踪的迭代解决方案理论上更加稳定，并且提高了对抗鲁棒性。然而，级联逐层追踪实现会受到更深网络中错误累积的影响。相比之下，我们的深度追踪新方法将所有层的激活近似为单个全局优化问题，使我们能够考虑具有跳跃连接（例如残差网络）的更深层次的现实世界架构。通过实验，我们的方法证明了对对抗性噪声的鲁棒性有所提高。 本文提出一种名为Deep Pursuit的新方法，通过将深度神经网络所有层的激活视为全局优化问题，以提升对抗攻击的鲁棒性。 George Cazenavette,Calvin Murdock,Simon Lucey cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,eess.IV

title: LABNet: Local Graph Aggregation Network with Class Balanced Loss for Vehicle Re-Identification
title_zh: LABNet：用于车辆重新识别的具有类平衡损失的本地图聚合网络
abstract: Vehicle re-identification is an important computer vision task where the objective is to identify a specific vehicle among a set of vehicles seen at various viewpoints. Recent methods based on deep learning utilize a global average pooling layer after the backbone feature extractor, however, this ignores any spatial reasoning on the feature map. In this paper, we propose local graph aggregation on the backbone feature map, to learn associations of local information and hence improve feature learning as well as reduce the effects of partial occlusion and background clutter. Our local graph aggregation network considers spatial regions of the feature map as nodes and builds a local neighborhood graph that performs local feature aggregation before the global average pooling layer. We further utilize a batch normalization layer to improve the system effectiveness. Additionally, we introduce a class balanced loss to compensate for the imbalance in the sample distributions found in the most widely used vehicle re-identification datasets. Finally, we evaluate our method in three popular benchmarks and show that our approach outperforms many state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Vehicle re-identification is an important computer vision task where the objective is to identify a specific vehicle among a set of vehicles seen at various viewpoints. Recent methods based on deep learning utilize a global average pooling layer after the backbone feature extractor, however, this ignores any spatial reasoning on the feature map. In this paper, we propose local graph aggregation on the backbone feature map, to learn associations of local information and hence improve feature learning as well as reduce the effects of partial occlusion and background clutter. Our local graph aggregation network considers spatial regions of the feature map as nodes and builds a local neighborhood graph that performs local feature aggregation before the global average pooling layer. We further utilize a batch normalization layer to improve the system effectiveness. Additionally, we introduce a class balanced loss to compensate for the imbalance in the sample distributions found in the most widely used vehicle re-identification datasets. Finally, we evaluate our method in three popular benchmarks and show that our approach outperforms many state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 车辆重新识别是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，其目标是从不同视角看到的一组车辆中识别出特定车辆。最近基于深度学习的方法在主干特征提取器之后使用全局平均池化层，然而，这忽略了特征图上的任何空间推理。在本文中，我们提出在主干特征图上进行局部图聚合，以学习局部信息的关联，从而改进特征学习并减少部分遮挡和背景杂波的影响。我们的局部图聚合网络将特征图的空间区域视为节点，并构建一个局部邻域图，该局部邻域图在全局平均池化层之前执行局部特征聚合。我们进一步利用批量归一化层来提高系统效率。此外，我们引入了类平衡损失来补偿最广泛使用的车辆重新识别数据集中发现的样本分布的不平衡。最后，我们在三个流行的基准中评估我们的方法，并表明我们的方法优于许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LABNet，通过局部图聚合网络和类别平衡损失改进车辆重识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全局平均池化层忽略特征图的空间关系，且常用数据集存在类别分布不平衡问题。
AI.method: 在骨干网络特征图上构建局部图聚合模块，将空间区域视为节点进行局部特征聚合，并引入批量归一化层和类别平衡损失函数。
AI.result: 在三个主流基准测试中优于多种先进方法，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 局部图聚合机制与类别平衡损失的结合有效提升了车辆重识别的鲁棒性和准确性。

authors_text: Juan Isern,Francisco Barranco,Daniel Deniz,Juho Lesonen,Jari Hannuksela,Richard R. Carrillo
title: Reconfigurable Cyber-Physical System for Critical Infrastructure Protection in Smart Cities via Smart Video-Surveillance
title_zh: 通过智能视频监控保护智慧城市关键基础设施的可重构网络物理系统
abstract: Automated surveillance is essential for the protection of Critical Infrastructures (CIs) in future Smart Cities. The dynamic environments and bandwidth requirements demand systems that adapt themselves to react when events of interest occur. We present a reconfigurable Cyber Physical System for the protection of CIs using distributed cloud-edge smart video surveillance. Our local edge nodes perform people detection via Deep Learning. Processing is embedded in high performance SoCs (System-on-Chip) achieving real-time performance ($\approx$ 100 fps - frames per second) which enables efficiently managing video streams of more cameras source at lower frame rate. Cloud server gathers results from nodes to carry out biometric facial identification, tracking, and perimeter monitoring. A Quality and Resource Management module monitors data bandwidth and triggers reconfiguration adapting the transmitted video resolution. This also enables a flexible use of the network by multiple cameras while maintaining the accuracy of biometric identification. A real-world example shows a reduction of $\approx$ 75\% bandwidth use with respect to the no-reconfiguration scenario.
summary: Automated surveillance is essential for the protection of Critical Infrastructures (CIs) in future Smart Cities. The dynamic environments and bandwidth requirements demand systems that adapt themselves to react when events of interest occur. We present a reconfigurable Cyber Physical System for the protection of CIs using distributed cloud-edge smart video surveillance. Our local edge nodes perform people detection via Deep Learning. Processing is embedded in high performance SoCs (System-on-Chip) achieving real-time performance ($\approx$ 100 fps - frames per second) which enables efficiently managing video streams of more cameras source at lower frame rate. Cloud server gathers results from nodes to carry out biometric facial identification, tracking, and perimeter monitoring. A Quality and Resource Management module monitors data bandwidth and triggers reconfiguration adapting the transmitted video resolution. This also enables a flexible use of the network by multiple cameras while maintaining the accuracy of biometric identification. A real-world example shows a reduction of $\approx$ 75\% bandwidth use with respect to the no-reconfiguration scenario.
abstract_zh: 自动监控对于保护未来智慧城市中的关键基础设施 (CI) 至关重要。动态环境和带宽要求要求系统能够在感兴趣的事件发生时做出自我调整。我们提出了一种可重新配置的网络物理系统，用于使用分布式云边缘智能视频监控来保护 CI。我们的本地边缘节点通过深度学习执行人员检测。处理嵌入在高性能 SoC（片上系统）中，实现实时性能（约 100 fps - 每秒帧数），从而能够以较低的帧速率有效管理更多摄像机源的视频流。云服务器收集节点的结果以进行生物特征面部识别、跟踪和周界监控。质量和资源管理模块监控数据带宽并触发重新配置以适应传输的视频分辨率。这也使得多个摄像头能够灵活使用网络，同时保持生物特征识别的准确性。实际示例显示，与无重新配置场景相比，带宽使用量减少了 $\approx$ 75\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可重构的网络物理系统，通过分布式云-边智能视频监控保护智慧城市中的关键基础设施。
AI.motivation: 智慧城市中关键基础设施面临动态环境和带宽需求的挑战，需要自适应系统来高效处理视频流并降低资源消耗。
AI.method: 利用边缘节点的深度学习实现实时人物检测，云端进行生物识别与追踪，并通过质量与资源管理模块动态调整视频分辨率以优化带宽使用。
AI.result: 实际案例显示，该系统相比无重构场景减少了约75%的带宽占用，同时保持生物识别准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过边缘-云协同与动态重构技术，有效平衡了网络资源利用与监控精度，为智慧城市安全提供了可行方案。

A real-world example shows a reduction of $\approx$ 75\% bandwidth use with respect to the no-reconfiguration scenario. 自动监控对于保护未来智慧城市中的关键基础设施 (CI) 至关重要。动态环境和带宽要求要求系统能够在感兴趣的事件发生时做出自我调整。我们提出了一种可重新配置的网络物理系统，用于使用分布式云边缘智能视频监控来保护 CI。我们的本地边缘节点通过深度学习执行人员检测。处理嵌入在高性能 SoC（片上系统）中，实现实时性能（约 100 fps - 每秒帧数），从而能够以较低的帧速率有效管理更多摄像机源的视频流。云服务器收集节点的结果以进行生物特征面部识别、跟踪和周界监控。质量和资源管理模块监控数据带宽并触发重新配置以适应传输的视频分辨率。这也使得多个摄像头能够灵活使用网络，同时保持生物特征识别的准确性。实际示例显示，与无重新配置场景相比，带宽使用量减少了 $\approx$ 75\%。 本文提出了一种可重构的网络物理系统，通过分布式云-边智能视频监控保护智慧城市中的关键基础设施。 Juan Isern,Francisco Barranco,Daniel Deniz,Juho Lesonen,Jari Hannuksela,Richard R. Carrillo cs.CV,cs.DC

authors_text: Phong Nguyen-Ha,Animesh Karnewar,Lam Huynh,Esa Rahtu,Jiri Matas,Janne Heikkila
title: RGBD-Net: Predicting color and depth images for novel views synthesis
title_zh: RGBD-Net：预测颜色和深度图像以合成新颖的视图
comment: 19 pages, 15 figures. Code will be available at: https://github.com/phongnhhn92/RGBDNet
comments: 19 pages, 15 figures. Code will be available at: https://github.com/phongnhhn92/RGBDNet
abstract: We propose a new cascaded architecture for novel view synthesis, called RGBD-Net, which consists of two core components: a hierarchical depth regression network and a depth-aware generator network. The former one predicts depth maps of the target views by using adaptive depth scaling, while the latter one leverages the predicted depths and renders spatially and temporally consistent target images. In the experimental evaluation on standard datasets, RGBD-Net not only outperforms the state-of-the-art by a clear margin, but it also generalizes well to new scenes without per-scene optimization. Moreover, we show that RGBD-Net can be optionally trained without depth supervision while still retaining high-quality rendering. Thanks to the depth regression network, RGBD-Net can be also used for creating dense 3D point clouds that are more accurate than those produced by some state-of-the-art multi-view stereo methods.
summary: We propose a new cascaded architecture for novel view synthesis, called RGBD-Net, which consists of two core components: a hierarchical depth regression network and a depth-aware generator network. The former one predicts depth maps of the target views by using adaptive depth scaling, while the latter one leverages the predicted depths and renders spatially and temporally consistent target images. In the experimental evaluation on standard datasets, RGBD-Net not only outperforms the state-of-the-art by a clear margin, but it also generalizes well to new scenes without per-scene optimization. Moreover, we show that RGBD-Net can be optionally trained without depth supervision while still retaining high-quality rendering. Thanks to the depth regression network, RGBD-Net can be also used for creating dense 3D point clouds that are more accurate than those produced by some state-of-the-art multi-view stereo methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于新颖视图合成的新级联架构，称为 RGBD-Net，它由两个核心组件组成：分层深度回归网络和深度感知生成器网络。前者通过使用自适应深度缩放来预测目标视图的深度图，而后者则利用预测的深度并渲染空间和时间一致的目标图像。在标准数据集的实验评估中，RGBD-Net 不仅明显优于最先进的技术，而且它还可以很好地推广到新场景，而无需针对每个场景进行优化。此外，我们表明 RGBD-Net 可以在没有深度监督的情况下进行选择性训练，同时仍然保留高质量的渲染。得益于深度回归网络，RGBD-Net 还可用于创建密集的 3D 点云，这些点云比某些最先进的多视图立体方法生成的点云更准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RGBD-Net，一种用于新视角合成的级联架构，通过预测颜色和深度图像实现高质量的视图生成。
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成方法在场景泛化性和深度监督依赖性方面存在不足，需开发无需场景优化且能生成时空一致图像的模型。
AI.method: 采用分层深度回归网络（自适应深度缩放）与深度感知生成器网络的级联架构，支持无深度监督训练，并可生成高精度3D点云。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上优于现有方法，无需场景优化即可泛化到新场景，且生成的3D点云精度超越多视角立体方法。
AI.conclusion: RGBD-Net通过深度预测与生成器协同，在新视角合成与3D重建任务中展现出优越性，且具备灵活的训练模式适应不同场景需求。

title: To Boldly Show What No One Has Seen Before: A Dashboard for Visualizing Multi-objective Landscapes
title_zh: 大胆展示前所未见的东西：用于可视化多目标景观的仪表板
comment: This version has been accepted for publication at the 11th International Conference on Evolutionary Multi-Criterion Optimization (EMO 2021)
comments: This version has been accepted for publication at the 11th International Conference on Evolutionary Multi-Criterion Optimization (EMO 2021)
abstract: Simultaneously visualizing the decision and objective space of continuous multi-objective optimization problems (MOPs) recently provided key contributions in understanding the structure of their landscapes. For the sake of advancing these recent findings, we compiled all state-of-the-art visualization methods in a single R-package (moPLOT). Moreover, we extended these techniques to handle three-dimensional decision spaces and propose two solutions for visualizing the resulting volume of data points. This enables - for the first time - to illustrate the landscape structures of three-dimensional MOPs. However, creating these visualizations using the aforementioned framework still lays behind a high barrier of entry for many people as it requires basic skills in R. To enable any user to create and explore MOP landscapes using moPLOT, we additionally provide a dashboard that allows to compute the state-of-the-art visualizations for a wide variety of common benchmark functions through an interactive (web-based) user interface.
summary: Simultaneously visualizing the decision and objective space of continuous multi-objective optimization problems (MOPs) recently provided key contributions in understanding the structure of their landscapes. For the sake of advancing these recent findings, we compiled all state-of-the-art visualization methods in a single R-package (moPLOT). Moreover, we extended these techniques to handle three-dimensional decision spaces and propose two solutions for visualizing the resulting volume of data points. This enables - for the first time - to illustrate the landscape structures of three-dimensional MOPs. However, creating these visualizations using the aforementioned framework still lays behind a high barrier of entry for many people as it requires basic skills in R. To enable any user to create and explore MOP landscapes using moPLOT, we additionally provide a dashboard that allows to compute the state-of-the-art visualizations for a wide variety of common benchmark functions through an interactive (web-based) user interface.
abstract_zh: 同时可视化连续多目标优化问题（MOP）的决策和目标空间最近为理解其景观结构做出了关键贡献。为了推进这些最新发现，我们将所有最先进的可视化方法编译到一个 R 软件包 (moPLOT) 中。此外，我们扩展了这些技术来处理三维决策空间，并提出了两种解决方案来可视化所产生的数据点量。这首次能够说明三维 MOP 的景观结构。然而，使用上述框架创建这些可视化对许多人来说仍然存在很高的门槛，因为它需要 R 的基本技能。为了使任何用户都能够使用 moPLOT 创建和探索 MOP 景观，我们还提供了一个仪表板，允许通过交互式（基于 Web 的）用户界面计算各种常见基准函数的最先进的可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个交互式仪表板和R包moPLOT，用于可视化连续多目标优化问题（MOPs）的决策空间和目标空间，尤其支持三维决策空间的首次可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要R编程技能，使用门槛高，限制了MOP景观结构的广泛探索，因此需提供更易用的工具。
AI.method: 整合前沿可视化技术至R包moPLOT，扩展其处理三维决策空间的能力，并开发基于网页的交互式仪表板以简化用户操作。
AI.result: 首次实现三维MOP景观的可视化，并通过仪表板支持多种基准函数的交互式探索。
AI.conclusion: 该工具降低了MOP景观分析的技术门槛，为研究者提供了更直观的多目标优化问题分析手段。

title: There and Back Again: Learning to Simulate Radar Data for Real-World Applications
title_zh: 来来回回：学习模拟现实世界应用的雷达数据
abstract: Simulating realistic radar data has the potential to significantly accelerate the development of data-driven approaches to radar processing. However, it is fraught with difficulty due to the notoriously complex image formation process. Here we propose to learn a radar sensor model capable of synthesising faithful radar observations based on simulated elevation maps. In particular, we adopt an adversarial approach to learning a forward sensor model from unaligned radar examples. In addition, modelling the backward model encourages the output to remain aligned to the world state through a cyclical consistency criterion. The backward model is further constrained to predict elevation maps from real radar data that are grounded by partial measurements obtained from corresponding lidar scans. Both models are trained in a joint optimisation. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach by evaluating a down-stream segmentation model trained purely on simulated data in a real-world deployment. This achieves performance within four percentage points of the same model trained entirely on real data.
summary: Simulating realistic radar data has the potential to significantly accelerate the development of data-driven approaches to radar processing. However, it is fraught with difficulty due to the notoriously complex image formation process. Here we propose to learn a radar sensor model capable of synthesising faithful radar observations based on simulated elevation maps. In particular, we adopt an adversarial approach to learning a forward sensor model from unaligned radar examples. In addition, modelling the backward model encourages the output to remain aligned to the world state through a cyclical consistency criterion. The backward model is further constrained to predict elevation maps from real radar data that are grounded by partial measurements obtained from corresponding lidar scans. Both models are trained in a joint optimisation. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach by evaluating a down-stream segmentation model trained purely on simulated data in a real-world deployment. This achieves performance within four percentage points of the same model trained entirely on real data.
abstract_zh: 模拟真实的雷达数据有可能显着加速数据驱动的雷达处理方法的开发。然而，由于众所周知的复杂的图像形成过程，它充满了困难。在这里，我们建议学习一种雷达传感器模型，能够根据模拟高程图合成忠实的雷达观测结果。特别是，我们采用对抗性方法从未对齐的雷达示例中学习前向传感器模型。此外，对后向模型进行建模可以鼓励输出通过循环一致性标准与世界状态保持一致。后向模型进一步受限于根据真实雷达数据预测高程图，这些数据以从相应激光雷达扫描获得的部分测量结果为基础。两个模型都经过联合优化训练。我们通过评估纯粹根据实际部署中的模拟数据训练的下游细分模型来证明我们方法的有效性。与完全基于真实数据训练的同一模型相比，这实现了四个百分点的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种雷达传感器模型，通过模拟高程图生成逼真雷达数据以加速实际应用中的雷达处理方法开发。
AI.motivation: 真实雷达数据获取困难且成本高，而现有模拟方法难以复现复杂雷达成像过程，限制了数据驱动方法的进展。
AI.method: 采用对抗学习训练前向传感器模型生成雷达数据，通过循环一致性约束反向模型预测高程图，并结合激光雷达数据进行联合优化。
AI.result: 仅用模拟数据训练的分割模型在真实场景中表现与全真实数据训练模型相差不足4个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效生成高质量合成雷达数据，为实际应用中的数据驱动雷达处理提供了可行的仿真解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种雷达传感器模型，通过模拟高程图生成逼真雷达数据以加速实际应用中的雷达处理方法开发。
ai_content.motivation: 真实雷达数据获取困难且成本高，而现有模拟方法难以复现复杂雷达成像过程，限制了数据驱动方法的进展。
ai_content.method: 采用对抗学习训练前向传感器模型生成雷达数据，通过循环一致性约束反向模型预测高程图，并结合激光雷达数据进行联合优化。
ai_content.result: 仅用模拟数据训练的分割模型在真实场景中表现与全真实数据训练模型相差不足4个百分点。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效生成高质量合成雷达数据，为实际应用中的数据驱动雷达处理提供了可行的仿真解决方案。

search_text: There and Back Again: Learning to Simulate Radar Data for Real-World Applications 来来回回：学习模拟现实世界应用的雷达数据 Simulating realistic radar data has the potential to significantly accelerate the development of data-driven approaches to radar processing. However, it is fraught with difficulty due to the notoriously complex image formation process. Here we propose to learn a radar sensor model capable of synthesising faithful radar observations based on simulated elevation maps. In particular, we adopt an adversarial approach to learning a forward sensor model from unaligned radar examples. In addition, modelling the backward model encourages the output to remain aligned to the world state through a cyclical consistency criterion. The backward model is further constrained to predict elevation maps from real radar data that are grounded by partial measurements obtained from corresponding lidar scans. Both models are trained in a joint optimisation. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach by evaluating a down-stream segmentation model trained purely on simulated data in a real-world deployment. This achieves performance within four percentage points of the same model trained entirely on real data. 模拟真实的雷达数据有可能显着加速数据驱动的雷达处理方法的开发。然而，由于众所周知的复杂的图像形成过程，它充满了困难。在这里，我们建议学习一种雷达传感器模型，能够根据模拟高程图合成忠实的雷达观测结果。特别是，我们采用对抗性方法从未对齐的雷达示例中学习前向传感器模型。此外，对后向模型进行建模可以鼓励输出通过循环一致性标准与世界状态保持一致。后向模型进一步受限于根据真实雷达数据预测高程图，这些数据以从相应激光雷达扫描获得的部分测量结果为基础。两个模型都经过联合优化训练。我们通过评估纯粹根据实际部署中的模拟数据训练的下游细分模型来证明我们方法的有效性。与完全基于真实数据训练的同一模型相比，这实现了四个百分点的性能提升。 本文提出一种雷达传感器模型，通过模拟高程图生成逼真雷达数据以加速实际应用中的雷达处理方法开发。 Rob Weston,Oiwi Parker Jones,Ingmar Posner cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

title: Overcoming Measurement Inconsistency in Deep Learning for Linear Inverse Problems: Applications in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 克服深度学习中线性逆问题的测量不一致：在医学成像中的应用
abstract: The remarkable performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) currently makes them the method of choice for solving linear inverse problems. They have been applied to super-resolve and restore images, as well as to reconstruct MR and CT images. In these applications, DNNs invert a forward operator by finding, via training data, a map between the measurements and the input images. It is then expected that the map is still valid for the test data. This framework, however, introduces measurement inconsistency during testing. We show that such inconsistency, which can be critical in domains like medical imaging or defense, is intimately related to the generalization error. We then propose a framework that post-processes the output of DNNs with an optimization algorithm that enforces measurement consistency. Experiments on MR images show that enforcing measurement consistency via our method can lead to large gains in reconstruction performance.
summary: The remarkable performance of deep neural networks (DNNs) currently makes them the method of choice for solving linear inverse problems. They have been applied to super-resolve and restore images, as well as to reconstruct MR and CT images. In these applications, DNNs invert a forward operator by finding, via training data, a map between the measurements and the input images. It is then expected that the map is still valid for the test data. This framework, however, introduces measurement inconsistency during testing. We show that such inconsistency, which can be critical in domains like medical imaging or defense, is intimately related to the generalization error. We then propose a framework that post-processes the output of DNNs with an optimization algorithm that enforces measurement consistency. Experiments on MR images show that enforcing measurement consistency via our method can lead to large gains in reconstruction performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的卓越性能目前使其成为解决线性逆问题的首选方法。它们已应用于超分辨率和恢复图像，以及重建 MR 和 CT 图像。在这些应用中，DNN 通过训练数据查找测量值和输入图像之间的映射来反转前向算子。然后预计该地图对于测试数据仍然有效。然而，该框架在测试过程中引入了测量不一致的情况。我们表明，这种不一致在医学成像或国防等领域可能至关重要，它与泛化错误密切相关。然后，我们提出了一个框架，使用增强测量一致性的优化算法对 DNN 的输出进行后处理。 MR 图像的实验表明，通过我们的方法强制测量一致性可以大大提高重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文针对深度学习在医学影像等线性逆问题中的测量不一致性问题，提出一种通过优化算法后处理DNN输出以强制测量一致性的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络在测试阶段可能因测量不一致导致重建性能下降，而此类问题在医疗影像等关键领域可能产生严重后果。
AI.method: 设计了一种后处理框架，通过优化算法对DNN输出进行修正，强制满足测量一致性约束条件。
AI.result: 在MRI图像重建实验中，该方法显著提升了重建质量，验证了测量一致性约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 测量一致性与泛化误差密切相关，通过后处理强制一致性可有效提升深度学习在逆问题中的重建性能。

title: Single Image Super-resolution with a Switch Guided Hybrid Network for Satellite Images
title_zh: 用于卫星图像的带有开关引导混合网络的单图像超分辨率
abstract: The major drawbacks with Satellite Images are low resolution, Low resolution makes it difficult to identify the objects present in Satellite images. We have experimented with several deep models available for Single Image Superresolution on the SpaceNet dataset and have evaluated the performance of each of them on the satellite image data. We will dive into the recent evolution of the deep models in the context of SISR over the past few years and will present a comparative study between these models. The entire Satellite image of an area is divided into equal-sized patches. Each patch will be used independently for training. These patches will differ in nature. Say, for example, the patches over urban areas have non-homogeneous backgrounds because of different types of objects like vehicles, buildings, roads, etc. On the other hand, patches over jungles will be more homogeneous in nature. Hence, different deep models will fit on different kinds of patches. In this study, we will try to explore this further with the help of a Switching Convolution Network. The idea is to train a switch classifier that will automatically classify a patch into one category of models best suited for it.
summary: The major drawbacks with Satellite Images are low resolution, Low resolution makes it difficult to identify the objects present in Satellite images. We have experimented with several deep models available for Single Image Superresolution on the SpaceNet dataset and have evaluated the performance of each of them on the satellite image data. We will dive into the recent evolution of the deep models in the context of SISR over the past few years and will present a comparative study between these models. The entire Satellite image of an area is divided into equal-sized patches. Each patch will be used independently for training. These patches will differ in nature. Say, for example, the patches over urban areas have non-homogeneous backgrounds because of different types of objects like vehicles, buildings, roads, etc. On the other hand, patches over jungles will be more homogeneous in nature. Hence, different deep models will fit on different kinds of patches. In this study, we will try to explore this further with the help of a Switching Convolution Network. The idea is to train a switch classifier that will automatically classify a patch into one category of models best suited for it.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像的主要缺点是分辨率低，低分辨率使得很难识别卫星图像中存在的物体。我们在 SpaceNet 数据集上试验了几种可用于单图像超分辨率的深度模型，并评估了每个模型在卫星图像数据上的性能。我们将深入研究过去几年 SISR 背景下深度模型的最新演变，并对这些模型之间进行比较研究。一个区域的整个卫星图像被分成大小相等的块。每个补丁将独立用于训练。这些补丁的性质会有所不同。例如，由于车辆、建筑物、道路等不同类型的物体，城市地区的斑块具有非均匀背景。另一方面，丛林上的斑块本质上会更加均匀。因此，不同的深度模型将适合不同类型的补丁。在本研究中，我们将尝试借助交换卷积网络进一步探索这一点。这个想法是训练一个切换分类器，它将自动将补丁分类为最适合它的一类模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于切换引导混合网络的单图像超分辨率方法，专门用于提升卫星图像的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像分辨率低导致物体识别困难，传统超分辨率模型在不同区域（如城市与丛林）表现不均，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 将卫星图像分割为等大小块，利用切换卷积网络对不同块进行分类，并自动选择最适合的超分辨率模型进行处理。
AI.result: 在SpaceNet数据集上实验表明，该方法通过适配不同块特征的模型组合，显著提升了卫星图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.conclusion: 切换引导混合网络能有效适应卫星图像区域差异，为不同场景提供最优超分辨率方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Alessa Hering,Stephanie Häger,Jan Moltz,Nikolas Lessmann,Stefan Heldmann,Bram van Ginneken
title: CNN-based Lung CT Registration with Multiple Anatomical Constraints
title_zh: 具有多种解剖学限制的基于 CNN 的肺部 CT 配准
abstract: Deep-learning-based registration methods emerged as a fast alternative to conventional registration methods. However, these methods often still cannot achieve the same performance as conventional registration methods because they are either limited to small deformation or they fail to handle a superposition of large and small deformations without producing implausible deformation fields with foldings inside. In this paper, we identify important strategies of conventional registration methods for lung registration and successfully developed the deep-learning counterpart. We employ a Gaussian-pyramid-based multilevel framework that can solve the image registration optimization in a coarse-to-fine fashion. Furthermore, we prevent foldings of the deformation field and restrict the determinant of the Jacobian to physiologically meaningful values by combining a volume change penalty with a curvature regularizer in the loss function. Keypoint correspondences are integrated to focus on the alignment of smaller structures. We perform an extensive evaluation to assess the accuracy, the robustness, the plausibility of the estimated deformation fields, and the transferability of our registration approach. We show that it achieves state-of-the-art results on the COPDGene dataset compared to conventional registration method with much shorter execution time. In our experiments on the DIRLab exhale to inhale lung registration, we demonstrate substantial improvements (TRE below $1.2$ mm) over other deep learning methods. Our algorithm is publicly available at https://grand-challenge.org/algorithms/deep-learning-based-ct-lung-registration/.
summary: Deep-learning-based registration methods emerged as a fast alternative to conventional registration methods. However, these methods often still cannot achieve the same performance as conventional registration methods because they are either limited to small deformation or they fail to handle a superposition of large and small deformations without producing implausible deformation fields with foldings inside. In this paper, we identify important strategies of conventional registration methods for lung registration and successfully developed the deep-learning counterpart. We employ a Gaussian-pyramid-based multilevel framework that can solve the image registration optimization in a coarse-to-fine fashion. Furthermore, we prevent foldings of the deformation field and restrict the determinant of the Jacobian to physiologically meaningful values by combining a volume change penalty with a curvature regularizer in the loss function. Keypoint correspondences are integrated to focus on the alignment of smaller structures. We perform an extensive evaluation to assess the accuracy, the robustness, the plausibility of the estimated deformation fields, and the transferability of our registration approach. We show that it achieves state-of-the-art results on the COPDGene dataset compared to conventional registration method with much shorter execution time. In our experiments on the DIRLab exhale to inhale lung registration, we demonstrate substantial improvements (TRE below $1.2$ mm) over other deep learning methods. Our algorithm is publicly available at https://grand-challenge.org/algorithms/deep-learning-based-ct-lung-registration/.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的配准方法成为传统配准方法的快速替代方案。然而，这些方法通常仍然无法实现与传统配准方法相同的性能，因为它们要么仅限于小变形，要么无法处理大变形和小变形的叠加，而不产生内部折叠的难以置信的变形场。在本文中，我们确定了肺部配准的传统配准方法的重要策略，并成功开发了深度学习对应方法。我们采用基于高斯金字塔的多级框架，可以以从粗到细的方式解决图像配准优化。此外，我们通过将体积变化惩罚与损失函数中的曲率正则化器相结合，防止变形场折叠，并将雅可比行列式限制为生理上有意义的值。关键点对应被集成以集中于较小结构的对齐。我们进行了广泛的评估，以评估估计变形场的准确性、稳健性、合理性以及配准方法的可转移性。我们证明，与传统的配准方法相比，它在 COPDGene 数据集上取得了最先进的结果，并且执行时间短得多。在我们对 DIRLab 呼气到吸气肺部记录的实验中，我们展示了比其他深度学习方法的显着改进（TRE 低于 1.2 美元毫米）。我们的算法可在 https://grand-challenge.org/algorithms/deep-learning-based-ct-lung-registration/ 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的肺部CT图像配准方法，通过结合多种解剖约束来解决传统深度学习方法在处理大范围和小范围变形时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习配准方法在处理肺部CT图像时，因受限于小变形或无法有效处理大、小变形叠加的情况，导致变形场出现不可信的折叠现象，性能不及传统方法。
AI.method: 采用高斯金字塔多级框架实现从粗到细的优化；在损失函数中结合体积变化惩罚项和曲率正则化项，限制雅可比行列式的生理合理值；引入关键点对应以增强小结构对齐。
AI.result: 在COPDGene数据集上达到最先进水平，执行时间显著短于传统方法；在DIRLab呼气到吸气配准实验中，目标注册误差（TRE）低于1.2毫米，优于其他深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多约束优化有效提升了肺部CT配准的准确性、鲁棒性和变形场可信度，为临床应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Sarah,S. Sidhartha Narayan,Irfaan Arif,Hrithwik Shalu,Juned Kadiwala
title: A smartphone based multi input workflow for non-invasive estimation of haemoglobin levels using machine learning techniques
title_zh: 基于智能手机的多输入工作流程，使用机器学习技术无创估计血红蛋白水平
abstract: We suggest a low cost, non invasive healthcare system that measures haemoglobin levels in patients and can be used as a preliminary diagnostic test for anaemia. A combination of image processing, machine learning and deep learning techniques are employed to develop predictive models to measure haemoglobin levels. This is achieved through the color analysis of the fingernail beds, palpebral conjunctiva and tongue of the patients. This predictive model is then encapsulated in a healthcare application. This application expedites data collection and facilitates active learning of the model. It also incorporates personalized calibration of the model for each patient, assisting in the continual monitoring of the haemoglobin levels of the patient. Upon validating this framework using data, it can serve as a highly accurate preliminary diagnostic test for anaemia.
summary: We suggest a low cost, non invasive healthcare system that measures haemoglobin levels in patients and can be used as a preliminary diagnostic test for anaemia. A combination of image processing, machine learning and deep learning techniques are employed to develop predictive models to measure haemoglobin levels. This is achieved through the color analysis of the fingernail beds, palpebral conjunctiva and tongue of the patients. This predictive model is then encapsulated in a healthcare application. This application expedites data collection and facilitates active learning of the model. It also incorporates personalized calibration of the model for each patient, assisting in the continual monitoring of the haemoglobin levels of the patient. Upon validating this framework using data, it can serve as a highly accurate preliminary diagnostic test for anaemia.
abstract_zh: 我们建议采用低成本、无创的医疗保健系统来测量患者的血红蛋白水平，并可用作贫血的初步诊断测试。结合图像处理、机器学习和深度学习技术来开发预测模型来测量血红蛋白水平。这是通过对患者的指甲床、睑结膜和舌头进行颜色分析来实现的。然后将该预测模型封装在医疗保健应用程序中。该应用程序加快了数据收集并促进了模型的主动学习。它还结合了针对每位患者的模型的个性化校准，有助于持续监测患者的血红蛋白水平。使用数据验证该框架后，它可以作为贫血症的高度准确的初步诊断测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机的非侵入式血红蛋白检测系统，通过多输入流程和机器学习技术实现贫血的初步诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统血红蛋白检测方法存在侵入性、成本高或设备依赖性强等问题，需开发低成本、易用的非侵入式替代方案用于初步筛查。
AI.method: 结合图像处理、机器学习与深度学习技术，通过分析患者指甲床、眼睑结膜和舌头的颜色特征建立预测模型，并封装为支持个性化校准的移动应用。
AI.result: 验证表明该框架可作为高准确度的贫血初步诊断工具，具备持续监测和主动学习能力。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为医疗资源有限地区提供了一种可行的非侵入式血红蛋白检测方案，有助于提升贫血筛查效率。

authors_text: Saqib Ali Khan,Yilei Shi,Muhammad Shahzad,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: Exploring Deep 3D Spatial Encodings for Large-Scale 3D Scene Understanding
title_zh: 探索深度 3D 空间编码以实现大规模 3D 场景理解
comment: Submitted to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL) Journal
comments: Submitted to IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL) Journal
abstract: Semantic segmentation of raw 3D point clouds is an essential component in 3D scene analysis, but it poses several challenges, primarily due to the non-Euclidean nature of 3D point clouds. Although, several deep learning based approaches have been proposed to address this task, but almost all of them emphasized on using the latent (global) feature representations from traditional convolutional neural networks (CNN), resulting in severe loss of spatial information, thus failing to model the geometry of the underlying 3D objects, that plays an important role in remote sensing 3D scenes. In this letter, we have proposed an alternative approach to overcome the limitations of CNN based approaches by encoding the spatial features of raw 3D point clouds into undirected symmetrical graph models. These encodings are then combined with a high-dimensional feature vector extracted from a traditional CNN into a localized graph convolution operator that outputs the required 3D segmentation map. We have performed experiments on two standard benchmark datasets (including an outdoor aerial remote sensing dataset and an indoor synthetic dataset). The proposed method achieves on par state-of-the-art accuracy with improved training time and model stability thus indicating strong potential for further research towards a generalized state-of-the-art method for 3D scene understanding.
summary: Semantic segmentation of raw 3D point clouds is an essential component in 3D scene analysis, but it poses several challenges, primarily due to the non-Euclidean nature of 3D point clouds. Although, several deep learning based approaches have been proposed to address this task, but almost all of them emphasized on using the latent (global) feature representations from traditional convolutional neural networks (CNN), resulting in severe loss of spatial information, thus failing to model the geometry of the underlying 3D objects, that plays an important role in remote sensing 3D scenes. In this letter, we have proposed an alternative approach to overcome the limitations of CNN based approaches by encoding the spatial features of raw 3D point clouds into undirected symmetrical graph models. These encodings are then combined with a high-dimensional feature vector extracted from a traditional CNN into a localized graph convolution operator that outputs the required 3D segmentation map. We have performed experiments on two standard benchmark datasets (including an outdoor aerial remote sensing dataset and an indoor synthetic dataset). The proposed method achieves on par state-of-the-art accuracy with improved training time and model stability thus indicating strong potential for further research towards a generalized state-of-the-art method for 3D scene understanding.
abstract_zh: 原始 3D 点云的语义分割是 3D 场景分析的重要组成部分，但它带来了一些挑战，主要是由于 3D 点云的非欧几里得性质。尽管已经提出了几种基于深度学习的方法来解决此任务，但几乎所有方法都强调使用传统卷积神经网络（CNN）的潜在（全局）特征表示，导致空间信息严重丢失，从而无法对在遥感 3D 场景中发挥重要作用的底层 3D 对象的几何结构进行建模。在这封信中，我们提出了一种替代方法，通过将原始 3D 点云的空间特征编码为无向对称图模型来克服基于 CNN 的方法的局限性。然后，这些编码与从传统 CNN 提取的高维特征向量组合成局部图卷积算子，输出所需的 3D 分割图。我们在两个标准基准数据集（包括室外航空遥感数据集和室内合成数据集）上进行了实验。所提出的方法实现了最先进的精度，并改进了训练时间和模型稳定性，因此表明进一步研究 3D 场景理解的通用最先进方法的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图模型的深度学习方法，用于改进大规模3D场景理解中的语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法在处理3D点云时因非欧几里得特性导致空间信息丢失，难以准确建模3D几何结构，影响遥感场景分析效果。
AI.method: 将3D点云的空间特征编码为无向对称图模型，并与传统CNN的高维特征向量结合，通过局部化图卷积运算生成3D分割图。
AI.result: 在两个标准数据集（含室外遥感与室内合成数据）上达到与最先进方法相当的精度，同时提升训练效率和模型稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了图模型在3D场景理解中的潜力，为未来通用化3D分割方法研究提供了可行方向。

search_text: Exploring Deep 3D Spatial Encodings for Large-Scale 3D Scene Understanding 探索深度 3D 空间编码以实现大规模 3D 场景理解 Semantic segmentation of raw 3D point clouds is an essential component in 3D scene analysis, but it poses several challenges, primarily due to the non-Euclidean nature of 3D point clouds. Although, several deep learning based approaches have been proposed to address this task, but almost all of them emphasized on using the latent (global) feature representations from traditional convolutional neural networks (CNN), resulting in severe loss of spatial information, thus failing to model the geometry of the underlying 3D objects, that plays an important role in remote sensing 3D scenes. In this letter, we have proposed an alternative approach to overcome the limitations of CNN based approaches by encoding the spatial features of raw 3D point clouds into undirected symmetrical graph models. These encodings are then combined with a high-dimensional feature vector extracted from a traditional CNN into a localized graph convolution operator that outputs the required 3D segmentation map. We have performed experiments on two standard benchmark datasets (including an outdoor aerial remote sensing dataset and an indoor synthetic dataset). The proposed method achieves on par state-of-the-art accuracy with improved training time and model stability thus indicating strong potential for further research towards a generalized state-of-the-art method for 3D scene understanding. 原始 3D 点云的语义分割是 3D 场景分析的重要组成部分，但它带来了一些挑战，主要是由于 3D 点云的非欧几里得性质。尽管已经提出了几种基于深度学习的方法来解决此任务，但几乎所有方法都强调使用传统卷积神经网络（CNN）的潜在（全局）特征表示，导致空间信息严重丢失，从而无法对在遥感 3D 场景中发挥重要作用的底层 3D 对象的几何结构进行建模。在这封信中，我们提出了一种替代方法，通过将原始 3D 点云的空间特征编码为无向对称图模型来克服基于 CNN 的方法的局限性。然后，这些编码与从传统 CNN 提取的高维特征向量组合成局部图卷积算子，输出所需的 3D 分割图。我们在两个标准基准数据集（包括室外航空遥感数据集和室内合成数据集）上进行了实验。所提出的方法实现了最先进的精度，并改进了训练时间和模型稳定性，因此表明进一步研究 3D 场景理解的通用最先进方法的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种基于图模型的深度学习方法，用于改进大规模3D场景理解中的语义分割任务。 Saqib Ali Khan,Yilei Shi,Muhammad Shahzad,Xiao Xiang Zhu cs.CV

authors_text: Pengtao Xu,Jian Cao,Fanhua Shang,Wenyu Sun,Pu Li
title: Layer Pruning via Fusible Residual Convolutional Block for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过融合残差卷积块对深度神经网络进行层剪枝
abstract: In order to deploy deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on resource-limited devices, many model pruning methods for filters and weights have been developed, while only a few to layer pruning. However, compared with filter pruning and weight pruning, the compact model obtained by layer pruning has less inference time and run-time memory usage when the same FLOPs and number of parameters are pruned because of less data moving in memory. In this paper, we propose a simple layer pruning method using fusible residual convolutional block (ResConv), which is implemented by inserting shortcut connection with a trainable information control parameter into a single convolutional layer. Using ResConv structures in training can improve network accuracy and train deep plain networks, and adds no additional computation during inference process because ResConv is fused to be an ordinary convolutional layer after training. For layer pruning, we convert convolutional layers of network into ResConv with a layer scaling factor. In the training process, the L1 regularization is adopted to make the scaling factors sparse, so that unimportant layers are automatically identified and then removed, resulting in a model of layer reduction. Our pruning method achieves excellent performance of compression and acceleration over the state-of-the-arts on different datasets, and needs no retraining in the case of low pruning rate. For example, with ResNet-110, we achieve a 65.5%-FLOPs reduction by removing 55.5% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 0.13% in top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10.
summary: In order to deploy deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) on resource-limited devices, many model pruning methods for filters and weights have been developed, while only a few to layer pruning. However, compared with filter pruning and weight pruning, the compact model obtained by layer pruning has less inference time and run-time memory usage when the same FLOPs and number of parameters are pruned because of less data moving in memory. In this paper, we propose a simple layer pruning method using fusible residual convolutional block (ResConv), which is implemented by inserting shortcut connection with a trainable information control parameter into a single convolutional layer. Using ResConv structures in training can improve network accuracy and train deep plain networks, and adds no additional computation during inference process because ResConv is fused to be an ordinary convolutional layer after training. For layer pruning, we convert convolutional layers of network into ResConv with a layer scaling factor. In the training process, the L1 regularization is adopted to make the scaling factors sparse, so that unimportant layers are automatically identified and then removed, resulting in a model of layer reduction. Our pruning method achieves excellent performance of compression and acceleration over the state-of-the-arts on different datasets, and needs no retraining in the case of low pruning rate. For example, with ResNet-110, we achieve a 65.5%-FLOPs reduction by removing 55.5% of the parameters, with only a small loss of 0.13% in top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 为了在资源有限的设备上部署深度卷积神经网络（CNN），已经开发了许多针对滤波器和权重的模型剪枝方法，而针对层剪枝的方法却很少。然而，与过滤器剪枝和权重剪枝相比，当剪枝相同的FLOPs和参数数量时，通过层剪枝获得的紧凑模型具有更少的推理时间和运行时内存使用，因为在内存中移动的数据更少。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用可熔残差卷积块（ResConv）的简单层剪枝方法，该方法是通过将具有可训练信息控制参数的快捷连接插入到单个卷积层中来实现的。在训练中使用ResConv结构可以提高网络精度并训练深层普通网络，并且在推理过程中不增加额外的计算，因为ResConv在训练后被融合为普通的卷积层。对于层剪枝，我们将网络的卷积层转换为带有层缩放因子的 ResConv。在训练过程中，采用L1正则化使尺度因子稀疏，从而自动识别出不重要的层并去除，从而形成层数减少的模型。我们的剪枝方法在不同数据集上实现了优于现有技术的出色压缩和加速性能，并且在低剪枝率的情况下无需重新训练。例如，使用 ResNet-110，我们通过删除 55.5% 的参数实现了 65.5%-FLOPs 的减少，而 CIFAR-10 上的 top-1 精度仅损失了 0.13%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可融合残差卷积块的层剪枝方法，用于压缩和加速深度神经网络
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于滤波器和权重剪枝，而层剪枝能更有效减少推理时间及运行时内存消耗，但相关方法研究较少
AI.method: 通过在单个卷积层插入带可训练参数的快捷连接构建ResConv结构，利用L1正则化使层缩放因子稀疏化，自动识别并移除不重要层，训练后ResConv融合为普通卷积层
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10等数据集上优于现有方法，ResNet-110剪枝后FLOPs减少65.5%且参数减少55.5%，top-1准确率仅下降0.13%
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时有效减少计算资源消耗，适用于资源受限设备
