authors_text: Mahmut Yurt,Salman Ul Hassan Dar,Muzaffer Özbey,Berk Tınaz,Kader Karlı Oğuz,Tolga Çukur
title: Semi-Supervised Learning of Mutually Accelerated MRI Synthesis without Fully-Sampled Ground Truths
title_zh: 无完全采样地面实况的互加速 MRI 合成的半监督学习
abstract: Learning-based synthetic multi-contrast MRI commonly involves deep models trained using high-quality images of source and target contrasts, regardless of whether source and target domain samples are paired or unpaired. This results in undesirable reliance on fully-sampled acquisitions of all MRI contrasts, which might prove impractical due to limitations on scan costs and time. Here, we propose a novel semi-supervised deep generative model that instead learns to recover high-quality target images directly from accelerated acquisitions of source and target contrasts. To achieve this, the proposed model introduces novel multi-coil tensor losses in image, k-space and adversarial domains. These selective losses are based only on acquired k-space samples, and randomized sampling masks are used across subjects to capture relationships among acquired and non-acquired k-space regions. Comprehensive experiments on multi-contrast neuroimaging datasets demonstrate that our semi-supervised approach yields equivalent performance to gold-standard fully-supervised models, while outperforming a cascaded approach that learns to synthesize based on reconstructions of undersampled data. Therefore, the proposed approach holds great promise to improve the feasibility and utility of accelerated MRI acquisitions mutually undersampled across both contrast sets and k-space.
summary: Learning-based synthetic multi-contrast MRI commonly involves deep models trained using high-quality images of source and target contrasts, regardless of whether source and target domain samples are paired or unpaired. This results in undesirable reliance on fully-sampled acquisitions of all MRI contrasts, which might prove impractical due to limitations on scan costs and time. Here, we propose a novel semi-supervised deep generative model that instead learns to recover high-quality target images directly from accelerated acquisitions of source and target contrasts. To achieve this, the proposed model introduces novel multi-coil tensor losses in image, k-space and adversarial domains. These selective losses are based only on acquired k-space samples, and randomized sampling masks are used across subjects to capture relationships among acquired and non-acquired k-space regions. Comprehensive experiments on multi-contrast neuroimaging datasets demonstrate that our semi-supervised approach yields equivalent performance to gold-standard fully-supervised models, while outperforming a cascaded approach that learns to synthesize based on reconstructions of undersampled data. Therefore, the proposed approach holds great promise to improve the feasibility and utility of accelerated MRI acquisitions mutually undersampled across both contrast sets and k-space.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的合成多对比 MRI 通常涉及使用源和目标对比的高质量图像训练的深度模型，无论源域样本和目标域样本是否配对。这会导致对所有 MRI 对比的完全采样采集的不合需要的依赖，由于扫描成本和时间的限制，这可能被证明是不切实际的。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督深度生成模型，该模型学习直接从源和目标对比度的加速采集中恢复高质量的目标图像。为了实现这一目标，所提出的模型在图像、k 空间和对抗域中引入了新颖的多线圈张量损失。这些选择性损失仅基于获取的 k 空间样本，并且在受试者之间使用随机采样掩模来捕获获取的和非获取的 k 空间区域之间的关系。对多对比神经影像数据集的综合实验表明，我们的半监督方法具有与黄金标准全监督模型相当的性能，同时优于基于欠采样数据重建学习合成的级联方法。因此，所提出的方法有望提高跨对比集和 k 空间相互欠采样的加速 MRI 采集的可行性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需完全采样真实数据的半监督学习方法，用于多对比MRI合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于所有对比的完全采样数据，但实际中扫描成本和时间限制使其不切实际。
AI.method: 引入多线圈张量损失，结合图像、k空间和对抗域，利用随机采样掩码捕捉采样与非采样区域的关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法性能与全监督模型相当，优于基于欠采样数据重建的级联方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有望提升跨对比集和k空间加速MRI的可行性与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种无需完全采样真实数据的半监督学习方法，用于多对比MRI合成。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法依赖于所有对比的完全采样数据，但实际中扫描成本和时间限制使其不切实际。
ai_content.method: 引入多线圈张量损失，结合图像、k空间和对抗域，利用随机采样掩码捕捉采样与非采样区域的关系。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法性能与全监督模型相当，优于基于欠采样数据重建的级联方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有望提升跨对比集和k空间加速MRI的可行性与实用性。

search_text: Semi-Supervised Learning of Mutually Accelerated MRI Synthesis without Fully-Sampled Ground Truths 无完全采样地面实况的互加速 MRI 合成的半监督学习 Learning-based synthetic multi-contrast MRI commonly involves deep models trained using high-quality images of source and target contrasts, regardless of whether source and target domain samples are paired or unpaired. This results in undesirable reliance on fully-sampled acquisitions of all MRI contrasts, which might prove impractical due to limitations on scan costs and time. Here, we propose a novel semi-supervised deep generative model that instead learns to recover high-quality target images directly from accelerated acquisitions of source and target contrasts. To achieve this, the proposed model introduces novel multi-coil tensor losses in image, k-space and adversarial domains. These selective losses are based only on acquired k-space samples, and randomized sampling masks are used across subjects to capture relationships among acquired and non-acquired k-space regions. Comprehensive experiments on multi-contrast neuroimaging datasets demonstrate that our semi-supervised approach yields equivalent performance to gold-standard fully-supervised models, while outperforming a cascaded approach that learns to synthesize based on reconstructions of undersampled data. Therefore, the proposed approach holds great promise to improve the feasibility and utility of accelerated MRI acquisitions mutually undersampled across both contrast sets and k-space. 基于学习的合成多对比 MRI 通常涉及使用源和目标对比的高质量图像训练的深度模型，无论源域样本和目标域样本是否配对。这会导致对所有 MRI 对比的完全采样采集的不合需要的依赖，由于扫描成本和时间的限制，这可能被证明是不切实际的。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督深度生成模型，该模型学习直接从源和目标对比度的加速采集中恢复高质量的目标图像。为了实现这一目标，所提出的模型在图像、k 空间和对抗域中引入了新颖的多线圈张量损失。这些选择性损失仅基于获取的 k 空间样本，并且在受试者之间使用随机采样掩模来捕获获取的和非获取的 k 空间区域之间的关系。对多对比神经影像数据集的综合实验表明，我们的半监督方法具有与黄金标准全监督模型相当的性能，同时优于基于欠采样数据重建学习合成的级联方法。因此，所提出的方法有望提高跨对比集和 k 空间相互欠采样的加速 MRI 采集的可行性和实用性。 提出一种无需完全采样真实数据的半监督学习方法，用于多对比MRI合成。 Mahmut Yurt,Salman Ul Hassan Dar,Muzaffer Özbey,Berk Tınaz,Kader Karlı Oğuz,Tolga Çukur eess.IV,cs.CV

title: ProtoPShare: Prototype Sharing for Interpretable Image Classification and Similarity Discovery
title_zh: ProtoPShare：用于可解释图像分类和相似性发现的原型共享
abstract: In this paper, we introduce ProtoPShare, a self-explained method that incorporates the paradigm of prototypical parts to explain its predictions. The main novelty of the ProtoPShare is its ability to efficiently share prototypical parts between the classes thanks to our data-dependent merge-pruning. Moreover, the prototypes are more consistent and the model is more robust to image perturbations than the state of the art method ProtoPNet. We verify our findings on two datasets, the CUB-200-2011 and the Stanford Cars.
summary: In this paper, we introduce ProtoPShare, a self-explained method that incorporates the paradigm of prototypical parts to explain its predictions. The main novelty of the ProtoPShare is its ability to efficiently share prototypical parts between the classes thanks to our data-dependent merge-pruning. Moreover, the prototypes are more consistent and the model is more robust to image perturbations than the state of the art method ProtoPNet. We verify our findings on two datasets, the CUB-200-2011 and the Stanford Cars.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 ProtoPShare，这是一种自我解释的方法，它结合了原型部件的范式来解释其预测。 ProtoPShare 的主要新颖之处在于，由于我们依赖于数据的合并修剪，它能够在类之间有效共享原型部分。此外，与最先进的方法 ProtoPNet 相比，原型更加一致，模型对图像扰动更加鲁棒。我们在 CUB-200-2011 和斯坦福汽车这两个数据集上验证了我们的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProtoPShare方法，通过原型共享实现可解释的图像分类和相似性发现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在原型生成上存在冗余且缺乏跨类别共享机制，导致模型鲁棒性和解释性不足。
AI.method: 基于数据依赖的合并剪枝策略，实现跨类别原型共享，提升原型一致性与模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011和Stanford Cars数据集上验证，ProtoPShare在原型一致性及抗扰动能力上优于ProtoPNet。
AI.conclusion: ProtoPShare通过原型共享机制，为可解释图像分类和相似性发现提供了更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: An Features Extraction and Recognition Method for Underwater Acoustic Target Based on ATCNN
title_zh: 基于ATCNN的水声目标特征提取与识别方法
abstract: Facing the complex marine environment, it is extremely challenging to conduct underwater acoustic target recognition (UATR) using ship-radiated noise. Inspired by neural mechanism of auditory perception, this paper provides a new deep neural network trained by original underwater acoustic signals with depthwise separable convolution (DWS) and time-dilated convolution neural network, named auditory perception inspired time-dilated convolution neural network (ATCNN), and then implements detection and classification for underwater acoustic signals. The proposed ATCNN model consists of learnable features extractor and integration layer inspired by auditory perception, and time-dilated convolution inspired by language model. This paper decomposes original time-domain ship-radiated noise signals into different frequency components with depthwise separable convolution filter, and then extracts signal features based on auditory perception. The deep features are integrated on integration layer. The time-dilated convolution is used for long-term contextual modeling. As a result, like language model, intra-class and inter-class information can be fully used for UATR. For UATR task, the classification accuracy reaches 90.9%, which is the highest in contrast experiment. Experimental results show that ATCNN has great potential to improve the performance of UATR classification.
summary: Facing the complex marine environment, it is extremely challenging to conduct underwater acoustic target recognition (UATR) using ship-radiated noise. Inspired by neural mechanism of auditory perception, this paper provides a new deep neural network trained by original underwater acoustic signals with depthwise separable convolution (DWS) and time-dilated convolution neural network, named auditory perception inspired time-dilated convolution neural network (ATCNN), and then implements detection and classification for underwater acoustic signals. The proposed ATCNN model consists of learnable features extractor and integration layer inspired by auditory perception, and time-dilated convolution inspired by language model. This paper decomposes original time-domain ship-radiated noise signals into different frequency components with depthwise separable convolution filter, and then extracts signal features based on auditory perception. The deep features are integrated on integration layer. The time-dilated convolution is used for long-term contextual modeling. As a result, like language model, intra-class and inter-class information can be fully used for UATR. For UATR task, the classification accuracy reaches 90.9%, which is the highest in contrast experiment. Experimental results show that ATCNN has great potential to improve the performance of UATR classification.
abstract_zh: 面对复杂的海洋环境，利用船舶辐射噪声进行水声目标识别（UATR）极具挑战性。受听觉感知神经机制的启发，本文提出了一种由原始水声信号结合深度可分离卷积（DWS）和时间扩张卷积神经网络训练的新型深度神经网络，命名为听觉感知启发时间扩张卷积神经网络（ATCNN），进而实现水声信号的检测和分类。所提出的 ATCNN 模型由受听觉感知启发的可学习特征提取器和集成层以及受语言模型启发的时间膨胀卷积组成。该文利用深度可分离卷积滤波器将原始时域船舶辐射噪声信号分解为不同频率分量，然后基于听觉感知提取信号特征。深层功能集成在集成层上。时间扩张卷积用于长期上下文建模。因此，与语言模型一样，UATR 可以充分利用类内和类间信息。对于UATR任务，分类准确率达到90.9%，是对比实验中最高的。实验结果表明ATCNN在提高UATR分类性能方面具有巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ATCNN的水下声学目标特征提取与识别方法，旨在提升复杂海洋环境下船舶辐射噪声的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 复杂海洋环境导致水下声学目标识别（UATR）面临挑战，传统方法难以有效处理船舶辐射噪声的特征提取与分类问题。
AI.method: 设计融合深度可分离卷积（DWS）和时序扩张卷积的ATCNN网络，结合听觉感知机制的特征提取层与语言模型启发的时序建模层，实现多尺度特征融合与长期上下文建模。
AI.result: 在UATR任务中分类准确率达90.9%，较对比实验方法提升显著，验证了ATCNN的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ATCNN通过模拟听觉感知机制与语言模型特性，为水下声学目标识别提供了新思路，具有显著性能优势。

authors_text: Peng Zhang,Jiaming Xu,Jing shi,Yunzhe Hao,Bo Xu
title: Audio-visual Speech Separation with Adversarially Disentangled Visual Representation
title_zh: 具有对抗性解缠视觉表示的视听语音分离
abstract: Speech separation aims to separate individual voice from an audio mixture of multiple simultaneous talkers. Although audio-only approaches achieve satisfactory performance, they build on a strategy to handle the predefined conditions, limiting their application in the complex auditory scene. Towards the cocktail party problem, we propose a novel audio-visual speech separation model. In our model, we use the face detector to detect the number of speakers in the scene and use visual information to avoid the permutation problem. To improve our model's generalization ability to unknown speakers, we extract speech-related visual features from visual inputs explicitly by the adversarially disentangled method, and use this feature to assist speech separation. Besides, the time-domain approach is adopted, which could avoid the phase reconstruction problem existing in the time-frequency domain models. To compare our model's performance with other models, we create two benchmark datasets of 2-speaker mixture from GRID and TCDTIMIT audio-visual datasets. Through a series of experiments, our proposed model is shown to outperform the state-of-the-art audio-only model and three audio-visual models.
summary: Speech separation aims to separate individual voice from an audio mixture of multiple simultaneous talkers. Although audio-only approaches achieve satisfactory performance, they build on a strategy to handle the predefined conditions, limiting their application in the complex auditory scene. Towards the cocktail party problem, we propose a novel audio-visual speech separation model. In our model, we use the face detector to detect the number of speakers in the scene and use visual information to avoid the permutation problem. To improve our model's generalization ability to unknown speakers, we extract speech-related visual features from visual inputs explicitly by the adversarially disentangled method, and use this feature to assist speech separation. Besides, the time-domain approach is adopted, which could avoid the phase reconstruction problem existing in the time-frequency domain models. To compare our model's performance with other models, we create two benchmark datasets of 2-speaker mixture from GRID and TCDTIMIT audio-visual datasets. Through a series of experiments, our proposed model is shown to outperform the state-of-the-art audio-only model and three audio-visual models.
abstract_zh: 语音分离旨在将单个语音从多个同时讲话者的音频混合物中分离出来。尽管纯音频方法取得了令人满意的性能，但它们建立在处理预定义条件的策略之上，限制了它们在复杂听觉场景中的应用。针对鸡尾酒会问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视听语音分离模型。在我们的模型中，我们使用面部检测器来检测场景中说话者的数量，并使用视觉信息来避免排列问题。为了提高模型对未知说话人的泛化能力，我们通过对抗性解缠结方法从视觉输入中显式提取与语音相关的视觉特征，并使用该特征来辅助语音分离。此外，采用时域方法，可以避免时频域模型中存在的相位重构问题。为了将我们的模型与其他模型的性能进行比较，我们从 GRID 和 TCDTIMIT 视听数据集创建了两个 2 扬声器混合的基准数据集。通过一系列的实验，我们提出的模型被证明优于最先进的纯音频模型和三个视听模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视听信息的语音分离模型，通过对抗解耦视觉特征解决复杂场景下的语音分离问题。
AI.motivation: 传统音频-only方法在复杂声学场景中表现受限，且存在说话人排列问题，需利用视觉信息提升模型泛化能力和分离效果。
AI.method: 使用人脸检测确定说话人数，通过对抗解耦方法提取与语音相关的视觉特征，结合时域处理避免相位重建问题，并构建GRID和TCDTIMIT基准数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在两个数据集上均优于现有音频-only模型及三种视听模型，有效解决了未知说话人场景下的语音分离难题。
AI.conclusion: 融合对抗解耦视觉特征与时域处理的视听分离模型，在复杂声学场景中展现出更优的语音分离性能和泛化能力。

search_text: Audio-visual Speech Separation with Adversarially Disentangled Visual Representation 具有对抗性解缠视觉表示的视听语音分离 Speech separation aims to separate individual voice from an audio mixture of multiple simultaneous talkers. Although audio-only approaches achieve satisfactory performance, they build on a strategy to handle the predefined conditions, limiting their application in the complex auditory scene. Towards the cocktail party problem, we propose a novel audio-visual speech separation model. In our model, we use the face detector to detect the number of speakers in the scene and use visual information to avoid the permutation problem. To improve our model's generalization ability to unknown speakers, we extract speech-related visual features from visual inputs explicitly by the adversarially disentangled method, and use this feature to assist speech separation. Besides, the time-domain approach is adopted, which could avoid the phase reconstruction problem existing in the time-frequency domain models. To compare our model's performance with other models, we create two benchmark datasets of 2-speaker mixture from GRID and TCDTIMIT audio-visual datasets. Through a series of experiments, our proposed model is shown to outperform the state-of-the-art audio-only model and three audio-visual models. 语音分离旨在将单个语音从多个同时讲话者的音频混合物中分离出来。尽管纯音频方法取得了令人满意的性能，但它们建立在处理预定义条件的策略之上，限制了它们在复杂听觉场景中的应用。针对鸡尾酒会问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视听语音分离模型。在我们的模型中，我们使用面部检测器来检测场景中说话者的数量，并使用视觉信息来避免排列问题。为了提高模型对未知说话人的泛化能力，我们通过对抗性解缠结方法从视觉输入中显式提取与语音相关的视觉特征，并使用该特征来辅助语音分离。此外，采用时域方法，可以避免时频域模型中存在的相位重构问题。为了将我们的模型与其他模型的性能进行比较，我们从 GRID 和 TCDTIMIT 视听数据集创建了两个 2 扬声器混合的基准数据集。通过一系列的实验，我们提出的模型被证明优于最先进的纯音频模型和三个视听模型。 本文提出一种结合视听信息的语音分离模型，通过对抗解耦视觉特征解决复杂场景下的语音分离问题。 Peng Zhang,Jiaming Xu,Jing shi,Yunzhe Hao,Bo Xu cs.SD,cs.CV,eess.AS

authors_text: Yanping Chen,Lefei Wu,Qinghua Zheng,Ruizhang Huang,Jun Liu,Liyuan Deng,Junhui Yu,Yongbin Qing,Bo Dong,Ping Chen
title: A Boundary Regression Model for Nested Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 嵌套命名实体识别的边界回归模型
abstract: Recognizing named entities (NEs) is commonly conducted as a classification problem that predicts a class tag for a word or a NE candidate in a sentence. In shallow structures, categorized features are weighted to support the prediction. Recent developments in neural networks have adopted deep structures that map categorized features into continuous representations. This approach unfolds a dense space saturated with high-order abstract semantic information, where the prediction is based on distributed feature representations. In this paper, positions of NEs in a sentence are represented as continuous values. Then, a regression operation is introduced to regress boundaries of NEs in a sentence. Based on boundary regression, we design a boundary regression model to support nested NE recognition. It is a multiobjective learning framework, which simultaneously predicts the classification score of a NE candidate and refine its spatial location in a sentence. It has the advantage to resolve nested NEs and support boundary regression for locating NEs in a sntence. By sharing parameters for predicting and locating, this model enables more potent nonlinear function approximators to enhance model discriminability. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for nested NE recognition\footnote{Our codes to implement the BR model are available at: \url{https://github.com/wuyuefei3/BR}.}.
summary: Recognizing named entities (NEs) is commonly conducted as a classification problem that predicts a class tag for a word or a NE candidate in a sentence. In shallow structures, categorized features are weighted to support the prediction. Recent developments in neural networks have adopted deep structures that map categorized features into continuous representations. This approach unfolds a dense space saturated with high-order abstract semantic information, where the prediction is based on distributed feature representations. In this paper, positions of NEs in a sentence are represented as continuous values. Then, a regression operation is introduced to regress boundaries of NEs in a sentence. Based on boundary regression, we design a boundary regression model to support nested NE recognition. It is a multiobjective learning framework, which simultaneously predicts the classification score of a NE candidate and refine its spatial location in a sentence. It has the advantage to resolve nested NEs and support boundary regression for locating NEs in a sntence. By sharing parameters for predicting and locating, this model enables more potent nonlinear function approximators to enhance model discriminability. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for nested NE recognition\footnote{Our codes to implement the BR model are available at: \url{https://github.com/wuyuefei3/BR}.}.
abstract_zh: 识别命名实体 (NE) 通常作为分类问题进行，预测句子中单词或 NE 候选的类别标签。在浅层结构中，对分类特征进行加权以支持预测。神经网络的最新发展采用了深层结构，将分类特征映射为连续表示。这种方法展开了一个充满高阶抽象语义信息的密集空间，其中预测基于分布式特征表示。在本文中，句子中NE的位置被表示为连续值。然后，引入回归操作来回归句子中NE的边界。基于边界回归，我们设计了边界回归模型来支持嵌套NE识别。它是一个多目标学习框架，可同时预测 NE 候选的分类分数并细化其在句子中的空间位置。它具有解析嵌套 NE 并支持边界回归以在句子中定位 NE 的优点。通过共享用于预测和定位的参数，该模型使更有效的非线性函数逼近器能够增强模型的辨别能力。实验证明了嵌套 NE 识别的最先进性能\footnote{我们实现 BR 模型的代码可在以下位置获取：\url{https://github.com/wuyuefei3/BR}.}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种边界回归模型，用于解决嵌套命名实体识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的命名实体识别通常作为分类问题处理，难以处理嵌套实体。本文旨在通过边界回归方法解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文将命名实体在句子中的位置表示为连续值，并引入回归操作来预测命名实体的边界。通过共享参数，模型同时预测命名实体的分类分数和空间位置。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在嵌套命名实体识别任务上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该边界回归模型能够有效解决嵌套命名实体识别问题，并通过共享参数增强了模型的判别能力。

title: Malaria Detection and Classificaiton
title_zh: 疟疾检测和分类
abstract: Malaria is a disease of global concern according to the World Health Organization. Billions of people in the world are at risk of Malaria today. Microscopy is considered the gold standard for Malaria diagnosis. Microscopic assessment of blood samples requires the need of trained professionals who at times are not available in rural areas where Malaria is a problem. Full automation of Malaria diagnosis is a challenging task. In this work, we put forward a framework for diagnosis of malaria. We adopt a two layer approach, where we detect infected cells using a Faster-RCNN in the first layer, crop them out, and feed the cropped cells to a seperate neural network for classification. The proposed methodology was tested on an openly available dataset, this will serve as a baseline for the future methods as currently there is no common dataset on which results are reported for Malaria Diagnosis.
summary: Malaria is a disease of global concern according to the World Health Organization. Billions of people in the world are at risk of Malaria today. Microscopy is considered the gold standard for Malaria diagnosis. Microscopic assessment of blood samples requires the need of trained professionals who at times are not available in rural areas where Malaria is a problem. Full automation of Malaria diagnosis is a challenging task. In this work, we put forward a framework for diagnosis of malaria. We adopt a two layer approach, where we detect infected cells using a Faster-RCNN in the first layer, crop them out, and feed the cropped cells to a seperate neural network for classification. The proposed methodology was tested on an openly available dataset, this will serve as a baseline for the future methods as currently there is no common dataset on which results are reported for Malaria Diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 据世界卫生组织称，疟疾是全球关注的疾病。今天，世界上有数十亿人面临疟疾的危险。显微镜被认为是疟疾诊断的金标准。对血液样本进行显微评估需要训练有素的专业人员，但在疟疾严重的农村地区有时无法提供这些专业人员。疟疾诊断的完全自动化是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了疟疾诊断框架。我们采用两层方法，在第一层使用 Faster-RCNN 检测受感染的细胞，将其裁剪掉，并将裁剪后的细胞输入单独的神经网络进行分类。所提出的方法在公开可用的数据集上进行了测试，这将作为未来方法的基线，因为目前没有报告疟疾诊断结果的通用数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两层框架用于疟疾的自动化检测与分类，旨在解决传统显微镜诊断依赖专业人员的不足。
AI.motivation: 疟疾威胁全球数亿人健康，而显微镜诊断需专业人员在资源匮乏地区难以普及，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：第一层用Faster-RCNN检测并裁剪感染细胞，第二层通过独立神经网络对裁剪图像进行分类。
AI.result: 方法在公开数据集上完成验证，为后续研究提供了首个疟疾诊断基准数据集和对比基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为疟疾自动化诊断提供可行方案，但需进一步优化以适应实际医疗场景需求。

tldr: 本文提出一种两层框架用于疟疾的自动化检测与分类，旨在解决传统显微镜诊断依赖专业人员的不足。
motivation: 疟疾威胁全球数亿人健康，而显微镜诊断需专业人员在资源匮乏地区难以普及，亟需自动化解决方案。
method: 采用两阶段方法：第一层用Faster-RCNN检测并裁剪感染细胞，第二层通过独立神经网络对裁剪图像进行分类。
result: 方法在公开数据集上完成验证，为后续研究提供了首个疟疾诊断基准数据集和对比基础。
conclusion: 该框架为疟疾自动化诊断提供可行方案，但需进一步优化以适应实际医疗场景需求。
search_text: Malaria Detection and Classificaiton 疟疾检测和分类 Malaria is a disease of global concern according to the World Health Organization. Billions of people in the world are at risk of Malaria today. Microscopy is considered the gold standard for Malaria diagnosis. Microscopic assessment of blood samples requires the need of trained professionals who at times are not available in rural areas where Malaria is a problem. Full automation of Malaria diagnosis is a challenging task. In this work, we put forward a framework for diagnosis of malaria. We adopt a two layer approach, where we detect infected cells using a Faster-RCNN in the first layer, crop them out, and feed the cropped cells to a seperate neural network for classification. The proposed methodology was tested on an openly available dataset, this will serve as a baseline for the future methods as currently there is no common dataset on which results are reported for Malaria Diagnosis. 据世界卫生组织称，疟疾是全球关注的疾病。今天，世界上有数十亿人面临疟疾的危险。显微镜被认为是疟疾诊断的金标准。对血液样本进行显微评估需要训练有素的专业人员，但在疟疾严重的农村地区有时无法提供这些专业人员。疟疾诊断的完全自动化是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了疟疾诊断框架。我们采用两层方法，在第一层使用 Faster-RCNN 检测受感染的细胞，将其裁剪掉，并将裁剪后的细胞输入单独的神经网络进行分类。所提出的方法在公开可用的数据集上进行了测试，这将作为未来方法的基线，因为目前没有报告疟疾诊断结果的通用数据集。 本文提出一种两层框架用于疟疾的自动化检测与分类，旨在解决传统显微镜诊断依赖专业人员的不足。 Ruskin Raj Manku,Ayush Sharma,Anand Panchbhai eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Kate Barnes,Tiernon Riesenmy,Minh Duc Trinh,Eli Lleshi,Nóra Balogh,Roland Molontay
title: Dank or Not? -- Analyzing and Predicting the Popularity of Memes on Reddit
title_zh: 潮湿与否？ -- 分析和预测 Reddit 上的 Meme 流行度
abstract: Internet memes have become an increasingly pervasive form of contemporary social communication that attracted a lot of research interest recently. In this paper, we analyze the data of 129,326 memes collected from Reddit in the middle of March, 2020, when the most serious coronavirus restrictions were being introduced around the world. This article not only provides a looking glass into the thoughts of Internet users during the COVID-19 pandemic but we also perform a content-based predictive analysis of what makes a meme go viral. Using machine learning methods, we also study what incremental predictive power image related attributes have over textual attributes on meme popularity. We find that the success of a meme can be predicted based on its content alone moderately well, our best performing machine learning model predicts viral memes with AUC=0.68. We also find that both image related and textual attributes have significant incremental predictive power over each other.
summary: Internet memes have become an increasingly pervasive form of contemporary social communication that attracted a lot of research interest recently. In this paper, we analyze the data of 129,326 memes collected from Reddit in the middle of March, 2020, when the most serious coronavirus restrictions were being introduced around the world. This article not only provides a looking glass into the thoughts of Internet users during the COVID-19 pandemic but we also perform a content-based predictive analysis of what makes a meme go viral. Using machine learning methods, we also study what incremental predictive power image related attributes have over textual attributes on meme popularity. We find that the success of a meme can be predicted based on its content alone moderately well, our best performing machine learning model predicts viral memes with AUC=0.68. We also find that both image related and textual attributes have significant incremental predictive power over each other.
abstract_zh: 互联网模因已成为当代社会交流的一种日益普遍的形式，最近引起了很多研究兴趣。在本文中，我们分析了 2020 年 3 月中旬从 Reddit 收集的 129,326 个表情包的数据，当时世界各地正在实施最严格的冠状病毒限制。本文不仅让我们了解了 COVID-19 大流行期间互联网用户的想法，而且我们还对模因传播的原因进行了基于内容的预测分析。使用机器学习方法，我们还研究了图像相关属性相对于文本属性对模因流行度的增量预测能力。我们发现，仅根据模因的内容就可以很好地预测模因的成功，我们表现最好的机器学习模型预测病毒模因的 AUC=0.68。我们还发现图像相关属性和文本属性都具有显着的增量预测能力。

AI.tldr: 分析并预测Reddit平台上迷因的流行度，探讨内容属性对病毒传播的影响。
AI.motivation: 通过疫情期间的社交媒体数据洞察用户心理，并研究内容特征对迷因传播的预测能力。
AI.method: 基于129,326个迷因数据，采用机器学习模型比较图像与文本属性的预测效能，使用AUC指标评估模型表现。
AI.result: 最佳模型实现AUC=0.68的中等预测效果，图像与文本属性均对流行度预测有显著增量贡献。
AI.conclusion: 迷因流行度可基于内容特征进行中等程度预测，图像与文本属性需结合分析以提升预测精度。

authors_text: Xiaoxu Li,Jijie Wu,Zhuo Sun,Zhanyu Ma,Jie Cao,Jing-Hao Xue
title: BSNet: Bi-Similarity Network for Few-shot Fine-grained Image Classification
title_zh: BSNet：用于少镜头细粒度图像分类的双相似网络
abstract: Few-shot learning for fine-grained image classification has gained recent attention in computer vision. Among the approaches for few-shot learning, due to the simplicity and effectiveness, metric-based methods are favorably state-of-the-art on many tasks. Most of the metric-based methods assume a single similarity measure and thus obtain a single feature space. However, if samples can simultaneously be well classified via two distinct similarity measures, the samples within a class can distribute more compactly in a smaller feature space, producing more discriminative feature maps. Motivated by this, we propose a so-called \textit{Bi-Similarity Network} (\textit{BSNet}) that consists of a single embedding module and a bi-similarity module of two similarity measures. After the support images and the query images pass through the convolution-based embedding module, the bi-similarity module learns feature maps according to two similarity measures of diverse characteristics. In this way, the model is enabled to learn more discriminative and less similarity-biased features from few shots of fine-grained images, such that the model generalization ability can be significantly improved. Through extensive experiments by slightly modifying established metric/similarity based networks, we show that the proposed approach produces a substantial improvement on several fine-grained image benchmark datasets. Codes are available at: https://github.com/spraise/BSNet
summary: Few-shot learning for fine-grained image classification has gained recent attention in computer vision. Among the approaches for few-shot learning, due to the simplicity and effectiveness, metric-based methods are favorably state-of-the-art on many tasks. Most of the metric-based methods assume a single similarity measure and thus obtain a single feature space. However, if samples can simultaneously be well classified via two distinct similarity measures, the samples within a class can distribute more compactly in a smaller feature space, producing more discriminative feature maps. Motivated by this, we propose a so-called \textit{Bi-Similarity Network} (\textit{BSNet}) that consists of a single embedding module and a bi-similarity module of two similarity measures. After the support images and the query images pass through the convolution-based embedding module, the bi-similarity module learns feature maps according to two similarity measures of diverse characteristics. In this way, the model is enabled to learn more discriminative and less similarity-biased features from few shots of fine-grained images, such that the model generalization ability can be significantly improved. Through extensive experiments by slightly modifying established metric/similarity based networks, we show that the proposed approach produces a substantial improvement on several fine-grained image benchmark datasets. Codes are available at: https://github.com/spraise/BSNet
abstract_zh: 用于细粒度图像分类的少样本学习最近在计算机视觉领域引起了关注。在小样本学习的方法中，由于简单且有效，基于度量的方法在许多任务上都是最先进的。大多数基于度量的方法都假设单个相似性度量，从而获得单个特征空间。然而，如果可以通过两个不同的相似性度量同时对样本进行良好分类，则类内的样本可以更紧凑地分布在较小的特征空间中，从而产生更具辨别力的特征图。受此启发，我们提出了一种所谓的 \textit{Bi-Similarity Network} (\textit{BSNet})，它由单个嵌入模块和两个相似性度量的双相似性模块组成。支持图像和查询图像经过基于卷积的嵌入模块后，双相似性模块根据不同特征的两个相似性度量来学习特征图。通过这种方式，模型能够从少量的细粒度图像中学习更具区分性和更少相似性偏差的特征，从而显着提高模型的泛化能力。通过稍微修改已建立的基于度量/相似性的网络进行大量实验，我们表明所提出的方法对几个细粒度图像基准数据集产生了实质性改进。代码可访问：https://github.com/spraise/BSNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出BSNet，一种用于小样本细粒度图像分类的双相似性网络，通过结合两种相似性度量来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于度量的小样本方法通常依赖单一相似性度量，导致特征空间分布不够紧凑。若能通过两种不同相似性度量同时分类样本，可使同类样本在更小特征空间中分布更紧密，从而提升判别性。
AI.method: BSNet包含单一流形嵌入模块和双相似性模块。嵌入模块提取支持集和查询集的特征，双相似性模块通过两种不同特性相似性度量学习更判别性的特征映射，减少相似性偏差。
AI.result: 在多个细粒度图像基准数据集上，通过轻微修改现有度量/相似性网络，BSNet显著提升了小样本分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 双相似性网络通过融合两种相似性度量，有效增强了小样本细粒度图像分类的泛化能力，为相关任务提供了新思路。

title: Image-based Plant Disease Diagnosis with Unsupervised Anomaly Detection Based on Reconstructability of Colors
title_zh: 基于图像的植物病害诊断和基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测
comment: This paper is accepted by IMPROVE 2021. 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables
comments: This paper is accepted by IMPROVE 2021. 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables
abstract: This paper proposes an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis. The construction of large and publicly available datasets containing labeled images of healthy and diseased crop plants led to growing interest in computer vision techniques for automatic plant disease diagnosis. Although supervised image classifiers based on deep learning can be a powerful tool for plant disease diagnosis, they require a huge amount of labeled data. The data mining technique of anomaly detection includes unsupervised approaches that do not require rare samples for training classifiers. We propose an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis that is based on the reconstructability of colors; a deep encoder-decoder network trained to reconstruct the colors of \textit{healthy} plant images should fail to reconstruct colors of symptomatic regions. Our proposed method includes a new image-based framework for plant disease detection that utilizes a conditional adversarial network called pix2pix and a new anomaly score based on CIEDE2000 color difference. Experiments with PlantVillage dataset demonstrated the superiority of our proposed method compared to an existing anomaly detector at identifying diseased crop images in terms of accuracy, interpretability and computational efficiency.
summary: This paper proposes an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis. The construction of large and publicly available datasets containing labeled images of healthy and diseased crop plants led to growing interest in computer vision techniques for automatic plant disease diagnosis. Although supervised image classifiers based on deep learning can be a powerful tool for plant disease diagnosis, they require a huge amount of labeled data. The data mining technique of anomaly detection includes unsupervised approaches that do not require rare samples for training classifiers. We propose an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis that is based on the reconstructability of colors; a deep encoder-decoder network trained to reconstruct the colors of \textit{healthy} plant images should fail to reconstruct colors of symptomatic regions. Our proposed method includes a new image-based framework for plant disease detection that utilizes a conditional adversarial network called pix2pix and a new anomaly score based on CIEDE2000 color difference. Experiments with PlantVillage dataset demonstrated the superiority of our proposed method compared to an existing anomaly detector at identifying diseased crop images in terms of accuracy, interpretability and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于基于图像的植物病害诊断的无监督异常检测技术。包含健康和患病作物植物标记图像的大型公开数据集的构建导致人们对用于自动植物病害诊断的计算机视觉技术越来越感兴趣。尽管基于深度学习的监督图像分类器可以成为植物病害诊断的强大工具，但它们需要大量的标记数据。异常检测的数据挖掘技术包括无监督方法，不需要稀有样本来训练分类器。我们提出了一种基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测技术，用于基于图像的植物病害诊断；经过训练来重建 \textit{healthy} 植物图像颜色的深度编码器-解码器网络应该无法重建有症状区域的颜色。我们提出的方法包括一个新的基于图像的植物病害检测框架，该框架利用称为 pix2pix 的条件对抗网络和基于 CIEDE2000 色差的新异常评分。 PlantVillage 数据集的实验证明，与现有的异常检测器相比，我们提出的方法在识别患病作物图像方面在准确性​​、可解释性和计算效率方面具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测技术，用于图像化的植物疾病诊断。
AI.motivation: 尽管监督学习在植物疾病诊断中表现强大，但需要大量标注数据。无监督异常检测可避免对罕见样本的依赖，适合数据标注成本高的场景。
AI.method: 构建深度编码-解码网络，训练其重构健康植物图像的颜色，利用CIEDE2000色差计算异常分数，并结合pix2pix条件对抗网络实现疾病区域检测。
AI.result: 在PlantVillage数据集上的实验表明，该方法在准确率、可解释性和计算效率上优于现有异常检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于颜色重构的无监督方法为植物疾病诊断提供了无需标注数据的有效解决方案。

search_text: Image-based Plant Disease Diagnosis with Unsupervised Anomaly Detection Based on Reconstructability of Colors 基于图像的植物病害诊断和基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测 This paper proposes an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis. The construction of large and publicly available datasets containing labeled images of healthy and diseased crop plants led to growing interest in computer vision techniques for automatic plant disease diagnosis. Although supervised image classifiers based on deep learning can be a powerful tool for plant disease diagnosis, they require a huge amount of labeled data. The data mining technique of anomaly detection includes unsupervised approaches that do not require rare samples for training classifiers. We propose an unsupervised anomaly detection technique for image-based plant disease diagnosis that is based on the reconstructability of colors; a deep encoder-decoder network trained to reconstruct the colors of \textit{healthy} plant images should fail to reconstruct colors of symptomatic regions. Our proposed method includes a new image-based framework for plant disease detection that utilizes a conditional adversarial network called pix2pix and a new anomaly score based on CIEDE2000 color difference. Experiments with PlantVillage dataset demonstrated the superiority of our proposed method compared to an existing anomaly detector at identifying diseased crop images in terms of accuracy, interpretability and computational efficiency. 本文提出了一种用于基于图像的植物病害诊断的无监督异常检测技术。包含健康和患病作物植物标记图像的大型公开数据集的构建导致人们对用于自动植物病害诊断的计算机视觉技术越来越感兴趣。尽管基于深度学习的监督图像分类器可以成为植物病害诊断的强大工具，但它们需要大量的标记数据。异常检测的数据挖掘技术包括无监督方法，不需要稀有样本来训练分类器。我们提出了一种基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测技术，用于基于图像的植物病害诊断；经过训练来重建 \textit{healthy} 植物图像颜色的深度编码器-解码器网络应该无法重建有症状区域的颜色。我们提出的方法包括一个新的基于图像的植物病害检测框架，该框架利用称为 pix2pix 的条件对抗网络和基于 CIEDE2000 色差的新异常评分。 PlantVillage 数据集的实验证明，与现有的异常检测器相比，我们提出的方法在识别患病作物图像方面在准确性​​、可解释性和计算效率方面具有优越性。 本文提出一种基于颜色可重构性的无监督异常检测技术，用于图像化的植物疾病诊断。 Ryoya Katafuchi,Terumasa Tokunaga cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Rui Li,Shunyi Zheng,Chenxi Duan,Jianlin Su,Ce Zhang
title: Multi-stage Attention ResU-Net for Semantic Segmentation of Fine-Resolution Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 用于精细分辨率遥感图像语义分割的多级Attention ResU-Net
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.14902, arXiv:2009.02130
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2007.14902, arXiv:2009.02130
abstract: The attention mechanism can refine the extracted feature maps and boost the classification performance of the deep network, which has become an essential technique in computer vision and natural language processing. However, the memory and computational costs of the dot-product attention mechanism increase quadratically with the spatio-temporal size of the input. Such growth hinders the usage of attention mechanisms considerably in application scenarios with large-scale inputs. In this Letter, we propose a Linear Attention Mechanism (LAM) to address this issue, which is approximately equivalent to dot-product attention with computational efficiency. Such a design makes the incorporation between attention mechanisms and deep networks much more flexible and versatile. Based on the proposed LAM, we re-factor the skip connections in the raw U-Net and design a Multi-stage Attention ResU-Net (MAResU-Net) for semantic segmentation from fine-resolution remote sensing images. Experiments conducted on the Vaihingen dataset demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of our MAResU-Net. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/lironui/Multistage-Attention-ResU-Net.
summary: The attention mechanism can refine the extracted feature maps and boost the classification performance of the deep network, which has become an essential technique in computer vision and natural language processing. However, the memory and computational costs of the dot-product attention mechanism increase quadratically with the spatio-temporal size of the input. Such growth hinders the usage of attention mechanisms considerably in application scenarios with large-scale inputs. In this Letter, we propose a Linear Attention Mechanism (LAM) to address this issue, which is approximately equivalent to dot-product attention with computational efficiency. Such a design makes the incorporation between attention mechanisms and deep networks much more flexible and versatile. Based on the proposed LAM, we re-factor the skip connections in the raw U-Net and design a Multi-stage Attention ResU-Net (MAResU-Net) for semantic segmentation from fine-resolution remote sensing images. Experiments conducted on the Vaihingen dataset demonstrated the effectiveness and efficiency of our MAResU-Net. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/lironui/Multistage-Attention-ResU-Net.
abstract_zh: 注意力机制可以细化提取的特征图并提高深度网络的分类性能，这已成为计算机视觉和自然语言处理中的基本技术。然而，点积注意力机制的内存和计算成本随着输入的时空大小呈二次方增加。这种增长极大地阻碍了注意力机制在大规模输入的应用场景中的使用。在这封信中，我们提出了一种线性注意力机制（LAM）来解决这个问题，它大约相当于具有计算效率的点积注意力。这样的设计使得注意力机制和深度网络之间的结合更加灵活和通用。基于所提出的 LAM，我们重构了原始 U-Net 中的跳跃连接，并设计了一个多阶段注意力 ResU-Net (MAResU-Net)，用于精细分辨率遥感图像的语义分割。在 Vaihingen 数据集上进行的实验证明了我们的 MAResU-Net 的有效性和效率。开源代码可在 https://github.com/lironui/Multistage-Attention-ResU-Net 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多阶段注意力ResU-Net网络，用于高分辨率遥感图像的语义分割，通过线性注意力机制降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统注意力机制计算复杂度高，限制了其在大规模输入场景中的应用，需更高效的注意力机制。
AI.method: 提出线性注意力机制（LAM），替代传统点积注意力，降低计算成本；基于LAM重构ResU-Net跳跃连接，设计多阶段注意力ResU-Net（MAResU-Net）。
AI.result: 在Vaihingen数据集上的实验验证了MAResU-Net的有效性和效率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MAResU-Net通过线性注意力机制有效降低了计算成本，适用于高分辨率遥感图像语义分割任务。

authors_text: Haotian Xie,Yong Zhang,Jun Wang,Jingjing Zhang,Yifan Ma,Zhaogang Yang
title: Automated Prostate Cancer Diagnosis Based on Gleason Grading Using Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络基于格里森分级的自动化前列腺癌诊断
comment: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant the license applied at the time of submission
comments: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators because the submitter did not have the authority to grant the license applied at the time of submission
abstract: The Gleason grading system using histological images is the most powerful diagnostic and prognostic predictor of prostate cancer. The current standard inspection is evaluating Gleason H&E-stained histopathology images by pathologists. However, it is complicated, time-consuming, and subject to observers. Deep learning (DL) based-methods that automatically learn image features and achieve higher generalization ability have attracted significant attention. However, challenges remain especially using DL to train the whole slide image (WSI), a predominant clinical source in the current diagnostic setting, containing billions of pixels, morphological heterogeneity, and artifacts. Hence, we proposed a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based automatic classification method for accurate grading of PCa using whole slide histopathology images. In this paper, a data augmentation method named Patch-Based Image Reconstruction (PBIR) was proposed to reduce the high resolution and increase the diversity of WSIs. In addition, a distribution correction (DC) module was developed to enhance the adaption of pretrained model to the target dataset by adjusting the data distribution. Besides, a Quadratic Weighted Mean Square Error (QWMSE) function was presented to reduce the misdiagnosis caused by equal Euclidean distances. Our experiments indicated the combination of PBIR, DC, and QWMSE function was necessary for achieving superior expert-level performance, leading to the best results (0.8885 quadratic-weighted kappa coefficient).
summary: The Gleason grading system using histological images is the most powerful diagnostic and prognostic predictor of prostate cancer. The current standard inspection is evaluating Gleason H&E-stained histopathology images by pathologists. However, it is complicated, time-consuming, and subject to observers. Deep learning (DL) based-methods that automatically learn image features and achieve higher generalization ability have attracted significant attention. However, challenges remain especially using DL to train the whole slide image (WSI), a predominant clinical source in the current diagnostic setting, containing billions of pixels, morphological heterogeneity, and artifacts. Hence, we proposed a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based automatic classification method for accurate grading of PCa using whole slide histopathology images. In this paper, a data augmentation method named Patch-Based Image Reconstruction (PBIR) was proposed to reduce the high resolution and increase the diversity of WSIs. In addition, a distribution correction (DC) module was developed to enhance the adaption of pretrained model to the target dataset by adjusting the data distribution. Besides, a Quadratic Weighted Mean Square Error (QWMSE) function was presented to reduce the misdiagnosis caused by equal Euclidean distances. Our experiments indicated the combination of PBIR, DC, and QWMSE function was necessary for achieving superior expert-level performance, leading to the best results (0.8885 quadratic-weighted kappa coefficient).
abstract_zh: 使用组织学图像的格里森分级系统是前列腺癌最强大的诊断和预后预测指标。目前的标准检查是由病理学家评估格里森 H&E 染色的组织病理学图像。然而，它是复杂的、耗时的并且受观察者的影响。基于深度学习（DL）的方法可以自动学习图像特征并实现更高的泛化能力，引起了人们的广泛关注。然而，挑战仍然存在，尤其是使用深度学习来训练整个幻灯片图像 (WSI)，这是当前诊断环境中的主要临床来源，包含数十亿像素、形态异质性和伪影。因此，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的自动分类方法，用于使用整个切片组织病理学图像对 PCa 进行准确分级。本文提出了一种名为基于补丁的图像重建（PBIR）的数据增强方法来降低高分辨率并增加 WSI 的多样性。此外，还开发了分布校正（DC）模块，通过调整数据分布来增强预训练模型对目标数据集的适应性。此外，提出了二次加权均方误差（QWMSE）函数来减少欧氏距离相等引起的误诊。我们的实验表明，PBIR、DC 和 QWMSE 函数的组合对于实现卓越的专家级性能是必要的，从而获得最佳结果（二次加权 kappa 系数为 0.8885）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的前列腺癌自动分级方法，利用全切片病理图像进行精准诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统前列腺癌诊断依赖病理学家对Gleason评分的主观判断，存在耗时、易受观察者影响等问题，而深度学习在处理高分辨率、异质性强的全切片图像（WSI）时仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出三种关键技术：基于补丁的图像重建（PBIR）降低分辨率并增强数据多样性；分布校正（DC）模块调整预训练模型适应目标数据集；二次加权均方误差（QWMSE）函数减少误诊风险。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合PBIR、DC和QWMSE的方法达到0.8885的二次加权Kappa系数，性能接近专家水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过多技术协同优化，有效解决了WSI处理中的关键问题，为前列腺癌自动化诊断提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的前列腺癌自动分级方法，利用全切片病理图像进行精准诊断。
ai_content.motivation: 传统前列腺癌诊断依赖病理学家对Gleason评分的主观判断，存在耗时、易受观察者影响等问题，而深度学习在处理高分辨率、异质性强的全切片图像（WSI）时仍面临挑战。
ai_content.method: 提出三种关键技术：基于补丁的图像重建（PBIR）降低分辨率并增强数据多样性；分布校正（DC）模块调整预训练模型适应目标数据集；二次加权均方误差（QWMSE）函数减少误诊风险。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，结合PBIR、DC和QWMSE的方法达到0.8885的二次加权Kappa系数，性能接近专家水平。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文方法通过多技术协同优化，有效解决了WSI处理中的关键问题，为前列腺癌自动化诊断提供了可行方案。

search_text: Automated Prostate Cancer Diagnosis Based on Gleason Grading Using Convolutional Neural Network 使用卷积神经网络基于格里森分级的自动化前列腺癌诊断 The Gleason grading system using histological images is the most powerful diagnostic and prognostic predictor of prostate cancer. The current standard inspection is evaluating Gleason H&E-stained histopathology images by pathologists. However, it is complicated, time-consuming, and subject to observers. Deep learning (DL) based-methods that automatically learn image features and achieve higher generalization ability have attracted significant attention. However, challenges remain especially using DL to train the whole slide image (WSI), a predominant clinical source in the current diagnostic setting, containing billions of pixels, morphological heterogeneity, and artifacts. Hence, we proposed a convolutional neural network (CNN)-based automatic classification method for accurate grading of PCa using whole slide histopathology images. In this paper, a data augmentation method named Patch-Based Image Reconstruction (PBIR) was proposed to reduce the high resolution and increase the diversity of WSIs. In addition, a distribution correction (DC) module was developed to enhance the adaption of pretrained model to the target dataset by adjusting the data distribution. Besides, a Quadratic Weighted Mean Square Error (QWMSE) function was presented to reduce the misdiagnosis caused by equal Euclidean distances. Our experiments indicated the combination of PBIR, DC, and QWMSE function was necessary for achieving superior expert-level performance, leading to the best results (0.8885 quadratic-weighted kappa coefficient). 使用组织学图像的格里森分级系统是前列腺癌最强大的诊断和预后预测指标。目前的标准检查是由病理学家评估格里森 H&E 染色的组织病理学图像。然而，它是复杂的、耗时的并且受观察者的影响。基于深度学习（DL）的方法可以自动学习图像特征并实现更高的泛化能力，引起了人们的广泛关注。然而，挑战仍然存在，尤其是使用深度学习来训练整个幻灯片图像 (WSI)，这是当前诊断环境中的主要临床来源，包含数十亿像素、形态异质性和伪影。因此，我们提出了一种基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的自动分类方法，用于使用整个切片组织病理学图像对 PCa 进行准确分级。本文提出了一种名为基于补丁的图像重建（PBIR）的数据增强方法来降低高分辨率并增加 WSI 的多样性。此外，还开发了分布校正（DC）模块，通过调整数据分布来增强预训练模型对目标数据集的适应性。此外，提出了二次加权均方误差（QWMSE）函数来减少欧氏距离相等引起的误诊。我们的实验表明，PBIR、DC 和 QWMSE 函数的组合对于实现卓越的专家级性能是必要的，从而获得最佳结果（二次加权 kappa 系数为 0.8885）。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的前列腺癌自动分级方法，利用全切片病理图像进行精准诊断。 Haotian Xie,Yong Zhang,Jun Wang,Jingjing Zhang,Yifan Ma,Zhaogang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Alphin J. Thottupattu,Jayanthi Sivaswamy,Venkateswaran P. Krishnan
title: A method for large diffeomorphic registration via broken geodesics
title_zh: 一种通过破碎测地线进行大微分同胚配准的方法
abstract: Anatomical variabilities seen in longitudinal data or inter-subject data is usually described by the underlying deformation, captured by non-rigid registration of these images. Stationary Velocity Field (SVF) based non-rigid registration algorithms are widely used for registration. SVF based methods form a metric-free framework which captures a finite dimensional submanifold of deformations embedded in the infinite dimensional smooth manifold of diffeomorphisms. However, these methods cover only a limited degree of deformations. In this paper, we address this limitation and define an approximate metric space for the manifold of diffeomorphisms $\mathcal{G}$. We propose a method to break down the large deformation into finite compositions of small deformations. This results in a broken geodesic path on $\mathcal{G}$ and its length now forms an approximate registration metric. We illustrate the method using a simple, intensity-based, log-demon implementation. Validation results of the proposed method show that it can capture large and complex deformations while producing qualitatively better results than the state-of-the-art methods. The results also demonstrate that the proposed registration metric is a good indicator of the degree of deformation.
summary: Anatomical variabilities seen in longitudinal data or inter-subject data is usually described by the underlying deformation, captured by non-rigid registration of these images. Stationary Velocity Field (SVF) based non-rigid registration algorithms are widely used for registration. SVF based methods form a metric-free framework which captures a finite dimensional submanifold of deformations embedded in the infinite dimensional smooth manifold of diffeomorphisms. However, these methods cover only a limited degree of deformations. In this paper, we address this limitation and define an approximate metric space for the manifold of diffeomorphisms $\mathcal{G}$. We propose a method to break down the large deformation into finite compositions of small deformations. This results in a broken geodesic path on $\mathcal{G}$ and its length now forms an approximate registration metric. We illustrate the method using a simple, intensity-based, log-demon implementation. Validation results of the proposed method show that it can capture large and complex deformations while producing qualitatively better results than the state-of-the-art methods. The results also demonstrate that the proposed registration metric is a good indicator of the degree of deformation.
abstract_zh: 纵向数据或受试者间数据中看到的解剖变异通常通过潜在的变形来描述，这些变形是通过这些图像的非刚性配准捕获的。基于静止速度场（SVF）的非刚性配准算法广泛用于配准。基于 SVF 的方法形成了一个无度量框架，该框架捕获嵌入微分同胚的无限维平滑流形中的有限维变形子流形。然而，这些方法仅涵盖有限程度的变形。在本文中，我们解决了这个限制，并为微分同胚流形 $\mathcal{G}$ 定义了一个近似度量空间。我们提出了一种将大变形分解为小变形的有限组合的方法。这会导致 $\mathcal{G}$ 上的测地线路径损坏，并且其长度现在形成近似配准度量。我们使用简单的、基于强度的日志恶魔实现来说明该方法。该方法的验证结果表明，它可以捕获大而复杂的变形，同时产生比最先进的方法更好的质量结果。结果还表明，所提出的配准度量是变形程度的良好指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过断裂测地线进行大变形微分同胚配准的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于固定速度场（SVF）的非刚性配准方法在捕捉变形方面存在局限性，无法有效处理大范围和复杂的变形。
AI.method: 本文定义了一个近似的度量空间，并将大变形分解为多个小变形的组合，形成断裂测地线路径，以此作为配准的近似度量。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够有效捕捉大而复杂的变形，并在定性上优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的配准度量能够很好地反映变形的程度，为处理复杂变形提供了新的方法。

title: A comparison of handcrafted, parameterized, and learnable features for speech separation
title_zh: 语音分离的手工、参数化和可学习特征的比较
abstract: The design of acoustic features is important for speech separation. It can be roughly categorized into three classes: handcrafted, parameterized, and learnable features. Among them, learnable features, which are trained with separation networks jointly in an end-to-end fashion, become a new trend of modern speech separation research, e.g. convolutional time domain audio separation network (Conv-Tasnet), while handcrafted and parameterized features are also shown competitive in very recent studies. However, a systematic comparison across the three kinds of acoustic features has not been conducted yet. In this paper, we compare them in the framework of Conv-Tasnet by setting its encoder and decoder with different acoustic features. We also generalize the handcrafted multi-phase gammatone filterbank (MPGTF) to a new parameterized multi-phase gammatone filterbank (ParaMPGTF). Experimental results on the WSJ0-2mix corpus show that (i) if the decoder is learnable, then setting the encoder to STFT, MPGTF, ParaMPGTF, and learnable features lead to similar performance; and (ii) when the pseudo-inverse transforms of STFT, MPGTF, and ParaMPGTF are used as the decoders, the proposed ParaMPGTF performs better than the other two handcrafted features.
summary: The design of acoustic features is important for speech separation. It can be roughly categorized into three classes: handcrafted, parameterized, and learnable features. Among them, learnable features, which are trained with separation networks jointly in an end-to-end fashion, become a new trend of modern speech separation research, e.g. convolutional time domain audio separation network (Conv-Tasnet), while handcrafted and parameterized features are also shown competitive in very recent studies. However, a systematic comparison across the three kinds of acoustic features has not been conducted yet. In this paper, we compare them in the framework of Conv-Tasnet by setting its encoder and decoder with different acoustic features. We also generalize the handcrafted multi-phase gammatone filterbank (MPGTF) to a new parameterized multi-phase gammatone filterbank (ParaMPGTF). Experimental results on the WSJ0-2mix corpus show that (i) if the decoder is learnable, then setting the encoder to STFT, MPGTF, ParaMPGTF, and learnable features lead to similar performance; and (ii) when the pseudo-inverse transforms of STFT, MPGTF, and ParaMPGTF are used as the decoders, the proposed ParaMPGTF performs better than the other two handcrafted features.
abstract_zh: 声学特征的设计对于语音分离很重要。它可以大致分为三类：手工制作的、参数化的和可学习的特征。其中，以端到端的方式与分离网络联合训练的可学习特征成为现代语音分离研究的新趋势。卷积时域音频分离网络（Conv-Tasnet），而手工制作和参数化的特征在最近的研究中也显示出竞争力。然而，尚未对这三种声学特征进行系统比较。在本文中，我们通过设置具有不同声学特征的编码器和解码器，在Conv-Tasnet的框架下对它们进行比较。我们还将手工制作的多相伽玛色调滤波器组（MPGTF）推广为新的参数化多相伽玛色调滤波器组（ParaMPGTF）。 WSJ0-2mix 语料库上的实验结果表明，（i）如果解码器是可学习的，则将编码器设置为 STFT、MPGTF、ParaMPGTF，并且可学习的特征会导致相似的性能； (ii) 当 STFT、MPGTF 和 ParaMPGTF 的伪逆变换用作解码器时，所提出的 ParaMPGTF 的性能优于其他两个手工特征。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了语音分离中手工设计、参数化和可学习特征的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管可学习特征成为语音分离研究的新趋势，但缺乏对三类特征的系统性对比分析。
AI.method: 基于Conv-Tasnet框架，通过设置不同声学特征的编码器和解码器进行对比实验，并提出参数化多相位伽马滤波器组(ParaMPGTF)。
AI.result: 当解码器为可学习时，STFT、MPGTF、ParaMPGTF和可学习特征表现相近；当使用伪逆变换作为解码器时，ParaMPGTF优于其他两种手工特征。
AI.conclusion: ParaMPGTF在特定解码器配置下表现更优，解码器设计对特征性能有显著影响。

In this paper, we compare them in the framework of Conv-Tasnet by setting its encoder and decoder with different acoustic features. Experimental results on the WSJ0-2mix corpus show that (i) if the decoder is learnable, then setting the encoder to STFT, MPGTF, ParaMPGTF, and learnable features lead to similar performance; and (ii) when the pseudo-inverse transforms of STFT, MPGTF, and ParaMPGTF are used as the decoders, the proposed ParaMPGTF performs better than the other two handcrafted features. 声学特征的设计对于语音分离很重要。它可以大致分为三类：手工制作的、参数化的和可学习的特征。其中，以端到端的方式与分离网络联合训练的可学习特征成为现代语音分离研究的新趋势。卷积时域音频分离网络（Conv-Tasnet），而手工制作和参数化的特征在最近的研究中也显示出竞争力。然而，尚未对这三种声学特征进行系统比较。在本文中，我们通过设置具有不同声学特征的编码器和解码器，在Conv-Tasnet的框架下对它们进行比较。我们还将手工制作的多相伽玛色调滤波器组（MPGTF）推广为新的参数化多相伽玛色调滤波器组（ParaMPGTF）。 WSJ0-2mix 语料库上的实验结果表明，（i）如果解码器是可学习的，则将编码器设置为 STFT、MPGTF、ParaMPGTF，并且可学习的特征会导致相似的性能； (ii) 当 STFT、MPGTF 和 ParaMPGTF 的伪逆变换用作解码器时，所提出的 ParaMPGTF 的性能优于其他两个手工特征。 本文比较了语音分离中手工设计、参数化和可学习特征的性能差异。 Wenbo Zhu,Mou Wang,Xiao-Lei Zhang,Susanto Rahardja cs.SD

authors_text: Amit Levi,Ramesh Krishnan S. Pallavoor,Sofya Raskhodnikova,Nithin Varma
title: Erasure-Resilient Sublinear-Time Graph Algorithms
title_zh: 抗擦除次线性时间图算法
comment: To appear in the 12th Innovations in Theoretical Computer Science (ITCS) conference, 2021
comments: To appear in the 12th Innovations in Theoretical Computer Science (ITCS) conference, 2021
abstract: We investigate sublinear-time algorithms that take partially erased graphs represented by adjacency lists as input. Our algorithms make degree and neighbor queries to the input graph and work with a specified fraction of adversarial erasures in adjacency entries. We focus on two computational tasks: testing if a graph is connected or $\varepsilon$-far from connected and estimating the average degree. For testing connectedness, we discover a threshold phenomenon: when the fraction of erasures is less than $\varepsilon$, this property can be tested efficiently (in time independent of the size of the graph); when the fraction of erasures is at least $\varepsilon,$ then a number of queries linear in the size of the graph representation is required. Our erasure-resilient algorithm (for the special case with no erasures) is an improvement over the previously known algorithm for connectedness in the standard property testing model and has optimal dependence on the proximity parameter $\varepsilon$. For estimating the average degree, our results provide an "interpolation" between the query complexity for this computational task in the model with no erasures in two different settings: with only degree queries, investigated by Feige (SIAM J. Comput. `06), and with degree queries and neighbor queries, investigated by Goldreich and Ron (Random Struct. Algorithms `08) and Eden et al. (ICALP `17). We conclude with a discussion of our model and open questions raised by our work.

Our algorithms make degree and neighbor queries to the input graph and work with a specified fraction of adversarial erasures in adjacency entries. Our erasure-resilient algorithm (for the special case with no erasures) is an improvement over the previously known algorithm for connectedness in the standard property testing model and has optimal dependence on the proximity parameter $\varepsilon$. For estimating the average degree, our results provide an "interpolation" between the query complexity for this computational task in the model with no erasures in two different settings: with only degree queries, investigated by Feige (SIAM J. Comput. `06), and with degree queries and neighbor queries, investigated by Goldreich and Ron (Random Struct. Algorithms `08) and Eden et al. (ICALP `17). We conclude with a discussion of our model and open questions raised by our work.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了亚线性时间算法，该算法将由邻接表表示的部分擦除图作为输入。我们的算法对输入图进行度数和邻居查询，并处理邻接条目中指定部分的对抗性擦除。我们专注于两个计算任务：测试图是否连通或$\varepsilon$-远离连通并估计平均度。为了测试连通性，我们发现了一个阈值现象：当擦除的比例小于 $\varepsilon$ 时，可以有效地测试此属性（时间与图的大小无关）；当擦除的比例至少为 $\varepsilon,$ 时，则需要大量与图表示的大小成线性关系的查询。我们的擦除弹性算法（针对没有擦除的特殊情况）是对标准属性测试模型中先前已知的连通性算法的改进，并且对邻近参数 $\varepsilon$ 具有最佳依赖性。为了估计平均程度，我们的结果在模型中此计算任务的查询复杂性之间提供了“插值”，在两种不同的设置中没有擦除：仅使用程度查询，由 Feige (SIAM J. Comput. `06) 研究，以及程度查询和邻居查询，由 Goldreich 和 Ron (Random Struct. Algorithms `08) 和 Eden 等人研究。 （ICAP `17）。最后我们讨论了我们的模型和我们的工作提出的开放性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在对抗性擦除的图上运行的亚线性时间算法，重点解决连通性测试和平均度数估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图算法难以处理部分数据擦除的情况，而实际应用中数据缺失普遍存在，需设计鲁棒的高效算法应对擦除干扰。
AI.method: 通过设计适应特定擦除比例的算法，结合度数查询与邻居查询，分析不同擦除阈值下的查询复杂度，并与已有模型结果进行对比插值。
AI.result: 发现连通性测试存在擦除阈值现象：低擦除率时时间与图规模无关，高擦除率时需线性查询；改进无擦除场景下的连通性测试效率，并在平均度数估计中融合不同查询模型的结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型有效应对擦除干扰，为亚线性时间算法设计提供新视角，同时指出未来需探索更广泛的擦除场景及算法优化方向。

authors_text: Lei Wang,Yuchun Huang,Pengjie Tao,Yaolin Hou,Yuxuan Liu
title: Learning geometry-image representation for 3D point cloud generation
title_zh: 学习 3D 点云生成的几何图像表示
abstract: We study the problem of generating point clouds of 3D objects. Instead of discretizing the object into 3D voxels with huge computational cost and resolution limitations, we propose a novel geometry image based generator (GIG) to convert the 3D point cloud generation problem to a 2D geometry image generation problem. Since the geometry image is a completely regular 2D array that contains the surface points of the 3D object, it leverages both the regularity of the 2D array and the geodesic neighborhood of the 3D surface. Thus, one significant benefit of our GIG is that it allows us to directly generate the 3D point clouds using efficient 2D image generation networks. Experiments on both rigid and non-rigid 3D object datasets have demonstrated the promising performance of our method to not only create plausible and novel 3D objects, but also learn a probabilistic latent space that well supports the shape editing like interpolation and arithmetic.
summary: We study the problem of generating point clouds of 3D objects. Instead of discretizing the object into 3D voxels with huge computational cost and resolution limitations, we propose a novel geometry image based generator (GIG) to convert the 3D point cloud generation problem to a 2D geometry image generation problem. Since the geometry image is a completely regular 2D array that contains the surface points of the 3D object, it leverages both the regularity of the 2D array and the geodesic neighborhood of the 3D surface. Thus, one significant benefit of our GIG is that it allows us to directly generate the 3D point clouds using efficient 2D image generation networks. Experiments on both rigid and non-rigid 3D object datasets have demonstrated the promising performance of our method to not only create plausible and novel 3D objects, but also learn a probabilistic latent space that well supports the shape editing like interpolation and arithmetic.
abstract_zh: 我们研究生成 3D 物体点云的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的基于几何图像的生成器（GIG），将 3D 点云生成问题转换为 2D 几何图像生成问题，而不是将对象离散为具有巨大计算成本和分辨率限制的 3D 体素。由于几何图像是一个完全规则的 2D 数组，其中包含 3D 对象的表面点，因此它利用了 2D 数组的规则性和 3D 表面的测地线邻域。因此，我们的 GIG 的一个显着优势是它允许我们使用高效的 2D 图像生成网络直接生成 3D 点云。在刚性和非刚性 3D 对象数据集上的实验证明了我们的方法的良好性能，不仅可以创建合理且新颖的 3D 对象，而且还可以学习很好支持插值和算术等形状编辑的概率潜在空间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了生成3D物体点云的问题，提出了一种基于几何图像的生成器（GIG）将3D点云生成转化为2D几何图像生成问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过3D体素离散化生成点云存在计算成本高和分辨率受限的问题，需寻找更高效的生成方式。
AI.method: 设计几何图像生成器（GIG），利用2D规则数组和3D表面测地邻域特性，通过高效2D图像生成网络直接生成3D点云。
AI.result: 在刚性和非刚性3D数据集上验证了方法有效性，可生成合理新物体并支持形状编辑（如插值和算术操作）。
AI.conclusion: GIG方法通过2D-3D映射实现了高效点云生成，为形状编辑提供了概率潜在空间，优于传统体素方法。

title: Learning Affinity-Aware Upsampling for Deep Image Matting
title_zh: 学习用于深度图像抠图的亲和感知上采样
abstract: We show that learning affinity in upsampling provides an effective and efficient approach to exploit pairwise interactions in deep networks. Second-order features are commonly used in dense prediction to build adjacent relations with a learnable module after upsampling such as non-local blocks. Since upsampling is essential, learning affinity in upsampling can avoid additional propagation layers, offering the potential for building compact models. By looking at existing upsampling operators from a unified mathematical perspective, we generalize them into a second-order form and introduce Affinity-Aware Upsampling (A2U) where upsampling kernels are generated using a light-weight lowrank bilinear model and are conditioned on second-order features. Our upsampling operator can also be extended to downsampling. We discuss alternative implementations of A2U and verify their effectiveness on two detail-sensitive tasks: image reconstruction on a toy dataset; and a largescale image matting task where affinity-based ideas constitute mainstream matting approaches. In particular, results on the Composition-1k matting dataset show that A2U achieves a 14% relative improvement in the SAD metric against a strong baseline with negligible increase of parameters (<0.5%). Compared with the state-of-the-art matting network, we achieve 8% higher performance with only 40% model complexity.
summary: We show that learning affinity in upsampling provides an effective and efficient approach to exploit pairwise interactions in deep networks. Second-order features are commonly used in dense prediction to build adjacent relations with a learnable module after upsampling such as non-local blocks. Since upsampling is essential, learning affinity in upsampling can avoid additional propagation layers, offering the potential for building compact models. By looking at existing upsampling operators from a unified mathematical perspective, we generalize them into a second-order form and introduce Affinity-Aware Upsampling (A2U) where upsampling kernels are generated using a light-weight lowrank bilinear model and are conditioned on second-order features. Our upsampling operator can also be extended to downsampling. We discuss alternative implementations of A2U and verify their effectiveness on two detail-sensitive tasks: image reconstruction on a toy dataset; and a largescale image matting task where affinity-based ideas constitute mainstream matting approaches. In particular, results on the Composition-1k matting dataset show that A2U achieves a 14% relative improvement in the SAD metric against a strong baseline with negligible increase of parameters (<0.5%). Compared with the state-of-the-art matting network, we achieve 8% higher performance with only 40% model complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，上采样中的学习亲和力提供了一种有效且高效的方法来利用深度网络中的成对交互。二阶特征通常用于密集预测，以在上采样（例如非局部块）之后与可学习模块建立相邻关系。由于上采样至关重要，因此学习上采样中的亲和力可以避免额外的传播层，从而为构建紧凑模型提供了潜力。通过从统一的数学角度看待现有的上采样运算符，我们将它们概括为二阶形式，并引入亲和感知上采样（A2U），其中上采样内核是使用轻量级低秩双线性模型生成的，并以二阶特征为条件。我们的上采样算子也可以扩展到下采样。我们讨论了 A2U 的替代实现，并验证了它们在两个细节敏感任务上的有效性：玩具数据集上的图像重建；以及大规模图像抠图任务，其中基于亲和力的想法构成了主流抠图方法。特别是，Composition-1k 抠图数据集的结果表明，与强基线相比，A2U 在 SAD 指标上实现了 14% 的相对改进，参数的增加可以忽略不计 (<0.5%)。与最先进的抠图网络相比，我们的性能提高了 8%，而模型复杂度仅为 40%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Affinity-Aware Upsampling (A2U)的新型上采样方法，通过学习亲和力来提升深度图像抠图任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在上采样后使用非局部模块建模相邻关系，导致模型复杂度增加。本文旨在通过将亲和力学习直接集成到上采样过程中，减少额外模块并提升效率。
AI.method: 从数学统一视角出发，将现有上采样算子推广为二阶形式，设计轻量低秩双线性模型生成上采样核，并基于二阶特征进行条件建模，同时扩展至下采样场景。
AI.result: 在Composition-1k数据集上，A2U相比强基线在SAD指标提升14%，参数量仅增加0.5%；相较最先进方法，性能提升8%且模型复杂度降低60%。
AI.conclusion: A2U通过亲和力感知的上采样机制，在保持模型简洁性的同时显著提升了图像抠图等细节敏感任务的效果，为紧凑型模型设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Affinity-Aware Upsampling for Deep Image Matting 学习用于深度图像抠图的亲和感知上采样 We show that learning affinity in upsampling provides an effective and efficient approach to exploit pairwise interactions in deep networks. Second-order features are commonly used in dense prediction to build adjacent relations with a learnable module after upsampling such as non-local blocks. Since upsampling is essential, learning affinity in upsampling can avoid additional propagation layers, offering the potential for building compact models. By looking at existing upsampling operators from a unified mathematical perspective, we generalize them into a second-order form and introduce Affinity-Aware Upsampling (A2U) where upsampling kernels are generated using a light-weight lowrank bilinear model and are conditioned on second-order features. Our upsampling operator can also be extended to downsampling. We discuss alternative implementations of A2U and verify their effectiveness on two detail-sensitive tasks: image reconstruction on a toy dataset; and a largescale image matting task where affinity-based ideas constitute mainstream matting approaches. In particular, results on the Composition-1k matting dataset show that A2U achieves a 14% relative improvement in the SAD metric against a strong baseline with negligible increase of parameters (<0.5%). Compared with the state-of-the-art matting network, we achieve 8% higher performance with only 40% model complexity. 我们证明，上采样中的学习亲和力提供了一种有效且高效的方法来利用深度网络中的成对交互。二阶特征通常用于密集预测，以在上采样（例如非局部块）之后与可学习模块建立相邻关系。由于上采样至关重要，因此学习上采样中的亲和力可以避免额外的传播层，从而为构建紧凑模型提供了潜力。通过从统一的数学角度看待现有的上采样运算符，我们将它们概括为二阶形式，并引入亲和感知上采样（A2U），其中上采样内核是使用轻量级低秩双线性模型生成的，并以二阶特征为条件。我们的上采样算子也可以扩展到下采样。我们讨论了 A2U 的替代实现，并验证了它们在两个细节敏感任务上的有效性：玩具数据集上的图像重建；以及大规模图像抠图任务，其中基于亲和力的想法构成了主流抠图方法。特别是，Composition-1k 抠图数据集的结果表明，与强基线相比，A2U 在 SAD 指标上实现了 14% 的相对改进，参数的增加可以忽略不计 (<0.5%)。与最先进的抠图网络相比，我们的性能提高了 8%，而模型复杂度仅为 40%。 本文提出了一种名为Affinity-Aware Upsampling (A2U)的新型上采样方法，通过学习亲和力来提升深度图像抠图任务的性能。 Yutong Dai,Hao Lu,Chunhua Shen cs.CV

title: Deeper or Wider Networks of Point Clouds with Self-attention?
title_zh: 具有自注意力机制的更深或更广的点云网络？
abstract: Prevalence of deeper networks driven by self-attention is in stark contrast to underexplored point-based methods. In this paper, we propose groupwise self-attention as the basic block to construct our network: SepNet. Our proposed module can effectively capture both local and global dependencies. This module computes the features of a group based on the summation of the weighted features of any point within the group. For convenience, we generalize groupwise operations to assemble this module. To further facilitate our networks, we deepen and widen SepNet on the tasks of segmentation and classification respectively, and verify its practicality. Specifically, SepNet achieves state-of-the-art for the tasks of classification and segmentation on most of the datasets. We show empirical evidence that SepNet can obtain extra accuracy in classification or segmentation from increased width or depth, respectively.
summary: Prevalence of deeper networks driven by self-attention is in stark contrast to underexplored point-based methods. In this paper, we propose groupwise self-attention as the basic block to construct our network: SepNet. Our proposed module can effectively capture both local and global dependencies. This module computes the features of a group based on the summation of the weighted features of any point within the group. For convenience, we generalize groupwise operations to assemble this module. To further facilitate our networks, we deepen and widen SepNet on the tasks of segmentation and classification respectively, and verify its practicality. Specifically, SepNet achieves state-of-the-art for the tasks of classification and segmentation on most of the datasets. We show empirical evidence that SepNet can obtain extra accuracy in classification or segmentation from increased width or depth, respectively.
abstract_zh: 由自注意力驱动的更深层次网络的普遍存在与尚未充分探索的基于点的方法形成鲜明对比。在本文中，我们提出分组自注意力作为构建我们的网络的基本块：SepNet。我们提出的模块可以有效地捕获本地和全局依赖关系。该模块根据组内任意点的加权特征的总和来计算组的特征。为了方便起见，我们概括了分组操作来组装这个模块。为了进一步促进我们的网络，我们分别在分割和分类任务上深化和拓宽了 SepNet，并验证了其实用性。具体来说，SepNet 在大多数数据集上的分类和分割任务中实现了最先进的水平。我们的经验证据表明，SepNet 可以分别通过增加宽度或深度来获得额外的分类或分割准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于组自注意力机制的SepNet网络，用于点云的分类和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 深度自注意力网络在图像领域广泛应用，但点云处理方法研究不足，需探索更有效的点云特征提取方式。
AI.method: 设计组自注意力模块作为基本单元，通过加权求和组内任意点的特征计算组特征，并推广组操作以构建SepNet网络。
AI.result: SepNet在多数数据集上达到分类和分割任务的最先进水平，实验证明增加网络深度或宽度可分别提升分类或分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 组自注意力机制有效捕捉点云局部与全局依赖关系，深度与宽度优化策略显著提升模型性能。

authors_text: Girisha S,Ujjwal Verma,Manohara Pai M M,Radhika Pai
title: UVid-Net: Enhanced Semantic Segmentation of UAV Aerial Videos by Embedding Temporal Information
title_zh: UVid-Net：通过嵌入时态信息增强无人机航拍视频的语义分割
comment: Includes additional discussions/results and comparison with SOTA methods. Published in IEEE JSTARS
comments: Includes additional discussions/results and comparison with SOTA methods. Published in IEEE JSTARS
abstract: Semantic segmentation of aerial videos has been extensively used for decision making in monitoring environmental changes, urban planning, and disaster management. The reliability of these decision support systems is dependent on the accuracy of the video semantic segmentation algorithms. The existing CNN based video semantic segmentation methods have enhanced the image semantic segmentation methods by incorporating an additional module such as LSTM or optical flow for computing temporal dynamics of the video which is a computational overhead. The proposed research work modifies the CNN architecture by incorporating temporal information to improve the efficiency of video semantic segmentation. In this work, an enhanced encoder-decoder based CNN architecture (UVid-Net) is proposed for UAV video semantic segmentation. The encoder of the proposed architecture embeds temporal information for temporally consistent labelling. The decoder is enhanced by introducing the feature-refiner module, which aids in accurate localization of the class labels. The proposed UVid-Net architecture for UAV video semantic segmentation is quantitatively evaluated on extended ManipalUAVid dataset. The performance metric mIoU of 0.79 has been observed which is significantly greater than the other state-of-the-art algorithms. Further, the proposed work produced promising results even for the pre-trained model of UVid-Net on urban street scene with fine tuning the final layer on UAV aerial videos.
summary: Semantic segmentation of aerial videos has been extensively used for decision making in monitoring environmental changes, urban planning, and disaster management. The reliability of these decision support systems is dependent on the accuracy of the video semantic segmentation algorithms. The existing CNN based video semantic segmentation methods have enhanced the image semantic segmentation methods by incorporating an additional module such as LSTM or optical flow for computing temporal dynamics of the video which is a computational overhead. The proposed research work modifies the CNN architecture by incorporating temporal information to improve the efficiency of video semantic segmentation. In this work, an enhanced encoder-decoder based CNN architecture (UVid-Net) is proposed for UAV video semantic segmentation. The encoder of the proposed architecture embeds temporal information for temporally consistent labelling. The decoder is enhanced by introducing the feature-refiner module, which aids in accurate localization of the class labels. The proposed UVid-Net architecture for UAV video semantic segmentation is quantitatively evaluated on extended ManipalUAVid dataset. The performance metric mIoU of 0.79 has been observed which is significantly greater than the other state-of-the-art algorithms. Further, the proposed work produced promising results even for the pre-trained model of UVid-Net on urban street scene with fine tuning the final layer on UAV aerial videos.
abstract_zh: 航拍视频的语义分割已广泛用于监测环境变化、城市规划和灾害管理等决策。这些决策支持系统的可靠性取决于视频语义分割算法的准确性。现有的基于 CNN 的视频语义分割方法通过合并诸如 LSTM 或光流之类的附加模块来增强图像语义分割方法，用于计算视频的时间动态，这是计算开销。所提出的研究工作通过结合时间信息来修改 CNN 架构，以提高视频语义分割的效率。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于增强型编码器-解码器的 CNN 架构（UVid-Net），用于无人机视频语义分割。所提出的架构的编码器嵌入时间信息以实现时间一致的标记。通过引入特征细化器模块来增强解码器，这有助于准确定位类标签。所提出的用于无人机视频语义分割的 UVid-Net 架构在扩展 ManipalUAVid 数据集上进行了定量评估。观察到的性能指标 mIoU 为 0.79，这明显高于其他最先进的算法。此外，即使对于城市街道场景上的 UVid-Net 预训练模型，通过对无人机航拍视频的最后一层进行微调，所提出的工作也产生了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UVid-Net的改进型编码器-解码器CNN架构，通过嵌入时间信息提升无人机航拍视频的语义分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频语义分割方法依赖LSTM或光流处理时间动态，存在计算开销大、效率低的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在编码器中嵌入时间信息实现时序一致标注，在解码器引入特征细化模块提升类别定位精度，基于ManipalUAVid数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在ManipalUAVid数据集上达到0.79的mIoU指标，优于现有算法；预训练模型微调后在城市街景数据上也表现良好。
AI.conclusion: UVid-Net通过时间信息嵌入和特征细化模块，在保持高效性的同时显著提升了无人机视频语义分割的准确率。

ai_content_json.result: 在ManipalUAVid数据集上达到0.79的mIoU指标，优于现有算法；预训练模型微调后在城市街景数据上也表现良好。

search_text: UVid-Net: Enhanced Semantic Segmentation of UAV Aerial Videos by Embedding Temporal Information UVid-Net：通过嵌入时态信息增强无人机航拍视频的语义分割 Semantic segmentation of aerial videos has been extensively used for decision making in monitoring environmental changes, urban planning, and disaster management. The reliability of these decision support systems is dependent on the accuracy of the video semantic segmentation algorithms. The existing CNN based video semantic segmentation methods have enhanced the image semantic segmentation methods by incorporating an additional module such as LSTM or optical flow for computing temporal dynamics of the video which is a computational overhead. The proposed research work modifies the CNN architecture by incorporating temporal information to improve the efficiency of video semantic segmentation. In this work, an enhanced encoder-decoder based CNN architecture (UVid-Net) is proposed for UAV video semantic segmentation. The encoder of the proposed architecture embeds temporal information for temporally consistent labelling. The decoder is enhanced by introducing the feature-refiner module, which aids in accurate localization of the class labels. The proposed UVid-Net architecture for UAV video semantic segmentation is quantitatively evaluated on extended ManipalUAVid dataset. The performance metric mIoU of 0.79 has been observed which is significantly greater than the other state-of-the-art algorithms. Further, the proposed work produced promising results even for the pre-trained model of UVid-Net on urban street scene with fine tuning the final layer on UAV aerial videos. 航拍视频的语义分割已广泛用于监测环境变化、城市规划和灾害管理等决策。这些决策支持系统的可靠性取决于视频语义分割算法的准确性。现有的基于 CNN 的视频语义分割方法通过合并诸如 LSTM 或光流之类的附加模块来增强图像语义分割方法，用于计算视频的时间动态，这是计算开销。所提出的研究工作通过结合时间信息来修改 CNN 架构，以提高视频语义分割的效率。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于增强型编码器-解码器的 CNN 架构（UVid-Net），用于无人机视频语义分割。所提出的架构的编码器嵌入时间信息以实现时间一致的标记。通过引入特征细化器模块来增强解码器，这有助于准确定位类标签。所提出的用于无人机视频语义分割的 UVid-Net 架构在扩展 ManipalUAVid 数据集上进行了定量评估。观察到的性能指标 mIoU 为 0.79，这明显高于其他最先进的算法。此外，即使对于城市街道场景上的 UVid-Net 预训练模型，通过对无人机航拍视频的最后一层进行微调，所提出的工作也产生了有希望的结果。 本文提出一种名为UVid-Net的改进型编码器-解码器CNN架构，通过嵌入时间信息提升无人机航拍视频的语义分割效果。 Girisha S,Ujjwal Verma,Manohara Pai M M,Radhika Pai cs.CV

authors_text: Hector J. Hortua,Riccardo Volpi,Dimitri Marinelli,Luigi Malago
title: Accelerating MCMC algorithms through Bayesian Deep Networks
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯深度网络加速 MCMC 算法
comment: Accepted in the Third Workshop on Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences, NeurIPS 2020, Vancouver, Canada. Text overlap with arXiv:1911.08508v3
comments: Accepted in the Third Workshop on Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences, NeurIPS 2020, Vancouver, Canada. Text overlap with arXiv:1911.08508v3
abstract: Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) algorithms are commonly used for their versatility in sampling from complicated probability distributions. However, as the dimension of the distribution gets larger, the computational costs for a satisfactory exploration of the sampling space become challenging. Adaptive MCMC methods employing a choice of proposal distribution can address this issue speeding up the convergence. In this paper we show an alternative way of performing adaptive MCMC, by using the outcome of Bayesian Neural Networks as the initial proposal for the Markov Chain. This combined approach increases the acceptance rate in the Metropolis-Hasting algorithm and accelerate the convergence of the MCMC while reaching the same final accuracy. Finally, we demonstrate the main advantages of this approach by constraining the cosmological parameters directly from Cosmic Microwave Background maps.
summary: Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) algorithms are commonly used for their versatility in sampling from complicated probability distributions. However, as the dimension of the distribution gets larger, the computational costs for a satisfactory exploration of the sampling space become challenging. Adaptive MCMC methods employing a choice of proposal distribution can address this issue speeding up the convergence. In this paper we show an alternative way of performing adaptive MCMC, by using the outcome of Bayesian Neural Networks as the initial proposal for the Markov Chain. This combined approach increases the acceptance rate in the Metropolis-Hasting algorithm and accelerate the convergence of the MCMC while reaching the same final accuracy. Finally, we demonstrate the main advantages of this approach by constraining the cosmological parameters directly from Cosmic Microwave Background maps.
abstract_zh: 马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 算法因其在复杂概率分布采样方面的多功能性而被广泛使用。然而，随着分布维数变大，令人满意地探索采样空间的计算成本变得具有挑战性。采用提案分布选择的自适应 MCMC 方法可以解决这个问题，加速收敛。在本文中，我们展示了执行自适应 MCMC 的另一种方法，即使用贝叶斯神经网络的结果作为马尔可夫链的初始建议。这种组合方法提高了 Metropolis-Hasting 算法的接受率，并加速 MCMC 的收敛，同时达到相同的最终精度。最后，我们通过直接从宇宙微波背景图中约束宇宙学参数来展示这种方法的主要优点。

AI.tldr: 论文提出通过贝叶斯深度网络加速MCMC算法，提高采样效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MCMC在高维分布下计算成本高，收敛慢，需改进。
AI.method: 利用贝叶斯神经网络生成初始提议分布，结合自适应MCMC方法。
AI.result: 提高接受率，加速收敛，保持准确率，应用于宇宙学参数约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升MCMC效率，适用于复杂高维问题。
