authors_text: Chongzhen Zhang,Yang Tang,Chaoqiang Zhao,Qiyu Sun,Zhencheng Ye,Jürgen Kurths
title: Multi-task GANs for Semantic Segmentation and Depth Completion with Cycle Consistency
title_zh: 用于具有循环一致性的语义分割和深度完成的多任务 GAN
abstract: Semantic segmentation and depth completion are two challenging tasks in scene understanding, and they are widely used in robotics and autonomous driving. Although several works are proposed to jointly train these two tasks using some small modifications, like changing the last layer, the result of one task is not utilized to improve the performance of the other one despite that there are some similarities between these two tasks. In this paper, we propose multi-task generative adversarial networks (Multi-task GANs), which are not only competent in semantic segmentation and depth completion, but also improve the accuracy of depth completion through generated semantic images. In addition, we improve the details of generated semantic images based on CycleGAN by introducing multi-scale spatial pooling blocks and the structural similarity reconstruction loss. Furthermore, considering the inner consistency between semantic and geometric structures, we develop a semantic-guided smoothness loss to improve depth completion results. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes dataset and KITTI depth completion benchmark show that the Multi-task GANs are capable of achieving competitive performance for both semantic segmentation and depth completion tasks.
summary: Semantic segmentation and depth completion are two challenging tasks in scene understanding, and they are widely used in robotics and autonomous driving. Although several works are proposed to jointly train these two tasks using some small modifications, like changing the last layer, the result of one task is not utilized to improve the performance of the other one despite that there are some similarities between these two tasks. In this paper, we propose multi-task generative adversarial networks (Multi-task GANs), which are not only competent in semantic segmentation and depth completion, but also improve the accuracy of depth completion through generated semantic images. In addition, we improve the details of generated semantic images based on CycleGAN by introducing multi-scale spatial pooling blocks and the structural similarity reconstruction loss. Furthermore, considering the inner consistency between semantic and geometric structures, we develop a semantic-guided smoothness loss to improve depth completion results. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes dataset and KITTI depth completion benchmark show that the Multi-task GANs are capable of achieving competitive performance for both semantic segmentation and depth completion tasks.
abstract_zh: 语义分割和深度补全是场景理解中的两个具有挑战性的任务，它们广泛应用于机器人和自动驾驶领域。尽管提出了一些工作来使用一些小的修改（例如更改最后一层）来联合训练这两个任务，但尽管这两个任务之间存在一些相似之处，但一个任务的结果并没有被用来提高另一个任务的性能。在本文中，我们提出了多任务生成对抗网络（Multi-task GAN），它不仅能够胜任语义分割和深度补全，而且还可以通过生成语义图像来提高深度补全的准确性。此外，我们通过引入多尺度空间池化块和结构相似性重建损失来改进基于 CycleGAN 生成的语义图像的细节。此外，考虑到语义和几何结构之间的内在一致性，我们开发了语义引导的平滑度损失来提高深度补全结果。在 Cityscapes 数据集和 KITTI 深度补全基准上进行的大量实验表明，多任务 GAN 能够在语义分割和深度补全任务中实现具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多任务生成对抗网络（Multi-task GANs），通过循环一致性约束同时解决语义分割和深度补全任务，并提升两者性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽联合训练语义分割与深度补全，但未有效利用任务间的相似性，导致性能未充分提升。
AI.method: 设计多任务GANs框架，引入多尺度空间池化块和结构相似性重建损失优化语义图像，结合语义引导的平滑度损失改进深度补全，并通过循环一致性约束增强任务间关联。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和KITTI数据集上，Multi-task GANs在语义分割和深度补全任务中均取得具有竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合任务间内在关联与改进损失函数，Multi-task GANs有效提升了语义分割与深度补全的协同性能。

authors_text: Susan M. Mniszewski,Pavel A. Dub,Sergei Tretiak,Petr M. Anisimov,Yu Zhang,Christian F. A. Negre
title: Downfolding the Molecular Hamiltonian Matrix using Quantum Community Detection
title_zh: 使用量子社区检测向下折叠分子哈密顿矩阵
comment: Main manuscript: 22 pages, 6 figures and Supplementary information: 15 pages, 3 figures
comments: Main manuscript: 22 pages, 6 figures and Supplementary information: 15 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Calculating the ground state energy of a molecule efficiently is of great interest in quantum chemistry. The exact numerical solution of the electronic Schrodinger equation remains unfeasible for most molecules requiring approximate methods at best. In this paper we introduce the use of Quantum Community Detection performed using the D-Wave quantum annealer to reduce the molecular Hamiltonian matrix without chemical knowledge. Given a molecule represented by a matrix of Slater determinants, the connectivity between Slater determinants is viewed as a graph adjacency matrix for determining multiple communities based on modularity maximization. The resulting lowest energy cluster of Slater determinants is used to calculate the ground state energy within chemical accuracy. The details of this method are described along with demonstrating its performance across multiple molecules of interest and a bond dissociation example. This approach is general and can be used as part of electronic structure calculations to reduce the computation required.
summary: Calculating the ground state energy of a molecule efficiently is of great interest in quantum chemistry. The exact numerical solution of the electronic Schrodinger equation remains unfeasible for most molecules requiring approximate methods at best. In this paper we introduce the use of Quantum Community Detection performed using the D-Wave quantum annealer to reduce the molecular Hamiltonian matrix without chemical knowledge. Given a molecule represented by a matrix of Slater determinants, the connectivity between Slater determinants is viewed as a graph adjacency matrix for determining multiple communities based on modularity maximization. The resulting lowest energy cluster of Slater determinants is used to calculate the ground state energy within chemical accuracy. The details of this method are described along with demonstrating its performance across multiple molecules of interest and a bond dissociation example. This approach is general and can be used as part of electronic structure calculations to reduce the computation required.
abstract_zh: 有效计算分子的基态能量在量子化学中引起了极大的兴趣。对于大多数需要近似方法的分子来说，电子薛定谔方程的精确数值解仍然不可行。在本文中，我们介绍了使用 D-Wave 量子退火器执行的量子社区检测来减少分子哈密顿矩阵，而无需化学知识。给定由 Slater 行列式矩阵表示的分子，Slater 行列式之间的连接被视为图邻接矩阵，用于基于模块性最大化确定多个社区。所得的斯莱特行列式的最低能量簇用于计算化学精度内的基态能量。描述了该方法的细节，并展示了其在多个目标分子和键解离示例中的性能。这种方法具有通用性，可以作为电子结构计算的一部分，以减少所需的计算量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用量子社区检测技术缩减分子哈密顿矩阵，以高效计算分子基态能量。
AI.motivation: 精确求解电子薛定谔方程对多数分子不可行，传统近似方法存在计算复杂度高或依赖化学知识的局限性，需开发通用降维方法。
AI.method: 使用D-Wave量子退火器对Slater行列式矩阵进行量子社区检测，将行列式间连接关系视为图邻接矩阵，通过模块度最大化划分社区，选取最低能量簇计算基态能量。
AI.result: 方法在多个分子及键解离案例中验证有效，能在化学精度范围内准确计算基态能量，显著降低计算需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为电子结构计算提供通用降维方案，可作为量子化学计算中减少计算量的有效工具。

search_text: Downfolding the Molecular Hamiltonian Matrix using Quantum Community Detection 使用量子社区检测向下折叠分子哈密顿矩阵 Calculating the ground state energy of a molecule efficiently is of great interest in quantum chemistry. The exact numerical solution of the electronic Schrodinger equation remains unfeasible for most molecules requiring approximate methods at best. In this paper we introduce the use of Quantum Community Detection performed using the D-Wave quantum annealer to reduce the molecular Hamiltonian matrix without chemical knowledge. Given a molecule represented by a matrix of Slater determinants, the connectivity between Slater determinants is viewed as a graph adjacency matrix for determining multiple communities based on modularity maximization. The resulting lowest energy cluster of Slater determinants is used to calculate the ground state energy within chemical accuracy. The details of this method are described along with demonstrating its performance across multiple molecules of interest and a bond dissociation example. This approach is general and can be used as part of electronic structure calculations to reduce the computation required. 有效计算分子的基态能量在量子化学中引起了极大的兴趣。对于大多数需要近似方法的分子来说，电子薛定谔方程的精确数值解仍然不可行。在本文中，我们介绍了使用 D-Wave 量子退火器执行的量子社区检测来减少分子哈密顿矩阵，而无需化学知识。给定由 Slater 行列式矩阵表示的分子，Slater 行列式之间的连接被视为图邻接矩阵，用于基于模块性最大化确定多个社区。所得的斯莱特行列式的最低能量簇用于计算化学精度内的基态能量。描述了该方法的细节，并展示了其在多个目标分子和键解离示例中的性能。这种方法具有通用性，可以作为电子结构计算的一部分，以减少所需的计算量。 本文提出利用量子社区检测技术缩减分子哈密顿矩阵，以高效计算分子基态能量。 Susan M. Mniszewski,Pavel A. Dub,Sergei Tretiak,Petr M. Anisimov,Yu Zhang,Christian F. A. Negre physics.chem-ph,cs.ET

title: Distilled Thompson Sampling: Practical and Efficient Thompson Sampling via Imitation Learning
title_zh: 蒸馏汤普森采样：通过模仿学习实现实用高效的汤普森采样
abstract: Thompson sampling (TS) has emerged as a robust technique for contextual bandit problems. However, TS requires posterior inference and optimization for action generation, prohibiting its use in many online platforms where latency and ease of deployment are of concern. We operationalize TS by proposing a novel imitation-learning-based algorithm that distills a TS policy into an explicit policy representation, allowing fast decision-making and easy deployment in mobile and server-based environments. Using batched data collected under the imitation policy, our algorithm iteratively performs offline updates to the TS policy, and learns a new explicit policy representation to imitate it. Empirically, our imitation policy achieves performance comparable to batch TS while allowing more than an order of magnitude reduction in decision-time latency. Buoyed by low latency and simplicity of implementation, our algorithm has been successfully deployed in multiple video upload systems for Meta. Using a randomized controlled trial, we show our algorithm resulted in significant improvements in video quality and watch time.
summary: Thompson sampling (TS) has emerged as a robust technique for contextual bandit problems. However, TS requires posterior inference and optimization for action generation, prohibiting its use in many online platforms where latency and ease of deployment are of concern. We operationalize TS by proposing a novel imitation-learning-based algorithm that distills a TS policy into an explicit policy representation, allowing fast decision-making and easy deployment in mobile and server-based environments. Using batched data collected under the imitation policy, our algorithm iteratively performs offline updates to the TS policy, and learns a new explicit policy representation to imitate it. Empirically, our imitation policy achieves performance comparable to batch TS while allowing more than an order of magnitude reduction in decision-time latency. Buoyed by low latency and simplicity of implementation, our algorithm has been successfully deployed in multiple video upload systems for Meta. Using a randomized controlled trial, we show our algorithm resulted in significant improvements in video quality and watch time.
abstract_zh: 汤普森采样（TS）已成为解决上下文强盗问题的强大技术。然而，TS 需要后验推理和优化来生成动作，这使得它无法在许多关注延迟和部署简易性的在线平台中使用。我们通过提出一种新颖的基于模仿学习的算法来操作 TS，该算法将 TS 策略提炼为显式策略表示，从而允许在移动和基于服务器的环境中快速决策并轻松部署。使用模仿策略下收集的批量数据，我们的算法迭代地对 TS 策略进行离线更新，并学习新的显式策略表示来模仿它。根据经验，我们的模仿策略实现了与批量 TS 相当的性能，同时允许决策时间延迟减少一个数量级以上。凭借低延迟和简单的实施方式，我们的算法已成功部署在 Meta 的多个视频上传系统中。通过随机对照试验，我们表明我们的算法显着提高了视频质量和观看时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模仿学习的改进型汤普森采样算法，以解决在线平台中汤普森采样因计算延迟和部署复杂性而难以应用的问题。
AI.motivation: 汤普森采样在上下文老虎机问题中表现出色，但其需要进行后验推断和优化，导致计算延迟高且难以部署，因此需要一种更高效、更易部署的替代方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种通过模仿学习将汤普森采样策略蒸馏为显式策略表示的方法，利用批量数据进行离线更新，并学习新的显式策略以模仿汤普森采样策略。
AI.result: 该模仿策略在性能上与批量汤普森采样相当，同时决策时间延迟减少了超过一个数量级，并成功部署在Meta的多个视频上传系统中，显著提升了视频质量和观看时长。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法通过模仿学习有效解决了汤普森采样在实际应用中的延迟和部署难题，为在线平台提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

title: Fully Quantized Image Super-Resolution Networks
title_zh: 全量化图像超分辨率网络
abstract: With the rising popularity of intelligent mobile devices, it is of great practical significance to develop accurate, realtime and energy-efficient image Super-Resolution (SR) inference methods. A prevailing method for improving the inference efficiency is model quantization, which allows for replacing the expensive floating-point operations with efficient fixed-point or bitwise arithmetic. To date, it is still challenging for quantized SR frameworks to deliver feasible accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Here, we propose a Fully Quantized image Super-Resolution framework (FQSR) to jointly optimize efficiency and accuracy. In particular, we target on obtaining end-to-end quantized models for all layers, especially including skip connections, which was rarely addressed in the literature. We further identify training obstacles faced by low-bit SR networks and propose two novel methods accordingly. The two difficulites are caused by 1) activation and weight distributions being vastly distinctive in different layers; 2) the inaccurate approximation of the quantization. We apply our quantization scheme on multiple mainstream super-resolution architectures, including SRResNet, SRGAN and EDSR. Experimental results show that our FQSR using low bits quantization can achieve on par performance compared with the full-precision counterparts on five benchmark datasets and surpass state-of-the-art quantized SR methods with significantly reduced computational cost and memory consumption.
summary: With the rising popularity of intelligent mobile devices, it is of great practical significance to develop accurate, realtime and energy-efficient image Super-Resolution (SR) inference methods. A prevailing method for improving the inference efficiency is model quantization, which allows for replacing the expensive floating-point operations with efficient fixed-point or bitwise arithmetic. To date, it is still challenging for quantized SR frameworks to deliver feasible accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Here, we propose a Fully Quantized image Super-Resolution framework (FQSR) to jointly optimize efficiency and accuracy. In particular, we target on obtaining end-to-end quantized models for all layers, especially including skip connections, which was rarely addressed in the literature. We further identify training obstacles faced by low-bit SR networks and propose two novel methods accordingly. The two difficulites are caused by 1) activation and weight distributions being vastly distinctive in different layers; 2) the inaccurate approximation of the quantization. We apply our quantization scheme on multiple mainstream super-resolution architectures, including SRResNet, SRGAN and EDSR. Experimental results show that our FQSR using low bits quantization can achieve on par performance compared with the full-precision counterparts on five benchmark datasets and surpass state-of-the-art quantized SR methods with significantly reduced computational cost and memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 随着智能移动设备的日益普及，开发准确、实时、节能的图像超分辨率（SR）推理方法具有重要的现实意义。提高推理效率的流行方法是模型量化，它允许用高效的定点或按位算术代替昂贵的浮点运算。迄今为止，量化 SR 框架要实现可行的准确性与效率的权衡仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种完全量化图像超分辨率框架（FQSR）来共同优化效率和准确性。特别是，我们的目标是获得所有层的端到端量化模型，特别是包括跳跃连接，这在文献中很少涉及。我们进一步确定了低位 SR 网络面临的训练障碍，并相应地提出了两种新颖的方法。这两个困难是由以下原因引起的：1）不同层的激活和权重分布差异很大； 2）量化的近似不准确。我们将我们的量化方案应用于多种主流超分辨率架构，包括 SRResNet、SRGAN 和 EDSR。实验结果表明，与五个基准数据集上的全精度对应物相比，我们使用低位量化的 FQSR 可以实现同等性能，并超越最先进的量化 SR 方法，同时显着降低计算成本和内存消耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的全量化图像超分辨率框架（FQSR），旨在通过量化技术提升超分辨率模型的效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 随着智能移动设备的普及，开发高效、低能耗且实时的图像超分辨率（SR）推理方法具有重要意义。现有量化SR框架在精度与效率的平衡上仍面临挑战，尤其是对跳过连接等结构的量化研究不足。
AI.method: 提出FQSR框架，针对量化过程中激活值与权重分布差异及量化近似误差两大难题，设计两种新型优化方法，并将该量化方案应用于SRResNet、SRGAN和EDSR等主流架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，FQSR在五个基准数据集上性能与全精度模型相当，且在计算成本和内存消耗上显著优于现有量化SR方法。
AI.conclusion: FQSR通过联合优化量化精度与效率，有效解决了低比特量化中的关键问题，为移动端部署提供了可行的高精度超分辨率方案。

search_text: Fully Quantized Image Super-Resolution Networks 全量化图像超分辨率网络 With the rising popularity of intelligent mobile devices, it is of great practical significance to develop accurate, realtime and energy-efficient image Super-Resolution (SR) inference methods. A prevailing method for improving the inference efficiency is model quantization, which allows for replacing the expensive floating-point operations with efficient fixed-point or bitwise arithmetic. To date, it is still challenging for quantized SR frameworks to deliver feasible accuracy-efficiency trade-off. Here, we propose a Fully Quantized image Super-Resolution framework (FQSR) to jointly optimize efficiency and accuracy. In particular, we target on obtaining end-to-end quantized models for all layers, especially including skip connections, which was rarely addressed in the literature. We further identify training obstacles faced by low-bit SR networks and propose two novel methods accordingly. The two difficulites are caused by 1) activation and weight distributions being vastly distinctive in different layers; 2) the inaccurate approximation of the quantization. We apply our quantization scheme on multiple mainstream super-resolution architectures, including SRResNet, SRGAN and EDSR. Experimental results show that our FQSR using low bits quantization can achieve on par performance compared with the full-precision counterparts on five benchmark datasets and surpass state-of-the-art quantized SR methods with significantly reduced computational cost and memory consumption. 随着智能移动设备的日益普及，开发准确、实时、节能的图像超分辨率（SR）推理方法具有重要的现实意义。提高推理效率的流行方法是模型量化，它允许用高效的定点或按位算术代替昂贵的浮点运算。迄今为止，量化 SR 框架要实现可行的准确性与效率的权衡仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种完全量化图像超分辨率框架（FQSR）来共同优化效率和准确性。特别是，我们的目标是获得所有层的端到端量化模型，特别是包括跳跃连接，这在文献中很少涉及。我们进一步确定了低位 SR 网络面临的训练障碍，并相应地提出了两种新颖的方法。这两个困难是由以下原因引起的：1）不同层的激活和权重分布差异很大； 2）量化的近似不准确。我们将我们的量化方案应用于多种主流超分辨率架构，包括 SRResNet、SRGAN 和 EDSR。实验结果表明，与五个基准数据集上的全精度对应物相比，我们使用低位量化的 FQSR 可以实现同等性能，并超越最先进的量化 SR 方法，同时显着降低计算成本和内存消耗。 本文提出了一种端到端的全量化图像超分辨率框架（FQSR），旨在通过量化技术提升超分辨率模型的效率与准确性。 Hu Wang,Peng Chen,Bohan Zhuang,Chunhua Shen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Julian D. Arias-Londoño,Jorge A. Gomez-Garcia,Laureano Moro-Velazquez,Juan I. Godino-Llorente
title: Artificial Intelligence applied to chest X-Ray images for the automatic detection of COVID-19. A thoughtful evaluation approach
title_zh: 人工智能应用于胸部 X 射线图像以自动检测 COVID-19。深思熟虑的评估方法
abstract: Current standard protocols used in the clinic for diagnosing COVID-19 include molecular or antigen tests, generally complemented by a plain chest X-Ray. The combined analysis aims to reduce the significant number of false negatives of these tests, but also to provide complementary evidence about the presence and severity of the disease. However, the procedure is not free of errors, and the interpretation of the chest X-Ray is only restricted to radiologists due to its complexity. With the long term goal to provide new evidence for the diagnosis, this paper presents an evaluation of different methods based on a deep neural network. These are the first steps to develop an automatic COVID-19 diagnosis tool using chest X-Ray images, that would additionally differentiate between controls, pneumonia or COVID-19 groups. The paper describes the process followed to train a Convolutional Neural Network with a dataset of more than 79,500 X-Ray images compiled from different sources, including more than 8,500 COVID-19 examples. For the sake of evaluation and comparison of the models developed, three different experiments were carried out following three preprocessing schemes. The aim is to evaluate how preprocessing the data affects the results and improves its explainability. Likewise, a critical analysis is carried out about different variability issues that might compromise the system and the effects on the performance. With the employed methodology, a 91.5% classification accuracy is obtained, with a 87.4% average recall for the worst but most explainable experiment, which requires a previous automatic segmentation of the lungs region.
summary: Current standard protocols used in the clinic for diagnosing COVID-19 include molecular or antigen tests, generally complemented by a plain chest X-Ray. The combined analysis aims to reduce the significant number of false negatives of these tests, but also to provide complementary evidence about the presence and severity of the disease. However, the procedure is not free of errors, and the interpretation of the chest X-Ray is only restricted to radiologists due to its complexity. With the long term goal to provide new evidence for the diagnosis, this paper presents an evaluation of different methods based on a deep neural network. These are the first steps to develop an automatic COVID-19 diagnosis tool using chest X-Ray images, that would additionally differentiate between controls, pneumonia or COVID-19 groups. The paper describes the process followed to train a Convolutional Neural Network with a dataset of more than 79,500 X-Ray images compiled from different sources, including more than 8,500 COVID-19 examples. For the sake of evaluation and comparison of the models developed, three different experiments were carried out following three preprocessing schemes. The aim is to evaluate how preprocessing the data affects the results and improves its explainability. Likewise, a critical analysis is carried out about different variability issues that might compromise the system and the effects on the performance. With the employed methodology, a 91.5% classification accuracy is obtained, with a 87.4% average recall for the worst but most explainable experiment, which requires a previous automatic segmentation of the lungs region.
abstract_zh: 目前临床上用于诊断 COVID-19 的标准方案包括分子或抗原测试，通常辅以胸部 X 光检查。综合分析旨在减少这些测试的大量假阴性，同时也提供有关疾病的存在和严重程度的补充证据。然而，该过程并非没有错误，而且由于其复杂性，胸部 X 光片的解释仅限于放射科医生。长期目标是为诊断提供新的证据，本文提出了基于深度神经网络的不同方法的评估。这是使用胸部 X 光图像开发自动 COVID-19 诊断工具的第一步，该工具还可以区分对照组、肺炎组或 COVID-19 组。该论文描述了使用由不同来源编译的 79,500 多张 X 射线图像组成的数据集（包括 8,500 多张 COVID-19 示例）训练卷积神经网络的过程。为了评估和比较所开发的模型，按照三种预处理方案进行了三个不同的实验。目的是评估数据预处理如何影响结果并提高其可解释性。同样，对可能损害系统及其对性能的影响的不同可变性问题进行关键分析。使用所采用的方法，获得了 91.5% 的分类准确率，对于最差但最可解释的实验，其平均召回率为 87.4%，这需要事先对肺部区域进行自动分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度神经网络的自动检测方法，利用胸部X光图像区分健康、肺炎及COVID-19患者，并评估不同预处理方案对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有COVID-19诊断依赖分子检测与放射科医生解读X光片，存在假阴性高和解读依赖性强的问题，需开发自动诊断工具提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含79,500张X光图像的数据集（含8,500例COVID-19），训练卷积神经网络模型，并通过三种预处理方案进行实验，分析数据预处理对分类结果与模型可解释性的影响。
AI.result: 模型分类准确率达91.5%，最可解释实验方案的平均召回率为87.4%，需肺部区域自动分割作为预处理步骤。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在自动诊断中表现良好，但需关注数据变异性和预处理对模型性能的影响，为后续开发临床诊断工具提供依据。

authors_text: Yao Fu,Chuanqi Tan,Bin Bi,Mosha Chen,Yansong Feng,Alexander M. Rush
title: Latent Template Induction with Gumbel-CRFs
title_zh: 使用 Gumbel-CRF 进行潜在模板归纳
abstract: Learning to control the structure of sentences is a challenging problem in text generation. Existing work either relies on simple deterministic approaches or RL-based hard structures. We explore the use of structured variational autoencoders to infer latent templates for sentence generation using a soft, continuous relaxation in order to utilize reparameterization for training. Specifically, we propose a Gumbel-CRF, a continuous relaxation of the CRF sampling algorithm using a relaxed Forward-Filtering Backward-Sampling (FFBS) approach. As a reparameterized gradient estimator, the Gumbel-CRF gives more stable gradients than score-function based estimators. As a structured inference network, we show that it learns interpretable templates during training, which allows us to control the decoder during testing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods with experiments on data-to-text generation and unsupervised paraphrase generation.
summary: Learning to control the structure of sentences is a challenging problem in text generation. Existing work either relies on simple deterministic approaches or RL-based hard structures. We explore the use of structured variational autoencoders to infer latent templates for sentence generation using a soft, continuous relaxation in order to utilize reparameterization for training. Specifically, we propose a Gumbel-CRF, a continuous relaxation of the CRF sampling algorithm using a relaxed Forward-Filtering Backward-Sampling (FFBS) approach. As a reparameterized gradient estimator, the Gumbel-CRF gives more stable gradients than score-function based estimators. As a structured inference network, we show that it learns interpretable templates during training, which allows us to control the decoder during testing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods with experiments on data-to-text generation and unsupervised paraphrase generation.
abstract_zh: 学习控制句子结构是文本生成中的一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的工作要么依赖于简单的确定性方法，要么依赖于基于强化学习的硬结构。我们探索使用结构化变分自动编码器来使用软连续松弛来推断句子生成的潜在模板，以便利用重新参数化进行训练。具体来说，我们提出了 Gumbel-CRF，这是一种使用宽松的前向过滤后向采样 (FFBS) 方法的 CRF 采样算法的连续松弛。作为重新参数化的梯度估计器，Gumbel-CRF 提供比基于分数函数的估计器更稳定的梯度。作为一个结构化推理网络，我们证明它在训练期间学习可解释的模板，这使我们能够在测试期间控制解码器。我们通过数据到文本生成和无监督释义生成的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Gumbel-CRFs进行潜在模板归纳，以解决文本生成中句子结构控制的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成方法在控制句子结构时存在局限，要么依赖简单确定性方法，要么使用强化学习的硬结构，难以稳定训练且缺乏可解释性。
AI.method: 提出结构化变分自编码器，结合Gumbel-CRF实现连续松弛的前向过滤后向采样，通过重参数化梯度估计提升训练稳定性，并学习可解释的潜在模板。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在数据到文本生成和无监督释义生成任务中均表现出有效性，能够稳定控制解码过程。
AI.conclusion: Gumbel-CRF通过连续松弛和结构化推断，为文本生成中的结构控制提供了更稳定、可解释的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出使用Gumbel-CRFs进行潜在模板归纳，以解决文本生成中句子结构控制的问题。
motivation: 现有文本生成方法在控制句子结构时存在局限，要么依赖简单确定性方法，要么使用强化学习的硬结构，难以稳定训练且缺乏可解释性。
method: 提出结构化变分自编码器，结合Gumbel-CRF实现连续松弛的前向过滤后向采样，通过重参数化梯度估计提升训练稳定性，并学习可解释的潜在模板。
result: 实验表明，该方法在数据到文本生成和无监督释义生成任务中均表现出有效性，能够稳定控制解码过程。
conclusion: Gumbel-CRF通过连续松弛和结构化推断，为文本生成中的结构控制提供了更稳定、可解释的解决方案。
search_text: Latent Template Induction with Gumbel-CRFs 使用 Gumbel-CRF 进行潜在模板归纳 Learning to control the structure of sentences is a challenging problem in text generation. Existing work either relies on simple deterministic approaches or RL-based hard structures. We explore the use of structured variational autoencoders to infer latent templates for sentence generation using a soft, continuous relaxation in order to utilize reparameterization for training. Specifically, we propose a Gumbel-CRF, a continuous relaxation of the CRF sampling algorithm using a relaxed Forward-Filtering Backward-Sampling (FFBS) approach. As a reparameterized gradient estimator, the Gumbel-CRF gives more stable gradients than score-function based estimators. As a structured inference network, we show that it learns interpretable templates during training, which allows us to control the decoder during testing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods with experiments on data-to-text generation and unsupervised paraphrase generation. 学习控制句子结构是文本生成中的一个具有挑战性的问题。现有的工作要么依赖于简单的确定性方法，要么依赖于基于强化学习的硬结构。我们探索使用结构化变分自动编码器来使用软连续松弛来推断句子生成的潜在模板，以便利用重新参数化进行训练。具体来说，我们提出了 Gumbel-CRF，这是一种使用宽松的前向过滤后向采样 (FFBS) 方法的 CRF 采样算法的连续松弛。作为重新参数化的梯度估计器，Gumbel-CRF 提供比基于分数函数的估计器更稳定的梯度。作为一个结构化推理网络，我们证明它在训练期间学习可解释的模板，这使我们能够在测试期间控制解码器。我们通过数据到文本生成和无监督释义生成的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出使用Gumbel-CRFs进行潜在模板归纳，以解决文本生成中句子结构控制的问题。 Yao Fu,Chuanqi Tan,Bin Bi,Mosha Chen,Yansong Feng,Alexander M. Rush cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Vishal Ramadoss,Keerthi Sagar,Mohamed Sadiq Ikbal,Jesus Hiram Lugo Calles,Matteo Zoppi
title: HEDRA: A Bio-Inspired Modular Tensegrity Soft Robot With Polyhedral Parallel Modules
title_zh: HEDRA：具有多面体并联模块的仿生模块化张拉整体软机器人
comment: 7 pages, 11 figures, associated video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ATRcSsBxOT0&feature=youtu.be&ab_channel=PMARrobotics . Manuscript submitted to 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 11 figures, associated video at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ATRcSsBxOT0&feature=youtu.be&ab_channel=PMARrobotics . Manuscript submitted to 2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: There is a surge of research interest in the field of tensegrity robotics. Robots developed under this paradigm provide many advantages and have distinguishing features in terms of structural compliance, dexterity, safety, and weight reduction. This paper proposes a new robotic mechanism based on tensegrity ('tension-integrity') robots and reconfigurable modular robots. The specific actuation schemes for this tensegrity robot with multiple degrees of freedom are presented. This article describes an easy-to-assemble 350 mm tensegrity based robot prototype by stacking a series of rigid struts linked with tensegrity joints that have no direct rigid contact with each other. The functionality of the proposed robot is validated by the experimental results by integrating the polyhedral parallel structure as its skeleton and series of tensegrity joints. The proposed manipulator is capable of reaching bending angles up to 76 degrees. An adaptive cable driven underactuated robotic gripper is designed and attached to the tensegrity manipulator for grasping objects in different shapes, weights, and sizes.
summary: There is a surge of research interest in the field of tensegrity robotics. Robots developed under this paradigm provide many advantages and have distinguishing features in terms of structural compliance, dexterity, safety, and weight reduction. This paper proposes a new robotic mechanism based on tensegrity ('tension-integrity') robots and reconfigurable modular robots. The specific actuation schemes for this tensegrity robot with multiple degrees of freedom are presented. This article describes an easy-to-assemble 350 mm tensegrity based robot prototype by stacking a series of rigid struts linked with tensegrity joints that have no direct rigid contact with each other. The functionality of the proposed robot is validated by the experimental results by integrating the polyhedral parallel structure as its skeleton and series of tensegrity joints. The proposed manipulator is capable of reaching bending angles up to 76 degrees. An adaptive cable driven underactuated robotic gripper is designed and attached to the tensegrity manipulator for grasping objects in different shapes, weights, and sizes.
abstract_zh: 张拉整体机器人领域的研究兴趣激增。在这种范式下开发的机器人具有许多优点，并在结构顺应性、灵活性、安全性和减轻重量方面具有显着特征。本文提出了一种基于张拉整体（“张力完整性”）机器人和可重构模块化机器人的新型机器人机构。提出了这种多自由度张拉整体机器人的具体驱动方案。本文描述了一种易于组装的基于张拉整体的 350 毫米机器人原型，通过堆叠一系列与张拉整体关节相连的刚性支柱，这些关节之间没有直接的刚性接触。通过集成多面体并联结构作为其骨架和一系列张拉整体关节，实验结果验证了所提出的机器人的功能。所提出的机械手能够达到高达 76 度的弯曲角度。设计了一种自适应电缆驱动的欠驱动机器人夹具，并将其连接到张拉整体机械臂上，用于抓取不同形状、重量和尺寸的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于张力完整结构和可重构模块化机器人的新型软体机器人HEDRA，并设计了自适应电缆驱动的欠驱动机械手。
AI.motivation: 张力完整机器人具有结构柔顺性、灵巧性等优势，但现有设计在模块化和多自由度驱动方面存在不足，需结合生物启发机制提升适应性。
AI.method: 采用多面体并联结构作为骨架，通过无直接刚性接触的张力关节串联刚性杆件构建350mm原型机，并设计集成欠驱动机械手。
AI.result: 实验验证机器人可实现76度弯曲，机械手可抓取不同形状、重量和尺寸的物体，验证了结构的可行性和功能有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为柔性机器人提供了新的模块化方案，在需要高适应性和安全性的场景中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Gregory W. Wimsatt,Alexander B. Boyd,Paul M. Riechers,James P. Crutchfield
title: Refining Landauer's Stack: Balancing Error and Dissipation When Erasing Information
title_zh: 细化兰道尔堆栈：擦除信息时平衡误差和耗散
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, 1 table; http://csc.ucdavis.edu/~cmg/compmech/pubs/tsperase.htm. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.06650
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, 1 table; http://csc.ucdavis.edu/~cmg/compmech/pubs/tsperase.htm. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.06650
abstract: Nonequilibrium information thermodynamics determines the minimum energy dissipation to reliably erase memory under time-symmetric control protocols. We demonstrate that its bounds are tight and so show that the costs overwhelm those implied by Landauer's energy bound on information erasure. Moreover, in the limit of perfect computation, the costs diverge. The conclusion is that time-asymmetric protocols should be developed for efficient, accurate thermodynamic computing. And, that Landauer's Stack -- the full suite of theoretically-predicted thermodynamic costs -- is ready for experimental test and calibration.
summary: Nonequilibrium information thermodynamics determines the minimum energy dissipation to reliably erase memory under time-symmetric control protocols. We demonstrate that its bounds are tight and so show that the costs overwhelm those implied by Landauer's energy bound on information erasure. Moreover, in the limit of perfect computation, the costs diverge. The conclusion is that time-asymmetric protocols should be developed for efficient, accurate thermodynamic computing. And, that Landauer's Stack -- the full suite of theoretically-predicted thermodynamic costs -- is ready for experimental test and calibration.
abstract_zh: 非平衡信息热力学决定了在时间对称控制协议下可靠地擦除存储器的最小能量耗散。我们证明了它的界限是严格的，因此表明成本超过了兰道尔关于信息擦除的能量界限所隐含的成本。此外，在完美计算的限制下，成本也有所不同。结论是应该开发时间不对称协议来实现高效、准确的热力学计算。而且，兰道尔堆栈——全套理论预测的热力学成本——已经准备好进行实验测试和校准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在擦除信息时如何平衡误差与能量耗散，并改进Landauer理论框架以更准确描述热力学计算的能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有Landauer理论未充分考虑时间对称控制协议下的实际能耗，而实际计算中误差与耗散的平衡对热力学计算效率至关重要。
AI.method: 基于非平衡信息热力学理论，分析时间对称控制协议下的能耗界限，并通过理论推导比较不同协议下的计算成本。
AI.result: 发现时间对称协议下能耗成本显著高于Landauer理论预测，且在完美计算极限下成本趋于发散，表明现有理论存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 应开发时间不对称协议以提升热力学计算效率，同时Landauer理论框架已具备实验验证的可行性。

title: Deep Learning for Regularization Prediction in Diffeomorphic Image Registration
title_zh: 微分同胚图像配准中正则化预测的深度学习
abstract: This paper presents a predictive model for estimating regularization parameters of diffeomorphic image registration. We introduce a novel framework that automatically determines the parameters controlling the smoothness of diffeomorphic transformations. Our method significantly reduces the effort of parameter tuning, which is time and labor-consuming. To achieve the goal, we develop a predictive model based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) that learns the mapping between pairwise images and the regularization parameter of image registration. In contrast to previous methods that estimate such parameters in a high-dimensional image space, our model is built in an efficient bandlimited space with much lower dimensions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on both 2D synthetic data and 3D real brain images. Experimental results show that our model not only predicts appropriate regularization parameters for image registration, but also improving the network training in terms of time and memory efficiency.
summary: This paper presents a predictive model for estimating regularization parameters of diffeomorphic image registration. We introduce a novel framework that automatically determines the parameters controlling the smoothness of diffeomorphic transformations. Our method significantly reduces the effort of parameter tuning, which is time and labor-consuming. To achieve the goal, we develop a predictive model based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) that learns the mapping between pairwise images and the regularization parameter of image registration. In contrast to previous methods that estimate such parameters in a high-dimensional image space, our model is built in an efficient bandlimited space with much lower dimensions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on both 2D synthetic data and 3D real brain images. Experimental results show that our model not only predicts appropriate regularization parameters for image registration, but also improving the network training in terms of time and memory efficiency.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于估计微分同胚图像配准正则化参数的预测模型。我们引入了一种新颖的框架，可以自动确定控制微分同胚变换平滑度的参数。我们的方法显着减少了参数调整的工作量，这既费时又费力。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了一种基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的预测模型，该模型学习成对图像与图像配准的正则化参数之间的映射。与之前在高维图像空间中估计此类参数的方法相比，我们的模型是在维度低得多的有效带限空间中构建的。我们在 2D 合成数据和 3D 真实大脑图像上证明了我们的模型的有效性。实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅可以预测图像配准的适当正则化参数，而且可以在时间和内存效率方面提高网络训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的预测模型，用于自动确定微分同胚图像配准中的正则化参数，以减少人工调参的工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统微分同胚图像配准方法需要手动调整正则化参数，耗时且依赖经验，亟需一种自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建基于CNN的预测模型，学习图像对与正则化参数间的映射关系，并在低维带限空间中实现，以提高效率。
AI.result: 模型在2D合成数据和3D脑图像上均有效，不仅预测出合适的正则化参数，还提升了网络训练的时间和内存效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度学习在自动预测图像配准参数中的潜力，为后续研究提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: Deep Learning for Regularization Prediction in Diffeomorphic Image Registration 微分同胚图像配准中正则化预测的深度学习 This paper presents a predictive model for estimating regularization parameters of diffeomorphic image registration. We introduce a novel framework that automatically determines the parameters controlling the smoothness of diffeomorphic transformations. Our method significantly reduces the effort of parameter tuning, which is time and labor-consuming. To achieve the goal, we develop a predictive model based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNN) that learns the mapping between pairwise images and the regularization parameter of image registration. In contrast to previous methods that estimate such parameters in a high-dimensional image space, our model is built in an efficient bandlimited space with much lower dimensions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on both 2D synthetic data and 3D real brain images. Experimental results show that our model not only predicts appropriate regularization parameters for image registration, but also improving the network training in terms of time and memory efficiency. 本文提出了一种用于估计微分同胚图像配准正则化参数的预测模型。我们引入了一种新颖的框架，可以自动确定控制微分同胚变换平滑度的参数。我们的方法显着减少了参数调整的工作量，这既费时又费力。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了一种基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的预测模型，该模型学习成对图像与图像配准的正则化参数之间的映射。与之前在高维图像空间中估计此类参数的方法相比，我们的模型是在维度低得多的有效带限空间中构建的。我们在 2D 合成数据和 3D 真实大脑图像上证明了我们的模型的有效性。实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅可以预测图像配准的适当正则化参数，而且可以在时间和内存效率方面提高网络训练。 本文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的预测模型，用于自动确定微分同胚图像配准中的正则化参数，以减少人工调参的工作量。 Jian Wang,Miaomiao Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: FaceGuard: A Self-Supervised Defense Against Adversarial Face Images
title_zh: FaceGuard：针对对抗性人脸图像的自我监督防御
abstract: Prevailing defense mechanisms against adversarial face images tend to overfit to the adversarial perturbations in the training set and fail to generalize to unseen adversarial attacks. We propose a new self-supervised adversarial defense framework, namely FaceGuard, that can automatically detect, localize, and purify a wide variety of adversarial faces without utilizing pre-computed adversarial training samples. During training, FaceGuard automatically synthesizes challenging and diverse adversarial attacks, enabling a classifier to learn to distinguish them from real faces and a purifier attempts to remove the adversarial perturbations in the image space. Experimental results on LFW dataset show that FaceGuard can achieve 99.81% detection accuracy on six unseen adversarial attack types. In addition, the proposed method can enhance the face recognition performance of ArcFace from 34.27% TAR @ 0.1% FAR under no defense to 77.46% TAR @ 0.1% FAR.
summary: Prevailing defense mechanisms against adversarial face images tend to overfit to the adversarial perturbations in the training set and fail to generalize to unseen adversarial attacks. We propose a new self-supervised adversarial defense framework, namely FaceGuard, that can automatically detect, localize, and purify a wide variety of adversarial faces without utilizing pre-computed adversarial training samples. During training, FaceGuard automatically synthesizes challenging and diverse adversarial attacks, enabling a classifier to learn to distinguish them from real faces and a purifier attempts to remove the adversarial perturbations in the image space. Experimental results on LFW dataset show that FaceGuard can achieve 99.81% detection accuracy on six unseen adversarial attack types. In addition, the proposed method can enhance the face recognition performance of ArcFace from 34.27% TAR @ 0.1% FAR under no defense to 77.46% TAR @ 0.1% FAR.
abstract_zh: 针对对抗性人脸图像的普遍防御机制往往会过度适应训练集中的对抗性扰动，并且无法泛化到看不见的对抗性攻击。我们提出了一种新的自监督对抗性防御框架，即 FaceGuard，它可以自动检测、定位和净化各种对抗性面孔，而无需利用预先计算的对抗性训练样本。在训练过程中，FaceGuard 自动合成具有挑战性和多样化的对抗性攻击，使分类器能够学习将它们与真实面孔区分开来，并且净化器尝试消除图像空间中的对抗性扰动。 LFW 数据集上的实验结果表明，FaceGuard 对六种未见过的对抗攻击类型可以达到 99.81% 的检测准确率。此外，所提出的方法可以将ArcFace的人脸识别性能从无防御下的34.27% TAR @ 0.1% FAR提升到77.46% TAR @ 0.1% FAR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FaceGuard的自监督防御框架，用于检测并净化对抗性人脸图像，无需预计算的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有防御机制容易过拟合训练集中的对抗扰动，无法泛化到未见过的攻击类型，因此需要一种更通用的自监督防御方法。
AI.method: FaceGuard通过自监督学习在训练时自动生成多样化的对抗攻击，使分类器学习区分真实人脸与对抗样本，同时通过净化器去除图像中的对抗扰动。
AI.result: 在LFW数据集上，FaceGuard对六种未见过的对抗攻击检测准确率达99.81%，并将ArcFace的识别性能从34.27%提升至77.46%（TAR@0.1% FAR）。
AI.conclusion: FaceGuard通过自监督生成对抗样本实现了高效的防御，显著提升了人脸识别系统的鲁棒性，为对抗攻击防御提供了新思路。

title: Truly shift-invariant convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 真正的平移不变卷积神经网络
abstract: Thanks to the use of convolution and pooling layers, convolutional neural networks were for a long time thought to be shift-invariant. However, recent works have shown that the output of a CNN can change significantly with small shifts in input: a problem caused by the presence of downsampling (stride) layers. The existing solutions rely either on data augmentation or on anti-aliasing, both of which have limitations and neither of which enables perfect shift invariance. Additionally, the gains obtained from these methods do not extend to image patterns not seen during training. To address these challenges, we propose adaptive polyphase sampling (APS), a simple sub-sampling scheme that allows convolutional neural networks to achieve 100% consistency in classification performance under shifts, without any loss in accuracy. With APS, the networks exhibit perfect consistency to shifts even before training, making it the first approach that makes convolutional neural networks truly shift-invariant.
summary: Thanks to the use of convolution and pooling layers, convolutional neural networks were for a long time thought to be shift-invariant. However, recent works have shown that the output of a CNN can change significantly with small shifts in input: a problem caused by the presence of downsampling (stride) layers. The existing solutions rely either on data augmentation or on anti-aliasing, both of which have limitations and neither of which enables perfect shift invariance. Additionally, the gains obtained from these methods do not extend to image patterns not seen during training. To address these challenges, we propose adaptive polyphase sampling (APS), a simple sub-sampling scheme that allows convolutional neural networks to achieve 100% consistency in classification performance under shifts, without any loss in accuracy. With APS, the networks exhibit perfect consistency to shifts even before training, making it the first approach that makes convolutional neural networks truly shift-invariant.
abstract_zh: 由于使用了卷积层和池化层，卷积神经网络长期以来被认为是平移不变的。然而，最近的研究表明，CNN 的输出可能会随着输入的微小变化而发生显着变化：这是由下采样（跨步）层的存在引起的问题。现有的解决方案要么依赖于数据增强，要么依赖于抗锯齿，这两者都有局限性，并且都无法实现完美的移位不变性。此外，从这些方法获得的增益不会扩展到训练期间未看到的图像模式。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了自适应多相采样（APS），这是一种简单的子采样方案，允许卷积神经网络在移位情况下实现分类性能 100% 的一致性，而不会损失任何准确性。借助 APS，网络甚至在训练之前就表现出完美的移位一致性，这使其成为第一种使卷积神经网络真正具有移位不变性的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自适应多相采样（APS）的子采样方案，旨在解决卷积神经网络（CNN）在平移不变性方面的缺陷，使CNN实现真正的平移不变性。
AI.motivation: 尽管传统CNN因卷积和池化层被认为具有平移不变性，但下采样层（如步长）的存在导致小输入平移会显著影响输出。现有方法（数据增强、抗混叠）存在局限性，无法实现完美平移不变性且效果无法推广到未见过的图像模式。
AI.method: 提出自适应多相采样（APS）方法，通过改进子采样方案，在无需数据增强或抗混叠的情况下，使CNN在训练前就具备对平移的完美一致性。
AI.result: APS使CNN在分类任务中实现100%的平移一致性，且不损失准确率，且在训练前即展现完美平移不变性，是首个真正解决该问题的方法。
AI.conclusion: APS方法有效解决了CNN的平移不变性缺陷，为实现真正意义上的平移不变性提供了新思路，优于现有数据增强和抗混叠方法。

result: APS使CNN在分类任务中实现100%的平移一致性，且不损失准确率，且在训练前即展现完美平移不变性，是首个真正解决该问题的方法。
conclusion: APS方法有效解决了CNN的平移不变性缺陷，为实现真正意义上的平移不变性提供了新思路，优于现有数据增强和抗混叠方法。
search_text: Truly shift-invariant convolutional neural networks 真正的平移不变卷积神经网络 Thanks to the use of convolution and pooling layers, convolutional neural networks were for a long time thought to be shift-invariant. However, recent works have shown that the output of a CNN can change significantly with small shifts in input: a problem caused by the presence of downsampling (stride) layers. The existing solutions rely either on data augmentation or on anti-aliasing, both of which have limitations and neither of which enables perfect shift invariance. Additionally, the gains obtained from these methods do not extend to image patterns not seen during training. To address these challenges, we propose adaptive polyphase sampling (APS), a simple sub-sampling scheme that allows convolutional neural networks to achieve 100% consistency in classification performance under shifts, without any loss in accuracy. With APS, the networks exhibit perfect consistency to shifts even before training, making it the first approach that makes convolutional neural networks truly shift-invariant. 由于使用了卷积层和池化层，卷积神经网络长期以来被认为是平移不变的。然而，最近的研究表明，CNN 的输出可能会随着输入的微小变化而发生显着变化：这是由下采样（跨步）层的存在引起的问题。现有的解决方案要么依赖于数据增强，要么依赖于抗锯齿，这两者都有局限性，并且都无法实现完美的移位不变性。此外，从这些方法获得的增益不会扩展到训练期间未看到的图像模式。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了自适应多相采样（APS），这是一种简单的子采样方案，允许卷积神经网络在移位情况下实现分类性能 100% 的一致性，而不会损失任何准确性。借助 APS，网络甚至在训练之前就表现出完美的移位一致性，这使其成为第一种使卷积神经网络真正具有移位不变性的方法。 本文提出了一种名为自适应多相采样（APS）的子采样方案，旨在解决卷积神经网络（CNN）在平移不变性方面的缺陷，使CNN实现真正的平移不变性。 Anadi Chaman,Ivan Dokmanić cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hongbin Pei,Bingzhe Wei,Kevin Chen-Chuan Chang,Chunxu Zhang,Bo Yang
title: Curvature Regularization to Prevent Distortion in Graph Embedding
title_zh: 曲率正则化防止图嵌入失真
comment: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2020
comments: Published as a conference paper at NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Recent research on graph embedding has achieved success in various applications. Most graph embedding methods preserve the proximity in a graph into a manifold in an embedding space. We argue an important but neglected problem about this proximity-preserving strategy: Graph topology patterns, while preserved well into an embedding manifold by preserving proximity, may distort in the ambient embedding Euclidean space, and hence to detect them becomes difficult for machine learning models. To address the problem, we propose curvature regularization, to enforce flatness for embedding manifolds, thereby preventing the distortion. We present a novel angle-based sectional curvature, termed ABS curvature, and accordingly three kinds of curvature regularization to induce flat embedding manifolds during graph embedding. We integrate curvature regularization into five popular proximity-preserving embedding methods, and empirical results in two applications show significant improvements on a wide range of open graph datasets.
summary: Recent research on graph embedding has achieved success in various applications. Most graph embedding methods preserve the proximity in a graph into a manifold in an embedding space. We argue an important but neglected problem about this proximity-preserving strategy: Graph topology patterns, while preserved well into an embedding manifold by preserving proximity, may distort in the ambient embedding Euclidean space, and hence to detect them becomes difficult for machine learning models. To address the problem, we propose curvature regularization, to enforce flatness for embedding manifolds, thereby preventing the distortion. We present a novel angle-based sectional curvature, termed ABS curvature, and accordingly three kinds of curvature regularization to induce flat embedding manifolds during graph embedding. We integrate curvature regularization into five popular proximity-preserving embedding methods, and empirical results in two applications show significant improvements on a wide range of open graph datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近关于图嵌入的研究在各种应用中取得了成功。大多数图嵌入方法将图中的邻近性保留到嵌入空间中的流形中。我们提出了关于这种邻近性保留策略的一个重要但被忽视的问题：图拓扑模式虽然通过保留邻近性很好地保留在嵌入流形中，但可能会在环境嵌入欧几里得空间中扭曲，因此机器学习模型很难检测到它们。为了解决这个问题，我们提出曲率正则化，以增强嵌入流形的平坦度，从而防止失真。我们提出了一种新颖的基于角度的截面曲率，称为 ABS 曲率，以及相应的三种曲率正则化，以在图嵌入过程中引入平坦的嵌入流形。我们将曲率正则化集成到五种流行的邻近保持嵌入方法中，两个应用程序的实证结果显示了对各种开放图数据集的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出曲率正则化方法防止图嵌入过程中的拓扑失真，通过保持嵌入流形的平坦性提升机器学习模型的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入方法虽能保持图邻近性，但嵌入后的欧几里得空间中拓扑模式易发生失真，导致机器学习模型难以有效检测。
AI.method: 提出基于角度的截面曲率（ABS曲率）及三种曲率正则化策略，整合到五种主流邻近保持嵌入方法中以诱导平坦流形。
AI.result: 在两个应用场景中，该方法于多个公开图数据集上显著提升了嵌入效果。
AI.conclusion: 曲率正则化有效缓解了图嵌入失真问题，为构建高质量嵌入流形提供了新思路。

title: AdaGrasp: Learning an Adaptive Gripper-Aware Grasping Policy
title_zh: AdaGrasp：学习自适应抓取器感知抓取策略
abstract: This paper aims to improve robots' versatility and adaptability by allowing them to use a large variety of end-effector tools and quickly adapt to new tools. We propose AdaGrasp, a method to learn a single grasping policy that generalizes to novel grippers. By training on a large collection of grippers, our algorithm is able to acquire generalizable knowledge of how different grippers should be used in various tasks. Given a visual observation of the scene and the gripper, AdaGrasp infers the possible grasp poses and their grasp scores by computing the cross convolution between the shape encodings of the gripper and scene. Intuitively, this cross convolution operation can be considered as an efficient way of exhaustively matching the scene geometry with gripper geometry under different grasp poses (i.e., translations and orientations), where a good "match" of 3D geometry will lead to a successful grasp. We validate our methods in both simulation and real-world environments. Our experiment shows that AdaGrasp significantly outperforms the existing multi-gripper grasping policy method, especially when handling cluttered environments and partial observations. Video is available at https://youtu.be/kknTYTbORfs
summary: This paper aims to improve robots' versatility and adaptability by allowing them to use a large variety of end-effector tools and quickly adapt to new tools. We propose AdaGrasp, a method to learn a single grasping policy that generalizes to novel grippers. By training on a large collection of grippers, our algorithm is able to acquire generalizable knowledge of how different grippers should be used in various tasks. Given a visual observation of the scene and the gripper, AdaGrasp infers the possible grasp poses and their grasp scores by computing the cross convolution between the shape encodings of the gripper and scene. Intuitively, this cross convolution operation can be considered as an efficient way of exhaustively matching the scene geometry with gripper geometry under different grasp poses (i.e., translations and orientations), where a good "match" of 3D geometry will lead to a successful grasp. We validate our methods in both simulation and real-world environments. Our experiment shows that AdaGrasp significantly outperforms the existing multi-gripper grasping policy method, especially when handling cluttered environments and partial observations. Video is available at https://youtu.be/kknTYTbORfs
abstract_zh: 本文旨在通过允许机器人使用多种末端执行器工具并快速适应新工具来提高机器人的多功能性和适应性。我们提出了 AdaGrasp，一种学习单一抓取策略的方法，该策略可推广到新颖的抓取器。通过对大量夹具进行训练，我们的算法能够获得关于如何在各种任务中使用不同夹具的通用知识。给定场景和抓取器的视觉观察，AdaGrasp 通过计算抓取器和场景的形状编码之间的交叉卷积来推断可能的抓取姿势及其抓取分数。直观上，这种交叉卷积操作可以被认为是在不同抓取姿势（即平移和方向）下将场景几何与夹具几何进行详尽匹配的有效方法，其中 3D 几何的良好“匹配”将导致成功抓取。我们在模拟和现实环境中验证我们的方法。我们的实验表明，AdaGrasp 显着优于现有的多夹具抓取策略方法，特别是在处理杂乱的环境和部分观察时。视频可在 https://youtu.be/kknTYTbORfs 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaGrasp方法，通过学习单个通用抓取策略，使机器人能够适应多种末端执行器工具并快速应对新工具。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取策略难以泛化到不同机械臂末端执行器，且需针对新工具重新训练，限制了机器人在复杂环境中的适应性。
AI.method: 通过大规模抓取器数据集训练，利用场景与抓取器形状编码的交叉卷积运算，匹配不同姿态下的几何特征，生成可能的抓取位姿及得分。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境中验证，AdaGrasp在杂乱场景和部分观测条件下显著优于现有多抓取器策略方法。
AI.conclusion: AdaGrasp通过几何特征匹配实现跨抓取器泛化，为机器人适应多样化末端工具提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Class-agnostic Object Detection
title_zh: 与类无关的对象检测
comment: To appear in Proceedings of WACV 2021
comments: To appear in Proceedings of WACV 2021
abstract: Object detection models perform well at localizing and classifying objects that they are shown during training. However, due to the difficulty and cost associated with creating and annotating detection datasets, trained models detect a limited number of object types with unknown objects treated as background content. This hinders the adoption of conventional detectors in real-world applications like large-scale object matching, visual grounding, visual relation prediction, obstacle detection (where it is more important to determine the presence and location of objects than to find specific types), etc. We propose class-agnostic object detection as a new problem that focuses on detecting objects irrespective of their object-classes. Specifically, the goal is to predict bounding boxes for all objects in an image but not their object-classes. The predicted boxes can then be consumed by another system to perform application-specific classification, retrieval, etc. We propose training and evaluation protocols for benchmarking class-agnostic detectors to advance future research in this domain. Finally, we propose (1) baseline methods and (2) a new adversarial learning framework for class-agnostic detection that forces the model to exclude class-specific information from features used for predictions. Experimental results show that adversarial learning improves class-agnostic detection efficacy.
summary: Object detection models perform well at localizing and classifying objects that they are shown during training. However, due to the difficulty and cost associated with creating and annotating detection datasets, trained models detect a limited number of object types with unknown objects treated as background content. This hinders the adoption of conventional detectors in real-world applications like large-scale object matching, visual grounding, visual relation prediction, obstacle detection (where it is more important to determine the presence and location of objects than to find specific types), etc. We propose class-agnostic object detection as a new problem that focuses on detecting objects irrespective of their object-classes. Specifically, the goal is to predict bounding boxes for all objects in an image but not their object-classes. The predicted boxes can then be consumed by another system to perform application-specific classification, retrieval, etc. We propose training and evaluation protocols for benchmarking class-agnostic detectors to advance future research in this domain. Finally, we propose (1) baseline methods and (2) a new adversarial learning framework for class-agnostic detection that forces the model to exclude class-specific information from features used for predictions. Experimental results show that adversarial learning improves class-agnostic detection efficacy.
abstract_zh: 对象检测模型在对训练期间显示的对象进行本地化和分类方面表现良好。然而，由于与创建和注释检测数据集相关的难度和成本，经过训练的模型检测有限数量的对象类型，并将未知对象视为背景内容。这阻碍了传统检测器在现实世界应用中的采用，例如大规模对象匹配、视觉接地、视觉关系预测、障碍物检测（其中确定对象的存在和位置比查找特定类型更重要）等。我们提出与类别无关的对象检测作为一个新问题，专注于检测对象而不管其对象类别如何。具体来说，目标是预测图像中所有对象的边界框，而不是它们的对象类。然后，另一个系统可以使用预测的框来执行特定于应用程序的分类、检索等。我们提出了用于对与类别无关的检测器进行基准测试的训练和评估协议，以推进该领域的未来研究。最后，我们提出（1）基线方法和（2）用于与类别无关的检测的新对抗性学习框架，该框架迫使模型从用于预测的特征中排除特定于类别的信息。实验结果表明，对抗性学习提高了类别无关的检测效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种与类别无关的对象检测方法，旨在检测图像中的所有对象而不进行类别分类。
AI.motivation: 传统对象检测模型在训练时只能检测有限类型的对象，无法处理未知对象，这限制了它们在实际应用中的使用。本文旨在解决这一问题，提高检测模型在实际场景中的适用性。
AI.method: 本文提出了基线方法和一种新的对抗学习框架，通过强制模型在预测时排除类别特定信息来提高类别无关检测的效果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，对抗学习方法提高了类别无关检测的效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的对抗学习框架有效提升了类别无关检测的性能，为未来研究提供了新的方向和基准。

search_text: Class-agnostic Object Detection 与类无关的对象检测 Object detection models perform well at localizing and classifying objects that they are shown during training. However, due to the difficulty and cost associated with creating and annotating detection datasets, trained models detect a limited number of object types with unknown objects treated as background content. This hinders the adoption of conventional detectors in real-world applications like large-scale object matching, visual grounding, visual relation prediction, obstacle detection (where it is more important to determine the presence and location of objects than to find specific types), etc. We propose class-agnostic object detection as a new problem that focuses on detecting objects irrespective of their object-classes. Specifically, the goal is to predict bounding boxes for all objects in an image but not their object-classes. The predicted boxes can then be consumed by another system to perform application-specific classification, retrieval, etc. We propose training and evaluation protocols for benchmarking class-agnostic detectors to advance future research in this domain. Finally, we propose (1) baseline methods and (2) a new adversarial learning framework for class-agnostic detection that forces the model to exclude class-specific information from features used for predictions. Experimental results show that adversarial learning improves class-agnostic detection efficacy. 对象检测模型在对训练期间显示的对象进行本地化和分类方面表现良好。然而，由于与创建和注释检测数据集相关的难度和成本，经过训练的模型检测有限数量的对象类型，并将未知对象视为背景内容。这阻碍了传统检测器在现实世界应用中的采用，例如大规模对象匹配、视觉接地、视觉关系预测、障碍物检测（其中确定对象的存在和位置比查找特定类型更重要）等。我们提出与类别无关的对象检测作为一个新问题，专注于检测对象而不管其对象类别如何。具体来说，目标是预测图像中所有对象的边界框，而不是它们的对象类。然后，另一个系统可以使用预测的框来执行特定于应用程序的分类、检索等。我们提出了用于对与类别无关的检测器进行基准测试的训练和评估协议，以推进该领域的未来研究。最后，我们提出（1）基线方法和（2）用于与类别无关的检测的新对抗性学习框架，该框架迫使模型从用于预测的特征中排除特定于类别的信息。实验结果表明，对抗性学习提高了类别无关的检测效率。 本文提出了一种与类别无关的对象检测方法，旨在检测图像中的所有对象而不进行类别分类。 Ayush Jaiswal,Yue Wu,Pradeep Natarajan,Premkumar Natarajan cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Sandesh Ramesh,Manoj Kumar M V,Sanjay H A
title: E-Pro: Euler Angle and Probabilistic Model for Face Detection and Recognition
title_zh: E-Pro：用于人脸检测和识别的欧拉角和概率模型
comment: 4th International Conference on Inventive Systems and Control (ICISC), 2020
comments: 4th International Conference on Inventive Systems and Control (ICISC), 2020
abstract: It is human nature to give prime importance to facial appearances. Often, to look good is to feel good. Also, facial features are unique to every individual on this planet, which means it is a source of vital information. This work proposes a framework named E-Pro for the detection and recognition of faces by taking facial images as inputs. E-Pro has its potential application in various domains, namely attendance, surveillance, crowd monitoring, biometric-based authentication etc. E-Pro is developed here as a mobile application that aims to aid lecturers to mark attendance in a classroom by detecting and recognizing the faces of students from a picture clicked through the app. E-Pro has been developed using Google Firebase Face Recognition APIs, which uses Euler Angles, and Probabilistic Model. E-Pro has been tested on stock images and the experimental results are promising.
summary: It is human nature to give prime importance to facial appearances. Often, to look good is to feel good. Also, facial features are unique to every individual on this planet, which means it is a source of vital information. This work proposes a framework named E-Pro for the detection and recognition of faces by taking facial images as inputs. E-Pro has its potential application in various domains, namely attendance, surveillance, crowd monitoring, biometric-based authentication etc. E-Pro is developed here as a mobile application that aims to aid lecturers to mark attendance in a classroom by detecting and recognizing the faces of students from a picture clicked through the app. E-Pro has been developed using Google Firebase Face Recognition APIs, which uses Euler Angles, and Probabilistic Model. E-Pro has been tested on stock images and the experimental results are promising.
abstract_zh: 重视面部外观是人类的​​天性。通常，看起来好看就是感觉良好。此外，面部特征对于这个星球上的每个人来说都是独一无二的，这意味着它是重要信息的来源。这项工作提出了一个名为 E-Pro 的框架，用于通过将面部图像作为输入来检测和识别面部。 E-Pro 在各个领域都有潜在的应用，即出勤、监控、人群监控、基于生物识别的身份验证等。E-Pro 是这里开发的一款移动应用程序，旨在通过检测和识别通过应用程序点击的学生的脸部来帮助讲师在课堂上标记出勤情况。 E-Pro 是使用 Google Firebase 人脸识别 API 开发的，该 API 使用欧拉角和概率模型。 E-Pro 已在库存图像上进行了测试，实验结果令人鼓舞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为E-Pro的框架，利用欧拉角和概率模型进行人脸检测与识别，旨在开发一款用于课堂考勤的移动应用。
AI.motivation: 人脸特征具有唯一性，可作为关键信息应用于考勤、监控等领域，但现有方法存在便捷性不足的问题，需改进以提升实际应用效率。
AI.method: 基于Google Firebase Face Recognition API，结合欧拉角和概率模型开发移动应用，通过拍摄照片检测并识别学生面部信息以完成考勤。
AI.result: 在库存图像上进行测试，实验结果表现出良好的性能和可行性。
AI.conclusion: E-Pro框架在人脸检测与识别任务中展现出潜力，未来可扩展至更多实际场景，但需进一步优化模型精度与适用性。

authors_text: Helin Yang,Jun Zhao,Zehui Xiong,Kwok-Yan Lam,Sumei Sun,Liang Xiao
title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning for UAV-Enabled Networks: Learning-Based Joint Scheduling and Resource Management
title_zh: 无人机网络的隐私保护联合学习：基于学习的联合调度和资源管理
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are capable of serving as flying base stations (BSs) for supporting data collection, artificial intelligence (AI) model training, and wireless communications. However, due to the privacy concerns of devices and limited computation or communication resource of UAVs, it is impractical to send raw data of devices to UAV servers for model training. Moreover, due to the dynamic channel condition and heterogeneous computing capacity of devices in UAV-enabled networks, the reliability and efficiency of data sharing require to be further improved. In this paper, we develop an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) framework for multi-UAV-enabled networks, which can provide asynchronous distributed computing by enabling model training locally without transmitting raw sensitive data to UAV servers. The device selection strategy is also introduced into the AFL framework to keep the low-quality devices from affecting the learning efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, we propose an asynchronous advantage actor-critic (A3C) based joint device selection, UAVs placement, and resource management algorithm to enhance the federated convergence speed and accuracy. Simulation results demonstrate that our proposed framework and algorithm achieve higher learning accuracy and faster federated execution time compared to other existing solutions.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are capable of serving as flying base stations (BSs) for supporting data collection, artificial intelligence (AI) model training, and wireless communications. However, due to the privacy concerns of devices and limited computation or communication resource of UAVs, it is impractical to send raw data of devices to UAV servers for model training. Moreover, due to the dynamic channel condition and heterogeneous computing capacity of devices in UAV-enabled networks, the reliability and efficiency of data sharing require to be further improved. In this paper, we develop an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) framework for multi-UAV-enabled networks, which can provide asynchronous distributed computing by enabling model training locally without transmitting raw sensitive data to UAV servers. The device selection strategy is also introduced into the AFL framework to keep the low-quality devices from affecting the learning efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, we propose an asynchronous advantage actor-critic (A3C) based joint device selection, UAVs placement, and resource management algorithm to enhance the federated convergence speed and accuracy. Simulation results demonstrate that our proposed framework and algorithm achieve higher learning accuracy and faster federated execution time compared to other existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 能够充当飞行基站 (BS)，支持数据收集、人工智能 (AI) 模型训练和无线通信。然而，由于设备的隐私问题以及无人机的计算或通信资源有限，将设备的原始数据发送到无人机服务器进行模型训练是不切实际的。此外，由于无人机网络中设备的动态信道条件和异构计算能力，数据共享的可靠性和效率需要进一步提高。在本文中，我们为多无人机网络开发了一种异步联邦学习（AFL）框架，该框架可以通过在本地进行模型训练来提供异步分布式计算，而无需将原始敏感数据传输到无人机服务器。 AFL框架中还引入了设备选择策略，以防止低质量设备影响学习效率和准确性。此外，我们提出了一种基于异步优势行动者批评家（A3C）的联合设备选择、无人机放置和资源管理算法，以提高联合收敛速度和准确性。仿真结果表明，与其他现有解决方案相比，我们提出的框架和算法实现了更高的学习精度和更快的联合执行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，结合异步训练和设备选择策略，优化无人机网络中的资源管理与调度。
AI.motivation: 无人机网络中设备隐私敏感、计算资源有限，且动态信道和异构设备导致数据共享效率低下，需改进联邦学习的隐私性与收敛效率。
AI.method: 设计异步联邦学习（AFL）框架，引入设备选择策略过滤低质量设备，并基于A3C算法联合优化设备选择、无人机部署与资源分配。
AI.result: 仿真表明，所提方法在学习准确率和联邦执行时间上优于现有方案，有效提升隐私保护与系统效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过异步联邦学习与强化学习算法，在保障隐私的同时优化无人机网络的资源管理与模型训练效率。

tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，结合异步训练和设备选择策略，优化无人机网络中的资源管理与调度。
motivation: 无人机网络中设备隐私敏感、计算资源有限，且动态信道和异构设备导致数据共享效率低下，需改进联邦学习的隐私性与收敛效率。
method: 设计异步联邦学习（AFL）框架，引入设备选择策略过滤低质量设备，并基于A3C算法联合优化设备选择、无人机部署与资源分配。
result: 仿真表明，所提方法在学习准确率和联邦执行时间上优于现有方案，有效提升隐私保护与系统效率。
conclusion: 该框架通过异步联邦学习与强化学习算法，在保障隐私的同时优化无人机网络的资源管理与模型训练效率。
search_text: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning for UAV-Enabled Networks: Learning-Based Joint Scheduling and Resource Management 无人机网络的隐私保护联合学习：基于学习的联合调度和资源管理 Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are capable of serving as flying base stations (BSs) for supporting data collection, artificial intelligence (AI) model training, and wireless communications. However, due to the privacy concerns of devices and limited computation or communication resource of UAVs, it is impractical to send raw data of devices to UAV servers for model training. Moreover, due to the dynamic channel condition and heterogeneous computing capacity of devices in UAV-enabled networks, the reliability and efficiency of data sharing require to be further improved. In this paper, we develop an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) framework for multi-UAV-enabled networks, which can provide asynchronous distributed computing by enabling model training locally without transmitting raw sensitive data to UAV servers. The device selection strategy is also introduced into the AFL framework to keep the low-quality devices from affecting the learning efficiency and accuracy. Moreover, we propose an asynchronous advantage actor-critic (A3C) based joint device selection, UAVs placement, and resource management algorithm to enhance the federated convergence speed and accuracy. Simulation results demonstrate that our proposed framework and algorithm achieve higher learning accuracy and faster federated execution time compared to other existing solutions. 无人机 (UAV) 能够充当飞行基站 (BS)，支持数据收集、人工智能 (AI) 模型训练和无线通信。然而，由于设备的隐私问题以及无人机的计算或通信资源有限，将设备的原始数据发送到无人机服务器进行模型训练是不切实际的。此外，由于无人机网络中设备的动态信道条件和异构计算能力，数据共享的可靠性和效率需要进一步提高。在本文中，我们为多无人机网络开发了一种异步联邦学习（AFL）框架，该框架可以通过在本地进行模型训练来提供异步分布式计算，而无需将原始敏感数据传输到无人机服务器。 AFL框架中还引入了设备选择策略，以防止低质量设备影响学习效率和准确性。此外，我们提出了一种基于异步优势行动者批评家（A3C）的联合设备选择、无人机放置和资源管理算法，以提高联合收敛速度和准确性。仿真结果表明，与其他现有解决方案相比，我们提出的框架和算法实现了更高的学习精度和更快的联合执行时间。 本文提出一种隐私保护的联邦学习框架，结合异步训练和设备选择策略，优化无人机网络中的资源管理与调度。 Helin Yang,Jun Zhao,Zehui Xiong,Kwok-Yan Lam,Sumei Sun,Liang Xiao eess.SP,cs.AI

title: Lattice Fusion Networks for Image Denoising
title_zh: 用于图像去噪的格融合网络
abstract: A novel method for feature fusion in convolutional neural networks is proposed in this paper. Different feature fusion techniques are suggested to facilitate the flow of information and improve the training of deep neural networks. Some of these techniques as well as the proposed network can be considered a type of Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) Network, where a layer can receive inputs from other layers and have outputs to other layers. In the proposed general framework of Lattice Fusion Network (LFNet), feature maps of each convolutional layer are passed to other layers based on a lattice graph structure, where nodes are convolutional layers. To evaluate the performance of the proposed architecture, different designs based on the general framework of LFNet are implemented for the task of image denoising. This task is used as an example where training deep convolutional networks is needed. Results are compared with state of the art methods. The proposed network is able to achieve better results with far fewer learnable parameters, which shows the effectiveness of LFNets for training of deep neural networks.
summary: A novel method for feature fusion in convolutional neural networks is proposed in this paper. Different feature fusion techniques are suggested to facilitate the flow of information and improve the training of deep neural networks. Some of these techniques as well as the proposed network can be considered a type of Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) Network, where a layer can receive inputs from other layers and have outputs to other layers. In the proposed general framework of Lattice Fusion Network (LFNet), feature maps of each convolutional layer are passed to other layers based on a lattice graph structure, where nodes are convolutional layers. To evaluate the performance of the proposed architecture, different designs based on the general framework of LFNet are implemented for the task of image denoising. This task is used as an example where training deep convolutional networks is needed. Results are compared with state of the art methods. The proposed network is able to achieve better results with far fewer learnable parameters, which shows the effectiveness of LFNets for training of deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种卷积神经网络特征融合的新方法。建议使用不同的特征融合技术来促进信息流动并改善深度神经网络的训练。其中一些技术以及所提出的网络可以被视为一种有向无环图（DAG）网络，其中一个层可以接收来自其他层的输入并向其他层输出。在提出的格子融合网络（LFNet）的总体框架中，每个卷积层的特征图基于格子图结构传递到其他层，其中节点是卷积层。为了评估所提出的架构的性能，基于 LFNet 通用框架的不同设计被实现用于图像去噪任务。该任务用作需要训练深度卷积网络的示例。结果与最先进的方法进行比较。所提出的网络能够以更少的可学习参数获得更好的结果，这显示了 LFNet 对于深度神经网络训练的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Lattice Fusion Network（LFNet）的新型卷积神经网络框架，用于图像去噪任务，通过改进特征融合机制提升深度网络训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络存在信息流动受限、训练困难等问题，需设计更高效的特征融合方法以提升深度网络性能。
AI.method: 构建基于有向无环图（DAG）的LFNet框架，通过格子图结构实现各卷积层特征图的多向传递，形成灵活的特征融合机制。
AI.result: 在图像去噪任务中，LFNet相较现有方法在更少可学习参数下取得更优去噪效果，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: LFNet通过创新的特征融合机制显著提升了深度网络训练效率，为复杂网络设计提供了新思路。

title: Stability of Finite Horizon Optimisation based Control without Terminal Weight
title_zh: 基于有限时域优化的无终端权控制的稳定性
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Systems Science, 20/06/2022
comments: Accepted by International Journal of Systems Science, 20/06/2022
abstract: This paper presents a stability analysis tool for model predictive control (MPC) where control action is generated by optimising a cost function over a finite horizon. Stability analysis of MPC with a limited horizon but without terminal weight is a well known challenging problem. We define a new value function based on an auxiliary one-step optimisation related to stage cost, namely optimal one-step value function (OSVF). It is shown that a finite horizon MPC can be made to be asymptotically stable if OSVF is a (local) control Lyapunov function (CLF). More specifically, by exploiting the CLF property of OSFV to construct a contractive terminal set, a new stabilising MPC algorithm (CMPC) is proposed. We show that CMPC is recursively feasible and guarantees stability under the condition that OSVF is a CLF. Checking this condition and estimation of the maximal terminal set are discussed. Numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed stability condition and corresponding CMPC algorithm.
summary: This paper presents a stability analysis tool for model predictive control (MPC) where control action is generated by optimising a cost function over a finite horizon. Stability analysis of MPC with a limited horizon but without terminal weight is a well known challenging problem. We define a new value function based on an auxiliary one-step optimisation related to stage cost, namely optimal one-step value function (OSVF). It is shown that a finite horizon MPC can be made to be asymptotically stable if OSVF is a (local) control Lyapunov function (CLF). More specifically, by exploiting the CLF property of OSFV to construct a contractive terminal set, a new stabilising MPC algorithm (CMPC) is proposed. We show that CMPC is recursively feasible and guarantees stability under the condition that OSVF is a CLF. Checking this condition and estimation of the maximal terminal set are discussed. Numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed stability condition and corresponding CMPC algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于模型预测控制（MPC）的稳定性分析工具，其中通过在有限范围内优化成本函数来生成控制动作。有限视野但无终端重量的 MPC 稳定性分析是一个众所周知的挑战性问题。我们定义了一种基于与阶段成本相关的辅助一步优化的新价值函数，即最优一步价值函数（OSVF）。结果表明，如果 OSVF 是（局部）控制 Lyapunov 函数（CLF），则可以使有限层 MPC 渐近稳定。更具体地说，通过利用OSFV的CLF特性构造收缩终端集，提出了一种新的稳定MPC算法（CMPC）。我们证明了 CMPC 是递归可行的，并且在 OSVF 是 CLF 的情况下保证了稳定性。讨论了检查此条件和最大终端集的估计。数值例子证明了所提出的稳定性条件和相应的 CMPC 算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需终端权重的有限时域优化控制稳定性分析工具，通过引入最优一步值函数（OSVF）构建收缩终端集，设计了保证稳定性的CMPC算法。
AI.motivation: 有限时域模型预测控制（MPC）在无终端权重时的稳定性分析是经典难题，传统方法依赖终端权重或约束条件，而实际应用中这些条件可能难以满足。
AI.method: 定义基于阶段成本的辅助一步优化值函数（OSVF），利用其控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）特性构造收缩终端集，提出递归可行且保证稳定的CMPC算法，并讨论CLF条件验证与最大终端集估计方法。
AI.result: CMPC算法在OSVF为CLF的条件下被证明具有递归可行性与稳定性，数值实验验证了所提稳定性条件及算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过OSVF的CLF特性构建收缩终端集，为无终端权重的有限时域MPC提供了新的稳定性保障方法，拓展了MPC在实际系统中的适用性。

title: On Parameterized Complexity of Liquid Democracy
title_zh: 论流动民主的参数化复杂性
comment: Submitted to 7th Annual International Conference on Algorithms and Discrete Applied Mathematics [CALDAM 2021]
comments: Submitted to 7th Annual International Conference on Algorithms and Discrete Applied Mathematics [CALDAM 2021]
abstract: In liquid democracy, each voter either votes herself or delegates her vote to some other voter. This gives rise to what is called a delegation graph. To decide the voters who eventually votes along with the subset of voters whose votes they give, we need to resolve the cycles in the delegation graph. This gives rise to the Resolve Delegation problem where we need to find an acyclic sub-graph of the delegation graph such that the number of voters whose votes they give is bounded above by some integer λ. Putting a cap on the number of voters whose votes a voter gives enable the system designer restrict the power of any individual voter. The Resolve Delegation problem is already known to be NP-hard. In this paper we study the parameterized complexity of this problem. We show that Resolve Delegation is para-NP-hard with respect to parameters λ, number of sink nodes and the maximum degree of the delegation graph. We also show that Resolve Delegation is W[1]-hard even with respect to the treewidth of the delegation graph. We complement our negative results by exhibiting FPT algorithms with respect to some other parameters. We finally show that a related problem, which we call Resolve Fractional Delegation, is polynomial time solvable.

We show that Resolve Delegation is para-NP-hard with respect to parameters λ, number of sink nodes and the maximum degree of the delegation graph. abstract_zh: 在流动民主中，每个选民要么自己投票，要么将投票委托给其他选民。这就产生了所谓的委托图。为了决定最终投票的选民以及他们投票的选民子集，我们需要解决委托图中的循环问题。这就产生了解决委托问题，我们需要找到委托图的非循环子图，使得他们投票的选民数量以某个整数 λ 为界。对选民投票的选民人数设置上限，使系统设计者能够限制任何个人选民的权力。众所周知，解决委托问题是 NP 难题。在本文中，我们研究了该问题的参数化复杂性。我们证明，解决委托在参数 λ、汇聚节点数量和委托图的最大度方面是准 NP 困难的。我们还表明，即使相对于委托图的树宽，解决委托也是 W[1]-困难的。我们通过展示有关其他一些参数的 FPT 算法来补充我们的负面结果。最后，我们证明了一个相关的问题，我们称之为“解决分数委托”，是多项式时间可解决的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究液态民主中委托图的参数化复杂度，分析解决循环问题的计算难度。
AI.motivation: 液态民主的委托图存在循环需解决，现有NP难结果需进一步分析参数化复杂度以指导实际系统设计。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂度理论，分析λ、汇点数、最大度数、树宽等参数对Resolve Delegation问题的影响，并设计FPT算法。
AI.result: 证明问题对λ等参数为para-NP难和W[1]-难，提出部分参数的FPT算法，相关分数委托问题可多项式求解。
AI.conclusion: 不同参数下问题复杂度差异显著，部分参数可有效求解，分数委托模型更易处理。

This gives rise to what is called a delegation graph. To decide the voters who eventually votes along with the subset of voters whose votes they give, we need to resolve the cycles in the delegation graph. This gives rise to the Resolve Delegation problem where we need to find an acyclic sub-graph of the delegation graph such that the number of voters whose votes they give is bounded above by some integer λ. Putting a cap on the number of voters whose votes a voter gives enable the system designer restrict the power of any individual voter. The Resolve Delegation problem is already known to be NP-hard. In this paper we study the parameterized complexity of this problem. We show that Resolve Delegation is para-NP-hard with respect to parameters λ, number of sink nodes and the maximum degree of the delegation graph. We also show that Resolve Delegation is W[1]-hard even with respect to the treewidth of the delegation graph. We complement our negative results by exhibiting FPT algorithms with respect to some other parameters. authors_text: Nanqing Dong,Michael Kampffmeyer,Xiaodan Liang,Min Xu,Irina Voiculescu,Eric P. Xing
title: Towards Robust Partially Supervised Multi-Structure Medical Image Segmentation on Small-Scale Data
title_zh: 针对小规模数据的鲁棒部分监督多结构医学图像分割
abstract: The data-driven nature of deep learning (DL) models for semantic segmentation requires a large number of pixel-level annotations. However, large-scale and fully labeled medical datasets are often unavailable for practical tasks. Recently, partially supervised methods have been proposed to utilize images with incomplete labels in the medical domain. To bridge the methodological gaps in partially supervised learning (PSL) under data scarcity, we propose Vicinal Labels Under Uncertainty (VLUU), a simple yet efficient framework utilizing the human structure similarity for partially supervised medical image segmentation. Motivated by multi-task learning and vicinal risk minimization, VLUU transforms the partially supervised problem into a fully supervised problem by generating vicinal labels. We systematically evaluate VLUU under the challenges of small-scale data, dataset shift, and class imbalance on two commonly used segmentation datasets for the tasks of chest organ segmentation and optic disc-and-cup segmentation. The experimental results show that VLUU can consistently outperform previous partially supervised models in these settings. Our research suggests a new research direction in label-efficient deep learning with partial supervision.
summary: The data-driven nature of deep learning (DL) models for semantic segmentation requires a large number of pixel-level annotations. However, large-scale and fully labeled medical datasets are often unavailable for practical tasks. Recently, partially supervised methods have been proposed to utilize images with incomplete labels in the medical domain. To bridge the methodological gaps in partially supervised learning (PSL) under data scarcity, we propose Vicinal Labels Under Uncertainty (VLUU), a simple yet efficient framework utilizing the human structure similarity for partially supervised medical image segmentation. Motivated by multi-task learning and vicinal risk minimization, VLUU transforms the partially supervised problem into a fully supervised problem by generating vicinal labels. We systematically evaluate VLUU under the challenges of small-scale data, dataset shift, and class imbalance on two commonly used segmentation datasets for the tasks of chest organ segmentation and optic disc-and-cup segmentation. The experimental results show that VLUU can consistently outperform previous partially supervised models in these settings. Our research suggests a new research direction in label-efficient deep learning with partial supervision.
abstract_zh: 用于语义分割的深度学习（DL）模型的数据驱动性质需要大量像素级注释。然而，大规模且完全标记的医学数据集通常无法用于实际任务。最近，已经提出了部分监督方法来利用医学领域中标签不完整的图像。为了弥补数据稀缺下部分监督学习（PSL）的方法论差距，我们提出了不确定性下的局部标签（VLUU），这是一种简单而有效的框架，利用人体结构相似性进行部分监督医学图像分割。在多任务学习和邻域风险最小化的推动下，VLUU 通过生成邻域标签将部分监督问题转化为完全监督问题。我们在胸部器官分割和视盘和视杯分割任务的两个常用分割数据集上，在小规模数据、数据集移位和类别不平衡的挑战下系统地评估了 VLUU。实验结果表明，VLUU 在这些设置中始终能够优于之前的部分监督模型。我们的研究提出了带有部分监督的标签高效深度学习的新研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VLUU的框架，用于在小规模数据下实现鲁棒的多结构医学图像分割，通过利用不完全标签进行部分监督学习。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割任务中，大规模且完全标注的数据集通常难以获取，而现有部分监督方法在数据稀缺场景下存在方法论上的不足。
AI.method: 基于多任务学习和邻域风险最小化，VLUU通过生成邻域标签将部分监督问题转化为完全监督问题，并利用人类结构相似性进行标签优化。
AI.result: 在胸部器官分割和视盘-视杯分割任务中，VLUU在小规模数据、数据集偏移和类别不平衡等挑战下均优于现有部分监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为标签高效且部分监督的深度学习提供了新的研究方向，证明了结构相似性驱动的邻域标签生成的有效性。

Recently, partially supervised methods have been proposed to utilize images with incomplete labels in the medical domain.
