title: Unsupervised Spoken Term Discovery Based on Re-clustering of Hypothesized Speech Segments with Siamese and Triplet Networks
title_zh: 基于连体网络和三元组网络的假设语音段重新聚类的无监督口语术语发现
abstract: Spoken term discovery from untranscribed speech audio could be achieved via a two-stage process. In the first stage, the unlabelled speech is decoded into a sequence of subword units that are learned and modelled in an unsupervised manner. In the second stage, partial sequence matching and clustering are performed on the decoded subword sequences, resulting in a set of discovered words or phrases. A limitation of this approach is that the results of subword decoding could be erroneous, and the errors would impact the subsequent steps. While Siamese/Triplet network is one approach to learn segment representations that can improve the discovery process, the challenge in spoken term discovery under a complete unsupervised scenario is that training examples are unavailable. In this paper, we propose to generate training examples from initial hypothesized sequence clusters. The Siamese/Triplet network is trained on the hypothesized examples to measure the similarity between two speech segments and hereby perform re-clustering of all hypothesized subword sequences to achieve spoken term discovery. Experimental results show that the proposed approach is effective in obtaining training examples for Siamese and Triplet networks, improving the efficacy of spoken term discovery as compared with the original two-stage method.
summary: Spoken term discovery from untranscribed speech audio could be achieved via a two-stage process. In the first stage, the unlabelled speech is decoded into a sequence of subword units that are learned and modelled in an unsupervised manner. In the second stage, partial sequence matching and clustering are performed on the decoded subword sequences, resulting in a set of discovered words or phrases. A limitation of this approach is that the results of subword decoding could be erroneous, and the errors would impact the subsequent steps. While Siamese/Triplet network is one approach to learn segment representations that can improve the discovery process, the challenge in spoken term discovery under a complete unsupervised scenario is that training examples are unavailable. In this paper, we propose to generate training examples from initial hypothesized sequence clusters. The Siamese/Triplet network is trained on the hypothesized examples to measure the similarity between two speech segments and hereby perform re-clustering of all hypothesized subword sequences to achieve spoken term discovery. Experimental results show that the proposed approach is effective in obtaining training examples for Siamese and Triplet networks, improving the efficacy of spoken term discovery as compared with the original two-stage method.
abstract_zh: 从未转录的语音音频中发现口语术语可以通过两阶段过程来实现。在第一阶段，未标记的语音被解码为一系列子字单元，这些子字单元以无监督的方式学习和建模。在第二阶段，对解码的子字序列执行部分序列匹配和聚类，从而产生一组发现的单词或短语。这种方法的局限性在于子字解码的结果可能是错误的，并且错误会影响后续步骤。虽然 Siamese/Triplet 网络是一种学习片段表示的方法，可以改进发现过程，但在完全无监督的场景下口语术语发现的挑战是训练示例不可用。在本文中，我们建议从初始假设的序列簇生成训练样本。 Siamese/Triplet 网络在假设的示例上进行训练，以测量两个语音片段之间的相似性，从而对所有假设的子词序列进行重新聚类，以实现口语术语发现。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效地获取Siamese和Triplet网络的训练样例，与原始的两阶段方法相比，提高了口语术语发现的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Siamese和Triplet网络的无监督语音术语发现方法，通过重新聚类假设的语音分段来改进发现效果。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段方法在子词解码阶段易产生错误，影响后续聚类效果；而Siamese/Triplet网络需依赖训练样本，但在完全无监督场景下缺乏标注数据。
AI.method: 从初始假设的序列聚类中生成训练样本，利用Siamese/Triplet网络学习语音分段相似性，再对所有假设子词序列进行重新聚类以发现语音术语。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成训练样本，相比原始两阶段方法显著提升了语音术语发现的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过从初始聚类中生成训练数据，可在无监督场景下有效提升Siamese/Triplet网络的语音术语发现性能。

authors_text: Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Wei He,Haizhao Yang
title: Efficient Attention Network: Accelerate Attention by Searching Where to Plug
title_zh: 高效的注意力网络：通过搜索插入位置来加速注意力
abstract: Recently, many plug-and-play self-attention modules are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Previous works lay an emphasis on the design of attention module for specific functionality, e.g., light-weighted or task-oriented attention. However, they ignore the importance of where to plug in the attention module since they connect the modules individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and number of parameters with the growth of network depth. Thus, we propose a framework called Efficient Attention Network (EAN) to improve the efficiency for the existing attention modules. In EAN, we leverage the sharing mechanism (Huang et al. 2020) to share the attention module within the backbone and search where to connect the shared attention module via reinforcement learning. Finally, we obtain the attention network with sparse connections between the backbone and modules, while (1) maintaining accuracy (2) reducing extra parameter increment and (3) accelerating inference. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks and popular attention networks show the effectiveness of EAN. Furthermore, we empirically illustrate that our EAN has the capacity of transferring to other tasks and capturing the informative features. The code is available at https://github.com/gbup-group/EAN-efficient-attention-network.
summary: Recently, many plug-and-play self-attention modules are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Previous works lay an emphasis on the design of attention module for specific functionality, e.g., light-weighted or task-oriented attention. However, they ignore the importance of where to plug in the attention module since they connect the modules individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and number of parameters with the growth of network depth. Thus, we propose a framework called Efficient Attention Network (EAN) to improve the efficiency for the existing attention modules. In EAN, we leverage the sharing mechanism (Huang et al. 2020) to share the attention module within the backbone and search where to connect the shared attention module via reinforcement learning. Finally, we obtain the attention network with sparse connections between the backbone and modules, while (1) maintaining accuracy (2) reducing extra parameter increment and (3) accelerating inference. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks and popular attention networks show the effectiveness of EAN. Furthermore, we empirically illustrate that our EAN has the capacity of transferring to other tasks and capturing the informative features. The code is available at https://github.com/gbup-group/EAN-efficient-attention-network.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了许多即插即用的自注意力模块，通过利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的内部信息来增强模型泛化能力。以前的工作侧重于针对特定功能的注意力模块的设计，例如轻量级或面向任务的注意力。然而，他们忽略了在哪里插入注意力模块的重要性，因为他们理所当然地将模块与整个 CNN 主干的每个块单独连接，导致随着网络深度的增长，计算成本和参数数量增加。因此，我们提出了一个名为高效注意力网络（EAN）的框架来提高现有注意力模块的效率。在 EAN 中，我们利用共享机制（Huang et al. 2020）来共享主干内的注意力模块，并通过强化学习搜索在哪里连接共享注意力模块。最后，我们获得主干和模块之间具有稀疏连接的注意力网络，同时（1）保持准确性（2）减少额外的参数增量和（3）加速推理。对广泛使用的基准和流行的关注网络进行的大量实验表明了 EAN 的有效性。此外，我们凭经验证明我们的 EAN 具有转移到其他任务并捕获信息特征的能力。该代码可在 https://github.com/gbup-group/EAN-efficient-attention-network 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效注意力网络（EAN），通过搜索注意力模块的插入位置来提升卷积神经网络（CNN）中注意力机制的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力模块设计过于关注功能特性（如轻量化或任务导向），却忽视了注意力模块在CNN主干网络中的插入位置，导致计算成本和参数量随网络深度增加而增长。
AI.method: 利用共享机制（Huang et al. 2020）在主干网络内共享注意力模块，并通过强化学习搜索最优连接位置，实现主干网络与模块间的稀疏连接。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试和注意力网络上验证了EAN的有效性，参数增量减少，推理速度加快，同时保持精度；并证明其具备跨任务迁移和特征提取能力。
AI.conclusion: EAN通过优化注意力模块的插入位置，在不损失精度的前提下显著降低计算和参数开销，且具有良好的迁移性。

search_text: Efficient Attention Network: Accelerate Attention by Searching Where to Plug 高效的注意力网络：通过搜索插入位置来加速注意力 Recently, many plug-and-play self-attention modules are proposed to enhance the model generalization by exploiting the internal information of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Previous works lay an emphasis on the design of attention module for specific functionality, e.g., light-weighted or task-oriented attention. However, they ignore the importance of where to plug in the attention module since they connect the modules individually with each block of the entire CNN backbone for granted, leading to incremental computational cost and number of parameters with the growth of network depth. Thus, we propose a framework called Efficient Attention Network (EAN) to improve the efficiency for the existing attention modules. In EAN, we leverage the sharing mechanism (Huang et al. 2020) to share the attention module within the backbone and search where to connect the shared attention module via reinforcement learning. Finally, we obtain the attention network with sparse connections between the backbone and modules, while (1) maintaining accuracy (2) reducing extra parameter increment and (3) accelerating inference. Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks and popular attention networks show the effectiveness of EAN. Furthermore, we empirically illustrate that our EAN has the capacity of transferring to other tasks and capturing the informative features. The code is available at https://github.com/gbup-group/EAN-efficient-attention-network. 最近，人们提出了许多即插即用的自注意力模块，通过利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的内部信息来增强模型泛化能力。以前的工作侧重于针对特定功能的注意力模块的设计，例如轻量级或面向任务的注意力。然而，他们忽略了在哪里插入注意力模块的重要性，因为他们理所当然地将模块与整个 CNN 主干的每个块单独连接，导致随着网络深度的增长，计算成本和参数数量增加。因此，我们提出了一个名为高效注意力网络（EAN）的框架来提高现有注意力模块的效率。在 EAN 中，我们利用共享机制（Huang et al. 2020）来共享主干内的注意力模块，并通过强化学习搜索在哪里连接共享注意力模块。最后，我们获得主干和模块之间具有稀疏连接的注意力网络，同时（1）保持准确性（2）减少额外的参数增量和（3）加速推理。对广泛使用的基准和流行的关注网络进行的大量实验表明了 EAN 的有效性。此外，我们凭经验证明我们的 EAN 具有转移到其他任务并捕获信息特征的能力。该代码可在 https://github.com/gbup-group/EAN-efficient-attention-network 获取。 本文提出高效注意力网络（EAN），通过搜索注意力模块的插入位置来提升卷积神经网络（CNN）中注意力机制的效率。 Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Wei He,Haizhao Yang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Junru Wu,Xiang Yu,Buyu Liu,Zhangyang Wang,Manmohan Chandraker
title: Uncertainty-Aware Physically-Guided Proxy Tasks for Unseen Domain Face Anti-spoofing
title_zh: 用于看不见的域面反欺骗的不确定性感知物理引导代理任务
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) seeks to discriminate genuine faces from fake ones arising from any type of spoofing attack. Due to the wide varieties of attacks, it is implausible to obtain training data that spans all attack types. We propose to leverage physical cues to attain better generalization on unseen domains. As a specific demonstration, we use physically guided proxy cues such as depth, reflection, and material to complement our main anti-spoofing (a.k.a liveness detection) task, with the intuition that genuine faces across domains have consistent face-like geometry, minimal reflection, and skin material. We introduce a novel uncertainty-aware attention scheme that independently learns to weigh the relative contributions of the main and proxy tasks, preventing the over-confident issue with traditional attention modules. Further, we propose attribute-assisted hard negative mining to disentangle liveness-irrelevant features with liveness features during learning. We evaluate extensively on public benchmarks with intra-dataset and inter-dataset protocols. Our method achieves the superior performance especially in unseen domain generalization for FAS.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) seeks to discriminate genuine faces from fake ones arising from any type of spoofing attack. Due to the wide varieties of attacks, it is implausible to obtain training data that spans all attack types. We propose to leverage physical cues to attain better generalization on unseen domains. As a specific demonstration, we use physically guided proxy cues such as depth, reflection, and material to complement our main anti-spoofing (a.k.a liveness detection) task, with the intuition that genuine faces across domains have consistent face-like geometry, minimal reflection, and skin material. We introduce a novel uncertainty-aware attention scheme that independently learns to weigh the relative contributions of the main and proxy tasks, preventing the over-confident issue with traditional attention modules. Further, we propose attribute-assisted hard negative mining to disentangle liveness-irrelevant features with liveness features during learning. We evaluate extensively on public benchmarks with intra-dataset and inter-dataset protocols. Our method achieves the superior performance especially in unseen domain generalization for FAS.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗 (FAS) 旨在区分任何类型的欺骗攻击所产生的真实面孔和假面孔。由于攻击的种类繁多，获得涵盖所有攻击类型的训练数据是难以置信的。我们建议利用物理线索来更好地概括未见过的领域。作为一个具体的演示，我们使用物理引导的代理线索（例如深度、反射和材质）来补充我们的主要反欺骗（又名活体检测）任务，直觉是跨域的真实面孔具有一致的面部几何形状、最小反射和皮肤材质。我们引入了一种新颖的不确定性感知注意方案，该方案独立学习权衡主要任务和代理任务的相对贡献，防止传统注意模块出现过度自信的问题。此外，我们提出了属性辅助的硬负挖掘，以在学习过程中将与活跃度无关的特征与活跃度特征分开。我们使用数据集内和数据集间协议对公共基准进行广泛评估。我们的方法实现了卓越的性能，尤其是在 FAS 的未见域泛化方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理线索的不确定性感知代理任务方法，以提升未见过领域下人脸防欺骗（FAS）的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 由于攻击类型繁多且无法覆盖所有训练数据，传统方法在未见过领域泛化能力不足。真实人脸在几何、反射和材质上具有跨域一致性，可通过物理线索辅助建模。
AI.method: 引入物理引导的代理任务（深度、反射、材质）作为辅助，设计不确定性感知注意力机制动态权衡主任务与代理任务，并采用属性辅助的难负样本挖掘分离无关特征。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准测试中，方法在跨域泛化场景下显著优于现有技术，尤其在未见过领域表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理约束与不确定性建模相结合，所提方法有效提升了FAS模型对未知攻击类型的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: A RGB-D SLAM Algorithm for Indoor Dynamic Scene
title_zh: 一种室内动态场景的RGB-D SLAM算法
abstract: Visual slam technology is one of the key technologies for robot to explore unknown environment independently. Accurate estimation of camera pose based on visual sensor is the basis of autonomous navigation and positioning. However, most visual slam algorithms are based on static environment assumption and cannot estimate accurate camera pose in dynamic environment. In order to solve this problem, a visual SLAM algorithm for indoor dynamic environment is proposed. Firstly, some moving objects are eliminated based on the depth information of RGB-D camera, and the initial camera pose is obtained by optimizing the luminosity and depth errors, then the moving objects are further eliminated. and, the initial static background is used for pose estimation again. After several iterations, the more accurate static background and more accurate camera pose is obtained. Experimental results show that, compared with previous research results, the proposed algorithm can achieve higher pose estimation accuracy in both low dynamic indoor scenes and high dynamic indoor scenes.
summary: Visual slam technology is one of the key technologies for robot to explore unknown environment independently. Accurate estimation of camera pose based on visual sensor is the basis of autonomous navigation and positioning. However, most visual slam algorithms are based on static environment assumption and cannot estimate accurate camera pose in dynamic environment. In order to solve this problem, a visual SLAM algorithm for indoor dynamic environment is proposed. Firstly, some moving objects are eliminated based on the depth information of RGB-D camera, and the initial camera pose is obtained by optimizing the luminosity and depth errors, then the moving objects are further eliminated. and, the initial static background is used for pose estimation again. After several iterations, the more accurate static background and more accurate camera pose is obtained. Experimental results show that, compared with previous research results, the proposed algorithm can achieve higher pose estimation accuracy in both low dynamic indoor scenes and high dynamic indoor scenes.
abstract_zh: 视觉SLAM技术是机器人自主探索未知环境的关键技术之一。基于视觉传感器的相机位姿准确估计是自主导航定位的基础。然而，大多数视觉SLAM算法都是基于静态环境假设，无法估计动态环境中准确的相机位姿。为了解决这一问题，提出了一种针对室内动态环境的视觉SLAM算法。首先，根据RGB-D相机的深度信息消除一些运动物体，通过优化光度和深度误差得到初始相机位姿，然后进一步消除运动物体。并且，再次使用初始静态背景进行姿态估计。经过多次迭代，获得更准确的静态背景和更准确的相机位姿。实验结果表明，与以往的研究结果相比，所提算法在低动态室内场景和高动态室内场景下均能获得较高的位姿估计精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于室内动态场景的RGB-D SLAM算法，通过消除移动物体提高相机位姿估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM算法基于静态环境假设，在动态场景中无法准确估计相机位姿，需解决动态环境下的定位问题。
AI.method: 利用RGB-D相机深度信息消除移动物体，通过优化光照与深度误差迭代获取初始位姿，并反复修正静态背景以提高精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在低动态和高动态室内场景中均比现有方法具有更高的位姿估计准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的动态场景SLAM算法通过多轮静态背景优化，有效提升了复杂室内环境下的定位鲁棒性与精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于室内动态场景的RGB-D SLAM算法，通过消除移动物体提高相机位姿估计精度。
ai_content.motivation: 传统视觉SLAM算法基于静态环境假设，在动态场景中无法准确估计相机位姿，需解决动态环境下的定位问题。
ai_content.method: 利用RGB-D相机深度信息消除移动物体，通过优化光照与深度误差迭代获取初始位姿，并反复修正静态背景以提高精度。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该算法在低动态和高动态室内场景中均比现有方法具有更高的位姿估计准确性。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的动态场景SLAM算法通过多轮静态背景优化，有效提升了复杂室内环境下的定位鲁棒性与精度。

search_text: A RGB-D SLAM Algorithm for Indoor Dynamic Scene 一种室内动态场景的RGB-D SLAM算法 Visual slam technology is one of the key technologies for robot to explore unknown environment independently. Accurate estimation of camera pose based on visual sensor is the basis of autonomous navigation and positioning. However, most visual slam algorithms are based on static environment assumption and cannot estimate accurate camera pose in dynamic environment. In order to solve this problem, a visual SLAM algorithm for indoor dynamic environment is proposed. Firstly, some moving objects are eliminated based on the depth information of RGB-D camera, and the initial camera pose is obtained by optimizing the luminosity and depth errors, then the moving objects are further eliminated. and, the initial static background is used for pose estimation again. After several iterations, the more accurate static background and more accurate camera pose is obtained. Experimental results show that, compared with previous research results, the proposed algorithm can achieve higher pose estimation accuracy in both low dynamic indoor scenes and high dynamic indoor scenes. 视觉SLAM技术是机器人自主探索未知环境的关键技术之一。基于视觉传感器的相机位姿准确估计是自主导航定位的基础。然而，大多数视觉SLAM算法都是基于静态环境假设，无法估计动态环境中准确的相机位姿。为了解决这一问题，提出了一种针对室内动态环境的视觉SLAM算法。首先，根据RGB-D相机的深度信息消除一些运动物体，通过优化光度和深度误差得到初始相机位姿，然后进一步消除运动物体。并且，再次使用初始静态背景进行姿态估计。经过多次迭代，获得更准确的静态背景和更准确的相机位姿。实验结果表明，与以往的研究结果相比，所提算法在低动态室内场景和高动态室内场景下均能获得较高的位姿估计精度。 本文提出一种适用于室内动态场景的RGB-D SLAM算法，通过消除移动物体提高相机位姿估计精度。 Deng Su,Dehong Chong cs.RO

authors_text: Taro Makino,Stanislaw Jastrzebski,Witold Oleszkiewicz,Celin Chacko,Robin Ehrenpreis,Naziya Samreen,Chloe Chhor,Eric Kim,Jiyon Lee,Kristine Pysarenko,Beatriu Reig,Hildegard Toth,Divya Awal,Linda Du,Alice Kim,James Park,Daniel K. Sodickson,Laura Heacock,Linda Moy,Kyunghyun Cho,Krzysztof J. Geras
title: Differences between human and machine perception in medical diagnosis
title_zh: 医学诊断中人与机器感知的差异
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) show promise in image-based medical diagnosis, but cannot be fully trusted since their performance can be severely degraded by dataset shifts to which human perception remains invariant. If we can better understand the differences between human and machine perception, we can potentially characterize and mitigate this effect. We therefore propose a framework for comparing human and machine perception in medical diagnosis. The two are compared with respect to their sensitivity to the removal of clinically meaningful information, and to the regions of an image deemed most suspicious. Drawing inspiration from the natural image domain, we frame both comparisons in terms of perturbation robustness. The novelty of our framework is that separate analyses are performed for subgroups with clinically meaningful differences. We argue that this is necessary in order to avert Simpson's paradox and draw correct conclusions. We demonstrate our framework with a case study in breast cancer screening, and reveal significant differences between radiologists and DNNs. We compare the two with respect to their robustness to Gaussian low-pass filtering, performing a subgroup analysis on microcalcifications and soft tissue lesions. For microcalcifications, DNNs use a separate set of high frequency components than radiologists, some of which lie outside the image regions considered most suspicious by radiologists. These features run the risk of being spurious, but if not, could represent potential new biomarkers. For soft tissue lesions, the divergence between radiologists and DNNs is even starker, with DNNs relying heavily on spurious high frequency components ignored by radiologists. Importantly, this deviation in soft tissue lesions was only observable through subgroup analysis, which highlights the importance of incorporating medical domain knowledge into our comparison framework.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) show promise in image-based medical diagnosis, but cannot be fully trusted since their performance can be severely degraded by dataset shifts to which human perception remains invariant. If we can better understand the differences between human and machine perception, we can potentially characterize and mitigate this effect. We therefore propose a framework for comparing human and machine perception in medical diagnosis. The two are compared with respect to their sensitivity to the removal of clinically meaningful information, and to the regions of an image deemed most suspicious. Drawing inspiration from the natural image domain, we frame both comparisons in terms of perturbation robustness. The novelty of our framework is that separate analyses are performed for subgroups with clinically meaningful differences. We argue that this is necessary in order to avert Simpson's paradox and draw correct conclusions. We demonstrate our framework with a case study in breast cancer screening, and reveal significant differences between radiologists and DNNs. We compare the two with respect to their robustness to Gaussian low-pass filtering, performing a subgroup analysis on microcalcifications and soft tissue lesions. For microcalcifications, DNNs use a separate set of high frequency components than radiologists, some of which lie outside the image regions considered most suspicious by radiologists. These features run the risk of being spurious, but if not, could represent potential new biomarkers. For soft tissue lesions, the divergence between radiologists and DNNs is even starker, with DNNs relying heavily on spurious high frequency components ignored by radiologists. Importantly, this deviation in soft tissue lesions was only observable through subgroup analysis, which highlights the importance of incorporating medical domain knowledge into our comparison framework.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在基于图像的医学诊断中显示出前景，但不能完全信任，因为它们的性能可能会因人类感知保持不变的数据集变化而严重降低。如果我们能够更好地理解人类和机器感知之间的差异，我们就有可能描述并减轻这种影响。因此，我们提出了一个用于比较医学诊断中人类和机器感知的框架。比较两者对删除有临床意义的信息的敏感性以及对被认为最可疑的图像区域的敏感性。从自然图像领域汲取灵感，我们从扰动鲁棒性方面进行了比较。我们框架的新颖之处在于，对具有临床意义差异的亚组进行了单独的分析。我们认为，为了避免辛普森悖论并得出正确的结论，这是必要的。我们通过乳腺癌筛查的案例研究展示了我们的框架，并揭示了放射科医生和 DNN 之间的显着差异。我们比较了两者对高斯低通滤波的鲁棒性，并对微钙化和软组织病变进行了亚组分析。对于微钙化，DNN 使用一组与放射科医生不同的高频分量，其中一些位于放射科医生认为最可疑的图像区域之外。这些特征存在虚假的风险，但如果不是，则可能代表潜在的新生物标志物。对于软组织病变，放射科医生和 DNN 之间的分歧更加明显，DNN 严重依赖放射科医生忽略的虚假高频分量。重要的是，软组织病变的这种偏差只能通过亚组分析才能观察到，这凸显了将医学领域知识纳入我们的比较框架的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，通过比较人类与机器在医学诊断中的感知差异，分析深度神经网络（DNN）与放射科医生在图像敏感性和可疑区域判断上的不同。
AI.motivation: 尽管DNN在医学影像诊断中表现良好，但其性能易受数据集偏移影响，而人类感知具有不变性。理解两者差异有助于改进模型鲁棒性，并避免统计悖论。
AI.method: 基于自然图像领域的扰动鲁棒性概念，设计框架比较人类与机器对临床关键信息移除的敏感性及可疑区域判断，通过乳腺癌筛查案例进行子群分析（如微钙化灶和软组织病变）。
AI.result: 发现DNN在微钙化灶中依赖与放射科医生不同的高频特征，部分位于医生忽略区域；软组织病变中DNN更依赖被医生忽视的虚假高频特征，且该差异仅通过子群分析可观察。
AI.conclusion: 需结合医学领域知识设计比较框架以避免统计悖论，DNN的特征差异可能揭示新生物标志物或反映模型对虚假特征的依赖。

title: cMinMax: A Fast Algorithm to Find the Corners of an N-dimensional Convex Polytope
title_zh: cMinMax：一种查找 N 维凸多面体角点的快速算法
comment: Accepted in GRAPP 2021, Code available at https://github.com/jimas95/CMinMax and video presentation at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ug313Nf-S-A
comments: Accepted in GRAPP 2021, Code available at https://github.com/jimas95/CMinMax and video presentation at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ug313Nf-S-A
abstract: During the last years, the emerging field of Augmented & Virtual Reality (AR-VR) has seen tremendousgrowth. At the same time there is a trend to develop low cost high-quality AR systems where computing poweris in demand. Feature points are extensively used in these real-time frame-rate and 3D applications, thereforeefficient high-speed feature detectors are necessary. Corners are such special features and often are used as thefirst step in the marker alignment in Augmented Reality (AR). Corners are also used in image registration andrecognition, tracking, SLAM, robot path finding and 2D or 3D object detection and retrieval. Therefore thereis a large number of corner detection algorithms but most of them are too computationally intensive for use inreal-time applications of any complexity. Many times the border of the image is a convex polygon. For thisspecial, but quite common case, we have developed a specific algorithm, cMinMax. The proposed algorithmis faster, approximately by a factor of 5 compared to the widely used Harris Corner Detection algorithm. Inaddition is highly parallelizable. The algorithm is suitable for the fast registration of markers in augmentedreality systems and in applications where a computationally efficient real time feature detector is necessary.The algorithm can also be extended to N-dimensional polyhedrons.
summary: During the last years, the emerging field of Augmented & Virtual Reality (AR-VR) has seen tremendousgrowth. At the same time there is a trend to develop low cost high-quality AR systems where computing poweris in demand. Feature points are extensively used in these real-time frame-rate and 3D applications, thereforeefficient high-speed feature detectors are necessary. Corners are such special features and often are used as thefirst step in the marker alignment in Augmented Reality (AR). Corners are also used in image registration andrecognition, tracking, SLAM, robot path finding and 2D or 3D object detection and retrieval. Therefore thereis a large number of corner detection algorithms but most of them are too computationally intensive for use inreal-time applications of any complexity. Many times the border of the image is a convex polygon. For thisspecial, but quite common case, we have developed a specific algorithm, cMinMax. The proposed algorithmis faster, approximately by a factor of 5 compared to the widely used Harris Corner Detection algorithm. Inaddition is highly parallelizable. The algorithm is suitable for the fast registration of markers in augmentedreality systems and in applications where a computationally efficient real time feature detector is necessary.The algorithm can also be extended to N-dimensional polyhedrons.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，增强和虚拟现实（AR-VR）这一新兴领域取得了巨大的增长。与此同时，在需要计算能力的地方，开发低成本高质量的 AR 系统成为了趋势。特征点广泛应用于这些实时帧率和 3D 应用中，因此高效的高速特征检测器是必要的。角点是一种特殊的特征，通常被用作增强现实 (AR) 中标记对齐的第一步。角点还用于图像配准和识别、跟踪、SLAM、机器人路径查找以及 2D 或 3D 对象检测和检索。因此，存在大量的角点检测算法，但其中大多数计算量太大，无法在任何复杂性的实时应用中使用。很多时候图像的边界是凸多边形。对于这种特殊但很常见的情况，我们开发了一种特定的算法，cMinMax。与广泛使用的 Harris 角点检测算法相比，所提出的算法速度更快，大约快 5 倍。此外，它还具有高度可并行性。该算法适用于增强现实系统中标记的快速配准以及需要计算高效的实时特征检测器的应用。该算法还可以扩展到 N 维多面体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为cMinMax的快速算法，用于在N维凸多面体中找到角点。
AI.motivation: 由于增强现实（AR）和虚拟现实（VR）等应用需要高效的实时特征检测，传统的角点检测算法如Harris算法计算量过大，难以满足实时需求。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种针对图像边界为凸多边形的特殊情况的算法cMinMax，该算法可以扩展到N维多面体，并且具有高度并行性。
AI.result: cMinMax算法比广泛使用的Harris角点检测算法快约5倍，适用于AR系统中的快速标记注册和需要高效实时特征检测的应用。
AI.conclusion: cMinMax算法在计算效率和并行性方面表现出色，适用于实时AR系统及其他需要高效特征检测的应用场景。

search_text: cMinMax: A Fast Algorithm to Find the Corners of an N-dimensional Convex Polytope cMinMax：一种查找 N 维凸多面体角点的快速算法 During the last years, the emerging field of Augmented & Virtual Reality (AR-VR) has seen tremendousgrowth. At the same time there is a trend to develop low cost high-quality AR systems where computing poweris in demand. Feature points are extensively used in these real-time frame-rate and 3D applications, thereforeefficient high-speed feature detectors are necessary. Corners are such special features and often are used as thefirst step in the marker alignment in Augmented Reality (AR). Corners are also used in image registration andrecognition, tracking, SLAM, robot path finding and 2D or 3D object detection and retrieval. Therefore thereis a large number of corner detection algorithms but most of them are too computationally intensive for use inreal-time applications of any complexity. Many times the border of the image is a convex polygon. For thisspecial, but quite common case, we have developed a specific algorithm, cMinMax. The proposed algorithmis faster, approximately by a factor of 5 compared to the widely used Harris Corner Detection algorithm. Inaddition is highly parallelizable. The algorithm is suitable for the fast registration of markers in augmentedreality systems and in applications where a computationally efficient real time feature detector is necessary.The algorithm can also be extended to N-dimensional polyhedrons. 在过去的几年里，增强和虚拟现实（AR-VR）这一新兴领域取得了巨大的增长。与此同时，在需要计算能力的地方，开发低成本高质量的 AR 系统成为了趋势。特征点广泛应用于这些实时帧率和 3D 应用中，因此高效的高速特征检测器是必要的。角点是一种特殊的特征，通常被用作增强现实 (AR) 中标记对齐的第一步。角点还用于图像配准和识别、跟踪、SLAM、机器人路径查找以及 2D 或 3D 对象检测和检索。因此，存在大量的角点检测算法，但其中大多数计算量太大，无法在任何复杂性的实时应用中使用。很多时候图像的边界是凸多边形。对于这种特殊但很常见的情况，我们开发了一种特定的算法，cMinMax。与广泛使用的 Harris 角点检测算法相比，所提出的算法速度更快，大约快 5 倍。此外，它还具有高度可并行性。该算法适用于增强现实系统中标记的快速配准以及需要计算高效的实时特征检测器的应用。该算法还可以扩展到 N 维多面体。 本文提出了一种名为cMinMax的快速算法，用于在N维凸多面体中找到角点。 Dimitrios Chamzas,Constantinos Chamzas,Konstantinos Moustakas cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Voting based ensemble improves robustness of defensive models
title_zh: 基于投票的集成提高了防御模型的稳健性
abstract: Developing robust models against adversarial perturbations has been an active area of research and many algorithms have been proposed to train individual robust models. Taking these pretrained robust models, we aim to study whether it is possible to create an ensemble to further improve robustness. Several previous attempts tackled this problem by ensembling the soft-label prediction and have been proved vulnerable based on the latest attack methods. In this paper, we show that if the robust training loss is diverse enough, a simple hard-label based voting ensemble can boost the robust error over each individual model. Furthermore, given a pool of robust models, we develop a principled way to select which models to ensemble. Finally, to verify the improved robustness, we conduct extensive experiments to study how to attack a voting-based ensemble and develop several new white-box attacks. On CIFAR-10 dataset, by ensembling several state-of-the-art pre-trained defense models, our method can achieve a 59.8% robust accuracy, outperforming all the existing defensive models without using additional data.
summary: Developing robust models against adversarial perturbations has been an active area of research and many algorithms have been proposed to train individual robust models. Taking these pretrained robust models, we aim to study whether it is possible to create an ensemble to further improve robustness. Several previous attempts tackled this problem by ensembling the soft-label prediction and have been proved vulnerable based on the latest attack methods. In this paper, we show that if the robust training loss is diverse enough, a simple hard-label based voting ensemble can boost the robust error over each individual model. Furthermore, given a pool of robust models, we develop a principled way to select which models to ensemble. Finally, to verify the improved robustness, we conduct extensive experiments to study how to attack a voting-based ensemble and develop several new white-box attacks. On CIFAR-10 dataset, by ensembling several state-of-the-art pre-trained defense models, our method can achieve a 59.8% robust accuracy, outperforming all the existing defensive models without using additional data.
abstract_zh: 开发针对对抗性扰动的鲁棒模型一直是一个活跃的研究领域，并且已经提出了许多算法来训练个体鲁棒模型。利用这些预训练的鲁棒模型，我们的目标是研究是否有可能创建一个集成来进一步提高鲁棒性。之前的几次尝试通过集成软标签预测来解决这个问题，并且基于最新的攻击方法已被证明是脆弱的。在本文中，我们表明，如果鲁棒训练损失足够多样化，则基于简单硬标签的投票集成可以提高每个单独模型的鲁棒误差。此外，给定一组强大的模型，我们开发了一种原则性的方法来选择要集成的模型。最后，为了验证改进的鲁棒性，我们进行了大量的实验来研究如何攻击基于投票的集成并开发几种新的白盒攻击。在 CIFAR-10 数据集上，通过集成多个最先进的预训练防御模型，我们的方法可以实现 59.8% 的鲁棒精度，在不使用额外数据的情况下优于所有现有的防御模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过投票机制集成预训练防御模型以提升对抗样本鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于软标签的集成方法在最新攻击下易受攻击，需探索更稳健的集成策略以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出基于硬标签投票的集成方法，通过模型间训练损失的多样性增强鲁棒性，并设计模型选择准则与新型白盒攻击进行验证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，集成多个先进防御模型后鲁棒准确率达59.8%，优于现有无额外数据的方法。
AI.conclusion: 硬标签投票集成结合模型选择策略能有效提升防御模型鲁棒性，新型攻击验证了方法的有效性。

title: General Multi-label Image Classification with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行通用多标签图像分类
abstract: Multi-label image classification is the task of predicting a set of labels corresponding to objects, attributes or other entities present in an image. In this work we propose the Classification Transformer (C-Tran), a general framework for multi-label image classification that leverages Transformers to exploit the complex dependencies among visual features and labels. Our approach consists of a Transformer encoder trained to predict a set of target labels given an input set of masked labels, and visual features from a convolutional neural network. A key ingredient of our method is a label mask training objective that uses a ternary encoding scheme to represent the state of the labels as positive, negative, or unknown during training. Our model shows state-of-the-art performance on challenging datasets such as COCO and Visual Genome. Moreover, because our model explicitly represents the uncertainty of labels during training, it is more general by allowing us to produce improved results for images with partial or extra label annotations during inference. We demonstrate this additional capability in the COCO, Visual Genome, News500, and CUB image datasets.
summary: Multi-label image classification is the task of predicting a set of labels corresponding to objects, attributes or other entities present in an image. In this work we propose the Classification Transformer (C-Tran), a general framework for multi-label image classification that leverages Transformers to exploit the complex dependencies among visual features and labels. Our approach consists of a Transformer encoder trained to predict a set of target labels given an input set of masked labels, and visual features from a convolutional neural network. A key ingredient of our method is a label mask training objective that uses a ternary encoding scheme to represent the state of the labels as positive, negative, or unknown during training. Our model shows state-of-the-art performance on challenging datasets such as COCO and Visual Genome. Moreover, because our model explicitly represents the uncertainty of labels during training, it is more general by allowing us to produce improved results for images with partial or extra label annotations during inference. We demonstrate this additional capability in the COCO, Visual Genome, News500, and CUB image datasets.
abstract_zh: 多标签图像分类是预测与图像中存在的对象、属性或其他实体相对应的一组标签的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了分类变压器（C-Tran），这是一种多标签图像分类的通用框架，利用变压器来利用视觉特征和标签之间的复杂依赖关系。我们的方法由一个 Transformer 编码器组成，该编码器经过训练，可以在给定一组输入的屏蔽标签的情况下预测一组目标标签，以及来自卷积神经网络的视觉特征。我们方法的一个关键要素是标签掩码训练目标，它使用三元编码方案在训练期间将标签的状态表示为正、负或未知。我们的模型在 COCO 和 Visual Genome 等具有挑战性的数据集上展示了最先进的性能。此外，由于我们的模型明确表示了训练期间标签的不确定性，因此它更通用，允许我们在推理过程中为具有部分或额外标签注释的图像生成改进的结果。我们在 COCO、Visual Genome、News500 和 CUB 图像数据集中演示了这种附加功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的通用多标签图像分类框架C-Tran，通过利用视觉特征与标签间的复杂依赖关系提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多标签图像分类时难以有效建模标签间的复杂依赖关系，并且对标签不确定性（如部分标注或额外标注）的处理能力不足。
AI.method: 设计了一个结合卷积神经网络视觉特征与Transformer编码器的框架，引入三元标签掩码训练目标，通过正/负/未知状态编码增强模型对标签不确定性的学习能力。
AI.result: 在COCO、Visual Genome等数据集上达到SOTA性能，且能有效处理部分标注或包含额外标签的图像，在News500和CUB数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: C-Tran通过显式建模标签不确定性，为多标签图像分类提供了更通用的解决方案，尤其适用于标注不完整或存在噪声的场景。

A key ingredient of our method is a label mask training objective that uses a ternary encoding scheme to represent the state of the labels as positive, negative, or unknown during training. Our model shows state-of-the-art performance on challenging datasets such as COCO and Visual Genome. Moreover, because our model explicitly represents the uncertainty of labels during training, it is more general by allowing us to produce improved results for images with partial or extra label annotations during inference. We demonstrate this additional capability in the COCO, Visual Genome, News500, and CUB image datasets. 多标签图像分类是预测与图像中存在的对象、属性或其他实体相对应的一组标签的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了分类变压器（C-Tran），这是一种多标签图像分类的通用框架，利用变压器来利用视觉特征和标签之间的复杂依赖关系。我们的方法由一个 Transformer 编码器组成，该编码器经过训练，可以在给定一组输入的屏蔽标签的情况下预测一组目标标签，以及来自卷积神经网络的视觉特征。我们方法的一个关键要素是标签掩码训练目标，它使用三元编码方案在训练期间将标签的状态表示为正、负或未知。我们的模型在 COCO 和 Visual Genome 等具有挑战性的数据集上展示了最先进的性能。此外，由于我们的模型明确表示了训练期间标签的不确定性，因此它更通用，允许我们在推理过程中为具有部分或额外标签注释的图像生成改进的结果。我们在 COCO、Visual Genome、News500 和 CUB 图像数据集中演示了这种附加功能。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的通用多标签图像分类框架C-Tran，通过利用视觉特征与标签间的复杂依赖关系提升分类性能。 Jack Lanchantin,Tianlu Wang,Vicente Ordonez,Yanjun Qi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xingqian Xu,Zhifei Zhang,Zhaowen Wang,Brian Price,Zhonghao Wang,Humphrey Shi
title: Rethinking Text Segmentation: A Novel Dataset and A Text-Specific Refinement Approach
title_zh: 重新思考文本分割：新颖的数据集和特定于文本的细化方法
abstract: Text segmentation is a prerequisite in many real-world text-related tasks, e.g., text style transfer, and scene text removal. However, facing the lack of high-quality datasets and dedicated investigations, this critical prerequisite has been left as an assumption in many works, and has been largely overlooked by current research. To bridge this gap, we proposed TextSeg, a large-scale fine-annotated text dataset with six types of annotations: word- and character-wise bounding polygons, masks and transcriptions. We also introduce Text Refinement Network (TexRNet), a novel text segmentation approach that adapts to the unique properties of text, e.g. non-convex boundary, diverse texture, etc., which often impose burdens on traditional segmentation models. In our TexRNet, we propose text specific network designs to address such challenges, including key features pooling and attention-based similarity checking. We also introduce trimap and discriminator losses that show significant improvement on text segmentation. Extensive experiments are carried out on both our TextSeg dataset and other existing datasets. We demonstrate that TexRNet consistently improves text segmentation performance by nearly 2% compared to other state-of-the-art segmentation methods. Our dataset and code will be made available at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Rethinking-Text-Segmentation.
summary: Text segmentation is a prerequisite in many real-world text-related tasks, e.g., text style transfer, and scene text removal. However, facing the lack of high-quality datasets and dedicated investigations, this critical prerequisite has been left as an assumption in many works, and has been largely overlooked by current research. To bridge this gap, we proposed TextSeg, a large-scale fine-annotated text dataset with six types of annotations: word- and character-wise bounding polygons, masks and transcriptions. We also introduce Text Refinement Network (TexRNet), a novel text segmentation approach that adapts to the unique properties of text, e.g. non-convex boundary, diverse texture, etc., which often impose burdens on traditional segmentation models. In our TexRNet, we propose text specific network designs to address such challenges, including key features pooling and attention-based similarity checking. We also introduce trimap and discriminator losses that show significant improvement on text segmentation. Extensive experiments are carried out on both our TextSeg dataset and other existing datasets. We demonstrate that TexRNet consistently improves text segmentation performance by nearly 2% compared to other state-of-the-art segmentation methods. Our dataset and code will be made available at https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Rethinking-Text-Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 文本分割是许多现实世界中与文本相关的任务的先决条件，例如文本样式转换和场景文本删除。然而，由于缺乏高质量的数据集和专门的调查，这一关键先决条件在许多工作中被作为假设，并且在很大程度上被当前的研究所忽视。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 TextSeg，这是一个大规模的精细注释文本数据集，具有六种类型的注释：单词和字符的边界多边形、掩码和转录。我们还介绍了文本细化网络（TexRNet），这是一种新颖的文本分割方法，可以适应文本的独特属性，例如：非凸边界、多样的纹理等，这些往往给传统的分割模型带来负担。在我们的 TexRNet 中，我们提出了文本特定的网络设计来应对这些挑战，包括关键特征池和基于注意力的相似性检查。我们还引入了三图和鉴别器损失，这在文本分割方面显示出显着的改进。我们在 TextSeg 数据集和其他现有数据集上进行了广泛的实验。我们证明，与其他最先进的分割方法相比，TexRNet 始终将文本分割性能提高了近 2%。我们的数据集和代码将在 https://github.com/SHI-Labs/Rethinking-Text-Segmentation 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型文本分割方法TexRNet，并构建了大规模精细标注的文本数据集TextSeg，以解决现有研究中文本分割任务缺乏高质量数据集和专用研究的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前文本分割作为许多实际文本相关任务的前提条件，因缺乏高质量数据集和专门研究而被忽视，导致现有方法难以处理文本的非凸边界、多样纹理等特性。
AI.method: 提出TextSeg数据集（包含词/字符级边界框、掩码和转录六类标注），设计TexRNet网络，包含关键特征池化、注意力相似性校验模块，并引入trimap和判别器损失函数以提升分割效果。
AI.result: 在TextSeg及多个现有数据集上实验表明，TexRNet相比其他最先进方法平均提升近2%性能，且数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过新型数据集和文本专用分割网络有效提升了文本分割性能，为后续研究提供了基础支持。

authors_text: Alan Lindsay,Bart Craenen,Sara Dalzel-Job,Robin L. Hill,Ronald P. A. Petrick
title: Investigating Human Response, Behaviour, and Preference in Joint-Task Interaction
title_zh: 研究联合任务交互中的人类反应、行为和偏好
abstract: Human interaction relies on a wide range of signals, including non-verbal cues. In order to develop effective Explainable Planning (XAIP) agents it is important that we understand the range and utility of these communication channels. Our starting point is existing results from joint task interaction and their study in cognitive science. Our intention is that these lessons can inform the design of interaction agents -- including those using planning techniques -- whose behaviour is conditioned on the user's response, including affective measures of the user (i.e., explicitly incorporating the user's affective state within the planning model). We have identified several concepts at the intersection of plan-based agent behaviour and joint task interaction and have used these to design two agents: one reactive and the other partially predictive. We have designed an experiment in order to examine human behaviour and response as they interact with these agents. In this paper we present the designed study and the key questions that are being investigated. We also present the results from an empirical analysis where we examined the behaviour of the two agents for simulated users.
summary: Human interaction relies on a wide range of signals, including non-verbal cues. In order to develop effective Explainable Planning (XAIP) agents it is important that we understand the range and utility of these communication channels. Our starting point is existing results from joint task interaction and their study in cognitive science. Our intention is that these lessons can inform the design of interaction agents -- including those using planning techniques -- whose behaviour is conditioned on the user's response, including affective measures of the user (i.e., explicitly incorporating the user's affective state within the planning model). We have identified several concepts at the intersection of plan-based agent behaviour and joint task interaction and have used these to design two agents: one reactive and the other partially predictive. We have designed an experiment in order to examine human behaviour and response as they interact with these agents. In this paper we present the designed study and the key questions that are being investigated. We also present the results from an empirical analysis where we examined the behaviour of the two agents for simulated users.
abstract_zh: 人类互动依赖于广泛的信号，包括非语言提示。为了开发有效的可解释规划 (XAIP) 代理，了解这些沟通渠道的范围和效用非常重要。我们的出发点是联合任务交互的现有结果及其在认知科学中的研究。我们的目的是，这些课程可以为交互代理的设计提供信息——包括那些使用规划技术的交互代理——其行为取决于用户的响应，包括用户的情感测量（即，明确地将用户的情感状态纳入规划模型中）。我们已经确定了基于计划的代理行为和联合任务交互的交叉点的几个概念，并使用这些概念设计了两种代理：一种是反应性的，另一种是部分预测性的。我们设计了一个实验来检查人类与这些代理交互时的行为和反应。在本文中，我们介绍了设计的研究和正在研究的关键问题。我们还展示了实证分析的结果，我们检查了模拟用户的两个代理的行为。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在研究人类在联合任务交互中的反应、行为及偏好，并基于此设计能够适应用户情感状态的交互代理。
AI.motivation: 为开发更有效的可解释规划代理，需理解人类交互中的非语言信号及情感状态对行为的影响。
AI.method: 设计两种交互代理（反应型与部分预测型），通过实验观察人类与代理的互动行为并进行实证分析。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种代理在模拟用户中的行为差异，但具体结果需进一步数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 用户情感状态应纳入规划模型以优化交互设计，未来需更多实证研究验证理论有效性。

title: Active Learning in CNNs via Expected Improvement Maximization
title_zh: 通过预期改进最大化的 CNN 主动学习
abstract: Deep learning models such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have demonstrated high levels of effectiveness in a variety of domains, including computer vision and more recently, computational biology. However, training effective models often requires assembling and/or labeling large datasets, which may be prohibitively time-consuming or costly. Pool-based active learning techniques have the potential to mitigate these issues, leveraging models trained on limited data to selectively query unlabeled data points from a pool in an attempt to expedite the learning process. Here we present "Dropout-based Expected IMprOvementS" (DEIMOS), a flexible and computationally-efficient approach to active learning that queries points that are expected to maximize the model's improvement across a representative sample of points. The proposed framework enables us to maintain a prediction covariance matrix capturing model uncertainty, and to dynamically update this matrix in order to generate diverse batches of points in the batch-mode setting. Our active learning results demonstrate that DEIMOS outperforms several existing baselines across multiple regression and classification tasks taken from computer vision and genomics.
summary: Deep learning models such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have demonstrated high levels of effectiveness in a variety of domains, including computer vision and more recently, computational biology. However, training effective models often requires assembling and/or labeling large datasets, which may be prohibitively time-consuming or costly. Pool-based active learning techniques have the potential to mitigate these issues, leveraging models trained on limited data to selectively query unlabeled data points from a pool in an attempt to expedite the learning process. Here we present "Dropout-based Expected IMprOvementS" (DEIMOS), a flexible and computationally-efficient approach to active learning that queries points that are expected to maximize the model's improvement across a representative sample of points. The proposed framework enables us to maintain a prediction covariance matrix capturing model uncertainty, and to dynamically update this matrix in order to generate diverse batches of points in the batch-mode setting. Our active learning results demonstrate that DEIMOS outperforms several existing baselines across multiple regression and classification tasks taken from computer vision and genomics.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等深度学习模型已在计算机视觉和最近的计算生物学等多个领域表现出高水平的有效性。然而，训练有效的模型通常需要组装和/或标记大型数据集，这可能非常耗时或昂贵。基于池的主动学习技术有可能缓解这些问题，利用有限数据训练的模型有选择地查询池中未标记的数据点，以加快学习过程。在这里，我们提出了“基于 Dropout-based Expected IMprOvementS”(DEIMOS)，这是一种灵活且计算高效的主动学习方法，它查询预期在代表性点样本中最大化模型改进的点。所提出的框架使我们能够维护一个捕获模型不确定性的预测协方差矩阵，并动态更新该矩阵，以便在批处理模式设置中生成不同批次的点。我们的主动学习结果表明，DEIMOS 在计算机视觉和基因组学的多个回归和分类任务中优于多个现有基线。

AI.tldr: 提出DEIMOS方法，通过预期改进最大化优化CNN的主动学习，减少标注数据需求。
AI.motivation: 训练有效CNN模型需要大量标注数据，成本高且耗时，主动学习可减少数据需求，但现有方法存在不足。
AI.method: 基于Dropout的DEIMOS方法，维护并动态更新预测协方差矩阵，选择预期改进最大的样本，生成多样化批次。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉和基因组学的多个任务中，DEIMOS在回归和分类任务中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DEIMOS是一种高效且灵活的主动学习框架，能有效提升CNN模型训练效率，适用于多种任务。

search_text: Active Learning in CNNs via Expected Improvement Maximization 通过预期改进最大化的 CNN 主动学习 Deep learning models such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have demonstrated high levels of effectiveness in a variety of domains, including computer vision and more recently, computational biology. However, training effective models often requires assembling and/or labeling large datasets, which may be prohibitively time-consuming or costly. Pool-based active learning techniques have the potential to mitigate these issues, leveraging models trained on limited data to selectively query unlabeled data points from a pool in an attempt to expedite the learning process. Here we present "Dropout-based Expected IMprOvementS" (DEIMOS), a flexible and computationally-efficient approach to active learning that queries points that are expected to maximize the model's improvement across a representative sample of points. The proposed framework enables us to maintain a prediction covariance matrix capturing model uncertainty, and to dynamically update this matrix in order to generate diverse batches of points in the batch-mode setting. Our active learning results demonstrate that DEIMOS outperforms several existing baselines across multiple regression and classification tasks taken from computer vision and genomics. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等深度学习模型已在计算机视觉和最近的计算生物学等多个领域表现出高水平的有效性。然而，训练有效的模型通常需要组装和/或标记大型数据集，这可能非常耗时或昂贵。基于池的主动学习技术有可能缓解这些问题，利用有限数据训练的模型有选择地查询池中未标记的数据点，以加快学习过程。在这里，我们提出了“基于 Dropout-based Expected IMprOvementS”(DEIMOS)，这是一种灵活且计算高效的主动学习方法，它查询预期在代表性点样本中最大化模型改进的点。所提出的框架使我们能够维护一个捕获模型不确定性的预测协方差矩阵，并动态更新该矩阵，以便在批处理模式设置中生成不同批次的点。我们的主动学习结果表明，DEIMOS 在计算机视觉和基因组学的多个回归和分类任务中优于多个现有基线。 提出DEIMOS方法，通过预期改进最大化优化CNN的主动学习，减少标注数据需求。 Udai G. Nagpal,David A Knowles cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Enamundram M. V. Naga Karthik,Catherine Laporte,Farida Cheriet
title: Three-dimensional Segmentation of the Scoliotic Spine from MRI using Unsupervised Volume-based MR-CT Synthesis
title_zh: 使用基于无监督体积的 MR-CT 合成从 MRI 中对脊柱侧凸进行三维分割
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the SPIE Medical Imaging Conference 2021, San Diego, CA. 9 pages, 4 figures in total
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the SPIE Medical Imaging Conference 2021, San Diego, CA. 9 pages, 4 figures in total
abstract: Vertebral bone segmentation from magnetic resonance (MR) images is a challenging task. Due to the inherent nature of the modality to emphasize soft tissues of the body, common thresholding algorithms are ineffective in detecting bones in MR images. On the other hand, it is relatively easier to segment bones from CT images because of the high contrast between bones and the surrounding regions. For this reason, we perform a cross-modality synthesis between MR and CT domains for simple thresholding-based segmentation of the vertebral bones. However, this implicitly assumes the availability of paired MR-CT data, which is rare, especially in the case of scoliotic patients. In this paper, we present a completely unsupervised, fully three-dimensional (3D) cross-modality synthesis method for segmenting scoliotic spines. A 3D CycleGAN model is trained for an unpaired volume-to-volume translation across MR and CT domains. Then, the Otsu thresholding algorithm is applied to the synthesized CT volumes for easy segmentation of the vertebral bones. The resulting segmentation is used to reconstruct a 3D model of the spine. We validate our method on 28 scoliotic vertebrae in 3 patients by computing the point-to-surface mean distance between the landmark points for each vertebra obtained from pre-operative X-rays and the surface of the segmented vertebra. Our study results in a mean error of 3.41 $\pm$ 1.06 mm. Based on qualitative and quantitative results, we conclude that our method is able to obtain a good segmentation and 3D reconstruction of scoliotic spines, all after training from unpaired data in an unsupervised manner.
summary: Vertebral bone segmentation from magnetic resonance (MR) images is a challenging task. Due to the inherent nature of the modality to emphasize soft tissues of the body, common thresholding algorithms are ineffective in detecting bones in MR images. On the other hand, it is relatively easier to segment bones from CT images because of the high contrast between bones and the surrounding regions. For this reason, we perform a cross-modality synthesis between MR and CT domains for simple thresholding-based segmentation of the vertebral bones. However, this implicitly assumes the availability of paired MR-CT data, which is rare, especially in the case of scoliotic patients. In this paper, we present a completely unsupervised, fully three-dimensional (3D) cross-modality synthesis method for segmenting scoliotic spines. A 3D CycleGAN model is trained for an unpaired volume-to-volume translation across MR and CT domains. Then, the Otsu thresholding algorithm is applied to the synthesized CT volumes for easy segmentation of the vertebral bones. The resulting segmentation is used to reconstruct a 3D model of the spine. We validate our method on 28 scoliotic vertebrae in 3 patients by computing the point-to-surface mean distance between the landmark points for each vertebra obtained from pre-operative X-rays and the surface of the segmented vertebra. Our study results in a mean error of 3.41 $\pm$ 1.06 mm. Based on qualitative and quantitative results, we conclude that our method is able to obtain a good segmentation and 3D reconstruction of scoliotic spines, all after training from unpaired data in an unsupervised manner.
abstract_zh: 从磁共振（MR）图像中进行椎骨分割是一项具有挑战性的任务。由于强调身体软组织的模式的固有性质，常见的阈值算法在检测 MR 图像中的骨骼时无效。另一方面，由于骨骼与周围区域之间的高对比度，从 CT 图像中分割骨骼相对容易。因此，我们在 MR 和 CT 域之间进行跨模态合成，以对椎骨进行简单的基于阈值的分割。然而，这隐含地假设了配对 MR-CT 数据的可用性，而这种情况很少见，特别是对于脊柱侧弯患者。在本文中，我们提出了一种完全无监督、完全三维（3D）跨模态合成方法来分割脊柱侧凸。 3D CycleGAN 模型经过训练，可以跨 MR 和 CT 领域进行不成对的体积到体积转换。然后，将 Otsu 阈值算法应用于合成的 CT 体积，以便轻松分割椎骨。由此产生的分割用于重建脊柱的 3D 模型。我们通过计算从术前 X 射线获得的每个椎骨的标志点与分段椎骨表面之间的点到表面平均距离，在 3 名患者的 28 个侧凸椎骨上验证了我们的方法。我们的研究结果平均误差为 3.41 $\pm$ 1.06 mm。基于定性和定量结果，我们得出的结论是，我们的方法能够获得良好的脊柱侧凸分割和 3D 重建，所有这些都是在以无监督的方式对不配对数据进行训练之后进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督的跨模态合成方法，用于从MRI图像中分割脊柱侧弯患者的三维脊柱结构。
AI.motivation: MRI图像难以直接分割骨骼，而CT图像易于分割但缺乏配对数据，尤其在脊柱侧弯患者中。
AI.method: 使用3D CycleGAN模型进行无监督跨模态MR-CT体积转换，再通过Otsu阈值算法分割合成CT体积中的椎骨。
AI.result: 在3名患者28块椎骨上验证，点到表面平均距离误差为3.41±1.06mm。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需配对数据即可实现脊柱侧弯的高质量分割与三维重建。

authors_text: Jihyeon Lee,Joseph Z. Xu,Kihyuk Sohn,Wenhan Lu,David Berthelot,Izzeddin Gur,Pranav Khaitan,Ke-Wei,Huang,Kyriacos Koupparis,Bernhard Kowatsch
title: Assessing Post-Disaster Damage from Satellite Imagery using Semi-Supervised Learning Techniques
title_zh: 使用半监督学习技术评估卫星图像的灾后损失
comment: NeurIPS 2020 Artificial Intelligence for Humanitarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop
comments: NeurIPS 2020 Artificial Intelligence for Humanitarian Assistance and Disaster Response Workshop
abstract: To respond to disasters such as earthquakes, wildfires, and armed conflicts, humanitarian organizations require accurate and timely data in the form of damage assessments, which indicate what buildings and population centers have been most affected. Recent research combines machine learning with remote sensing to automatically extract such information from satellite imagery, reducing manual labor and turn-around time. A major impediment to using machine learning methods in real disaster response scenarios is the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient amount of labeled data to train a model for an unfolding disaster. This paper shows a novel application of semi-supervised learning (SSL) to train models for damage assessment with a minimal amount of labeled data and large amount of unlabeled data. We compare the performance of state-of-the-art SSL methods, including MixMatch and FixMatch, to a supervised baseline for the 2010 Haiti earthquake, 2017 Santa Rosa wildfire, and 2016 armed conflict in Syria. We show how models trained with SSL methods can reach fully supervised performance despite using only a fraction of labeled data and identify areas for further improvements.
summary: To respond to disasters such as earthquakes, wildfires, and armed conflicts, humanitarian organizations require accurate and timely data in the form of damage assessments, which indicate what buildings and population centers have been most affected. Recent research combines machine learning with remote sensing to automatically extract such information from satellite imagery, reducing manual labor and turn-around time. A major impediment to using machine learning methods in real disaster response scenarios is the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient amount of labeled data to train a model for an unfolding disaster. This paper shows a novel application of semi-supervised learning (SSL) to train models for damage assessment with a minimal amount of labeled data and large amount of unlabeled data. We compare the performance of state-of-the-art SSL methods, including MixMatch and FixMatch, to a supervised baseline for the 2010 Haiti earthquake, 2017 Santa Rosa wildfire, and 2016 armed conflict in Syria. We show how models trained with SSL methods can reach fully supervised performance despite using only a fraction of labeled data and identify areas for further improvements.
abstract_zh: 为了应对地震、野火和武装冲突等灾害，人道组织需要以损失评估形式提供准确、及时的数据，以表明哪些建筑物和人口中心受到的影响最严重。最近的研究将机器学习与遥感相结合，自动从卫星图像中提取此类信息，从而减少体力劳动和周转时间。在实际灾难响应场景中使用机器学习方法的一个主要障碍是难以获得足够量的标记数据来训练正在发生的灾难的模型。本文展示了半监督学习（SSL）的一种新颖应用，用于使用最少量的标记数据和大量未标记数据来训练损害评估模型。我们将最先进的 SSL 方法（包括 MixMatch 和 FixMatch）的性能与 2010 年海地地震、2017 年圣罗莎野火和 2016 年叙利亚武装冲突的监督基线进行了比较。我们展示了使用 SSL 方法训练的模型如何在仅使用一小部分标记数据的情况下达到完全监督的性能，并确定需要进一步改进的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用半监督学习技术，从卫星图像中自动评估灾后损害，解决灾害场景下标记数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 灾害发生时获取足够标记数据困难，传统方法依赖人工处理效率低，需开发减少标记数据依赖的自动化评估方法。
AI.method: 比较MixMatch和FixMatch等半监督学习方法与监督基线，在海地地震、圣罗莎野火和叙利亚冲突案例中验证性能。
AI.result: SSL方法在少量标记数据下达到接近全监督模型的性能，证明其有效性并指出潜在优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习可有效用于灾后损害评估，未来需进一步优化模型以提升实际应用效果。

tldr: 本文提出利用半监督学习技术，从卫星图像中自动评估灾后损害，解决灾害场景下标记数据不足的问题。
motivation: 灾害发生时获取足够标记数据困难，传统方法依赖人工处理效率低，需开发减少标记数据依赖的自动化评估方法。
method: 比较MixMatch和FixMatch等半监督学习方法与监督基线，在海地地震、圣罗莎野火和叙利亚冲突案例中验证性能。
result: SSL方法在少量标记数据下达到接近全监督模型的性能，证明其有效性并指出潜在优化方向。
conclusion: 半监督学习可有效用于灾后损害评估，未来需进一步优化模型以提升实际应用效果。
search_text: Assessing Post-Disaster Damage from Satellite Imagery using Semi-Supervised Learning Techniques 使用半监督学习技术评估卫星图像的灾后损失 To respond to disasters such as earthquakes, wildfires, and armed conflicts, humanitarian organizations require accurate and timely data in the form of damage assessments, which indicate what buildings and population centers have been most affected. Recent research combines machine learning with remote sensing to automatically extract such information from satellite imagery, reducing manual labor and turn-around time. A major impediment to using machine learning methods in real disaster response scenarios is the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient amount of labeled data to train a model for an unfolding disaster. This paper shows a novel application of semi-supervised learning (SSL) to train models for damage assessment with a minimal amount of labeled data and large amount of unlabeled data. We compare the performance of state-of-the-art SSL methods, including MixMatch and FixMatch, to a supervised baseline for the 2010 Haiti earthquake, 2017 Santa Rosa wildfire, and 2016 armed conflict in Syria. We show how models trained with SSL methods can reach fully supervised performance despite using only a fraction of labeled data and identify areas for further improvements. 为了应对地震、野火和武装冲突等灾害，人道组织需要以损失评估形式提供准确、及时的数据，以表明哪些建筑物和人口中心受到的影响最严重。最近的研究将机器学习与遥感相结合，自动从卫星图像中提取此类信息，从而减少体力劳动和周转时间。在实际灾难响应场景中使用机器学习方法的一个主要障碍是难以获得足够量的标记数据来训练正在发生的灾难的模型。本文展示了半监督学习（SSL）的一种新颖应用，用于使用最少量的标记数据和大量未标记数据来训练损害评估模型。我们将最先进的 SSL 方法（包括 MixMatch 和 FixMatch）的性能与 2010 年海地地震、2017 年圣罗莎野火和 2016 年叙利亚武装冲突的监督基线进行了比较。我们展示了使用 SSL 方法训练的模型如何在仅使用一小部分标记数据的情况下达到完全监督的性能，并确定需要进一步改进的领域。 本文提出利用半监督学习技术，从卫星图像中自动评估灾后损害，解决灾害场景下标记数据不足的问题。 Jihyeon Lee,Joseph Z. Xu,Kihyuk Sohn,Wenhan Lu,David Berthelot,Izzeddin Gur,Pranav Khaitan,Ke-Wei,Huang,Kyriacos Koupparis,Bernhard Kowatsch cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: Reflective-Net: Learning from Explanations
title_zh: 反射网络：从解释中学习
abstract: We examine whether data generated by explanation techniques, which promote a process of self-reflection, can improve classifier performance. Our work is based on the idea that humans have the ability to make quick, intuitive decisions as well as to reflect on their own thinking and learn from explanations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that the potential of mimicking this process by using explanations generated by explainability methods has been explored. We found that combining explanations with traditional labeled data leads to significant improvements in classification accuracy and training efficiency across multiple image classification datasets and convolutional neural network architectures. It is worth noting that during training, we not only used explanations for the correct or predicted class, but also for other classes. This serves multiple purposes, including allowing for reflection on potential outcomes and enriching the data through augmentation.
summary: We examine whether data generated by explanation techniques, which promote a process of self-reflection, can improve classifier performance. Our work is based on the idea that humans have the ability to make quick, intuitive decisions as well as to reflect on their own thinking and learn from explanations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that the potential of mimicking this process by using explanations generated by explainability methods has been explored. We found that combining explanations with traditional labeled data leads to significant improvements in classification accuracy and training efficiency across multiple image classification datasets and convolutional neural network architectures. It is worth noting that during training, we not only used explanations for the correct or predicted class, but also for other classes. This serves multiple purposes, including allowing for reflection on potential outcomes and enriching the data through augmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们研究通过促进自我反思过程的解释技术生成的数据是否可以提高分类器的性能。我们的工作基于这样的理念：人类有能力做出快速、直观的决定，以及反思自己的思维并从解释中学习。据我们所知，这是第一次探索通过使用可解释性方法生成的解释来模仿这一过程的潜力。我们发现，将解释与传统标记数据相结合可以显着提高多个图像分类数据集和卷积神经网络架构的分类准确性和训练效率。值得注意的是，在训练过程中，我们不仅使用了正确或预测类别的解释，还使用了其他类别的解释。这有多种目的，包括允许反思潜在结果以及通过增强来丰富数据。

AI.tldr: 通过生成解释数据来增强分类器性能
AI.motivation: 受人类反思学习启发，探索利用解释数据提升模型性能
AI.method: 结合传统标签数据与多类解释数据，通过数据增强和反思机制训练模型
AI.result: 多数据集和CNN架构下分类准确率和训练效率显著提升
AI.conclusion: 利用解释数据训练能有效提升模型性能，具有应用潜力

authors_text: Ivo Sluganovic,Enis Ulqinaku,Aritra Dhar,Daniele Lain,Srdjan Capkun,Ivan Martinovic
title: IntegriScreen: Visually Supervising Remote User Interactions on Compromised Clients
title_zh: IntegriScreen：可视化监控受感染客户端上的远程用户交互
abstract: Remote services and applications that users access via their local clients (laptops or desktops) usually assume that, following a successful user authentication at the beginning of the session, all subsequent communication reflects the user's intent. However, this is not true if the adversary gains control of the client and can therefore manipulate what the user sees and what is sent to the remote server. To protect the user's communication with the remote server despite a potentially compromised local client, we propose the concept of continuous visual supervision by a second device equipped with a camera. Motivated by the rapid increase of the number of incoming devices with front-facing cameras, such as augmented reality headsets and smart home assistants, we build upon the core idea that the user's actual intended input is what is shown on the client's screen, despite what ends up being sent to the remote server. A statically positioned camera enabled device can, therefore, continuously analyze the client's screen to enforce that the client behaves honestly despite potentially being malicious. We evaluate the present-day feasibility and deployability of this concept by developing a fully functional prototype, running a host of experimental tests on three different mobile devices, and by conducting a user study in which we analyze participants' use of the system during various simulated attacks. Experimental evaluation indeed confirms the feasibility of the concept of visual supervision, given that the system consistently detects over 98% of evaluated attacks, while study participants with little instruction detect the remaining attacks with high probability.
summary: Remote services and applications that users access via their local clients (laptops or desktops) usually assume that, following a successful user authentication at the beginning of the session, all subsequent communication reflects the user's intent. However, this is not true if the adversary gains control of the client and can therefore manipulate what the user sees and what is sent to the remote server. To protect the user's communication with the remote server despite a potentially compromised local client, we propose the concept of continuous visual supervision by a second device equipped with a camera. Motivated by the rapid increase of the number of incoming devices with front-facing cameras, such as augmented reality headsets and smart home assistants, we build upon the core idea that the user's actual intended input is what is shown on the client's screen, despite what ends up being sent to the remote server. A statically positioned camera enabled device can, therefore, continuously analyze the client's screen to enforce that the client behaves honestly despite potentially being malicious. We evaluate the present-day feasibility and deployability of this concept by developing a fully functional prototype, running a host of experimental tests on three different mobile devices, and by conducting a user study in which we analyze participants' use of the system during various simulated attacks. Experimental evaluation indeed confirms the feasibility of the concept of visual supervision, given that the system consistently detects over 98% of evaluated attacks, while study participants with little instruction detect the remaining attacks with high probability.
abstract_zh: 用户通过本地客户端（笔记本电脑或台式机）访问的远程服务和应用程序通常假设，在会话开始时成功进行用户身份验证后，所有后续通信都会反映用户的意图。但是，如果攻击者获得了客户端的控制权并因此可以操纵用户看到的内容以及发送到远程服务器的内容，则情况并非如此。尽管本地客户端可能受到威胁，但为了保护用户与远程服务器的通信，我们提出了通过配备摄像头的第二台设备进行连续视觉监督的概念。由于带有前置摄像头的传入设备（例如增强现实耳机和智能家居助理）数量迅速增加，我们建立了这样的核心理念：用户的实际预期输入是客户端屏幕上显示的内容，尽管最终会发送到远程服务器。因此，静态定位的支持摄像头的设备可以持续分析客户端的屏幕，以强制客户端诚实地行事，尽管可能存在恶意。我们通过开发功能齐全的原型、在三种不同的移动设备上运行大量实验测试以及进行用户研究（分析参与者在各种模拟攻击期间对系统的使用情况）来评估这一概念目前的可行性和可部署性。实验评估确实证实了视觉监督概念的可行性，因为系统始终检测到超过 98% 的评估攻击，而几乎没有指导的研究参与者以很高的概率检测到剩余的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IntegriScreen系统，通过第二设备的摄像头持续监控用户客户端屏幕，检测并阻止被入侵客户端篡改用户与远程服务器的交互行为。
AI.motivation: 传统远程服务假设用户认证后通信可信，但恶意客户端可篡改用户界面及发送数据。随着智能设备摄像头普及，通过视觉监督验证用户真实意图成为可能。
AI.method: 开发原型系统利用摄像头实时分析客户端屏幕内容，对比实际显示与发送至服务器的数据流，通过实验测试及用户研究验证检测能力。
AI.result: 系统在三种移动设备上实现98%以上的攻击检测率，未受指导的用户也能高概率识别剩余攻击。
AI.conclusion: 视觉监督概念可行，为抵御恶意客户端攻击提供了新的防御思路，未来需进一步优化部署方式与用户体验。

title: Automated Coding of Under-Studied Medical Concept Domains: Linking Physical Activity Reports to the International Classification of Functioning, Disability, and Health
title_zh: 未充分研究的医学概念领域的自动编码：将身体活动报告与功能、残疾和健康的国际分类联系起来
comment: Updated final version, published in Frontiers in Digital Health, https://doi.org/10.3389/fdgth.2021.620828. 34 pages (23 text + 11 references); 9 figures, 2 tables
comments: Updated final version, published in Frontiers in Digital Health, https://doi.org/10.3389/fdgth.2021.620828. 34 pages (23 text + 11 references); 9 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Linking clinical narratives to standardized vocabularies and coding systems is a key component of unlocking the information in medical text for analysis. However, many domains of medical concepts lack well-developed terminologies that can support effective coding of medical text. We present a framework for developing natural language processing (NLP) technologies for automated coding of under-studied types of medical information, and demonstrate its applicability via a case study on physical mobility function. Mobility is a component of many health measures, from post-acute care and surgical outcomes to chronic frailty and disability, and is coded in the International Classification of Functioning, Disability, and Health (ICF). However, mobility and other types of functional activity remain under-studied in medical informatics, and neither the ICF nor commonly-used medical terminologies capture functional status terminology in practice. We investigated two data-driven paradigms, classification and candidate selection, to link narrative observations of mobility to standardized ICF codes, using a dataset of clinical narratives from physical therapy encounters. Recent advances in language modeling and word embedding were used as features for established machine learning models and a novel deep learning approach, achieving a macro F-1 score of 84% on linking mobility activity reports to ICF codes. Both classification and candidate selection approaches present distinct strengths for automated coding in under-studied domains, and we highlight that the combination of (i) a small annotated data set; (ii) expert definitions of codes of interest; and (iii) a representative text corpus is sufficient to produce high-performing automated coding systems. This study has implications for the ongoing growth of NLP tools for a variety of specialized applications in clinical care and research.
summary: Linking clinical narratives to standardized vocabularies and coding systems is a key component of unlocking the information in medical text for analysis. However, many domains of medical concepts lack well-developed terminologies that can support effective coding of medical text. We present a framework for developing natural language processing (NLP) technologies for automated coding of under-studied types of medical information, and demonstrate its applicability via a case study on physical mobility function. Mobility is a component of many health measures, from post-acute care and surgical outcomes to chronic frailty and disability, and is coded in the International Classification of Functioning, Disability, and Health (ICF). However, mobility and other types of functional activity remain under-studied in medical informatics, and neither the ICF nor commonly-used medical terminologies capture functional status terminology in practice. We investigated two data-driven paradigms, classification and candidate selection, to link narrative observations of mobility to standardized ICF codes, using a dataset of clinical narratives from physical therapy encounters. Recent advances in language modeling and word embedding were used as features for established machine learning models and a novel deep learning approach, achieving a macro F-1 score of 84% on linking mobility activity reports to ICF codes. Both classification and candidate selection approaches present distinct strengths for automated coding in under-studied domains, and we highlight that the combination of (i) a small annotated data set; (ii) expert definitions of codes of interest; and (iii) a representative text corpus is sufficient to produce high-performing automated coding systems. This study has implications for the ongoing growth of NLP tools for a variety of specialized applications in clinical care and research.
abstract_zh: 将临床叙述与标准化词汇和编码系统联系起来是解锁医学文本信息进行分析的关键组成部分。然而，医学概念的许多领域缺乏可以支持医学文本有效编码的成熟术语。我们提出了一个开发自然语言处理（NLP）技术的框架，用于对尚未研究的医疗信息类型进行自动编码，并通过身体移动功能的案例研究证明其适用性。活动能力是许多健康措施的组成部分，从急性后护理和手术结果到慢性虚弱和残疾，并被编码在国际功能、残疾和健康分类 (ICF) 中。然而，医学信息学中对移动性和其他类型的功能活动的研究仍然不足，ICF 和常用的医学术语都没有在实践中捕获功能状态术语。我们研究了两种数据驱动的范式：分类和候选者选择，使用物理治疗经历的临床叙述数据集，将流动性的叙述观察与标准化 ICF 代码联系起来。语言建模和词嵌入方面的最新进展被用作已建立的机器学习模型和新颖的深度学习方法的特征，在将出行活动报告与 ICF 代码关联起来时取得了 84% 的宏观 F-1 分数。分类和候选选择方法都在未充分研究的领域中呈现出自动编码的独特优势，我们强调（i）小型注释数据集的组合； (ii) 利益代码的专家定义； (iii) 具有代表性的文本语料库足以产生高性能的自动编码系统。这项研究对于临床护理和研究中各种专业应用的 NLP 工具的持续发展具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自然语言处理框架，用于自动化编码未被充分研究的医疗概念领域，通过将物理活动报告与国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）代码关联。
AI.motivation: 许多医疗概念领域缺乏有效的标准化术语，导致临床文本分析困难。运动功能作为健康评估的重要指标，其在ICF中的编码尚未被充分研究，亟需开发自动化编码技术。
AI.method: 采用分类和候选代码选择两种数据驱动范式，结合语言模型和词嵌入技术作为特征，利用物理治疗临床文本数据集训练机器学习模型和深度学习方法。
AI.result: 在将运动活动报告链接到ICF代码的任务中，模型达到84%的宏观F-1分数，证明两种方法在未研究领域自动化编码中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 小规模标注数据、专家定义的代码集和代表性文本语料库的结合可构建高性能自动化编码系统，为临床研究中多样化NLP工具的发展提供新思路。

search_text: Automated Coding of Under-Studied Medical Concept Domains: Linking Physical Activity Reports to the International Classification of Functioning, Disability, and Health 未充分研究的医学概念领域的自动编码：将身体活动报告与功能、残疾和健康的国际分类联系起来 Linking clinical narratives to standardized vocabularies and coding systems is a key component of unlocking the information in medical text for analysis. However, many domains of medical concepts lack well-developed terminologies that can support effective coding of medical text. We present a framework for developing natural language processing (NLP) technologies for automated coding of under-studied types of medical information, and demonstrate its applicability via a case study on physical mobility function. Mobility is a component of many health measures, from post-acute care and surgical outcomes to chronic frailty and disability, and is coded in the International Classification of Functioning, Disability, and Health (ICF). We investigated two data-driven paradigms, classification and candidate selection, to link narrative observations of mobility to standardized ICF codes, using a dataset of clinical narratives from physical therapy encounters. Recent advances in language modeling and word embedding were used as features for established machine learning models and a novel deep learning approach, achieving a macro F-1 score of 84% on linking mobility activity reports to ICF codes. This study has implications for the ongoing growth of NLP tools for a variety of specialized applications in clinical care and research. 将临床叙述与标准化词汇和编码系统联系起来是解锁医学文本信息进行分析的关键组成部分。然而，医学概念的许多领域缺乏可以支持医学文本有效编码的成熟术语。我们提出了一个开发自然语言处理（NLP）技术的框架，用于对尚未研究的医疗信息类型进行自动编码，并通过身体移动功能的案例研究证明其适用性。活动能力是许多健康措施的组成部分，从急性后护理和手术结果到慢性虚弱和残疾，并被编码在国际功能、残疾和健康分类 (ICF) 中。然而，医学信息学中对移动性和其他类型的功能活动的研究仍然不足，ICF 和常用的医学术语都没有在实践中捕获功能状态术语。我们研究了两种数据驱动的范式：分类和候选者选择，使用物理治疗经历的临床叙述数据集，将流动性的叙述观察与标准化 ICF 代码联系起来。语言建模和词嵌入方面的最新进展被用作已建立的机器学习模型和新颖的深度学习方法的特征，在将出行活动报告与 ICF 代码关联起来时取得了 84% 的宏观 F-1 分数。分类和候选选择方法都在未充分研究的领域中呈现出自动编码的独特优势，我们强调（i）小型注释数据集的组合； (ii) 利益代码的专家定义； (iii) 具有代表性的文本语料库足以产生高性能的自动编码系统。这项研究对于临床护理和研究中各种专业应用的 NLP 工具的持续发展具有重要意义。 本文提出一种自然语言处理框架，用于自动化编码未被充分研究的医疗概念领域，通过将物理活动报告与国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）代码关联。 Denis Newman-Griffis,Eric Fosler-Lussier cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Improving Welfare in One-sided Matching using Simple Threshold Queries
title_zh: 使用简单阈值查询提高单边匹配的福利
abstract: We study one-sided matching problems where $n$ agents have preferences over $m$ objects and each of them need to be assigned to at most one object. Most work on such problems assume that the agents only have ordinal preferences and usually the goal in them is to compute a matching that satisfies some notion of economic efficiency. However, in reality, agents may have some preference intensities or cardinal utilities that, e.g., indicate that they like an object much more than another object, and not taking these into account can result in a loss in welfare. While one way to potentially account for these is to directly ask the agents for this information, such an elicitation process is cognitively demanding. Therefore, we focus on learning more about their cardinal preferences using simple threshold queries which ask an agent if they value an object greater than a certain value, and use this in turn to come up with algorithms that produce a matching that, for a particular economic notion $X$, satisfies $X$ and also achieves a good approximation to the optimal welfare among all matchings that satisfy $X$. We focus on several notions of economic efficiency, and look at both adaptive and non-adaptive algorithms. Overall, our results show how one can improve welfare by even non-adaptively asking the agents for just one bit of extra information per object.
summary: We study one-sided matching problems where $n$ agents have preferences over $m$ objects and each of them need to be assigned to at most one object. Most work on such problems assume that the agents only have ordinal preferences and usually the goal in them is to compute a matching that satisfies some notion of economic efficiency. However, in reality, agents may have some preference intensities or cardinal utilities that, e.g., indicate that they like an object much more than another object, and not taking these into account can result in a loss in welfare. While one way to potentially account for these is to directly ask the agents for this information, such an elicitation process is cognitively demanding. Therefore, we focus on learning more about their cardinal preferences using simple threshold queries which ask an agent if they value an object greater than a certain value, and use this in turn to come up with algorithms that produce a matching that, for a particular economic notion $X$, satisfies $X$ and also achieves a good approximation to the optimal welfare among all matchings that satisfy $X$. We focus on several notions of economic efficiency, and look at both adaptive and non-adaptive algorithms. Overall, our results show how one can improve welfare by even non-adaptively asking the agents for just one bit of extra information per object.
abstract_zh: 我们研究单边匹配问题，其中 $n$ 个代理对 $m$ 个对象有偏好，并且每个代理最多需要分配给一个对象。大多数关于此类问题的研究都假设代理仅具有顺序偏好，并且通常其目标是计算满足某些经济效率概念的匹配。然而，在现实中，代理人可能有一些偏好强度或基本效用，例如，表明他们比另一个对象更喜欢一个对象，并且不考虑这些可能会导致福利损失。虽然解释这些问题的一种方法是直接向智能体询问这些信息，但这种启发过程对认知要求很高。因此，我们专注于使用简单的阈值查询来更多地了解他们的基本偏好，这些阈值查询询问代理他们对某个对象的评价是否大于某个值，并依次使用它来提出算法，产生一个匹配，对于特定的经济概念$X$，满足$X$，并且在满足$X$的所有匹配中实现了对最优福利的良好近似。我们关注经济效率的几个概念，并研究自适应和非自适应算法。总的来说，我们的结果表明，即使是非适应性地向智能体询问每个对象的一点额外信息，也可以改善福利。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过简单阈值查询提升单边匹配中的福利，使匹配结果在满足经济效率的同时逼近最优福利。
AI.motivation: 传统单边匹配问题仅考虑序数偏好，忽略代理人的卡迪尔效用（偏好强度），导致福利损失。直接获取卡迪尔信息成本高，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 设计阈值查询（询问代理人某物品价值是否超过特定值），通过少量查询学习卡迪尔偏好，并用于改进满足经济效率的匹配算法。
AI.result: 提出适应性和非适应性算法，在保证经济效率的前提下，通过每个物品仅一次查询即可显著提升福利近似度。
AI.conclusion: 阈值查询能有效利用有限信息优化匹配福利，为平衡效率与信息获取成本提供新思路。

title: Trends in deep learning for medical hyperspectral image analysis
title_zh: 医学高光谱图像分析深度学习的趋势
abstract: Deep learning algorithms have seen acute growth of interest in their applications throughout several fields of interest in the last decade, with medical hyperspectral imaging being a particularly promising domain. So far, to the best of our knowledge, there is no review paper that discusses the implementation of deep learning for medical hyperspectral imaging, which is what this review paper aims to accomplish by examining publications that currently utilize deep learning to perform effective analysis of medical hyperspectral imagery. This paper discusses deep learning concepts that are relevant and applicable to medical hyperspectral imaging analysis, several of which have been implemented since the boom in deep learning. This will comprise of reviewing the use of deep learning for classification, segmentation, and detection in order to investigate the analysis of medical hyperspectral imaging. Lastly, we discuss the current and future challenges pertaining to this discipline and the possible efforts to overcome such trials.
summary: Deep learning algorithms have seen acute growth of interest in their applications throughout several fields of interest in the last decade, with medical hyperspectral imaging being a particularly promising domain. So far, to the best of our knowledge, there is no review paper that discusses the implementation of deep learning for medical hyperspectral imaging, which is what this review paper aims to accomplish by examining publications that currently utilize deep learning to perform effective analysis of medical hyperspectral imagery. This paper discusses deep learning concepts that are relevant and applicable to medical hyperspectral imaging analysis, several of which have been implemented since the boom in deep learning. This will comprise of reviewing the use of deep learning for classification, segmentation, and detection in order to investigate the analysis of medical hyperspectral imaging. Lastly, we discuss the current and future challenges pertaining to this discipline and the possible efforts to overcome such trials.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度学习算法在多个领域的应用引起了人们的兴趣急剧增长，其中医学高光谱成像是一个特别有前途的领域。到目前为止，据我们所知，还没有一篇评论论文讨论深度学习在医学高光谱成像中的实施，这正是本文旨在通过审查目前利用深度学习对医学高光谱图像进行有效分析的出版物来实现的。本文讨论了与医学高光谱成像分析相关且适用的深度学习概念，其中一些概念自深度学习热潮以来已得到实施。这将包括回顾深度学习在分类、分割和检测中的使用，以研究医学高光谱成像的分析。最后，我们讨论了与该学科有关的当前和未来的挑战以及克服此类试验的可能努力。

AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统分析深度学习在医疗高光谱图像分类、分割和检测中的应用
AI.result: 总结了深度学习在医疗高光谱图像分析中的主要技术方法，梳理了分类、分割和检测等任务的应用案例，并指出现有技术的局限性
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步优化模型性能，提升数据质量和标注效率，以推动深度学习在医疗高光谱图像分析中的实际应用
