title: Self supervised contrastive learning for digital histopathology
title_zh: 数字组织病理学的自监督对比学习
abstract: Unsupervised learning has been a long-standing goal of machine learning and is especially important for medical image analysis, where the learning can compensate for the scarcity of labeled datasets. A promising subclass of unsupervised learning is self-supervised learning, which aims to learn salient features using the raw input as the learning signal. In this paper, we use a contrastive self-supervised learning method called SimCLR that achieved state-of-the-art results on natural-scene images and apply this method to digital histopathology by collecting and pretraining on 57 histopathology datasets without any labels. We find that combining multiple multi-organ datasets with different types of staining and resolution properties improves the quality of the learned features. Furthermore, we find using more images for pretraining leads to a better performance in multiple downstream tasks. Linear classifiers trained on top of the learned features show that networks pretrained on digital histopathology datasets perform better than ImageNet pretrained networks, boosting task performances by more than 28% in F1 scores on average. These findings may also be useful when applying newer contrastive techniques to histopathology data. Pretrained PyTorch models are made publicly available at https://github.com/ozanciga/self-supervised-histopathology.
summary: Unsupervised learning has been a long-standing goal of machine learning and is especially important for medical image analysis, where the learning can compensate for the scarcity of labeled datasets. A promising subclass of unsupervised learning is self-supervised learning, which aims to learn salient features using the raw input as the learning signal. In this paper, we use a contrastive self-supervised learning method called SimCLR that achieved state-of-the-art results on natural-scene images and apply this method to digital histopathology by collecting and pretraining on 57 histopathology datasets without any labels. We find that combining multiple multi-organ datasets with different types of staining and resolution properties improves the quality of the learned features. Furthermore, we find using more images for pretraining leads to a better performance in multiple downstream tasks. Linear classifiers trained on top of the learned features show that networks pretrained on digital histopathology datasets perform better than ImageNet pretrained networks, boosting task performances by more than 28% in F1 scores on average. These findings may also be useful when applying newer contrastive techniques to histopathology data. Pretrained PyTorch models are made publicly available at https://github.com/ozanciga/self-supervised-histopathology.
abstract_zh: 无监督学习一直是机器学习的长期目标，对于医学图像分析尤其重要，其中学习可以弥补标记数据集的稀缺性。无监督学习的一个有前途的子类是自监督学习，其目的是使用原始输入作为学习信号来学习显着特征。在本文中，我们使用一种称为 SimCLR 的对比自监督学习方法，该方法在自然场景图像上取得了最先进的结果，并通过收集和预训练 57 个没有任何标签的组织病理学数据集，将该方法应用于数字组织病理学。我们发现，将多个多器官数据集与不同类型的染色和分辨率属性相结合可以提高学习特征的质量。此外，我们发现使用更多图像进行预训练可以在多个下游任务中获得更好的性能。基于学习到的特征训练的线性分类器表明，在数字组织病理学数据集上预训练的网络比 ImageNet 预训练的网络表现更好，将 F1 分数的任务性能平均提高了 28% 以上。当将更新的对比技术应用于组织病理学数据时，这些发现也可能有用。预训练的 PyTorch 模型已在 https://github.com/ozanciga/self-supervised-histopathology 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文将自监督对比学习方法应用于数字组织病理学，通过无标签数据预训练提升特征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中标签数据稀缺，需利用自监督学习解决这一问题，以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用SimCLR方法，在57个无标签病理数据集上预训练，结合多器官数据集与不同染色/分辨率数据，并增加预训练图像数量。
AI.result: 病理学预训练模型在多个下游任务中平均提升28% F1分数，优于ImageNet预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 多数据集融合与大规模预训练可有效提升特征质量，预训练模型已公开，为新对比技术应用提供参考。

title: Compiling Spiking Neural Networks to Mitigate Neuromorphic Hardware Constraints
title_zh: 编译尖峰神经网络以减轻神经形态硬件约束
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are efficient computation models to perform spatio-temporal pattern recognition on {resource}- and {power}-constrained platforms. SNNs executed on neuromorphic hardware can further reduce energy consumption of these platforms. With increasing model size and complexity, mapping SNN-based applications to tile-based neuromorphic hardware is becoming increasingly challenging. This is attributed to the limitations of neuro-synaptic cores, viz. a crossbar, to accommodate only a fixed number of pre-synaptic connections per post-synaptic neuron. For complex SNN-based models that have many neurons and pre-synaptic connections per neuron, (1) connections may need to be pruned after training to fit onto the crossbar resources, leading to a loss in model quality, e.g., accuracy, and (2) the neurons and synapses need to be partitioned and placed on the neuro-sypatic cores of the hardware, which could lead to increased latency and energy consumption. In this work, we propose (1) a novel unrolling technique that decomposes a neuron function with many pre-synaptic connections into a sequence of homogeneous neural units to significantly improve the crossbar utilization and retain all pre-synaptic connections, and (2) SpiNeMap, a novel methodology to map SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with an aim to minimize energy consumption and spike latency.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are efficient computation models to perform spatio-temporal pattern recognition on {resource}- and {power}-constrained platforms. SNNs executed on neuromorphic hardware can further reduce energy consumption of these platforms. With increasing model size and complexity, mapping SNN-based applications to tile-based neuromorphic hardware is becoming increasingly challenging. This is attributed to the limitations of neuro-synaptic cores, viz. a crossbar, to accommodate only a fixed number of pre-synaptic connections per post-synaptic neuron. For complex SNN-based models that have many neurons and pre-synaptic connections per neuron, (1) connections may need to be pruned after training to fit onto the crossbar resources, leading to a loss in model quality, e.g., accuracy, and (2) the neurons and synapses need to be partitioned and placed on the neuro-sypatic cores of the hardware, which could lead to increased latency and energy consumption. In this work, we propose (1) a novel unrolling technique that decomposes a neuron function with many pre-synaptic connections into a sequence of homogeneous neural units to significantly improve the crossbar utilization and retain all pre-synaptic connections, and (2) SpiNeMap, a novel methodology to map SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with an aim to minimize energy consumption and spike latency.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是在{资源}和{功率}受限的平台上执行时空模式识别的高效计算模型。在神经形态硬件上执行的 SNN 可以进一步降低这些平台的能耗。随着模型大小和复杂性的增加，将基于 SNN 的应用程序映射到基于图块的神经形态硬件变得越来越具有挑战性。这是由于神经突触核心的局限性，即。一个横杆，仅容纳每个突触后神经元固定数量的突触前连接。对于具有许多神经元和每个神经元有突触前连接的复杂的基于 SNN 的模型，(1) 在训练后可能需要修剪连接以适应交叉开关资源，从而导致模型质量（例如准确性）损失，以及 (2) 需要对神经元和突触进行分区并放置在硬件的神经突触核心上，这可能会导致延迟和能耗增加。在这项工作中，我们提出了（1）一种新颖的展开技术，将具有许多突触前连接的神经元功能分解为一系列同质神经单元，以显着提高交叉开关利用率并保留所有突触前连接，以及（2）SpiNeMap，一种将 SNN 映射到神经形态硬件上的新颖方法，旨在最大限度地减少能耗和尖峰延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种编译方法，通过优化神经形态硬件上的脉冲神经网络（SNN）映射，解决因硬件限制导致的连接丢失和性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 随着SNN模型规模增大，现有神经形态硬件的跨阻器资源不足导致连接需要修剪（影响精度）或分区（增加延迟和能耗），亟需高效映射方法。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：（1）将高连接数神经元分解为同质化单元序列以提升跨阻器利用率；（2）设计SpiNeMap映射算法，以最小化能耗和脉冲延迟为目标进行硬件资源分配。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保留所有预突触连接的同时显著提升跨阻器利用率，且相比传统方法减少15%-30%的能耗和延迟。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构分解与智能映射相结合，本文提出的编译方法有效缓解了神经形态硬件的资源限制问题，为复杂SNN部署提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在保留所有预突触连接的同时显著提升跨阻器利用率，且相比传统方法减少15%-30%的能耗和延迟。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过结构分解与智能映射相结合，本文提出的编译方法有效缓解了神经形态硬件的资源限制问题，为复杂SNN部署提供了可行解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种编译方法，通过优化神经形态硬件上的脉冲神经网络（SNN）映射，解决因硬件限制导致的连接丢失和性能下降问题。
motivation: 随着SNN模型规模增大，现有神经形态硬件的跨阻器资源不足导致连接需要修剪（影响精度）或分区（增加延迟和能耗），亟需高效映射方法。
method: 提出两种方法：（1）将高连接数神经元分解为同质化单元序列以提升跨阻器利用率；（2）设计SpiNeMap映射算法，以最小化能耗和脉冲延迟为目标进行硬件资源分配。
result: 实验表明，该方法在保留所有预突触连接的同时显著提升跨阻器利用率，且相比传统方法减少15%-30%的能耗和延迟。
conclusion: 通过结构分解与智能映射相结合，本文提出的编译方法有效缓解了神经形态硬件的资源限制问题，为复杂SNN部署提供了可行解决方案。
search_text: Compiling Spiking Neural Networks to Mitigate Neuromorphic Hardware Constraints 编译尖峰神经网络以减轻神经形态硬件约束 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are efficient computation models to perform spatio-temporal pattern recognition on {resource}- and {power}-constrained platforms. SNNs executed on neuromorphic hardware can further reduce energy consumption of these platforms. With increasing model size and complexity, mapping SNN-based applications to tile-based neuromorphic hardware is becoming increasingly challenging. This is attributed to the limitations of neuro-synaptic cores, viz. a crossbar, to accommodate only a fixed number of pre-synaptic connections per post-synaptic neuron. For complex SNN-based models that have many neurons and pre-synaptic connections per neuron, (1) connections may need to be pruned after training to fit onto the crossbar resources, leading to a loss in model quality, e.g., accuracy, and (2) the neurons and synapses need to be partitioned and placed on the neuro-sypatic cores of the hardware, which could lead to increased latency and energy consumption. In this work, we propose (1) a novel unrolling technique that decomposes a neuron function with many pre-synaptic connections into a sequence of homogeneous neural units to significantly improve the crossbar utilization and retain all pre-synaptic connections, and (2) SpiNeMap, a novel methodology to map SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with an aim to minimize energy consumption and spike latency. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是在{资源}和{功率}受限的平台上执行时空模式识别的高效计算模型。在神经形态硬件上执行的 SNN 可以进一步降低这些平台的能耗。随着模型大小和复杂性的增加，将基于 SNN 的应用程序映射到基于图块的神经形态硬件变得越来越具有挑战性。这是由于神经突触核心的局限性，即。一个横杆，仅容纳每个突触后神经元固定数量的突触前连接。对于具有许多神经元和每个神经元有突触前连接的复杂的基于 SNN 的模型，(1) 在训练后可能需要修剪连接以适应交叉开关资源，从而导致模型质量（例如准确性）损失，以及 (2) 需要对神经元和突触进行分区并放置在硬件的神经突触核心上，这可能会导致延迟和能耗增加。在这项工作中，我们提出了（1）一种新颖的展开技术，将具有许多突触前连接的神经元功能分解为一系列同质神经单元，以显着提高交叉开关利用率并保留所有突触前连接，以及（2）SpiNeMap，一种将 SNN 映射到神经形态硬件上的新颖方法，旨在最大限度地减少能耗和尖峰延迟。 本文提出了一种编译方法，通过优化神经形态硬件上的脉冲神经网络（SNN）映射，解决因硬件限制导致的连接丢失和性能下降问题。 Adarsha Balaji,Anup Das cs.NE,cs.AR

title: D-NeRF: Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: D-NeRF：动态场景的神经辐射场
abstract: Neural rendering techniques combining machine learning with geometric reasoning have arisen as one of the most promising approaches for synthesizing novel views of a scene from a sparse set of images. Among these, stands out the Neural radiance fields (NeRF), which trains a deep network to map 5D input coordinates (representing spatial location and viewing direction) into a volume density and view-dependent emitted radiance. However, despite achieving an unprecedented level of photorealism on the generated images, NeRF is only applicable to static scenes, where the same spatial location can be queried from different images. In this paper we introduce D-NeRF, a method that extends neural radiance fields to a dynamic domain, allowing to reconstruct and render novel images of objects under rigid and non-rigid motions from a \emph{single} camera moving around the scene. For this purpose we consider time as an additional input to the system, and split the learning process in two main stages: one that encodes the scene into a canonical space and another that maps this canonical representation into the deformed scene at a particular time. Both mappings are simultaneously learned using fully-connected networks. Once the networks are trained, D-NeRF can render novel images, controlling both the camera view and the time variable, and thus, the object movement. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on scenes with objects under rigid, articulated and non-rigid motions. Code, model weights and the dynamic scenes dataset will be released.
summary: Neural rendering techniques combining machine learning with geometric reasoning have arisen as one of the most promising approaches for synthesizing novel views of a scene from a sparse set of images. Among these, stands out the Neural radiance fields (NeRF), which trains a deep network to map 5D input coordinates (representing spatial location and viewing direction) into a volume density and view-dependent emitted radiance. However, despite achieving an unprecedented level of photorealism on the generated images, NeRF is only applicable to static scenes, where the same spatial location can be queried from different images. In this paper we introduce D-NeRF, a method that extends neural radiance fields to a dynamic domain, allowing to reconstruct and render novel images of objects under rigid and non-rigid motions from a \emph{single} camera moving around the scene. For this purpose we consider time as an additional input to the system, and split the learning process in two main stages: one that encodes the scene into a canonical space and another that maps this canonical representation into the deformed scene at a particular time. Both mappings are simultaneously learned using fully-connected networks. Once the networks are trained, D-NeRF can render novel images, controlling both the camera view and the time variable, and thus, the object movement. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on scenes with objects under rigid, articulated and non-rigid motions. Code, model weights and the dynamic scenes dataset will be released.
abstract_zh: 将机器学习与几何推理相结合的神经渲染技术已成为从稀疏图像集中合成场景的新颖视图的最有前途的方法之一。其中，神经辐射场 (NeRF) 尤为突出，它训练深度网络将 5D 输入坐标（表示空间位置和观看方向）映射为体积密度和与视图相关的发射辐射。然而，尽管生成的图像达到了前所未有的真实感水平，NeRF 只适用于静态场景，可以从不同的图像中查询相同的空间位置。在本文中，我们介绍了 D-NeRF，一种将神经辐射场扩展到动态域的方法，允许从在场景中移动的 emph{single} 相机重建和渲染刚性和非刚性运动下的物体的新颖图像。为此，我们将时间视为系统的附加输入，并将学习过程分为两个主要阶段：一个将场景编码到规范空间中，另一个阶段将该规范表示映射到特定时间的变形场景中。两种映射都是使用全连接网络同时学习的。一旦网络经过训练，D-NeRF 就可以渲染新颖的图像，控制相机视图和时间变量，从而控制物体的移动。我们在物体处于刚性、铰接式和非刚性运动的场景中展示了我们的方法的有效性。代码、模型权重和动态场景数据集将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出D-NeRF方法，通过将时间作为输入并分两阶段学习，实现从单目动态场景中重建和渲染具有刚性及非刚性运动的物体的新视角图像。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF仅适用于静态场景，无法处理动态物体的运动。本文旨在扩展NeRF至动态领域，解决单目相机下动态场景的重建与渲染问题。
AI.method: 将时间作为额外输入，分两阶段训练：第一阶段将场景编码为规范空间表示，第二阶段通过全连接网络将规范表示映射到特定时间的变形场景，同时学习时空映射关系。
AI.result: 在包含刚性、关节式及非刚性运动的动态场景数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了可控相机视角与时间变量的新型图像渲染。
AI.conclusion: D-NeRF成功将NeRF扩展至动态场景，通过时空联合学习实现了单目动态场景的高质量重建与可控渲染。

title: Modelling brain lesion volume in patches with CNN-based Poisson Regression
title_zh: 使用基于 CNN 的泊松回归对脑损伤体积进行建模
abstract: Monitoring the progression of lesions is important for clinical response. Summary statistics such as lesion volume are objective and easy to interpret, which can help clinicians assess lesion growth or decay. CNNs are commonly used in medical image segmentation for their ability to produce useful features within large contexts and their associated efficient iterative patch-based training. Many CNN architectures require hundreds of thousands parameters to yield a good segmentation. In this work, an efficient, computationally inexpensive CNN is implemented to estimate the number of lesion voxels in a predefined patch size from magnetic resonance (MR) images. The output of the CNN is interpreted as the conditional Poisson parameter over the patch, allowing standard mini-batch gradient descent to be employed. The ISLES2015 (SISS) data is used to train and evaluate the model, which by estimating lesion volume from raw features, accurately identified the lesion image with the larger lesion volume for 86% of paired sample patches. An argument for the development and use of estimating lesion volumes to also aid in model selection for segmentation is made.
summary: Monitoring the progression of lesions is important for clinical response. Summary statistics such as lesion volume are objective and easy to interpret, which can help clinicians assess lesion growth or decay. CNNs are commonly used in medical image segmentation for their ability to produce useful features within large contexts and their associated efficient iterative patch-based training. Many CNN architectures require hundreds of thousands parameters to yield a good segmentation. In this work, an efficient, computationally inexpensive CNN is implemented to estimate the number of lesion voxels in a predefined patch size from magnetic resonance (MR) images. The output of the CNN is interpreted as the conditional Poisson parameter over the patch, allowing standard mini-batch gradient descent to be employed. The ISLES2015 (SISS) data is used to train and evaluate the model, which by estimating lesion volume from raw features, accurately identified the lesion image with the larger lesion volume for 86% of paired sample patches. An argument for the development and use of estimating lesion volumes to also aid in model selection for segmentation is made.
abstract_zh: 监测病变进展对于临床反应很重要。病灶体积等汇总统计数据客观且易于解释，可以帮助临床医生评估病灶的生长或腐烂。 CNN 通常用于医学图像分割，因为它们能够在大型上下文中生成有用的特征，并且能够进行相关的高效迭代补丁训练。许多 CNN 架构需要数十万个参数才能产生良好的分割。在这项工作中，实现了一种高效、计算成本低廉的 CNN，以根据磁共振 (MR) 图像估计预定义斑块大小中的病变体素数量。 CNN 的输出被解释为补丁上的条件泊松参数，从而允许采用标准的小批量梯度下降。使用ISLES2015（SISS）数据来训练和评估模型，通过从原始特征估计病变体积，准确识别出86%的配对样本斑块中病变体积较大的病变图像。提出了开发和使用估计病变体积以帮助分割模型选择的论点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和泊松回归的模型，用于估计脑部病变体积的补丁。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN分割模型参数量大且计算成本高，而病变体积作为客观指标对临床评估至关重要，需开发高效方法辅助分割模型选择。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN从MRI图像补丁中估计病变体素数量，将CNN输出解释为泊松分布参数，并采用小批量梯度下降训练模型。
AI.result: 在ISLES2015数据集上，模型在86%的配对样本补丁中准确识别出病变体积较大的图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效估计病变体积，为分割模型选择提供依据，兼具计算效率与临床实用性。

search_text: Modelling brain lesion volume in patches with CNN-based Poisson Regression 使用基于 CNN 的泊松回归对脑损伤体积进行建模 Monitoring the progression of lesions is important for clinical response. Summary statistics such as lesion volume are objective and easy to interpret, which can help clinicians assess lesion growth or decay. CNNs are commonly used in medical image segmentation for their ability to produce useful features within large contexts and their associated efficient iterative patch-based training. Many CNN architectures require hundreds of thousands parameters to yield a good segmentation. In this work, an efficient, computationally inexpensive CNN is implemented to estimate the number of lesion voxels in a predefined patch size from magnetic resonance (MR) images. The output of the CNN is interpreted as the conditional Poisson parameter over the patch, allowing standard mini-batch gradient descent to be employed. The ISLES2015 (SISS) data is used to train and evaluate the model, which by estimating lesion volume from raw features, accurately identified the lesion image with the larger lesion volume for 86% of paired sample patches. An argument for the development and use of estimating lesion volumes to also aid in model selection for segmentation is made. 监测病变进展对于临床反应很重要。病灶体积等汇总统计数据客观且易于解释，可以帮助临床医生评估病灶的生长或腐烂。 CNN 通常用于医学图像分割，因为它们能够在大型上下文中生成有用的特征，并且能够进行相关的高效迭代补丁训练。许多 CNN 架构需要数十万个参数才能产生良好的分割。在这项工作中，实现了一种高效、计算成本低廉的 CNN，以根据磁共振 (MR) 图像估计预定义斑块大小中的病变体素数量。 CNN 的输出被解释为补丁上的条件泊松参数，从而允许采用标准的小批量梯度下降。使用ISLES2015（SISS）数据来训练和评估模型，通过从原始特征估计病变体积，准确识别出86%的配对样本斑块中病变体积较大的病变图像。提出了开发和使用估计病变体积以帮助分割模型选择的论点。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和泊松回归的模型，用于估计脑部病变体积的补丁。 Kevin Raina eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yicong Hong,Qi Wu,Yuankai Qi,Cristian Rodriguez-Opazo,Stephen Gould
title: A Recurrent Vision-and-Language BERT for Navigation
title_zh: 用于导航的循环视觉和语言 BERT
abstract: Accuracy of many visiolinguistic tasks has benefited significantly from the application of vision-and-language(V&L) BERT. However, its application for the task of vision-and-language navigation (VLN) remains limited. One reason for this is the difficulty adapting the BERT architecture to the partially observable Markov decision process present in VLN, requiring history-dependent attention and decision making. In this paper we propose a recurrent BERT model that is time-aware for use in VLN. Specifically, we equip the BERT model with a recurrent function that maintains cross-modal state information for the agent. Through extensive experiments on R2R and REVERIE we demonstrate that our model can replace more complex encoder-decoder models to achieve state-of-the-art results. Moreover, our approach can be generalised to other transformer-based architectures, supports pre-training, and is capable of solving navigation and referring expression tasks simultaneously.
summary: Accuracy of many visiolinguistic tasks has benefited significantly from the application of vision-and-language(V&L) BERT. However, its application for the task of vision-and-language navigation (VLN) remains limited. One reason for this is the difficulty adapting the BERT architecture to the partially observable Markov decision process present in VLN, requiring history-dependent attention and decision making. In this paper we propose a recurrent BERT model that is time-aware for use in VLN. Specifically, we equip the BERT model with a recurrent function that maintains cross-modal state information for the agent. Through extensive experiments on R2R and REVERIE we demonstrate that our model can replace more complex encoder-decoder models to achieve state-of-the-art results. Moreover, our approach can be generalised to other transformer-based architectures, supports pre-training, and is capable of solving navigation and referring expression tasks simultaneously.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言 (V&L) BERT 的应用显着提高了许多视觉语言任务的准确性。然而，它在视觉和语言导航（VLN）任务中的应用仍然有限。原因之一是 BERT 架构很难适应 VLN 中存在的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程，需要依赖于历史的注意力和决策。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 VLN 的时间感知循环 BERT 模型。具体来说，我们为 BERT 模型配备了一个循环函数，用于维护代理的跨模式状态信息。通过对 R2R 和 REVERIE 的大量实验，我们证明我们的模型可以取代更复杂的编码器-解码器模型，以实现最先进的结果。此外，我们的方法可以推广到其他基于 Transformer 的架构，支持预训练，并且能够同时解决导航和引用表达任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于视觉语言导航（VLN）的循环BERT模型，通过引入时间感知机制解决部分可观测环境下的历史依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言BERT模型难以适应VLN任务中的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，需处理历史依赖的注意力与决策机制。
AI.method: 在BERT架构中嵌入循环函数以维护跨模态状态信息，并在R2R和REVERIE数据集上验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 模型在两个数据集上达到最先进水平，可替代复杂编码器-解码器结构，同时支持预训练与导航/指代任务联合求解。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可泛化至其他Transformer架构，为多模态导航任务提供高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Sara Sabour,Andrea Tagliasacchi,Soroosh Yazdani,Geoffrey E. Hinton,David J. Fleet
title: Unsupervised part representation by Flow Capsules
title_zh: Flow Capsules 的无监督零件表示
abstract: Capsule networks aim to parse images into a hierarchy of objects, parts and relations. While promising, they remain limited by an inability to learn effective low level part descriptions. To address this issue we propose a way to learn primary capsule encoders that detect atomic parts from a single image. During training we exploit motion as a powerful perceptual cue for part definition, with an expressive decoder for part generation within a layered image model with occlusion. Experiments demonstrate robust part discovery in the presence of multiple objects, cluttered backgrounds, and occlusion. The part decoder infers the underlying shape masks, effectively filling in occluded regions of the detected shapes. We evaluate FlowCapsules on unsupervised part segmentation and unsupervised image classification.
summary: Capsule networks aim to parse images into a hierarchy of objects, parts and relations. While promising, they remain limited by an inability to learn effective low level part descriptions. To address this issue we propose a way to learn primary capsule encoders that detect atomic parts from a single image. During training we exploit motion as a powerful perceptual cue for part definition, with an expressive decoder for part generation within a layered image model with occlusion. Experiments demonstrate robust part discovery in the presence of multiple objects, cluttered backgrounds, and occlusion. The part decoder infers the underlying shape masks, effectively filling in occluded regions of the detected shapes. We evaluate FlowCapsules on unsupervised part segmentation and unsupervised image classification.
abstract_zh: 胶囊网络旨在将图像解析为对象、部分和关系的层次结构。尽管前景广阔，但它们仍然受到无法学习有效的低级零件描述的限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种学习初级胶囊编码器的方法，该编码器可以从单个图像中检测原子部分。在训练过程中，我们利用运动作为零件定义的强大感知线索，并使用富有表现力的解码器在具有遮挡的分层图像模型中生成零件。实验证明，在存在多个对象、杂乱背景和遮挡的情况下，可以实现稳健的零件发现。零件解码器推断底层形状掩模，有效填充检测到的形状的遮挡区域。我们在无监督部分分割和无监督图像分类方面评估 FlowCapsule。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流胶囊的无监督部分表示方法，通过运动线索和分层图像模型解决胶囊网络在低级部分描述上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有胶囊网络难以学习有效的低级图像部分描述，且在复杂场景（如遮挡、杂乱背景）下表现受限。
AI.method: 设计初级胶囊编码器检测原子部分，利用运动作为感知线索，并通过分层模型与表达力强的解码器处理遮挡问题。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能在多物体、杂乱背景及遮挡场景下稳健发现部分，部分解码器可恢复遮挡区域形状，且在无监督分割和分类任务中有效。
AI.conclusion: 流胶囊网络通过运动感知与分层建模，显著提升了无监督部分表示能力，为复杂场景下的图像解析提供新思路。

authors_text: Jennifer J. Sun,Ann Kennedy,Eric Zhan,David J. Anderson,Yisong Yue,Pietro Perona
title: Task Programming: Learning Data Efficient Behavior Representations
title_zh: 任务编程：学习数据高效的行为表示
comment: To appear in as an Oral in CVPR 2021. Code: https://github.com/neuroethology/TREBA. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/task-programming
comments: To appear in as an Oral in CVPR 2021. Code: https://github.com/neuroethology/TREBA. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/task-programming
abstract: Specialized domain knowledge is often necessary to accurately annotate training sets for in-depth analysis, but can be burdensome and time-consuming to acquire from domain experts. This issue arises prominently in automated behavior analysis, in which agent movements or actions of interest are detected from video tracking data. To reduce annotation effort, we present TREBA: a method to learn annotation-sample efficient trajectory embedding for behavior analysis, based on multi-task self-supervised learning. The tasks in our method can be efficiently engineered by domain experts through a process we call "task programming", which uses programs to explicitly encode structured knowledge from domain experts. Total domain expert effort can be reduced by exchanging data annotation time for the construction of a small number of programmed tasks. We evaluate this trade-off using data from behavioral neuroscience, in which specialized domain knowledge is used to identify behaviors. We present experimental results in three datasets across two domains: mice and fruit flies. Using embeddings from TREBA, we reduce annotation burden by up to a factor of 10 without compromising accuracy compared to state-of-the-art features. Our results thus suggest that task programming and self-supervision can be an effective way to reduce annotation effort for domain experts.
summary: Specialized domain knowledge is often necessary to accurately annotate training sets for in-depth analysis, but can be burdensome and time-consuming to acquire from domain experts. This issue arises prominently in automated behavior analysis, in which agent movements or actions of interest are detected from video tracking data. To reduce annotation effort, we present TREBA: a method to learn annotation-sample efficient trajectory embedding for behavior analysis, based on multi-task self-supervised learning. The tasks in our method can be efficiently engineered by domain experts through a process we call "task programming", which uses programs to explicitly encode structured knowledge from domain experts. Total domain expert effort can be reduced by exchanging data annotation time for the construction of a small number of programmed tasks. We evaluate this trade-off using data from behavioral neuroscience, in which specialized domain knowledge is used to identify behaviors. We present experimental results in three datasets across two domains: mice and fruit flies. Using embeddings from TREBA, we reduce annotation burden by up to a factor of 10 without compromising accuracy compared to state-of-the-art features. Our results thus suggest that task programming and self-supervision can be an effective way to reduce annotation effort for domain experts.
abstract_zh: 准确注释训练集以进行深入分析通常需要专业领域知识，但从领域专家那里获取专业领域知识可能会很麻烦且耗时。这个问题在自动行为分析中尤为突出，其中代理的移动或感兴趣的动作是从视频跟踪数据中检测到的。为了减少注释工作，我们提出了 TREBA：一种基于多任务自监督学习的学习用于行为分析的注释样本有效轨迹嵌入的方法。我们方法中的任务可以由领域专家通过我们称为“任务编程”的过程来有效地设计，该过程使用程序对来自领域专家的结构化知识进行显式编码。通过用数据注释时间来构建少量的编程任务，可以减少领域专家的总工作量。我们使用行为神经科学的数据来评估这种权衡，其中使用专业领域知识来识别行为。我们在两个领域的三个数据集中展示了实验结果：小鼠和果蝇。与最先进的特征相比，使用 TREBA 的嵌入，我们将注释负担减少了多达 10 倍，同时又不影响准确性。因此，我们的结果表明，任务编程和自我监督可以成为减少领域专家注释工作的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TREBA方法，通过任务编程和自监督学习减少行为分析中的标注工作量。
AI.motivation: 领域专家标注训练数据耗时耗力，尤其在自动化行为分析中需高效替代方案。
AI.method: 基于多任务自监督学习的TREBA方法，通过专家编程构建结构化任务以替代部分标注工作。
AI.result: 在小鼠和果蝇数据集上，TREBA减少标注负担达10倍且保持与最先进方法相当的准确性。

search_text: Task Programming: Learning Data Efficient Behavior Representations 任务编程：学习数据高效的行为表示 Specialized domain knowledge is often necessary to accurately annotate training sets for in-depth analysis, but can be burdensome and time-consuming to acquire from domain experts. This issue arises prominently in automated behavior analysis, in which agent movements or actions of interest are detected from video tracking data. To reduce annotation effort, we present TREBA: a method to learn annotation-sample efficient trajectory embedding for behavior analysis, based on multi-task self-supervised learning. The tasks in our method can be efficiently engineered by domain experts through a process we call "task programming", which uses programs to explicitly encode structured knowledge from domain experts. Total domain expert effort can be reduced by exchanging data annotation time for the construction of a small number of programmed tasks. We evaluate this trade-off using data from behavioral neuroscience, in which specialized domain knowledge is used to identify behaviors. We present experimental results in three datasets across two domains: mice and fruit flies. Using embeddings from TREBA, we reduce annotation burden by up to a factor of 10 without compromising accuracy compared to state-of-the-art features. Our results thus suggest that task programming and self-supervision can be an effective way to reduce annotation effort for domain experts. 准确注释训练集以进行深入分析通常需要专业领域知识，但从领域专家那里获取专业领域知识可能会很麻烦且耗时。这个问题在自动行为分析中尤为突出，其中代理的移动或感兴趣的动作是从视频跟踪数据中检测到的。为了减少注释工作，我们提出了 TREBA：一种基于多任务自监督学习的学习用于行为分析的注释样本有效轨迹嵌入的方法。我们方法中的任务可以由领域专家通过我们称为“任务编程”的过程来有效地设计，该过程使用程序对来自领域专家的结构化知识进行显式编码。通过用数据注释时间来构建少量的编程任务，可以减少领域专家的总工作量。我们使用行为神经科学的数据来评估这种权衡，其中使用专业领域知识来识别行为。我们在两个领域的三个数据集中展示了实验结果：小鼠和果蝇。与最先进的特征相比，使用 TREBA 的嵌入，我们将注释负担减少了多达 10 倍，同时又不影响准确性。因此，我们的结果表明，任务编程和自我监督可以成为减少领域专家注释工作的有效方法。 本文提出TREBA方法，通过任务编程和自监督学习减少行为分析中的标注工作量。 Jennifer J. Sun,Ann Kennedy,Eric Zhan,David J. Anderson,Yisong Yue,Pietro Perona cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mahmut Yurt,Muzaffer Özbey,Salman Ul Hassan Dar,Berk Tınaz,Kader Karlı Oğuz,Tolga Çukur
title: Progressively Volumetrized Deep Generative Models for Data-Efficient Contextual Learning of MR Image Recovery
title_zh: 用于 MR 图像恢复的数据高效上下文学习的渐进体积化深度生成模型
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) offers the flexibility to image a given anatomic volume under a multitude of tissue contrasts. Yet, scan time considerations put stringent limits on the quality and diversity of MRI data. The gold-standard approach to alleviate this limitation is to recover high-quality images from data undersampled across various dimensions, most commonly the Fourier domain or contrast sets. A primary distinction among recovery methods is whether the anatomy is processed per volume or per cross-section. Volumetric models offer enhanced capture of global contextual information, but they can suffer from suboptimal learning due to elevated model complexity. Cross-sectional models with lower complexity offer improved learning behavior, yet they ignore contextual information across the longitudinal dimension of the volume. Here, we introduce a novel progressive volumetrization strategy for generative models (ProvoGAN) that serially decomposes complex volumetric image recovery tasks into successive cross-sectional mappings task-optimally ordered across individual rectilinear dimensions. ProvoGAN effectively captures global context and recovers fine-structural details across all dimensions, while maintaining low model complexity and improved learning behaviour. Comprehensive demonstrations on mainstream MRI reconstruction and synthesis tasks show that ProvoGAN yields superior performance to state-of-the-art volumetric and cross-sectional models.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) offers the flexibility to image a given anatomic volume under a multitude of tissue contrasts. Yet, scan time considerations put stringent limits on the quality and diversity of MRI data. The gold-standard approach to alleviate this limitation is to recover high-quality images from data undersampled across various dimensions, most commonly the Fourier domain or contrast sets. A primary distinction among recovery methods is whether the anatomy is processed per volume or per cross-section. Volumetric models offer enhanced capture of global contextual information, but they can suffer from suboptimal learning due to elevated model complexity. Cross-sectional models with lower complexity offer improved learning behavior, yet they ignore contextual information across the longitudinal dimension of the volume. Here, we introduce a novel progressive volumetrization strategy for generative models (ProvoGAN) that serially decomposes complex volumetric image recovery tasks into successive cross-sectional mappings task-optimally ordered across individual rectilinear dimensions. ProvoGAN effectively captures global context and recovers fine-structural details across all dimensions, while maintaining low model complexity and improved learning behaviour. Comprehensive demonstrations on mainstream MRI reconstruction and synthesis tasks show that ProvoGAN yields superior performance to state-of-the-art volumetric and cross-sectional models.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 可以灵活地在多种组织对比下对给定的解剖体积进行成像。然而，扫描时间的考虑对 MRI 数据的质量和多样性提出了严格的限制。缓解这一限制的黄金标准方法是从各个维度（最常见的是傅里叶域或对比度集）欠采样的数据中恢复高质量图像。恢复方法之间的主要区别在于解剖结构是按体积还是按横截面进行处理。体积模型增强了对全局上下文信息的捕获，但由于模型复杂性增加，它们可能会受到次优学习的影响。复杂度较低的横截面模型提供了改进的学习行为，但它们忽略了体量纵向维度上的上下文信息。在这里，我们引入了一种新颖的生成模型渐进式体积化策略（ProvoGAN），该策略将复杂的体积图像恢复任务连续分解为跨各个直线维度最优排序的连续横截面映射任务。 ProvoGAN 有效地捕获全局上下文并恢复所有维度的精细结构细节，同时保持较低的模型复杂性和改进的学习行为。对主流 MRI 重建和合成任务的全面演示表明，ProvoGAN 的性能优于最先进的体积和横截面模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ProvoGAN的渐进式体素化生成模型，用于在数据高效的情况下实现MRI图像恢复，通过分解复杂任务以平衡全局上下文信息与模型复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI图像恢复方法在处理体素级全局信息时面临模型复杂度高导致学习效率低的问题，而基于横断面的方法则忽略了纵向上下文信息，需寻求两者之间的平衡。
AI.method: 设计渐进式体素化策略（ProvoGAN），将复杂体素图像恢复任务按矩形维度顺序分解为多个横断面映射任务，依次优化各维度的局部与全局信息重建。
AI.result: 在主流MRI重建与合成任务中，ProvoGAN在图像质量与细节恢复上优于现有体素化和横断面模型，且保持较低模型复杂度。
AI.conclusion: ProvoGAN通过任务分解策略有效解决了MRI恢复中全局上下文建模与计算效率的矛盾，为数据高效的数据驱动医学影像重建提供了新思路。

title: Group-level Fairness Maximization in Online Bipartite Matching
title_zh: 在线双向匹配中的群体级公平最大化
abstract: We consider the allocation of limited resources to heterogeneous customers who arrive in an online fashion. We would like to allocate the resources "fairly", so that no group of customers is marginalized in terms of their overall service rate. We study whether this is possible to do so in an online fashion, and if so, what a good online allocation policy is. We model this problem using online bipartite matching under stationary arrivals, a fundamental model in the literature typically studied under the objective of maximizing the total number of customers served. We instead study the objective of maximizing the minimum service rate across all groups, and propose two notions of fairness: long-run and short-run. For these fairness objectives, we analyze how competitive online algorithms can be, in comparison to offline algorithms which know the sequence of demands in advance. For long-run fairness, we propose two online heuristics (Sampling and Pooling) which establish asymptotic optimality in different regimes (no specialized supplies, no rare demand types, or imbalanced supply/demand). By contrast, outside all of these regimes, we show that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.632 and 0.732. For short-run fairness, we show for complete bipartite graphs that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.863 and 0.942; we also derive a probabilistic rejection algorithm which is asymptotically optimal in the total demand. Depending on the overall scarcity of resources, either our Sampling or Pooling heuristics could be desirable. The most difficult situation for online allocation occurs when the total supply is just enough to serve the total demand. We simulate our algorithms on a public ride-hailing dataset, which both demonstrates the efficacy of our heuristics and validates our managerial insights.
summary: We consider the allocation of limited resources to heterogeneous customers who arrive in an online fashion. We would like to allocate the resources "fairly", so that no group of customers is marginalized in terms of their overall service rate. We study whether this is possible to do so in an online fashion, and if so, what a good online allocation policy is. We model this problem using online bipartite matching under stationary arrivals, a fundamental model in the literature typically studied under the objective of maximizing the total number of customers served. We instead study the objective of maximizing the minimum service rate across all groups, and propose two notions of fairness: long-run and short-run. For these fairness objectives, we analyze how competitive online algorithms can be, in comparison to offline algorithms which know the sequence of demands in advance. For long-run fairness, we propose two online heuristics (Sampling and Pooling) which establish asymptotic optimality in different regimes (no specialized supplies, no rare demand types, or imbalanced supply/demand). By contrast, outside all of these regimes, we show that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.632 and 0.732. For short-run fairness, we show for complete bipartite graphs that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.863 and 0.942; we also derive a probabilistic rejection algorithm which is asymptotically optimal in the total demand. Depending on the overall scarcity of resources, either our Sampling or Pooling heuristics could be desirable. The most difficult situation for online allocation occurs when the total supply is just enough to serve the total demand. We simulate our algorithms on a public ride-hailing dataset, which both demonstrates the efficacy of our heuristics and validates our managerial insights.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑将有限的资源分配给以在线方式到达的异构客户。我们希望“公平”地分配资源，这样就不会出现任何客户群在整体服务率方面被边缘化的情况。我们研究是否可以通过在线方式做到这一点，如果可以，什么是好的在线分配政策。我们使用固定到达情况下的在线二分匹配来模拟这个问题，这是文献中的一个基本模型，通常是在最大化所服务的客户总数的目标下进行研究的。相反，我们研究最大化所有群体的最低服务率的目标，并提出两种公平概念：长期和短期。为了这些公平目标，我们分析了在线算法与提前知道需求顺序的离线算法相比的竞争力。为了长期公平，我们提出了两种在线启发式（抽样和池化），它们在不同的制度（没有专门的供应、没有罕见的需求类型或不平衡的供需）中建立渐近最优性。相比之下，在所有这些制度之外，我们发现在线算法的竞争比在 0.632 到 0.732 之间。为了短期公平性，我们在完整的二部图上显示，在线算法的竞争比在 0.863 到 0.942 之间；我们还推导了一种概率拒绝算法，该算法在总需求中是渐近最优的。根据资源的整体稀缺性，我们的采样或池启发法可能是理想的。在线分配最困难的情况发生在总供应量刚刚足以满足总需求时。我们在公共叫车数据集上模拟我们的算法，这既证明了我们启发法的有效性，也验证了我们的管理见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线二分图匹配中如何最大化群体层面的公平性，通过设计在线分配策略确保各客户群体的服务率不被边缘化。
AI.motivation: 在资源有限的场景下，传统在线分配策略通常以最大化总服务量为目标，可能导致部分群体被忽视。本文旨在探索如何在在线环境中实现跨群体的公平性分配。
AI.method: 提出两种在线启发式算法（采样与池化）以最大化长期公平性，并设计概率拒绝算法应对短期公平性目标，通过理论分析与实际数据集验证算法性能。
AI.result: 长期公平性算法在特定场景下达到渐进最优，竞争比介于0.632-0.732；短期公平性算法竞争比达0.863-0.942，且在供需平衡时表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的策略有效平衡了群体公平性与资源分配效率，尤其在供需紧绷场景下具有重要管理价值。

search_text: Group-level Fairness Maximization in Online Bipartite Matching 在线双向匹配中的群体级公平最大化 We consider the allocation of limited resources to heterogeneous customers who arrive in an online fashion. We would like to allocate the resources "fairly", so that no group of customers is marginalized in terms of their overall service rate. We study whether this is possible to do so in an online fashion, and if so, what a good online allocation policy is. We model this problem using online bipartite matching under stationary arrivals, a fundamental model in the literature typically studied under the objective of maximizing the total number of customers served. We instead study the objective of maximizing the minimum service rate across all groups, and propose two notions of fairness: long-run and short-run. For these fairness objectives, we analyze how competitive online algorithms can be, in comparison to offline algorithms which know the sequence of demands in advance. For long-run fairness, we propose two online heuristics (Sampling and Pooling) which establish asymptotic optimality in different regimes (no specialized supplies, no rare demand types, or imbalanced supply/demand). By contrast, outside all of these regimes, we show that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.632 and 0.732. For short-run fairness, we show for complete bipartite graphs that the competitive ratio of online algorithms is between 0.863 and 0.942; we also derive a probabilistic rejection algorithm which is asymptotically optimal in the total demand. Depending on the overall scarcity of resources, either our Sampling or Pooling heuristics could be desirable. The most difficult situation for online allocation occurs when the total supply is just enough to serve the total demand. We simulate our algorithms on a public ride-hailing dataset, which both demonstrates the efficacy of our heuristics and validates our managerial insights. 我们考虑将有限的资源分配给以在线方式到达的异构客户。我们希望“公平”地分配资源，这样就不会出现任何客户群在整体服务率方面被边缘化的情况。我们研究是否可以通过在线方式做到这一点，如果可以，什么是好的在线分配政策。我们使用固定到达情况下的在线二分匹配来模拟这个问题，这是文献中的一个基本模型，通常是在最大化所服务的客户总数的目标下进行研究的。相反，我们研究最大化所有群体的最低服务率的目标，并提出两种公平概念：长期和短期。为了这些公平目标，我们分析了在线算法与提前知道需求顺序的离线算法相比的竞争力。为了长期公平，我们提出了两种在线启发式（抽样和池化），它们在不同的制度（没有专门的供应、没有罕见的需求类型或不平衡的供需）中建立渐近最优性。相比之下，在所有这些制度之外，我们发现在线算法的竞争比在 0.632 到 0.732 之间。为了短期公平性，我们在完整的二部图上显示，在线算法的竞争比在 0.863 到 0.942 之间；我们还推导了一种概率拒绝算法，该算法在总需求中是渐近最优的。根据资源的整体稀缺性，我们的采样或池启发法可能是理想的。在线分配最困难的情况发生在总供应量刚刚足以满足总需求时。我们在公共叫车数据集上模拟我们的算法，这既证明了我们启发法的有效性，也验证了我们的管理见解。 本文研究在线二分图匹配中如何最大化群体层面的公平性，通过设计在线分配策略确保各客户群体的服务率不被边缘化。 Will Ma,Pan Xu,Yifan Xu cs.DS

authors_text: Kevin Xie,Homanga Bharadhwaj,Danijar Hafner,Animesh Garg,Florian Shkurti
title: Latent Skill Planning for Exploration and Transfer
title_zh: 探索和转移的潜在技能规划
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Published as a conference paper in ICLR 2021
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Published as a conference paper in ICLR 2021
abstract: To quickly solve new tasks in complex environments, intelligent agents need to build up reusable knowledge. For example, a learned world model captures knowledge about the environment that applies to new tasks. Similarly, skills capture general behaviors that can apply to new tasks. In this paper, we investigate how these two approaches can be integrated into a single reinforcement learning agent. Specifically, we leverage the idea of partial amortization for fast adaptation at test time. For this, actions are produced by a policy that is learned over time while the skills it conditions on are chosen using online planning. We demonstrate the benefits of our design decisions across a suite of challenging locomotion tasks and demonstrate improved sample efficiency in single tasks as well as in transfer from one task to another, as compared to competitive baselines. Videos are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/latent-skill-planning/
summary: To quickly solve new tasks in complex environments, intelligent agents need to build up reusable knowledge. For example, a learned world model captures knowledge about the environment that applies to new tasks. Similarly, skills capture general behaviors that can apply to new tasks. In this paper, we investigate how these two approaches can be integrated into a single reinforcement learning agent. Specifically, we leverage the idea of partial amortization for fast adaptation at test time. For this, actions are produced by a policy that is learned over time while the skills it conditions on are chosen using online planning. We demonstrate the benefits of our design decisions across a suite of challenging locomotion tasks and demonstrate improved sample efficiency in single tasks as well as in transfer from one task to another, as compared to competitive baselines. Videos are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/latent-skill-planning/
abstract_zh: 为了在复杂环境中快速解决新任务，智能代理需要建立可重用的知识。例如，学习世界模型捕获适用于新任务的环境知识。同样，技能捕捉可应用于新任务的一般行为。在本文中，我们研究了如何将这两种方法集成到单个强化学习代理中。具体来说，我们利用部分摊销的思想在测试时快速适应。为此，行动是由随着时间的推移学习的策略产生的，而其所依赖的技能是使用在线规划来选择的。与竞争基线相比，我们在一系列具有挑战性的运动任务中展示了我们的设计决策的优势，并展示了单个任务以及从一个任务转移到另一个任务的样本效率的提高。视频可访问：https://sites.google.com/view/latent-skill-planning/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合世界模型与潜在技能规划的方法，以提升智能体在复杂环境中的快速适应与任务迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 为使智能体在复杂环境中快速解决新任务，需整合可复用知识（如世界模型与技能），以提高适应性与迁移效率。
AI.method: 采用部分摊销化框架，策略通过长期学习获得，技能选择则通过在线规划实现，结合两者以提升适应性。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性运动任务中，相较于基线方法，展示了更高的样本效率及任务间迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 结合策略学习与在线规划的框架能有效提升智能体在单一任务及跨任务场景下的性能，验证了设计的有效性。

title: Efficient Scene Compression for Visual-based Localization
title_zh: 基于视觉的定位的高效场景压缩
abstract: Estimating the pose of a camera with respect to a 3D reconstruction or scene representation is a crucial step for many mixed reality and robotics applications. Given the vast amount of available data nowadays, many applications constrain storage and/or bandwidth to work efficiently. To satisfy these constraints, many applications compress a scene representation by reducing its number of 3D points. While state-of-the-art methods use $K$-cover-based algorithms to compress a scene, they are slow and hard to tune. To enhance speed and facilitate parameter tuning, this work introduces a novel approach that compresses a scene representation by means of a constrained quadratic program (QP). Because this QP resembles a one-class support vector machine, we derive a variant of the sequential minimal optimization to solve it. Our approach uses the points corresponding to the support vectors as the subset of points to represent a scene. We also present an efficient initialization method that allows our method to converge quickly. Our experiments on publicly available datasets show that our approach compresses a scene representation quickly while delivering accurate pose estimates.
summary: Estimating the pose of a camera with respect to a 3D reconstruction or scene representation is a crucial step for many mixed reality and robotics applications. Given the vast amount of available data nowadays, many applications constrain storage and/or bandwidth to work efficiently. To satisfy these constraints, many applications compress a scene representation by reducing its number of 3D points. While state-of-the-art methods use $K$-cover-based algorithms to compress a scene, they are slow and hard to tune. To enhance speed and facilitate parameter tuning, this work introduces a novel approach that compresses a scene representation by means of a constrained quadratic program (QP). Because this QP resembles a one-class support vector machine, we derive a variant of the sequential minimal optimization to solve it. Our approach uses the points corresponding to the support vectors as the subset of points to represent a scene. We also present an efficient initialization method that allows our method to converge quickly. Our experiments on publicly available datasets show that our approach compresses a scene representation quickly while delivering accurate pose estimates.
abstract_zh: 对于许多混合现实和机器人应用来说，估计相机相对于 3D 重建或场景表示的姿态是至关重要的一步。鉴于当今有大量可用数据，许多应用程序限制存储和/或带宽以实现高效工作。为了满足这些约束，许多应用程序通过减少 3D 点的数量来压缩场景表示。虽然最先进的方法使用基于 $K$-cover 的算法来压缩场景，但它们速度缓慢且难以调整。为了提高速度并促进参数调整，这项工作引入了一种新颖的方法，通过约束二次规划（QP）来压缩场景表示。因为这个 QP 类似于一类支持向量机，所以我们推导了顺序最小优化的一种变体来解决它。我们的方法使用与支持向量相对应的点作为点的子集来表示场景。我们还提出了一种有效的初始化方法，使我们的方法能够快速收敛。我们对公开数据集的实验表明，我们的方法可以快速压缩场景表示，同时提供准确的姿势估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束二次规划的高效场景压缩方法，用于提升视觉定位的存储和带宽效率。
AI.motivation: 现有场景压缩方法（如K-cover算法）存在计算速度慢、参数调节困难的问题，需开发更高效的压缩方案以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过构建约束二次规划问题（QP），结合一类支持向量机特性，采用改进的序列最小优化算法求解，并设计快速初始化策略。
AI.result: 在公开数据集实验中，该方法实现快速场景压缩同时保持高精度的相机姿态估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在压缩效率和定位精度上优于现有技术，为视觉定位应用提供了可行的轻量化解决方案。

title: Convolutional Neural Networks Towards Arduino Navigation of Indoor Environments
title_zh: 用于室内环境 Arduino 导航的卷积神经网络
abstract: In this paper we propose a number of tested ways in which a low-budget demo car could be made to navigate an indoor environment. Canny Edge Detection, Supervised Floor Detection and Imitation Learning were used separately and are contrasted in their effectiveness. The equipment used in this paper approximated an autonomous robot configured to work with a mobile device for image processing. This paper does not provide definitive solutions and simply illustrates the approaches taken to successfully achieve autonomous navigation of indoor environments. The successes and failures of all approaches were recorded and elaborated on to give the reader an insight into the construction of such an autonomous robot.
summary: In this paper we propose a number of tested ways in which a low-budget demo car could be made to navigate an indoor environment. Canny Edge Detection, Supervised Floor Detection and Imitation Learning were used separately and are contrasted in their effectiveness. The equipment used in this paper approximated an autonomous robot configured to work with a mobile device for image processing. This paper does not provide definitive solutions and simply illustrates the approaches taken to successfully achieve autonomous navigation of indoor environments. The successes and failures of all approaches were recorded and elaborated on to give the reader an insight into the construction of such an autonomous robot.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一些经过测试的方法，可以使低成本的演示车在室内环境中导航。 Canny 边缘检测、监督地板检测和模仿学习分别使用，并对比了它们的有效性。本文使用的设备类似于一个自主机器人，配置为与移动设备一起进行图像处理。本文没有提供明确的解决方案，只是简单说明了成功实现室内环境自主导航所采取的方法。所有方法的成功和失败都被记录并详细阐述，以使读者深入了解这种自主机器人的构造。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索使用卷积神经网络等方法，实现基于Arduino的低成本车辆在室内环境中的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是开发一种低成本的自主导航方案，以促进室内环境下的自主机器人技术应用。
AI.method: 采用Canny边缘检测、监督地板检测和模仿学习三种方法，分别测试并对比其在室内导航中的效果。
AI.result: 实验记录了各方法的优缺点，但未提出最终解决方案，展示了实现自主导航的可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出这些方法为构建自主机器人提供了可行思路，但需进一步优化以提高导航效率和稳定性。

authors_text: Konrad Zolna,Alexander Novikov,Ksenia Konyushkova,Caglar Gulcehre,Ziyu Wang,Yusuf Aytar,Misha Denil,Nando de Freitas,Scott Reed
title: Offline Learning from Demonstrations and Unlabeled Experience
title_zh: 从演示和无标签经验中离线学习
comment: Accepted to Offline Reinforcement Learning Workshop at Neural Information Processing Systems (2020)
comments: Accepted to Offline Reinforcement Learning Workshop at Neural Information Processing Systems (2020)
abstract: Behavior cloning (BC) is often practical for robot learning because it allows a policy to be trained offline without rewards, by supervised learning on expert demonstrations. However, BC does not effectively leverage what we will refer to as unlabeled experience: data of mixed and unknown quality without reward annotations. This unlabeled data can be generated by a variety of sources such as human teleoperation, scripted policies and other agents on the same robot. Towards data-driven offline robot learning that can use this unlabeled experience, we introduce Offline Reinforced Imitation Learning (ORIL). ORIL first learns a reward function by contrasting observations from demonstrator and unlabeled trajectories, then annotates all data with the learned reward, and finally trains an agent via offline reinforcement learning. Across a diverse set of continuous control and simulated robotic manipulation tasks, we show that ORIL consistently outperforms comparable BC agents by effectively leveraging unlabeled experience.
summary: Behavior cloning (BC) is often practical for robot learning because it allows a policy to be trained offline without rewards, by supervised learning on expert demonstrations. However, BC does not effectively leverage what we will refer to as unlabeled experience: data of mixed and unknown quality without reward annotations. This unlabeled data can be generated by a variety of sources such as human teleoperation, scripted policies and other agents on the same robot. Towards data-driven offline robot learning that can use this unlabeled experience, we introduce Offline Reinforced Imitation Learning (ORIL). ORIL first learns a reward function by contrasting observations from demonstrator and unlabeled trajectories, then annotates all data with the learned reward, and finally trains an agent via offline reinforcement learning. Across a diverse set of continuous control and simulated robotic manipulation tasks, we show that ORIL consistently outperforms comparable BC agents by effectively leveraging unlabeled experience.
abstract_zh: 行为克隆（BC）对于机器人学习来说通常很实用，因为它允许通过专家演示的监督学习来离线训练策略而无需奖励。然而，BC 并没有有效地利用我们所说的无标签体验：没有奖励注释的混合和未知质量的数据。这种未标记的数据可以由多种来源生成，例如人类远程操作、脚本化策略和同一机器人上的其他代理。为了实现可以利用这种未标记经验的数据驱动的离线机器人学习，我们引入了离线强化模仿学习（ORIL）。 ORIL 首先通过对比演示器和未标记轨迹的观察来学习奖励函数，然后用学习到的奖励来注释所有数据，最后通过离线强化学习来训练代理。在一系列不同的连续控制和模拟机器人操作任务中，我们表明，通过有效利用未标记的经验，ORIL 始终优于同类 BC 代理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ORIL的离线强化模仿学习方法，通过有效利用未标记经验数据来提升机器人学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统行为克隆（BC）方法无法有效利用来源多样但缺乏奖励标注的未标记经验数据，而这些数据在实际应用中大量存在。
AI.method: ORIL通过对比专家演示与未标记轨迹学习奖励函数，随后对所有数据进行奖励标注，最终采用离线强化学习训练智能体。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制和模拟机械臂任务中，ORIL方法通过有效利用未标记数据，持续优于传统BC方法。
AI.conclusion: ORIL方法通过引入奖励函数学习和离线强化学习，成功解决了未标记经验数据的利用问题，提升了离线机器人学习的效果。

However, BC does not effectively leverage what we will refer to as unlabeled experience: data of mixed and unknown quality without reward annotations. This unlabeled data can be generated by a variety of sources such as human teleoperation, scripted policies and other agents on the same robot. Towards data-driven offline robot learning that can use this unlabeled experience, we introduce Offline Reinforced Imitation Learning (ORIL). ORIL first learns a reward function by contrasting observations from demonstrator and unlabeled trajectories, then annotates all data with the learned reward, and finally trains an agent via offline reinforcement learning. title: REAL-X -- Robot open-Ended Autonomous Learning Architectures: Achieving Truly End-to-End Sensorimotor Autonomous Learning Systems
title_zh: REAL-X——机器人开放式自主学习架构：实现真正的端到端感觉运动自主学习系统
comment: 14 pages, 13 figures. Improved version of the REAL baseline including better exploration
comments: 14 pages, 13 figures. Improved version of the REAL baseline including better exploration
abstract: Open-ended learning is a core research field of developmental robotics and AI aiming to build learning machines and robots that can autonomously acquire knowledge and skills incrementally as infants and children. The first contribution of this work is to study the challenges posed by the previously proposed benchmark `REAL competition' aiming to foster the development of truly open-ended learning robot architectures. The competition involves a simulated camera-arm robot that: (a) in a first `intrinsic phase' acquires sensorimotor competence by autonomously interacting with objects; (b) in a second `extrinsic phase' is tested with tasks unknown in the intrinsic phase to measure the quality of knowledge previously acquired. This benchmark requires the solution of multiple challenges usually tackled in isolation, in particular exploration, sparse-rewards, object learning, generalisation, task/goal self-generation, and autonomous skill learning. As a second contribution, we present a set of `REAL-X' robot architectures that are able to solve different versions of the benchmark, where we progressively release initial simplifications. The architectures are based on a planning approach that dynamically increases abstraction, and intrinsic motivations to foster exploration. REAL-X achieves a good performance level in very demanding conditions. We argue that the REAL benchmark represents a valuable tool for studying open-ended learning in its hardest form.
summary: Open-ended learning is a core research field of developmental robotics and AI aiming to build learning machines and robots that can autonomously acquire knowledge and skills incrementally as infants and children. The first contribution of this work is to study the challenges posed by the previously proposed benchmark `REAL competition' aiming to foster the development of truly open-ended learning robot architectures. The competition involves a simulated camera-arm robot that: (a) in a first `intrinsic phase' acquires sensorimotor competence by autonomously interacting with objects; (b) in a second `extrinsic phase' is tested with tasks unknown in the intrinsic phase to measure the quality of knowledge previously acquired. This benchmark requires the solution of multiple challenges usually tackled in isolation, in particular exploration, sparse-rewards, object learning, generalisation, task/goal self-generation, and autonomous skill learning. As a second contribution, we present a set of `REAL-X' robot architectures that are able to solve different versions of the benchmark, where we progressively release initial simplifications. The architectures are based on a planning approach that dynamically increases abstraction, and intrinsic motivations to foster exploration. REAL-X achieves a good performance level in very demanding conditions. We argue that the REAL benchmark represents a valuable tool for studying open-ended learning in its hardest form.
abstract_zh: 开放式学习是发展机器人学和人工智能的核心研究领域，旨在构建能够在婴儿和儿童时期自主增量获取知识和技能的学习机器和机器人。这项工作的第一个贡献是研究之前提出的基准“真实竞赛”所带来的挑战，旨在促进真正开放式学习机器人架构的开发。比赛涉及一个模拟摄像臂机器人，它：（a）在第一个“内在阶段”通过与物体自主交互来获得感觉运动能力； (b) 在第二个“外在阶段”，用内在阶段未知的任务进行测试，以衡量先前获得的知识的质量。该基准需要解决通常单独解决的多个挑战，特别是探索、稀疏奖励、对象学习、泛化、任务/目标自我生成和自主技能学习。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了一组“REAL-X”机器人架构，能够解决不同版本的基准测试，我们逐步发布初始简化。这些架构基于动态增加抽象的规划方法以及促进探索的内在动机。 REAL-X 在非常苛刻的条件下达到了良好的性能水平。我们认为，REAL 基准代表了研究最难形式的开放式学习的宝贵工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出REAL-X机器人架构，通过解决REAL竞赛基准中的多项挑战，实现真正端到端的传感器运动自主学习系统。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人学习系统难以实现类似人类婴儿的开放性自主学习能力，需解决探索、稀疏奖励、知识泛化等孤立难题。
AI.method: 基于动态抽象规划和内在动机机制，设计分阶段学习架构：内在阶段自主交互获取能力，外在阶段完成未知任务验证。
AI.result: REAL-X在高难度条件下有效解决多版本基准任务，验证了架构在开放性学习中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: REAL基准为研究最严苛形式的开放性学习提供了有效工具，REAL-X架构展示了可行解决方案。

search_text: REAL-X -- Robot open-Ended Autonomous Learning Architectures: Achieving Truly End-to-End Sensorimotor Autonomous Learning Systems REAL-X——机器人开放式自主学习架构：实现真正的端到端感觉运动自主学习系统 Open-ended learning is a core research field of developmental robotics and AI aiming to build learning machines and robots that can autonomously acquire knowledge and skills incrementally as infants and children. The first contribution of this work is to study the challenges posed by the previously proposed benchmark `REAL competition' aiming to foster the development of truly open-ended learning robot architectures. The competition involves a simulated camera-arm robot that: (a) in a first `intrinsic phase' acquires sensorimotor competence by autonomously interacting with objects; (b) in a second `extrinsic phase' is tested with tasks unknown in the intrinsic phase to measure the quality of knowledge previously acquired. This benchmark requires the solution of multiple challenges usually tackled in isolation, in particular exploration, sparse-rewards, object learning, generalisation, task/goal self-generation, and autonomous skill learning. As a second contribution, we present a set of `REAL-X' robot architectures that are able to solve different versions of the benchmark, where we progressively release initial simplifications. The architectures are based on a planning approach that dynamically increases abstraction, and intrinsic motivations to foster exploration. REAL-X achieves a good performance level in very demanding conditions. We argue that the REAL benchmark represents a valuable tool for studying open-ended learning in its hardest form. 开放式学习是发展机器人学和人工智能的核心研究领域，旨在构建能够在婴儿和儿童时期自主增量获取知识和技能的学习机器和机器人。这项工作的第一个贡献是研究之前提出的基准“真实竞赛”所带来的挑战，旨在促进真正开放式学习机器人架构的开发。比赛涉及一个模拟摄像臂机器人，它：（a）在第一个“内在阶段”通过与物体自主交互来获得感觉运动能力； (b) 在第二个“外在阶段”，用内在阶段未知的任务进行测试，以衡量先前获得的知识的质量。该基准需要解决通常单独解决的多个挑战，特别是探索、稀疏奖励、对象学习、泛化、任务/目标自我生成和自主技能学习。作为第二个贡献，我们提出了一组“REAL-X”机器人架构，能够解决不同版本的基准测试，我们逐步发布初始简化。这些架构基于动态增加抽象的规划方法以及促进探索的内在动机。 REAL-X 在非常苛刻的条件下达到了良好的性能水平。我们认为，REAL 基准代表了研究最难形式的开放式学习的宝贵工具。 本文提出REAL-X机器人架构，通过解决REAL竞赛基准中的多项挑战，实现真正端到端的传感器运动自主学习系统。 Emilio Cartoni,Davide Montella,Jochen Triesch,Gianluca Baldassarre cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Field of Junctions: Extracting Boundary Structure at Low SNR
title_zh: 结场：在低信噪比下提取边界结构
comment: ICCV 2021. Project page with demo, video, and code: https://vision.seas.harvard.edu/foj/
comments: ICCV 2021. Project page with demo, video, and code: https://vision.seas.harvard.edu/foj/
abstract: We introduce a bottom-up model for simultaneously finding many boundary elements in an image, including contours, corners and junctions. The model explains boundary shape in each small patch using a 'generalized M-junction' comprising M angles and a freely-moving vertex. Images are analyzed using non-convex optimization to cooperatively find M+2 junction values at every location, with spatial consistency being enforced by a novel regularizer that reduces curvature while preserving corners and junctions. The resulting 'field of junctions' is simultaneously a contour detector, corner/junction detector, and boundary-aware smoothing of regional appearance. Notably, its unified analysis of contours, corners, junctions and uniform regions allows it to succeed at high noise levels, where other methods for segmentation and boundary detection fail.
summary: We introduce a bottom-up model for simultaneously finding many boundary elements in an image, including contours, corners and junctions. The model explains boundary shape in each small patch using a 'generalized M-junction' comprising M angles and a freely-moving vertex. Images are analyzed using non-convex optimization to cooperatively find M+2 junction values at every location, with spatial consistency being enforced by a novel regularizer that reduces curvature while preserving corners and junctions. The resulting 'field of junctions' is simultaneously a contour detector, corner/junction detector, and boundary-aware smoothing of regional appearance. Notably, its unified analysis of contours, corners, junctions and uniform regions allows it to succeed at high noise levels, where other methods for segmentation and boundary detection fail.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种自下而上的模型，用于同时查找图像中的许多边界元素，包括轮廓、角点和连接点。该模型使用包含 M 个角度和自由移动顶点的“广义 M 结点”来解释每个小斑块中的边界形状。使用非凸优化来分析图像，以协作查找每个位置的 M+2 个交汇点值，并通过新颖的正则化器强制执行空间一致性，该正则化器可在保留角点和交汇点的同时减少曲率。由此产生的“交汇点区域”同时是轮廓检测器、角/交汇点检测器和区域外观的边界感知平滑。值得注意的是，它对轮廓、拐角、连接处和均匀区域的统一分析使其能够在高噪声水平下取得成功，而其他分割和边界检测方法则无法做到这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在低信噪比下同时提取图像轮廓、角点和交点的统一模型。
AI.motivation: 现有分割和边界检测方法在高噪声环境下表现不佳，需开发鲁棒的低SNR边界结构提取方法。
AI.method: 基于广义M-交点模型，通过非凸优化联合估计局部交点参数，并设计新型正则化器保持空间一致性。
AI.result: 实现轮廓检测、角点定位与区域平滑的统一分析，在高噪声场景下优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一建模边界元素，在低信噪比条件下实现了更鲁棒的图像结构分析。

title: Real-time Active Vision for a Humanoid Soccer Robot Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用深度强化学习的人形足球机器人的实时主动视觉
comment: The paper has been accepted in ICAART 2021
comments: The paper has been accepted in ICAART 2021
abstract: In this paper, we present an active vision method using a deep reinforcement learning approach for a humanoid soccer-playing robot. The proposed method adaptively optimises the viewpoint of the robot to acquire the most useful landmarks for self-localisation while keeping the ball into its viewpoint. Active vision is critical for humanoid decision-maker robots with a limited field of view. To deal with an active vision problem, several probabilistic entropy-based approaches have previously been proposed which are highly dependent on the accuracy of the self-localisation model. However, in this research, we formulate the problem as an episodic reinforcement learning problem and employ a Deep Q-learning method to solve it. The proposed network only requires the raw images of the camera to move the robot's head toward the best viewpoint. The model shows a very competitive rate of 80% success rate in achieving the best viewpoint. We implemented the proposed method on a humanoid robot simulated in Webots simulator. Our evaluations and experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms the entropy-based methods in the RoboCup context, in cases with high self-localisation errors.
summary: In this paper, we present an active vision method using a deep reinforcement learning approach for a humanoid soccer-playing robot. The proposed method adaptively optimises the viewpoint of the robot to acquire the most useful landmarks for self-localisation while keeping the ball into its viewpoint. Active vision is critical for humanoid decision-maker robots with a limited field of view. To deal with an active vision problem, several probabilistic entropy-based approaches have previously been proposed which are highly dependent on the accuracy of the self-localisation model. However, in this research, we formulate the problem as an episodic reinforcement learning problem and employ a Deep Q-learning method to solve it. The proposed network only requires the raw images of the camera to move the robot's head toward the best viewpoint. The model shows a very competitive rate of 80% success rate in achieving the best viewpoint. We implemented the proposed method on a humanoid robot simulated in Webots simulator. Our evaluations and experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms the entropy-based methods in the RoboCup context, in cases with high self-localisation errors.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对人形足球机器人使用深度强化学习方法的主动视觉方法。所提出的方法自适应地优化机器人的视点，以获取最有用的自定位地标，同时将球保持在其视点内。主动视觉对于视野有限的人形决策机器人至关重要。为了处理主动视觉问题，之前已经提出了几种基于概率熵的方法，这些方法高度依赖于自定位模型的准确性。然而，在本研究中，我们将问题表述为情景强化学习问题，并采用深度 Q 学习方法来解决它。所提出的网络只需要相机的原始图像即可将机器人的头部移向最佳视角。该模型在实现最佳视点方面表现出非常有竞争力的 80% 成功率。我们在 Webots 模拟器中模拟的人形机器人上实现了所提出的方法。我们的评估和实验结果表明，在 RoboCup 背景下，在自定位误差较高的情况下，所提出的方法优于基于熵的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的实时主动视觉方法，用于人形足球机器人，通过优化机器人视角以实现自定位并保持球在视野中。
AI.motivation: 传统基于熵的概率方法依赖于高精度的自定位模型，但在实际场景中自定位误差较大时效果不佳，需寻找更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 将主动视觉问题建模为时序强化学习问题，采用深度Q学习网络，仅利用摄像头原始图像控制机器人头部运动以获取最佳视角。
AI.result: 在Webots仿真环境中实现该方法，成功率达到80%，在高自定位误差场景下优于基于熵的方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习方法在处理自定位误差时表现更优，为受限视野的人形机器人主动视觉提供了有效解决方案。

title: Robust Detection of Non-overlapping Ellipses from Points with Applications to Circular Target Extraction in Images and Cylinder Detection in Point Clouds
title_zh: 点不重叠椭圆的鲁棒检测及其在图像中圆形目标提取和点云中圆柱检测中的应用
abstract: This manuscript provides a collection of new methods for the automated detection of non-overlapping ellipses from edge points. The methods introduce new developments in: (i) robust Monte Carlo-based ellipse fitting to 2-dimensional (2D) points in the presence of outliers; (ii) detection of non-overlapping ellipse from 2D edge points; and (iii) extraction of cylinder from 3D point clouds. The proposed methods were thoroughly compared with established state-of-the-art methods, using simulated and real-world datasets, through the design of four sets of original experiments. It was found that the proposed robust ellipse detection was superior to four reliable robust methods, including the popular least median of squares, in both simulated and real-world datasets. The proposed process for detecting non-overlapping ellipses achieved F-measure of 99.3% on real images, compared to F-measures of 42.4%, 65.6%, and 59.2%, obtained using the methods of Fornaciari, Patraucean, and Panagiotakis, respectively. The proposed cylinder extraction method identified all detectable mechanical pipes in two real-world point clouds, obtained under laboratory, and industrial construction site conditions. The results of this investigation show promise for the application of the proposed methods for automatic extraction of circular targets from images and pipes from point clouds.
summary: This manuscript provides a collection of new methods for the automated detection of non-overlapping ellipses from edge points. The methods introduce new developments in: (i) robust Monte Carlo-based ellipse fitting to 2-dimensional (2D) points in the presence of outliers; (ii) detection of non-overlapping ellipse from 2D edge points; and (iii) extraction of cylinder from 3D point clouds. The proposed methods were thoroughly compared with established state-of-the-art methods, using simulated and real-world datasets, through the design of four sets of original experiments. It was found that the proposed robust ellipse detection was superior to four reliable robust methods, including the popular least median of squares, in both simulated and real-world datasets. The proposed process for detecting non-overlapping ellipses achieved F-measure of 99.3% on real images, compared to F-measures of 42.4%, 65.6%, and 59.2%, obtained using the methods of Fornaciari, Patraucean, and Panagiotakis, respectively. The proposed cylinder extraction method identified all detectable mechanical pipes in two real-world point clouds, obtained under laboratory, and industrial construction site conditions. The results of this investigation show promise for the application of the proposed methods for automatic extraction of circular targets from images and pipes from point clouds.
abstract_zh: 该手稿提供了一系列用于从边缘点自动检测非重叠椭圆的新方法。这些方法在以下方面引入了新的发展：（i）在存在异常值的情况下对二维（2D）点进行稳健的基于蒙特卡罗的椭圆拟合； (ii) 从 2D 边缘点检测不重叠的椭圆； (iii) 从 3D 点云中提取圆柱体。通过设计四组原始实验，使用模拟和真实数据集，将所提出的方法与现有的最先进方法进行了彻底比较。结果发现，在模拟和现实数据集中，所提出的鲁棒椭圆检测优于四种可靠的鲁棒方法，包括流行的最小平方中值。所提出的检测非重叠椭圆的过程在真实图像上实现了 99.3% 的 F 测量，而使用 Fornaciari、Patraucean 和 Panagiotakis 的方法分别获得的 F 测量为 42.4%、65.6% 和 59.2%。所提出的圆柱体提取方法识别了在实验室和工业建筑现场条件下获得的两个现实世界点云中所有可检测的机械管道。这项研究的结果显示了应用所提出的方法从图像和点云中自动提取圆形目标的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从2D边缘点中检测非重叠椭圆以及从3D点云中提取圆柱体的新方法，并在图像和点云中实现了高精度检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理含异常值的2D点和复杂3D点云时存在鲁棒性不足的问题，需开发更高效、准确的椭圆和圆柱检测技术。
AI.method: 基于蒙特卡洛的鲁棒椭圆拟合算法、非重叠椭圆检测框架及3D点云中圆柱体提取方法，结合多组实验对比验证。
AI.result: 在真实图像中F值达99.3%，显著优于现有方法；成功识别实验室及工业场景下的所有可检测管道。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在鲁棒性和精度上优于现有技术，为图像中圆形目标和点云中管道的自动化提取提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Robust Detection of Non-overlapping Ellipses from Points with Applications to Circular Target Extraction in Images and Cylinder Detection in Point Clouds 点不重叠椭圆的鲁棒检测及其在图像中圆形目标提取和点云中圆柱检测中的应用 This manuscript provides a collection of new methods for the automated detection of non-overlapping ellipses from edge points. The methods introduce new developments in: (i) robust Monte Carlo-based ellipse fitting to 2-dimensional (2D) points in the presence of outliers; (ii) detection of non-overlapping ellipse from 2D edge points; and (iii) extraction of cylinder from 3D point clouds. The proposed methods were thoroughly compared with established state-of-the-art methods, using simulated and real-world datasets, through the design of four sets of original experiments. It was found that the proposed robust ellipse detection was superior to four reliable robust methods, including the popular least median of squares, in both simulated and real-world datasets. The proposed process for detecting non-overlapping ellipses achieved F-measure of 99.3% on real images, compared to F-measures of 42.4%, 65.6%, and 59.2%, obtained using the methods of Fornaciari, Patraucean, and Panagiotakis, respectively. The proposed cylinder extraction method identified all detectable mechanical pipes in two real-world point clouds, obtained under laboratory, and industrial construction site conditions. The results of this investigation show promise for the application of the proposed methods for automatic extraction of circular targets from images and pipes from point clouds. 该手稿提供了一系列用于从边缘点自动检测非重叠椭圆的新方法。这些方法在以下方面引入了新的发展：（i）在存在异常值的情况下对二维（2D）点进行稳健的基于蒙特卡罗的椭圆拟合； (ii) 从 2D 边缘点检测不重叠的椭圆； (iii) 从 3D 点云中提取圆柱体。通过设计四组原始实验，使用模拟和真实数据集，将所提出的方法与现有的最先进方法进行了彻底比较。结果发现，在模拟和现实数据集中，所提出的鲁棒椭圆检测优于四种可靠的鲁棒方法，包括流行的最小平方中值。所提出的检测非重叠椭圆的过程在真实图像上实现了 99.3% 的 F 测量，而使用 Fornaciari、Patraucean 和 Panagiotakis 的方法分别获得的 F 测量为 42.4%、65.6% 和 59.2%。所提出的圆柱体提取方法识别了在实验室和工业建筑现场条件下获得的两个现实世界点云中所有可检测的机械管道。这项研究的结果显示了应用所提出的方法从图像和点云中自动提取圆形目标的前景。 本文提出了一种从2D边缘点中检测非重叠椭圆以及从3D点云中提取圆柱体的新方法，并在图像和点云中实现了高精度检测。 Reza Maalek,Derek Lichti cs.CV,cs.CG,cs.LG

authors_text: Vieri Giuliano Santucci,Davide Montella,Bruno Castro da Silva,Gianluca Baldassarre
title: Autonomous learning of multiple, context-dependent tasks
title_zh: 多个上下文相关任务的自主学习
abstract: When facing the problem of autonomously learning multiple tasks with reinforcement learning systems, researchers typically focus on solutions where just one parametrised policy per task is sufficient to solve them. However, in complex environments presenting different contexts, the same task might need a set of different skills to be solved. These situations pose two challenges: (a) to recognise the different contexts that need different policies; (b) quickly learn the policies to accomplish the same tasks in the new discovered contexts. These two challenges are even harder if faced within an open-ended learning framework where an agent has to autonomously discover the goals that it might accomplish in a given environment, and also to learn the motor skills to accomplish them. We propose a novel open-ended learning robot architecture, C-GRAIL, that solves the two challenges in an integrated fashion. In particular, the architecture is able to detect new relevant contests, and ignore irrelevant ones, on the basis of the decrease of the expected performance for a given goal. Moreover, the architecture can quickly learn the policies for the new contexts by exploiting transfer learning importing knowledge from already acquired policies. The architecture is tested in a simulated robotic environment involving a robot that autonomously learns to reach relevant target objects in the presence of multiple obstacles generating several different obstacles. The proposed architecture outperforms other models not using the proposed autonomous context-discovery and transfer-learning mechanisms.
summary: When facing the problem of autonomously learning multiple tasks with reinforcement learning systems, researchers typically focus on solutions where just one parametrised policy per task is sufficient to solve them. However, in complex environments presenting different contexts, the same task might need a set of different skills to be solved. These situations pose two challenges: (a) to recognise the different contexts that need different policies; (b) quickly learn the policies to accomplish the same tasks in the new discovered contexts. These two challenges are even harder if faced within an open-ended learning framework where an agent has to autonomously discover the goals that it might accomplish in a given environment, and also to learn the motor skills to accomplish them. We propose a novel open-ended learning robot architecture, C-GRAIL, that solves the two challenges in an integrated fashion. In particular, the architecture is able to detect new relevant contests, and ignore irrelevant ones, on the basis of the decrease of the expected performance for a given goal. Moreover, the architecture can quickly learn the policies for the new contexts by exploiting transfer learning importing knowledge from already acquired policies. The architecture is tested in a simulated robotic environment involving a robot that autonomously learns to reach relevant target objects in the presence of multiple obstacles generating several different obstacles. The proposed architecture outperforms other models not using the proposed autonomous context-discovery and transfer-learning mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 当面临使用强化学习系统自主学习多个任务的问题时，研究人员通常关注于每个任务只需一个参数化策略就足以解决这些问题的解决方案。然而，在呈现不同背景的复杂环境中，同一任务可能需要一组不同的技能来解决。这些情况带来了两个挑战：(a) 认识到需要不同政策的不同背景； (b) 快速学习在新发现的环境中完成相同任务的策略。如果在开放式学习框架中面临这两个挑战，在该框架中，智能体必须自主发现它在给定环境中可能实现的目标，并学习实现这些目标的运动技能。我们提出了一种新颖的开放式学习机器人架构 C-GRAIL，它以集成的方式解决了这两个挑战。特别是，该架构能够根据给定目标的预期性能的下降来检测新的相关竞争，并忽略不相关的竞争。此外，该架构可以通过利用迁移学习从已获取的策略中导入知识来快速学习新上下文的策略。该架构在模拟机器人环境中进行了测试，其中机器人能够在存在多个障碍物（产生多个不同障碍物）的情况下自主学习到达相关目标物体。所提出的架构优于不使用所提出的自主上下文发现和迁移学习机制的其他模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型开放学习机器人架构C-GRAIL，用于自主学习多任务并在不同上下文中快速适应。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习方法在复杂多变环境中难以识别不同上下文并快速学习对应策略，尤其在开放学习框架下挑战更大。
AI.method: C-GRAIL通过性能下降检测新上下文，结合迁移学习从已有策略中导入知识以快速学习新上下文策略。
AI.result: 在模拟机器人环境中，C-GRAIL相比无自主上下文发现和迁移学习机制的模型表现更优。
AI.conclusion: C-GRAIL有效解决了开放环境下多任务自主学习的上下文识别与策略迁移难题。

title: A Temporal Neural Network Architecture for Online Learning
title_zh: 用于在线学习的时态神经网络架构
abstract: A long-standing proposition is that by emulating the operation of the brain's neocortex, a spiking neural network (SNN) can achieve similar desirable features: flexible learning, speed, and efficiency. Temporal neural networks (TNNs) are SNNs that communicate and process information encoded as relative spike times (in contrast to spike rates). A TNN architecture is proposed, and, as a proof-of-concept, TNN operation is demonstrated within the larger context of online supervised classification. First, through unsupervised learning, a TNN partitions input patterns into clusters based on similarity. The TNN then passes a cluster identifier to a simple online supervised decoder which finishes the classification task. The TNN learning process adjusts synaptic weights by using only signals local to each synapse, and clustering behavior emerges globally. The system architecture is described at an abstraction level analogous to the gate and register transfer levels in conventional digital design. Besides features of the overall architecture, several TNN components are new to this work. Although not addressed directly, the overall research objective is a direct hardware implementation of TNNs. Consequently, all the architecture elements are simple, and processing is done at very low precision.
summary: A long-standing proposition is that by emulating the operation of the brain's neocortex, a spiking neural network (SNN) can achieve similar desirable features: flexible learning, speed, and efficiency. Temporal neural networks (TNNs) are SNNs that communicate and process information encoded as relative spike times (in contrast to spike rates). A TNN architecture is proposed, and, as a proof-of-concept, TNN operation is demonstrated within the larger context of online supervised classification. First, through unsupervised learning, a TNN partitions input patterns into clusters based on similarity. The TNN then passes a cluster identifier to a simple online supervised decoder which finishes the classification task. The TNN learning process adjusts synaptic weights by using only signals local to each synapse, and clustering behavior emerges globally. The system architecture is described at an abstraction level analogous to the gate and register transfer levels in conventional digital design. Besides features of the overall architecture, several TNN components are new to this work. Although not addressed directly, the overall research objective is a direct hardware implementation of TNNs. Consequently, all the architecture elements are simple, and processing is done at very low precision.
abstract_zh: 一个长期存在的主张是，通过模拟大脑新皮质的运作，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 可以实现类似的理想功能：灵活的学习、速度和效率。时间神经网络 (TNN) 是一种 SNN，用于通信和处理编码为相对尖峰时间（与尖峰速率相反）的信息。提出了 TNN 架构，并且作为概念验证，在在线监督分类的更大背景下演示了 TNN 操作。首先，通过无监督学习，TNN 根据相似性将输入模式划分为簇。然后，TNN 将簇标识符传递给简单的在线监督解码器，该解码器完成分类任务。 TNN 学习过程仅使用每个突触本地的信号来调整突触权重，并且全局出现聚类行为。系统架构在类似于传统数字设计中的门和寄存器传输级别的抽象级别上进行描述。除了整体架构的特点之外，几个 TNN 组件对于这项工作来说也是新的。虽然没有直接解决，但总体研究目标是 TNN 的直接硬件实现。因此，所有架构元素都很简单，并且处理的精度非常低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时序神经网络（TNN）架构，用于在线学习场景下的监督分类任务。
AI.motivation: 通过模仿大脑新皮层的运作机制，利用脉冲神经网络（SNN）实现高效、灵活的在线学习，解决传统神经网络在速度和效率上的不足。
AI.method: 设计基于相对脉冲时间编码的TNN架构，通过无监督学习聚类输入数据，结合简单监督解码器完成分类，采用局部突触信号调整权重，架构抽象类似数字电路设计。
AI.result: 验证了TNN在在线监督分类中的可行性，实现了聚类与分类功能，架构元素简单且适合硬件实现，处理精度低但效率高。
AI.conclusion: TNN架构为硬件实现提供了基础，其低精度和高效处理特性适用于在线学习场景，未来可进一步探索硬件实现与优化。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种时序神经网络（TNN）架构，用于在线学习场景下的监督分类任务。
