search_text: A Temporal Neural Network Architecture for Online Learning 用于在线学习的时态神经网络架构 A long-standing proposition is that by emulating the operation of the brain's neocortex, a spiking neural network (SNN) can achieve similar desirable features: flexible learning, speed, and efficiency. Temporal neural networks (TNNs) are SNNs that communicate and process information encoded as relative spike times (in contrast to spike rates). A TNN architecture is proposed, and, as a proof-of-concept, TNN operation is demonstrated within the larger context of online supervised classification. First, through unsupervised learning, a TNN partitions input patterns into clusters based on similarity. The TNN then passes a cluster identifier to a simple online supervised decoder which finishes the classification task. The TNN learning process adjusts synaptic weights by using only signals local to each synapse, and clustering behavior emerges globally. The system architecture is described at an abstraction level analogous to the gate and register transfer levels in conventional digital design. Besides features of the overall architecture, several TNN components are new to this work. Although not addressed directly, the overall research objective is a direct hardware implementation of TNNs. Consequently, all the architecture elements are simple, and processing is done at very low precision. 一个长期存在的主张是，通过模拟大脑新皮质的运作，尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 可以实现类似的理想功能：灵活的学习、速度和效率。时间神经网络 (TNN) 是一种 SNN，用于通信和处理编码为相对尖峰时间（与尖峰速率相反）的信息。提出了 TNN 架构，并且作为概念验证，在在线监督分类的更大背景下演示了 TNN 操作。首先，通过无监督学习，TNN 根据相似性将输入模式划分为簇。然后，TNN 将簇标识符传递给简单的在线监督解码器，该解码器完成分类任务。 TNN 学习过程仅使用每个突触本地的信号来调整突触权重，并且全局出现聚类行为。系统架构在类似于传统数字设计中的门和寄存器传输级别的抽象级别上进行描述。除了整体架构的特点之外，几个 TNN 组件对于这项工作来说也是新的。虽然没有直接解决，但总体研究目标是 TNN 的直接硬件实现。因此，所有架构元素都很简单，并且处理的精度非常低。 本文提出一种时序神经网络（TNN）架构，用于在线学习场景下的监督分类任务。 James E. Smith cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SFTrack++: A Fast Learnable Spectral Segmentation Approach for Space-Time Consistent Tracking
title_zh: SFTrack++：一种快速学习的光谱分割方法，用于时空一致跟踪
comment: Accepted at Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020 - Pre-registration Workshop and at The International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2021 - Structured Representations for Video Understanding Workshop
comments: Accepted at Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2020 - Pre-registration Workshop and at The International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2021 - Structured Representations for Video Understanding Workshop
abstract: We propose an object tracking method, SFTrack++, that smoothly learns to preserve the tracked object consistency over space and time dimensions by taking a spectral clustering approach over the graph of pixels from the video, using a fast 3D filtering formulation for finding the principal eigenvector of this graph's adjacency matrix. To better capture complex aspects of the tracked object, we enrich our formulation to multi-channel inputs, which permit different points of view for the same input. The channel inputs are in our experiments, the output of multiple tracking methods. After combining them, instead of relying only on hidden layers representations to predict a good tracking bounding box, we explicitly learn an intermediate, more refined one, namely the segmentation map of the tracked object. This prevents the rough common bounding box approach to introduce noise and distractors in the learning process. We test our method, SFTrack++, on five tracking benchmarks: OTB, UAV, NFS, GOT-10k, and TrackingNet, using five top trackers as input. Our experimental results validate the pre-registered hypothesis. We obtain consistent and robust results, competitive on the three traditional benchmarks (OTB, UAV, NFS) and significantly on top of others (by over $1.1\%$ on accuracy) on GOT-10k and TrackingNet, which are newer, larger, and more varied datasets.
summary: We propose an object tracking method, SFTrack++, that smoothly learns to preserve the tracked object consistency over space and time dimensions by taking a spectral clustering approach over the graph of pixels from the video, using a fast 3D filtering formulation for finding the principal eigenvector of this graph's adjacency matrix. To better capture complex aspects of the tracked object, we enrich our formulation to multi-channel inputs, which permit different points of view for the same input. The channel inputs are in our experiments, the output of multiple tracking methods. After combining them, instead of relying only on hidden layers representations to predict a good tracking bounding box, we explicitly learn an intermediate, more refined one, namely the segmentation map of the tracked object. This prevents the rough common bounding box approach to introduce noise and distractors in the learning process. We test our method, SFTrack++, on five tracking benchmarks: OTB, UAV, NFS, GOT-10k, and TrackingNet, using five top trackers as input. Our experimental results validate the pre-registered hypothesis. We obtain consistent and robust results, competitive on the three traditional benchmarks (OTB, UAV, NFS) and significantly on top of others (by over $1.1\%$ on accuracy) on GOT-10k and TrackingNet, which are newer, larger, and more varied datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种对象跟踪方法 SFTrack++，该方法通过对视频中的像素图采用谱聚类方法，使用快速 3D 过滤公式来查找该图邻接矩阵的主特征向量，从而平滑地学习保持跟踪对象在空间和时间维度上的一致性。为了更好地捕捉跟踪对象的复杂方面，我们将我们的公式丰富到多通道输入，这允许对同一输入有不同的观点。在我们的实验中，通道输入是多种跟踪方法的输出。将它们组合起来后，我们不再仅仅依赖隐藏层表示来预测良好的跟踪边界框，而是显式地学习一个中间的、更精细的边界框，即跟踪对象的分割图。这可以防止粗略的通用边界框方法在学习过程中引入噪音和干扰因素。我们使用五个顶级跟踪器作为输入，在五个跟踪基准上测试我们的方法 SFTrack++：OTB、UAV、NFS、GOT-10k 和 TrackingNet。我们的实验结果验证了预先注册的假设。我们获得了一致且稳健的结果，在三个传统基准（OTB、UAV、NFS）上具有竞争力，并且在 GOT-10k 和 TrackingNet（更新、更大、更多样化的数据集）上明显领先于其他基准（准确率超过 1.1\%$）。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于谱聚类的可学习分割方法SFTrack++，实现时空一致性的目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统目标跟踪中使用粗略边界框易引入噪声和干扰，需通过更精细的分割地图提升跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用快速3D滤波计算像素图的主特征向量，结合多跟踪器输出的多通道输入，显式学习目标分割地图以替代传统边界框预测。
AI.result: 在OTB、UAV、NFS等五个基准测试中表现优异，在GOT-10k和TrackingNet数据集上准确率超越其他方法1.1%以上。
AI.conclusion: SFTrack++通过谱分割方法有效提升了时空一致性跟踪性能，尤其在大规模复杂数据集上表现突出。

authors_text: Kaidi Xu,Huan Zhang,Shiqi Wang,Yihan Wang,Suman Jana,Xue Lin,Cho-Jui Hsieh
title: Fast and Complete: Enabling Complete Neural Network Verification with Rapid and Massively Parallel Incomplete Verifiers
title_zh: 快速而完整：通过快速且大规模并行的不完整验证器实现完整的神经网络验证
abstract: Formal verification of neural networks (NNs) is a challenging and important problem. Existing efficient complete solvers typically require the branch-and-bound (BaB) process, which splits the problem domain into sub-domains and solves each sub-domain using faster but weaker incomplete verifiers, such as Linear Programming (LP) on linearly relaxed sub-domains. In this paper, we propose to use the backward mode linear relaxation based perturbation analysis (LiRPA) to replace LP during the BaB process, which can be efficiently implemented on the typical machine learning accelerators such as GPUs and TPUs. However, unlike LP, LiRPA when applied naively can produce much weaker bounds and even cannot check certain conflicts of sub-domains during splitting, making the entire procedure incomplete after BaB. To address these challenges, we apply a fast gradient based bound tightening procedure combined with batch splits and the design of minimal usage of LP bound procedure, enabling us to effectively use LiRPA on the accelerator hardware for the challenging complete NN verification problem and significantly outperform LP-based approaches. On a single GPU, we demonstrate an order of magnitude speedup compared to existing LP-based approaches.
summary: Formal verification of neural networks (NNs) is a challenging and important problem. Existing efficient complete solvers typically require the branch-and-bound (BaB) process, which splits the problem domain into sub-domains and solves each sub-domain using faster but weaker incomplete verifiers, such as Linear Programming (LP) on linearly relaxed sub-domains. In this paper, we propose to use the backward mode linear relaxation based perturbation analysis (LiRPA) to replace LP during the BaB process, which can be efficiently implemented on the typical machine learning accelerators such as GPUs and TPUs. However, unlike LP, LiRPA when applied naively can produce much weaker bounds and even cannot check certain conflicts of sub-domains during splitting, making the entire procedure incomplete after BaB. To address these challenges, we apply a fast gradient based bound tightening procedure combined with batch splits and the design of minimal usage of LP bound procedure, enabling us to effectively use LiRPA on the accelerator hardware for the challenging complete NN verification problem and significantly outperform LP-based approaches. On a single GPU, we demonstrate an order of magnitude speedup compared to existing LP-based approaches.
abstract_zh: 神经网络（NN）的形式化验证是一个具有挑战性且重要的问题。现有的高效完整求解器通常需要分支定界（BaB）过程，该过程将问题域分割为子域，并使用更快但较弱的不完全验证器求解每个子域，例如线性松弛子域上的线性规划（LP）。在本文中，我们建议使用后向模式基于线性松弛的扰动分析（LiRPA）来代替 BaB 过程中的 LP，该方法可以在 GPU 和 TPU 等典型机器学习加速器上高效实现。然而，与LP不同的是，LiRPA在简单应用时会产生更弱的边界，甚至无法在分裂过程中检查子域的某些冲突，使得BaB之后的整个过程不完整。为了应对这些挑战，我们应用基于快速梯度的边界紧缩过程，结合批量分割和最小化 LP 边界过程的设计，使我们能够在加速器硬件上有效地使用 LiRPA 来解决具有挑战性的完整 NN 验证问题，并显着优于基于 LP 的方法。在单个 GPU 上，与现有的基于 LP 的方法相比，我们展示了一个数量级的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiRPA的快速且完整的神经网络验证方法，通过优化分支定界过程中的松弛技术，利用GPU/TPU加速实现高效验证。
AI.motivation: 现有完整求解器依赖LP进行分支定界，效率低且难以适应硬件加速。LiRPA虽更高效但存在松弛界弱的问题，需改进以保证验证完整性。
AI.method: 采用LiRPA替代LP，并结合梯度紧缩、批量分割及最小化LP使用，设计适配加速器硬件的验证流程。
AI.result: 在单块GPU上实现相比现有LP方法数量级的加速，同时保持验证完整性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化LiRPA与硬件加速的结合，本文为完整神经网络验证提供了更高效且可扩展的解决方案。

method: 采用LiRPA替代LP，并结合梯度紧缩、批量分割及最小化LP使用，设计适配加速器硬件的验证流程。
result: 在单块GPU上实现相比现有LP方法数量级的加速，同时保持验证完整性。
conclusion: 通过优化LiRPA与硬件加速的结合，本文为完整神经网络验证提供了更高效且可扩展的解决方案。
search_text: Fast and Complete: Enabling Complete Neural Network Verification with Rapid and Massively Parallel Incomplete Verifiers 快速而完整：通过快速且大规模并行的不完整验证器实现完整的神经网络验证 Formal verification of neural networks (NNs) is a challenging and important problem. Existing efficient complete solvers typically require the branch-and-bound (BaB) process, which splits the problem domain into sub-domains and solves each sub-domain using faster but weaker incomplete verifiers, such as Linear Programming (LP) on linearly relaxed sub-domains. In this paper, we propose to use the backward mode linear relaxation based perturbation analysis (LiRPA) to replace LP during the BaB process, which can be efficiently implemented on the typical machine learning accelerators such as GPUs and TPUs. However, unlike LP, LiRPA when applied naively can produce much weaker bounds and even cannot check certain conflicts of sub-domains during splitting, making the entire procedure incomplete after BaB. To address these challenges, we apply a fast gradient based bound tightening procedure combined with batch splits and the design of minimal usage of LP bound procedure, enabling us to effectively use LiRPA on the accelerator hardware for the challenging complete NN verification problem and significantly outperform LP-based approaches. On a single GPU, we demonstrate an order of magnitude speedup compared to existing LP-based approaches. 神经网络（NN）的形式化验证是一个具有挑战性且重要的问题。现有的高效完整求解器通常需要分支定界（BaB）过程，该过程将问题域分割为子域，并使用更快但较弱的不完全验证器求解每个子域，例如线性松弛子域上的线性规划（LP）。在本文中，我们建议使用后向模式基于线性松弛的扰动分析（LiRPA）来代替 BaB 过程中的 LP，该方法可以在 GPU 和 TPU 等典型机器学习加速器上高效实现。然而，与LP不同的是，LiRPA在简单应用时会产生更弱的边界，甚至无法在分裂过程中检查子域的某些冲突，使得BaB之后的整个过程不完整。为了应对这些挑战，我们应用基于快速梯度的边界紧缩过程，结合批量分割和最小化 LP 边界过程的设计，使我们能够在加速器硬件上有效地使用 LiRPA 来解决具有挑战性的完整 NN 验证问题，并显着优于基于 LP 的方法。在单个 GPU 上，与现有的基于 LP 的方法相比，我们展示了一个数量级的加速。 本文提出一种基于LiRPA的快速且完整的神经网络验证方法，通过优化分支定界过程中的松弛技术，利用GPU/TPU加速实现高效验证。 Kaidi Xu,Huan Zhang,Shiqi Wang,Yihan Wang,Suman Jana,Xue Lin,Cho-Jui Hsieh cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Generalized Pose-and-Scale Estimation using 4-Point Congruence Constraints
title_zh: 使用 4 点同余约束的广义姿态和尺度估计
abstract: We present gP4Pc, a new method for computing the absolute pose of a generalized camera with unknown internal scale from four corresponding 3D point-and-ray pairs. Unlike most pose-and-scale methods, gP4Pc is based on constraints arising from the congruence of shapes defined by two sets of four points related by an unknown similarity transformation. By choosing a novel parametrization for the problem, we derive a system of four quadratic equations in four scalar variables. The variables represent the distances of 3D points along the rays from the camera centers. After solving this system via Groebner basis-based automatic polynomial solvers, we compute the similarity transformation using an efficient 3D point-point alignment method. We also propose a specialized variant of our solver for the case of coplanar points, which is computationally very efficient and about 3x faster than the fastest existing solver. Our experiments on real and synthetic datasets, demonstrate that gP4Pc is among the fastest methods in terms of total running time when used within a RANSAC framework, while achieving competitive numerical stability, accuracy, and robustness to noise.
summary: We present gP4Pc, a new method for computing the absolute pose of a generalized camera with unknown internal scale from four corresponding 3D point-and-ray pairs. Unlike most pose-and-scale methods, gP4Pc is based on constraints arising from the congruence of shapes defined by two sets of four points related by an unknown similarity transformation. By choosing a novel parametrization for the problem, we derive a system of four quadratic equations in four scalar variables. The variables represent the distances of 3D points along the rays from the camera centers. After solving this system via Groebner basis-based automatic polynomial solvers, we compute the similarity transformation using an efficient 3D point-point alignment method. We also propose a specialized variant of our solver for the case of coplanar points, which is computationally very efficient and about 3x faster than the fastest existing solver. Our experiments on real and synthetic datasets, demonstrate that gP4Pc is among the fastest methods in terms of total running time when used within a RANSAC framework, while achieving competitive numerical stability, accuracy, and robustness to noise.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 gP4Pc，这是一种从四个相应的 3D 点射线对计算具有未知内部尺度的广义相机的绝对位姿的新方法。与大多数姿势和尺度方法不同，gP4Pc 基于由未知相似性变换相关的两组四个点定义的形状一致性所产生的约束。通过为该问题选择一种新颖的参数化，我们推导了四个标量变量的四个二次方程组。这些变量表示沿光线的 3D 点距相机中心的距离。通过基于 Groebner 基的自动多项式求解器求解该系统后，我们使用高效的 3D 点对点对齐方法计算相似变换。我们还针对共面点的情况提出了求解器的专门变体，其计算效率非常高，并且比现有最快的求解器快约 3 倍。我们对真实数据集和合成数据集的实验表明，在 RANSAC 框架中使用时，gP4Pc 是总运行时间最快的方法之一，同时实现了具有竞争力的数值稳定性、准确性和对噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于四点一致性约束的通用相机位姿与尺度估计方法gP4Pc，通过四组3D点-射线对计算相机的绝对位姿。
AI.motivation: 现有位姿与尺度估计方法在处理未知内部尺度时存在效率与稳定性不足的问题，尤其在处理共面点时缺乏高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过新颖的参数化方法建立四元二次方程组，利用Gröbner基自动求解器解算，并结合高效3D点对齐方法计算相似变换，同时提出针对共面点的优化变体。
AI.result: 实验表明gP4Pc在RANSAC框架下运行速度最快，数值稳定性、精度和抗噪鲁棒性均表现优异，共面点变体比现有最优求解器快3倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过几何一致性约束实现了高效准确的位姿与尺度估计，在实际应用中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Lie Ju,Xin Wang,Xin Zhao,Paul Bonnington,Tom Drummond,Zongyuan Ge
title: Leveraging Regular Fundus Images for Training UWF Fundus Diagnosis Models via Adversarial Learning and Pseudo-Labeling
title_zh: 利用常规眼底图像通过对抗性学习和伪标签训练 UWF 眼底诊断模型
abstract: Recently, ultra-widefield (UWF) 200\degree~fundus imaging by Optos cameras has gradually been introduced because of its broader insights for detecting more information on the fundus than regular 30 degree - 60 degree fundus cameras. Compared with UWF fundus images, regular fundus images contain a large amount of high-quality and well-annotated data. Due to the domain gap, models trained by regular fundus images to recognize UWF fundus images perform poorly. Hence, given that annotating medical data is labor intensive and time consuming, in this paper, we explore how to leverage regular fundus images to improve the limited UWF fundus data and annotations for more efficient training. We propose the use of a modified cycle generative adversarial network (CycleGAN) model to bridge the gap between regular and UWF fundus and generate additional UWF fundus images for training. A consistency regularization term is proposed in the loss of the GAN to improve and regulate the quality of the generated data. Our method does not require that images from the two domains be paired or even that the semantic labels be the same, which provides great convenience for data collection. Furthermore, we show that our method is robust to noise and errors introduced by the generated unlabeled data with the pseudo-labeling technique. We evaluated the effectiveness of our methods on several common fundus diseases and tasks, such as diabetic retinopathy (DR) classification, lesion detection and tessellated fundus segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method simultaneously achieves superior generalizability of the learned representations and performance improvements in multiple tasks.
summary: Recently, ultra-widefield (UWF) 200\degree~fundus imaging by Optos cameras has gradually been introduced because of its broader insights for detecting more information on the fundus than regular 30 degree - 60 degree fundus cameras. Compared with UWF fundus images, regular fundus images contain a large amount of high-quality and well-annotated data. Due to the domain gap, models trained by regular fundus images to recognize UWF fundus images perform poorly. Hence, given that annotating medical data is labor intensive and time consuming, in this paper, we explore how to leverage regular fundus images to improve the limited UWF fundus data and annotations for more efficient training. We propose the use of a modified cycle generative adversarial network (CycleGAN) model to bridge the gap between regular and UWF fundus and generate additional UWF fundus images for training. A consistency regularization term is proposed in the loss of the GAN to improve and regulate the quality of the generated data. Our method does not require that images from the two domains be paired or even that the semantic labels be the same, which provides great convenience for data collection. Furthermore, we show that our method is robust to noise and errors introduced by the generated unlabeled data with the pseudo-labeling technique. We evaluated the effectiveness of our methods on several common fundus diseases and tasks, such as diabetic retinopathy (DR) classification, lesion detection and tessellated fundus segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method simultaneously achieves superior generalizability of the learned representations and performance improvements in multiple tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近，Optos相机的超宽视场（UWF）200度眼底成像逐渐被引入，因为它比普通30度至60度眼底相机具有更广泛的视野，可以检测到更多的眼底信息。与UWF眼底图像相比，常规眼底图像包含大量高质量且注释良好的数据。由于域差距，通过常规眼底图像训练来识别 UWF 眼底图像的模型表现不佳。因此，鉴于注释医学数据是劳动密集型且耗时的，在本文中，我们探索如何利用常规眼底图像来改进有限的UWF眼底数据和注释，以实现更有效的训练。我们建议使用改进的循环生成对抗网络 (CycleGAN) 模型来弥合常规眼底和 UWF 眼底之间的差距，并生成额外的 UWF 眼底图像用于训练。在GAN的损失中提出了一致性正则化项，以提高和调节生成数据的质量。我们的方法不需要将两个域的图像配对，甚至不需要语义标签相同，这为数据收集提供了极大的便利。此外，我们表明我们的方法对于使用伪标记技术生成的未标记数据引入的噪声和错误具有鲁棒性。我们评估了我们的方法对几种常见眼底疾病和任务的有效性，例如糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分类、病变检测和棋盘格眼底分割。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法同时实现了学习表示的优异泛化性和多个任务中的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对抗学习和伪标签技术，利用常规眼底图像提升超广角眼底诊断模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 超广角（UWF）眼底图像因覆盖范围广而被采用，但其数据量少且标注成本高，而常规眼底图像数据丰富但存在领域差异，导致模型性能不佳。
AI.method: 改进的CycleGAN模型生成UWF图像以弥合领域差异，并引入一致性正则化项优化生成质量；结合伪标签技术提升对噪声数据的鲁棒性，无需配对图像或相同语义标签。
AI.result: 在糖尿病视网膜病变分类、病变检测和视网膜分割等任务中，方法显著提升了模型泛化能力和多任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了领域差异问题，在医疗图像数据有限场景下具有实用价值，且对生成噪声具有鲁棒性。

Furthermore, we show that our method is robust to noise and errors introduced by the generated unlabeled data with the pseudo-labeling technique. We evaluated the effectiveness of our methods on several common fundus diseases and tasks, such as diabetic retinopathy (DR) classification, lesion detection and tessellated fundus segmentation. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method simultaneously achieves superior generalizability of the learned representations and performance improvements in multiple tasks. 最近，Optos相机的超宽视场（UWF）200度眼底成像逐渐被引入，因为它比普通30度至60度眼底相机具有更广泛的视野，可以检测到更多的眼底信息。与UWF眼底图像相比，常规眼底图像包含大量高质量且注释良好的数据。由于域差距，通过常规眼底图像训练来识别 UWF 眼底图像的模型表现不佳。因此，鉴于注释医学数据是劳动密集型且耗时的，在本文中，我们探索如何利用常规眼底图像来改进有限的UWF眼底数据和注释，以实现更有效的训练。我们建议使用改进的循环生成对抗网络 (CycleGAN) 模型来弥合常规眼底和 UWF 眼底之间的差距，并生成额外的 UWF 眼底图像用于训练。在GAN的损失中提出了一致性正则化项，以提高和调节生成数据的质量。我们的方法不需要将两个域的图像配对，甚至不需要语义标签相同，这为数据收集提供了极大的便利。此外，我们表明我们的方法对于使用伪标记技术生成的未标记数据引入的噪声和错误具有鲁棒性。我们评估了我们的方法对几种常见眼底疾病和任务的有效性，例如糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）分类、病变检测和棋盘格眼底分割。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法同时实现了学习表示的优异泛化性和多个任务中的性能改进。 本文提出通过对抗学习和伪标签技术，利用常规眼底图像提升超广角眼底诊断模型的性能。 Lie Ju,Xin Wang,Xin Zhao,Paul Bonnington,Tom Drummond,Zongyuan Ge cs.CV

title: Post or Tweet: Lessons from a Study of Facebook and Twitter Usage
title_zh: 发帖或推文：Facebook 和 Twitter 使用情况研究的教训
comment: Published in the CHI 2016 Workshop on Following user pathways: Using cross platform and mixed methods analysis in social media studies, San Jose, CA, USA
comments: Published in the CHI 2016 Workshop on Following user pathways: Using cross platform and mixed methods analysis in social media studies, San Jose, CA, USA
abstract: This workshop paper reports on an ongoing mixed-methods study on the two arguably most popular social network sites, Facebook and Twitter, for the same users. The overarching goal of the study is to shed light into the nuances of social media selection and cross-platform use by combining survey data about participants' motivations with usage data collected via API extraction. We describe the set-up of the study and focus our discussion on the challenges and insights relating to participant recruiting and data collection, handling and dimensionalizing usage data, and comparing usage data across sites.
summary: This workshop paper reports on an ongoing mixed-methods study on the two arguably most popular social network sites, Facebook and Twitter, for the same users. The overarching goal of the study is to shed light into the nuances of social media selection and cross-platform use by combining survey data about participants' motivations with usage data collected via API extraction. We describe the set-up of the study and focus our discussion on the challenges and insights relating to participant recruiting and data collection, handling and dimensionalizing usage data, and comparing usage data across sites.
abstract_zh: 本研讨会论文报告了一项正在进行的混合方法研究，该研究针对同一用户，对两个可以说是最受欢迎的社交网站 Facebook 和 Twitter 进行了研究。该研究的总体目标是通过将参与者动机的调查数据与通过 API 提取收集的使用数据相结合，揭示社交媒体选择和跨平台使用的细微差别。我们描述了该研究的设置，并重点讨论了与参与者招募和数据收集、处理和维度化使用数据以及比较跨站点使用数据相关的挑战和见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法研究同一用户在Facebook和Twitter上的使用差异，探讨社交媒体选择与跨平台使用的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 旨在揭示用户在不同社交平台间选择与使用行为的细微差别，以及跨平台数据比较的潜在挑战。
AI.method: 结合问卷调查数据与API提取的使用数据，分析用户动机并比较跨平台行为模式。
AI.result: 总结了参与者招募、数据收集处理及跨平台比较中的关键挑战，提出了多维分析用户行为的见解。
AI.conclusion: 跨平台社交媒体研究需兼顾定量数据与定性动机分析，未来需进一步细化使用场景与用户需求的关联性研究。

authors_text: Vicente J. P. Amorim,Ricardo A. O. Oliveira,Mauricio Jose da Silva
title: Recent Trends in Wearable Computing Research: A Systematic Review
title_zh: 可穿戴计算研究的最新趋势：系统回顾
abstract: Wearable devices are a trending topic in both commercial and academic areas. Increasing demand for innovation has led to increased research and new products, addressing new challenges and creating profitable opportunities. However, despite a number of reviews and surveys on wearable computing, a study outlining how this area has recently evolved, which provides a broad and objective view of the main topics addressed by scientists, is lacking. The systematic review of literature presented in this paper investigates recent trends in wearable computing studies, taking into account a set of constraints applied to relevant studies over a window of ten years. The extracted articles were considered as a means to extract valuable information, creating a useful data set to represent the current status. Results of this study faithfully portray evolving interests in wearable devices. The analysis conducted here involving studies made over the past ten years allows evaluation of the areas, research focus, and technologies that are currently at the forefront of wearable device development. Conclusions presented in this review aim to assist scientists to better perceive recent demand trends and how wearable technology can further evolve. Finally, this study should assist in outlining the next steps in current and future development.
summary: Wearable devices are a trending topic in both commercial and academic areas. Increasing demand for innovation has led to increased research and new products, addressing new challenges and creating profitable opportunities. However, despite a number of reviews and surveys on wearable computing, a study outlining how this area has recently evolved, which provides a broad and objective view of the main topics addressed by scientists, is lacking. The systematic review of literature presented in this paper investigates recent trends in wearable computing studies, taking into account a set of constraints applied to relevant studies over a window of ten years. The extracted articles were considered as a means to extract valuable information, creating a useful data set to represent the current status. Results of this study faithfully portray evolving interests in wearable devices. The analysis conducted here involving studies made over the past ten years allows evaluation of the areas, research focus, and technologies that are currently at the forefront of wearable device development. Conclusions presented in this review aim to assist scientists to better perceive recent demand trends and how wearable technology can further evolve. Finally, this study should assist in outlining the next steps in current and future development.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴设备是商业和学术领域的热门话题。对创新的需求不断增加，导致研究和新产品的增加，应对新的挑战并创造盈利机会。然而，尽管对可穿戴计算进行了许多评论和调查，但仍缺乏一项概述该领域最近如何发展的研究，该研究对科学家所讨论的主要主题提供了广泛而客观的看法。本文对文献进行了系统回顾，调查了可穿戴计算研究的最新趋势，并考虑了十年内应用于相关研究的一组约束。提取的文章被认为是提取有价值信息的一种手段，创建了一个有用的数据集来表示当前状态。这项研究的结果忠实地描绘了人们对可穿戴设备不断变化的兴趣。这里进行的分析涉及过去十年的研究，可以对目前处于可穿戴设备开发前沿的领域、研究重点和技术进行评估。本综述提出的结论旨在帮助科学家更好地了解最近的需求趋势以及可穿戴技术如何进一步发展。最后，这项研究应有助于概述当前和未来发展的下一步。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述分析过去十年可穿戴计算研究的最新趋势，识别当前研究热点与技术前沿。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量可穿戴计算研究，但缺乏全面且客观的近期趋势分析，需通过系统综述明确领域发展动态。
AI.method: 采用系统综述方法，设定十年时间窗口与筛选标准，提取文献数据并分析研究主题、技术及趋势。
AI.result: 揭示了可穿戴设备研究领域的演变路径，包括主要研究方向、技术热点及未来潜在发展领域。
AI.conclusion: 为科研人员提供领域发展趋势洞察，助力明确未来研究方向与技术突破重点。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Kasaei,Miguel Abreu,Nuno Lau,Artur Pereira,Luis Paulo Reis,Zhibin Li
title: Learning Hybrid Locomotion Skills -- Learn to Exploit Residual Dynamics and Modulate Model-based Gait Control
title_zh: 学习混合运动技能——学习利用残余动力学并调节基于模型的步态控制
abstract: This work aims to combine machine learning and control approaches for legged robots, and developed a hybrid framework to achieve new capabilities of balancing against external perturbations. The framework embeds a kernel which is a fully parametric closed-loop gait generator based on analytical control. On top of that, a neural network with symmetric partial data augmentation learns to automatically adjust the parameters for the gait kernel and to generate compensatory actions for all joints as the residual dynamics, thus significantly augmenting the stability under unexpected perturbations. The performance of the proposed framework was evaluated across a set of challenging simulated scenarios. The results showed considerable improvements compared to the baseline in recovering from large external forces. Moreover, the produced behaviours are more natural, human-like and robust against noisy sensing.
summary: This work aims to combine machine learning and control approaches for legged robots, and developed a hybrid framework to achieve new capabilities of balancing against external perturbations. The framework embeds a kernel which is a fully parametric closed-loop gait generator based on analytical control. On top of that, a neural network with symmetric partial data augmentation learns to automatically adjust the parameters for the gait kernel and to generate compensatory actions for all joints as the residual dynamics, thus significantly augmenting the stability under unexpected perturbations. The performance of the proposed framework was evaluated across a set of challenging simulated scenarios. The results showed considerable improvements compared to the baseline in recovering from large external forces. Moreover, the produced behaviours are more natural, human-like and robust against noisy sensing.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在将机器学习和腿式机器人的控制方法结合起来，并开发了一种混合框架，以实现平衡外部扰动的新功能。该框架嵌入了一个内核，该内核是基于分析控制的全参数闭环步态生成器。最重要的是，具有对称部分数据增强的神经网络学习自动调整步态内核的参数，并为所有关节生成补偿动作作为残余动力学，从而显着增强意外扰动下的稳定性。所提出的框架的性能是在一组具有挑战性的模拟场景中进行评估的。结果显示，与从大外力中恢复的基线相比，有相当大的改善。此外，产生的行为更加自然、更像人类，并且对噪声感知具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合框架，结合模型预测控制与数据驱动方法，使腿式机器人具备更强的外部扰动恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 传统腿式机器人控制方法在面对复杂外部扰动时稳定性不足，需融合模型精确性与数据驱动的自适应性以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建参数化闭合回路步态生成器作为核心控制器，叠加神经网络通过对称部分数据增强学习残差动力学补偿策略。
AI.result: 在模拟场景中相较基线方法提升大扰动恢复能力，生成行为更接近人类运动特征且对传感噪声更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架有效结合模型先验与数据后验，为复杂地形下的智能机器人运动控制提供新思路。

search_text: Learning Hybrid Locomotion Skills -- Learn to Exploit Residual Dynamics and Modulate Model-based Gait Control 学习混合运动技能——学习利用残余动力学并调节基于模型的步态控制 This work aims to combine machine learning and control approaches for legged robots, and developed a hybrid framework to achieve new capabilities of balancing against external perturbations. The framework embeds a kernel which is a fully parametric closed-loop gait generator based on analytical control. On top of that, a neural network with symmetric partial data augmentation learns to automatically adjust the parameters for the gait kernel and to generate compensatory actions for all joints as the residual dynamics, thus significantly augmenting the stability under unexpected perturbations. The performance of the proposed framework was evaluated across a set of challenging simulated scenarios. The results showed considerable improvements compared to the baseline in recovering from large external forces. Moreover, the produced behaviours are more natural, human-like and robust against noisy sensing. 这项工作旨在将机器学习和腿式机器人的控制方法结合起来，并开发了一种混合框架，以实现平衡外部扰动的新功能。该框架嵌入了一个内核，该内核是基于分析控制的全参数闭环步态生成器。最重要的是，具有对称部分数据增强的神经网络学习自动调整步态内核的参数，并为所有关节生成补偿动作作为残余动力学，从而显着增强意外扰动下的稳定性。所提出的框架的性能是在一组具有挑战性的模拟场景中进行评估的。结果显示，与从大外力中恢复的基线相比，有相当大的改善。此外，产生的行为更加自然、更像人类，并且对噪声感知具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种混合框架，结合模型预测控制与数据驱动方法，使腿式机器人具备更强的外部扰动恢复能力。 Mohammadreza Kasaei,Miguel Abreu,Nuno Lau,Artur Pereira,Luis Paulo Reis,Zhibin Li cs.RO

title: Navigating the GAN Parameter Space for Semantic Image Editing
title_zh: 导航 GAN 参数空间以进行语义图像编辑
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are currently an indispensable tool for visual editing, being a standard component of image-to-image translation and image restoration pipelines. Furthermore, GANs are especially useful for controllable generation since their latent spaces contain a wide range of interpretable directions, well suited for semantic editing operations. By gradually changing latent codes along these directions, one can produce impressive visual effects, unattainable without GANs. In this paper, we significantly expand the range of visual effects achievable with the state-of-the-art models, like StyleGAN2. In contrast to existing works, which mostly operate by latent codes, we discover interpretable directions in the space of the generator parameters. By several simple methods, we explore this space and demonstrate that it also contains a plethora of interpretable directions, which are an excellent source of non-trivial semantic manipulations. The discovered manipulations cannot be achieved by transforming the latent codes and can be used to edit both synthetic and real images. We release our code and models and hope they will serve as a handy tool for further efforts on GAN-based image editing.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are currently an indispensable tool for visual editing, being a standard component of image-to-image translation and image restoration pipelines. Furthermore, GANs are especially useful for controllable generation since their latent spaces contain a wide range of interpretable directions, well suited for semantic editing operations. By gradually changing latent codes along these directions, one can produce impressive visual effects, unattainable without GANs. In this paper, we significantly expand the range of visual effects achievable with the state-of-the-art models, like StyleGAN2. In contrast to existing works, which mostly operate by latent codes, we discover interpretable directions in the space of the generator parameters. By several simple methods, we explore this space and demonstrate that it also contains a plethora of interpretable directions, which are an excellent source of non-trivial semantic manipulations. The discovered manipulations cannot be achieved by transforming the latent codes and can be used to edit both synthetic and real images. We release our code and models and hope they will serve as a handy tool for further efforts on GAN-based image editing.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）目前是视觉编辑不可或缺的工具，是图像到图像转换和图像恢复管道的标准组件。此外，GAN 对于可控生成特别有用，因为它们的潜在空间包含广泛的可解释方向，非常适合语义编辑操作。通过沿着这些方向逐渐改变潜在代码，我们可以产生令人印象深刻的视觉效果，如果没有 GAN，这是无法实现的。在本文中，我们显着扩展了 StyleGAN2 等最先进模型可实现的视觉效果范围。与主要通过潜在代码操作的现有作品相比，我们在生成器参数的空间中发现了可解释的方向。通过几种简单的方法，我们探索这个空间并证明它还包含大量可解释的方向，这是重要语义操作的极好来源。所发现的操作无法通过转换潜在代码来实现，并且可用于编辑合成图像和真实图像。我们发布了我们的代码和模型，希望它们能够成为进一步致力于基于 GAN 的图像编辑的便捷工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过探索生成对抗网络（GAN）生成器参数空间中的可解释方向，实现更丰富的语义图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖潜在码（latent code）进行图像编辑，但其表达能力有限。本文旨在通过直接操作生成器参数空间，挖掘更多可解释的语义方向以提升编辑效果。
AI.method: 通过简单方法探索生成器参数空间，识别其中的可解释方向，并验证这些方向可用于合成图像和真实图像的语义编辑。
AI.result: 在StyleGAN2等模型上验证了参数空间中存在大量可解释方向，实现了传统潜在码方法无法完成的非平凡语义操作，并开源了代码和模型。
AI.conclusion: 参数空间操作为基于GAN的图像编辑提供了新工具，拓展了语义编辑的边界，未来可进一步探索其在更多场景中的应用。

title: Urban Twitter Networks and Communities: A Case Study of Microblogging in Athens
title_zh: 城市 Twitter 网络和社区：雅典微博案例研究
comment: Published in the proceedings of Hybrid City Conference 2013, Athens, Greece
comments: Published in the proceedings of Hybrid City Conference 2013, Athens, Greece
abstract: This paper examines the community formed by the Twitter users that used a city-level hashtag. In particular, we provide a network perspective of the city of Athens, Greece, as demonstrated by the analysis and visualization of the relevant Twitter hashtag data, in order to present both an overview and deeper insights at the microblogging practices of this geographic local network. Further analysis suggests that the Twitter community defined by the members of the network shows strong signs of a real-life community.
summary: This paper examines the community formed by the Twitter users that used a city-level hashtag. In particular, we provide a network perspective of the city of Athens, Greece, as demonstrated by the analysis and visualization of the relevant Twitter hashtag data, in order to present both an overview and deeper insights at the microblogging practices of this geographic local network. Further analysis suggests that the Twitter community defined by the members of the network shows strong signs of a real-life community.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了由使用城市级主题标签的 Twitter 用户形成的社区。特别是，我们提供了希腊雅典市的网络视角，通过对相关 Twitter 标签数据的分析和可视化来证明，以便对该地理本地网络的微博实践提供概述和更深入的见解。进一步的分析表明，由网络成员定义的 Twitter 社区显示出现实生活社区的强烈迹象。

AI.tldr: 分析雅典Twitter用户通过城市级话题标签形成的社区结构及微博客实践
AI.motivation: 探索城市级话题标签下Twitter用户的社交网络结构，了解其现实社区特征
AI.method: 通过分析和可视化Twitter话题标签数据，构建和展示城市社交网络
AI.result: 发现该Twitter社区具有显著的现实社区特征
AI.conclusion: 网络视角的微博客数据分析能揭示线上社区与现实社会结构的关联性

authors_text: Guangming Wang,Yehui Yang,Huixin Zhang,Zhe Liu,Hesheng Wang
title: Spherical Interpolated Convolutional Network with Distance-Feature Density for 3D Semantic Segmentation of Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于点云 3D 语义分割的具有距离特征密度的球形插值卷积网络
abstract: The semantic segmentation of point clouds is an important part of the environment perception for robots. However, it is difficult to directly adopt the traditional 3D convolution kernel to extract features from raw 3D point clouds because of the unstructured property of point clouds. In this paper, a spherical interpolated convolution operator is proposed to replace the traditional grid-shaped 3D convolution operator. This newly proposed feature extraction operator improves the accuracy of the network and reduces the parameters of the network. In addition, this paper analyzes the defect of point cloud interpolation methods based on the distance as the interpolation weight and proposes the self-learned distance-feature density by combining the distance and the feature correlation. The proposed method makes the feature extraction of spherical interpolated convolution network more rational and effective. The effectiveness of the proposed network is demonstrated on the 3D semantic segmentation task of point clouds. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves good performance on the ScanNet dataset and Paris-Lille-3D dataset.
summary: The semantic segmentation of point clouds is an important part of the environment perception for robots. However, it is difficult to directly adopt the traditional 3D convolution kernel to extract features from raw 3D point clouds because of the unstructured property of point clouds. In this paper, a spherical interpolated convolution operator is proposed to replace the traditional grid-shaped 3D convolution operator. This newly proposed feature extraction operator improves the accuracy of the network and reduces the parameters of the network. In addition, this paper analyzes the defect of point cloud interpolation methods based on the distance as the interpolation weight and proposes the self-learned distance-feature density by combining the distance and the feature correlation. The proposed method makes the feature extraction of spherical interpolated convolution network more rational and effective. The effectiveness of the proposed network is demonstrated on the 3D semantic segmentation task of point clouds. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves good performance on the ScanNet dataset and Paris-Lille-3D dataset.
abstract_zh: 点云语义分割是机器人环境感知的重要组成部分。然而，由于点云的非结构化特性，很难直接采用传统的3D卷积核从原始3D点云中提取特征。本文提出了一种球形插值卷积算子来代替传统的网格状3D卷积算子。这种新提出的特征提取算子提高了网络的准确性并减少了网络的参数。此外，本文分析了基于距离作为插值权重的点云插值方法的缺陷，并结合距离和特征相关性提出了自学习的距离-特征密度。该方法使得球面插值卷积网络的特征提取更加合理有效。该网络的有效性在点云的 3D 语义分割任务上得到了证明。实验表明，该方法在ScanNet数据集和Paris-Lille-3D数据集上取得了良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合距离-特征密度的球面插值卷积网络，用于点云的3D语义分割。
AI.motivation: 传统3D卷积难以处理点云的非结构化特性，且基于距离的插值方法存在缺陷，需改进特征提取效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计球面插值卷积算子替代传统网格卷积，并融合距离与特征相关性自学习距离-特征密度以优化特征提取。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和Paris-Lille-3D数据集上验证，方法在分割性能上表现优异，参数量减少。
AI.conclusion: 所提网络通过改进卷积算子与密度学习机制，有效提升了点云语义分割的准确性与效率。

search_text: Spherical Interpolated Convolutional Network with Distance-Feature Density for 3D Semantic Segmentation of Point Clouds 用于点云 3D 语义分割的具有距离特征密度的球形插值卷积网络 The semantic segmentation of point clouds is an important part of the environment perception for robots. However, it is difficult to directly adopt the traditional 3D convolution kernel to extract features from raw 3D point clouds because of the unstructured property of point clouds. In this paper, a spherical interpolated convolution operator is proposed to replace the traditional grid-shaped 3D convolution operator. This newly proposed feature extraction operator improves the accuracy of the network and reduces the parameters of the network. In addition, this paper analyzes the defect of point cloud interpolation methods based on the distance as the interpolation weight and proposes the self-learned distance-feature density by combining the distance and the feature correlation. The proposed method makes the feature extraction of spherical interpolated convolution network more rational and effective. The effectiveness of the proposed network is demonstrated on the 3D semantic segmentation task of point clouds. Experiments show that the proposed method achieves good performance on the ScanNet dataset and Paris-Lille-3D dataset. 点云语义分割是机器人环境感知的重要组成部分。然而，由于点云的非结构化特性，很难直接采用传统的3D卷积核从原始3D点云中提取特征。本文提出了一种球形插值卷积算子来代替传统的网格状3D卷积算子。这种新提出的特征提取算子提高了网络的准确性并减少了网络的参数。此外，本文分析了基于距离作为插值权重的点云插值方法的缺陷，并结合距离和特征相关性提出了自学习的距离-特征密度。该方法使得球面插值卷积网络的特征提取更加合理有效。该网络的有效性在点云的 3D 语义分割任务上得到了证明。实验表明，该方法在ScanNet数据集和Paris-Lille-3D数据集上取得了良好的性能。 本文提出一种结合距离-特征密度的球面插值卷积网络，用于点云的3D语义分割。 Guangming Wang,Yehui Yang,Huixin Zhang,Zhe Liu,Hesheng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Rachit Dubey,Erin Grant,Michael Luo,Karthik Narasimhan,Thomas Griffiths
title: Connecting Context-specific Adaptation in Humans to Meta-learning
title_zh: 将人类的特定情境适应与元学习联系起来
abstract: Cognitive control, the ability of a system to adapt to the demands of a task, is an integral part of cognition. A widely accepted fact about cognitive control is that it is context-sensitive: Adults and children alike infer information about a task's demands from contextual cues and use these inferences to learn from ambiguous cues. However, the precise way in which people use contextual cues to guide adaptation to a new task remains poorly understood. This work connects the context-sensitive nature of cognitive control to a method for meta-learning with context-conditioned adaptation. We begin by identifying an essential difference between human learning and current approaches to meta-learning: In contrast to humans, existing meta-learning algorithms do not make use of task-specific contextual cues but instead rely exclusively on online feedback in the form of task-specific labels or rewards. To remedy this, we introduce a framework for using contextual information about a task to guide the initialization of task-specific models before adaptation to online feedback. We show how context-conditioned meta-learning can capture human behavior in a cognitive task and how it can be scaled to improve the speed of learning in various settings, including few-shot classification and low-sample reinforcement learning. Our work demonstrates that guiding meta-learning with task information can capture complex, human-like behavior, thereby deepening our understanding of cognitive control.
summary: Cognitive control, the ability of a system to adapt to the demands of a task, is an integral part of cognition. A widely accepted fact about cognitive control is that it is context-sensitive: Adults and children alike infer information about a task's demands from contextual cues and use these inferences to learn from ambiguous cues. However, the precise way in which people use contextual cues to guide adaptation to a new task remains poorly understood. This work connects the context-sensitive nature of cognitive control to a method for meta-learning with context-conditioned adaptation. We begin by identifying an essential difference between human learning and current approaches to meta-learning: In contrast to humans, existing meta-learning algorithms do not make use of task-specific contextual cues but instead rely exclusively on online feedback in the form of task-specific labels or rewards. To remedy this, we introduce a framework for using contextual information about a task to guide the initialization of task-specific models before adaptation to online feedback. We show how context-conditioned meta-learning can capture human behavior in a cognitive task and how it can be scaled to improve the speed of learning in various settings, including few-shot classification and low-sample reinforcement learning. Our work demonstrates that guiding meta-learning with task information can capture complex, human-like behavior, thereby deepening our understanding of cognitive control.
abstract_zh: 认知控制是系统适应任务要求的能力，是认知的一个组成部分。关于认知控制的一个被广泛接受的事实是，它是情境敏感的：成人和儿童都可以从情境线索中推断出有关任务要求的信息，并利用这些推论从模糊的线索中学习。然而，人们使用情境线索来指导适应新任务的确切方式仍然知之甚少。这项工作将认知控制的上下文敏感性质与具有上下文条件适应的元学习方法联系起来。我们首先确定人类学习和当前元学习方法之间的本质区别：与人类相比，现有的元学习算法不利用特定于任务的上下文线索，而是完全依赖于特定于任务的标签或奖励形式的在线反馈。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个框架，用于在适应在线反馈之前使用有关任务的上下文信息来指导特定于任务的模型的初始化。我们展示了上下文条件元学习如何在认知任务中捕获人类行为，以及如何扩展它以提高各种环境下的学习速度，包括少样本分类和低样本强化学习。我们的工作表明，用任务信息指导元学习可以捕获复杂的、类人的行为，从而加深我们对认知控制的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文将人类认知控制中的情境特异性适应与元学习方法结合，提出基于情境信息的元学习框架以提升模型适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习算法依赖任务标签或奖励反馈，无法像人类一样利用情境线索指导适应，导致难以模拟复杂人类行为。
AI.method: 提出基于情境信息的任务模型初始化框架，在适应在线反馈前利用任务上下文引导模型参数初始化。
AI.result: 该框架成功捕捉人类认知任务行为，并在少样本分类和低样本强化学习场景中提升学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过任务信息引导元学习可模拟复杂人类行为，为理解认知控制机制提供新视角。

title: An Integrated Approach Towards the Construction of an HCI Methodological Framework
title_zh: 构建人机交互方法论框架的综合方法
comment: In Proceedings of the 1st European Workshop on HCI Design and Evaluation, Limassol, Cyprus
comments: In Proceedings of the 1st European Workshop on HCI Design and Evaluation, Limassol, Cyprus
abstract: We present a methodological framework aiming at the support of HCI practitioners and researchers in selecting and applying the most appropriate combination of HCI methods for particular problems. We highlight the need for a clear and effective overview of methods and provide further discussion on possible extensions that can support recent trends and needs, such as the focus on specific application domains.
summary: We present a methodological framework aiming at the support of HCI practitioners and researchers in selecting and applying the most appropriate combination of HCI methods for particular problems. We highlight the need for a clear and effective overview of methods and provide further discussion on possible extensions that can support recent trends and needs, such as the focus on specific application domains.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个方法论框架，旨在支持人机交互从业者和研究人员针对特定问题选择和应用最合适的人机交互方法组合。我们强调需要对方法进行清晰有效的概述，并就可以支持最新趋势和需求的可能扩展进行进一步讨论，例如关注特定应用领域。

AI.tldr: 提出一个方法论框架，帮助HCI从业者和研究人员为特定问题选择和应用最合适的HCI方法组合。
AI.motivation: 现有HCI方法缺乏系统化整合，难以应对特定应用领域的复杂需求，需构建结构化框架以提升方法选择效率。
AI.method: 通过整合现有HCI方法并构建分类体系，设计可扩展的框架结构，结合领域特异性需求进行方法适配性讨论。
AI.result: 形成包含方法分类、适用场景及扩展机制的框架模型，为不同领域提供方法组合的理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可系统化支持HCI实践中的方法选择，同时为应对新兴应用领域的研究需求提供扩展路径。

title: Enhancing Diversity in Teacher-Student Networks via Asymmetric branches for Unsupervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 通过非监督人员重新识别的不对称分支增强师生网络的多样性
abstract: The objective of unsupervised person re-identification (Re-ID) is to learn discriminative features without labor-intensive identity annotations. State-of-the-art unsupervised Re-ID methods assign pseudo labels to unlabeled images in the target domain and learn from these noisy pseudo labels. Recently introduced Mean Teacher Model is a promising way to mitigate the label noise. However, during the training, self-ensembled teacher-student networks quickly converge to a consensus which leads to a local minimum. We explore the possibility of using an asymmetric structure inside neural network to address this problem. First, asymmetric branches are proposed to extract features in different manners, which enhances the feature diversity in appearance signatures. Then, our proposed cross-branch supervision allows one branch to get supervision from the other branch, which transfers distinct knowledge and enhances the weight diversity between teacher and student networks. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method can significantly surpass the performance of previous work on both unsupervised domain adaptation and fully unsupervised Re-ID tasks.
summary: The objective of unsupervised person re-identification (Re-ID) is to learn discriminative features without labor-intensive identity annotations. State-of-the-art unsupervised Re-ID methods assign pseudo labels to unlabeled images in the target domain and learn from these noisy pseudo labels. Recently introduced Mean Teacher Model is a promising way to mitigate the label noise. However, during the training, self-ensembled teacher-student networks quickly converge to a consensus which leads to a local minimum. We explore the possibility of using an asymmetric structure inside neural network to address this problem. First, asymmetric branches are proposed to extract features in different manners, which enhances the feature diversity in appearance signatures. Then, our proposed cross-branch supervision allows one branch to get supervision from the other branch, which transfers distinct knowledge and enhances the weight diversity between teacher and student networks. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method can significantly surpass the performance of previous work on both unsupervised domain adaptation and fully unsupervised Re-ID tasks.
abstract_zh: 无监督人员重新识别（Re-ID）的目标是在不需要劳动密集型身份注释的情况下学习判别性特征。最先进的无监督 Re-ID 方法将伪标签分配给目标域中的未标记图像，并从这些噪声伪标签中学习。最近推出的平均教师模型是减轻标签噪声的一种有前途的方法。然而，在训练过程中，自集成的师生网络很快收敛到共识，从而达到局部最小值。我们探索在神经网络内部使用不对称结构来解决这个问题的可能性。首先，提出不对称分支以不同方式提取特征，这增强了外观签名的特征多样性。然后，我们提出的跨分支监督允许一个分支得到另一个分支的监督，从而传递不同的知识并增强教师和学生网络之间的权重多样性。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法可以显着超越以前在无监督域适应和完全无监督 Re-ID 任务上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过不对称分支增强教师-学生网络多样性以提升无监督行人重识别性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督Re-ID方法依赖伪标签易受噪声影响，而均值教师模型在训练中易陷入局部最优，需通过网络结构改进解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计不对称分支提取差异特征以增强表观多样性，并引入跨分支监督机制促进教师与学生网络权重多样性。
AI.result: 在无监督域适应和完全无监督Re-ID任务中显著超越现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 不对称结构有效提升了特征与权重多样性，解决了教师-学生网络收敛过快导致的性能瓶颈。

search_text: Enhancing Diversity in Teacher-Student Networks via Asymmetric branches for Unsupervised Person Re-identification 通过非监督人员重新识别的不对称分支增强师生网络的多样性 The objective of unsupervised person re-identification (Re-ID) is to learn discriminative features without labor-intensive identity annotations. State-of-the-art unsupervised Re-ID methods assign pseudo labels to unlabeled images in the target domain and learn from these noisy pseudo labels. Recently introduced Mean Teacher Model is a promising way to mitigate the label noise. However, during the training, self-ensembled teacher-student networks quickly converge to a consensus which leads to a local minimum. We explore the possibility of using an asymmetric structure inside neural network to address this problem. First, asymmetric branches are proposed to extract features in different manners, which enhances the feature diversity in appearance signatures. Then, our proposed cross-branch supervision allows one branch to get supervision from the other branch, which transfers distinct knowledge and enhances the weight diversity between teacher and student networks. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method can significantly surpass the performance of previous work on both unsupervised domain adaptation and fully unsupervised Re-ID tasks. 无监督人员重新识别（Re-ID）的目标是在不需要劳动密集型身份注释的情况下学习判别性特征。最先进的无监督 Re-ID 方法将伪标签分配给目标域中的未标记图像，并从这些噪声伪标签中学习。最近推出的平均教师模型是减轻标签噪声的一种有前途的方法。然而，在训练过程中，自集成的师生网络很快收敛到共识，从而达到局部最小值。我们探索在神经网络内部使用不对称结构来解决这个问题的可能性。首先，提出不对称分支以不同方式提取特征，这增强了外观签名的特征多样性。然后，我们提出的跨分支监督允许一个分支得到另一个分支的监督，从而传递不同的知识并增强教师和学生网络之间的权重多样性。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法可以显着超越以前在无监督域适应和完全无监督 Re-ID 任务上的性能。 本文提出一种通过不对称分支增强教师-学生网络多样性以提升无监督行人重识别性能的方法。 Hao Chen,Benoit Lagadec,Francois Bremond cs.CV

authors_text: Ivan Anokhin,Kirill Demochkin,Taras Khakhulin,Gleb Sterkin,Victor Lempitsky,Denis Korzhenkov
title: Image Generators with Conditionally-Independent Pixel Synthesis
title_zh: 具有条件独立像素合成的图像生成器
abstract: Existing image generator networks rely heavily on spatial convolutions and, optionally, self-attention blocks in order to gradually synthesize images in a coarse-to-fine manner. Here, we present a new architecture for image generators, where the color value at each pixel is computed independently given the value of a random latent vector and the coordinate of that pixel. No spatial convolutions or similar operations that propagate information across pixels are involved during the synthesis. We analyze the modeling capabilities of such generators when trained in an adversarial fashion, and observe the new generators to achieve similar generation quality to state-of-the-art convolutional generators. We also investigate several interesting properties unique to the new architecture.
summary: Existing image generator networks rely heavily on spatial convolutions and, optionally, self-attention blocks in order to gradually synthesize images in a coarse-to-fine manner. Here, we present a new architecture for image generators, where the color value at each pixel is computed independently given the value of a random latent vector and the coordinate of that pixel. No spatial convolutions or similar operations that propagate information across pixels are involved during the synthesis. We analyze the modeling capabilities of such generators when trained in an adversarial fashion, and observe the new generators to achieve similar generation quality to state-of-the-art convolutional generators. We also investigate several interesting properties unique to the new architecture.
abstract_zh: 现有的图像生成器网络严重依赖空间卷积和可选的自注意力块，以便以从粗到细的方式逐渐合成图像。在这里，我们提出了一种新的图像生成器架构，其中每个像素的颜色值是根据随机潜在向量的值和该像素的坐标独立计算的。合成过程中不涉及跨像素传播信息的空间卷积或类似操作。我们分析了以对抗方式训练时此类生成器的建模能力，并观察新生成器实现与最先进的卷积生成器相似的生成质量。我们还研究了新架构独有的几个有趣的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的图像生成架构，通过独立计算每个像素的颜色值，无需使用空间卷积或跨像素信息传播操作。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成网络依赖空间卷积和自注意力模块，计算复杂且可能限制生成效率，需探索更简洁的生成方法。
AI.method: 基于随机潜在向量和像素坐标独立计算每个像素颜色值，完全避免空间卷积及类似操作，采用对抗训练优化模型。
AI.result: 新生成器在对抗训练下达到与最先进卷积生成器相当的生成质量，并展现出独特的架构特性。
AI.conclusion: 独立像素合成架构有效可行，为图像生成提供了新思路，可能推动相关领域的进一步研究。

authors_text: Lyujie Chen,Xiaming Yuan,Yao Xiao,Yiding Zhang,Jihong Zhu
title: Robust Autonomous Landing of UAV in Non-Cooperative Environments based on Dynamic Time Camera-LiDAR Fusion
title_zh: 基于动态时间相机-激光雷达融合的无人机非合作环境鲁棒自主着陆
abstract: Selecting safe landing sites in non-cooperative environments is a key step towards the full autonomy of UAVs. However, the existing methods have the common problems of poor generalization ability and robustness. Their performance in unknown environments is significantly degraded and the error cannot be self-detected and corrected. In this paper, we construct a UAV system equipped with low-cost LiDAR and binocular cameras to realize autonomous landing in non-cooperative environments by detecting the flat and safe ground area. Taking advantage of the non-repetitive scanning and high FOV coverage characteristics of LiDAR, we come up with a dynamic time depth completion algorithm. In conjunction with the proposed self-evaluation method of the depth map, our model can dynamically select the LiDAR accumulation time at the inference phase to ensure an accurate prediction result. Based on the depth map, the high-level terrain information such as slope, roughness, and the size of the safe area are derived. We have conducted extensive autonomous landing experiments in a variety of familiar or completely unknown environments, verifying that our model can adaptively balance the accuracy and speed, and the UAV can robustly select a safe landing site.
summary: Selecting safe landing sites in non-cooperative environments is a key step towards the full autonomy of UAVs. However, the existing methods have the common problems of poor generalization ability and robustness. Their performance in unknown environments is significantly degraded and the error cannot be self-detected and corrected. In this paper, we construct a UAV system equipped with low-cost LiDAR and binocular cameras to realize autonomous landing in non-cooperative environments by detecting the flat and safe ground area. Taking advantage of the non-repetitive scanning and high FOV coverage characteristics of LiDAR, we come up with a dynamic time depth completion algorithm. In conjunction with the proposed self-evaluation method of the depth map, our model can dynamically select the LiDAR accumulation time at the inference phase to ensure an accurate prediction result. Based on the depth map, the high-level terrain information such as slope, roughness, and the size of the safe area are derived. We have conducted extensive autonomous landing experiments in a variety of familiar or completely unknown environments, verifying that our model can adaptively balance the accuracy and speed, and the UAV can robustly select a safe landing site.
abstract_zh: 在非合作环境中选择安全着陆点是实现无人机完全自主的关键一步。然而，现有方法普遍存在泛化能力和鲁棒性较差的问题。它们在未知环境中的性能显着下降，并且无法自我检测和纠正错误。在本文中，我们构建了一种配备低成本激光雷达和双目摄像头的无人机系统，通过检测平坦且安全的地面区域来实现非合作环境中的自主着陆。利用激光雷达的非重复扫描和高视场覆盖特性，我们提出了动态时间深度补全算法。结合所提出的深度图自评估方法，我们的模型可以在推理阶段动态选择激光雷达累积时间，以确保准确的预测结果。基于深度图，得出坡度、粗糙度和安全区域大小等高级地形信息。我们在各种熟悉或完全未知的环境中进行了广泛的自主着陆实验，验证了我们的模型能够自适应地平衡精度和速度，并且无人机能够鲁棒地选择安全着陆地点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于动态时间相机-激光雷达融合的无人机自主着陆方法，以在非合作环境中实现安全着陆。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机自主着陆方法在非合作环境中泛化能力差，存在误差无法自检校的问题，需提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建低成本激光雷达与双目相机融合系统，提出动态时间深度补全算法及深度图自评估方法，动态选择激光雷达累计时间以优化预测精度。
AI.result: 在多种已知与未知环境中验证模型可自适应平衡精度与速度，无人机能鲁棒选择安全着陆区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多传感器融合与动态算法优化，显著提升了无人机在非结构化环境中的自主着陆可靠性与适应性。

title: Rethinking Generalization in American Sign Language Prediction for Edge Devices with Extremely Low Memory Footprint
title_zh: 重新思考内存占用极低的边缘设备的美国手语预测的泛化
comment: 6 pages, Published in IEEE RAICS 2020, see https://raics.in
comments: 6 pages, Published in IEEE RAICS 2020, see https://raics.in
abstract: Due to the boom in technical compute in the last few years, the world has seen massive advances in artificially intelligent systems solving diverse real-world problems. But a major roadblock in the ubiquitous acceptance of these models is their enormous computational complexity and memory footprint. Hence efficient architectures and training techniques are required for deployment on extremely low resource inference endpoints. This paper proposes an architecture for detection of alphabets in American Sign Language on an ARM Cortex-M7 microcontroller having just 496 KB of framebuffer RAM. Leveraging parameter quantization is a common technique that might cause varying drops in test accuracy. This paper proposes using interpolation as augmentation amongst other techniques as an efficient method of reducing this drop, which also helps the model generalize well to previously unseen noisy data. The proposed model is about 185 KB post-quantization and inference speed is 20 frames per second.
summary: Due to the boom in technical compute in the last few years, the world has seen massive advances in artificially intelligent systems solving diverse real-world problems. But a major roadblock in the ubiquitous acceptance of these models is their enormous computational complexity and memory footprint. Hence efficient architectures and training techniques are required for deployment on extremely low resource inference endpoints. This paper proposes an architecture for detection of alphabets in American Sign Language on an ARM Cortex-M7 microcontroller having just 496 KB of framebuffer RAM. Leveraging parameter quantization is a common technique that might cause varying drops in test accuracy. This paper proposes using interpolation as augmentation amongst other techniques as an efficient method of reducing this drop, which also helps the model generalize well to previously unseen noisy data. The proposed model is about 185 KB post-quantization and inference speed is 20 frames per second.
abstract_zh: 由于过去几年技术计算的蓬勃发展，世界在解决各种现实世界问题的人工智能系统方面取得了巨大进步。但这些模型普遍被接受的一个主要障碍是它们巨大的计算复杂性和内存占用。因此，需要高效的架构和训练技术来部署在资源极少的推理端点上。本文提出了一种在仅具有 496 KB 帧缓冲 RAM 的 ARM Cortex-M7 微控制器上检测美国手语字母的架构。利用参数量化是一种常见技术，可能会导致测试精度出现不同程度的下降。本文提出使用插值作为其他技术中的增强作为减少这种下降的有效方法，这也有助于模型很好地推广到以前未见过的噪声数据。所提出的模型量化后约为 185 KB，推理速度为每秒 20 帧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在极低内存的边缘设备上实现美国手语字母检测的高效模型架构。
AI.motivation: 人工智能模型普遍存在计算复杂度高和内存占用大的问题，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上，亟需高效架构和训练技术。
AI.method: 采用参数量化技术并结合插值数据增强方法，在ARM Cortex-M7微控制器（496 KB内存）上实现模型压缩与泛化能力提升。
AI.result: 量化后模型体积为185 KB，推理速度达20帧/秒，有效缓解量化导致的精度下降并提升对噪声数据的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化与插值增强的联合优化，在极低资源设备上实现了美国手语识别的高效部署，为边缘AI应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lei Han,Jiechao Xiong,Peng Sun,Xinghai Sun,Meng Fang,Qingwei Guo,Qiaobo Chen,Tengfei Shi,Hongsheng Yu,Xipeng Wu,Zhengyou Zhang
title: TStarBot-X: An Open-Sourced and Comprehensive Study for Efficient League Training in StarCraft II Full Game
title_zh: TStarBot-X：《星际争霸 II》全场比赛高效联赛训练的开源综合研究
abstract: StarCraft, one of the most difficult esport games with long-standing history of professional tournaments, has attracted generations of players and fans, and also, intense attentions in artificial intelligence research. Recently, Google's DeepMind announced AlphaStar, a grandmaster level AI in StarCraft II that can play with humans using comparable action space and operations. In this paper, we introduce a new AI agent, named TStarBot-X, that is trained under orders of less computations and can play competitively with expert human players. TStarBot-X takes advantage of important techniques introduced in AlphaStar, and also benefits from substantial innovations including new league training methods, novel multi-agent roles, rule-guided policy search, stabilized policy improvement, lightweight neural network architecture, and importance sampling in imitation learning, etc. We show that with orders of less computation scale, a faithful reimplementation of AlphaStar's methods can not succeed and the proposed techniques are necessary to ensure TStarBot-X's competitive performance. We reveal all technical details that are complementary to those mentioned in AlphaStar, showing the most sensitive parts in league training, reinforcement learning and imitation learning that affect the performance of the agents. Most importantly, this is an open-sourced study that all codes and resources (including the trained model parameters) are publicly accessible via \url{https://github.com/tencent-ailab/tleague_projpage}. We expect this study could be beneficial for both academic and industrial future research in solving complex problems like StarCraft, and also, might provide a sparring partner for all StarCraft II players and other AI agents.
summary: StarCraft, one of the most difficult esport games with long-standing history of professional tournaments, has attracted generations of players and fans, and also, intense attentions in artificial intelligence research. Recently, Google's DeepMind announced AlphaStar, a grandmaster level AI in StarCraft II that can play with humans using comparable action space and operations. In this paper, we introduce a new AI agent, named TStarBot-X, that is trained under orders of less computations and can play competitively with expert human players. TStarBot-X takes advantage of important techniques introduced in AlphaStar, and also benefits from substantial innovations including new league training methods, novel multi-agent roles, rule-guided policy search, stabilized policy improvement, lightweight neural network architecture, and importance sampling in imitation learning, etc. We show that with orders of less computation scale, a faithful reimplementation of AlphaStar's methods can not succeed and the proposed techniques are necessary to ensure TStarBot-X's competitive performance. We reveal all technical details that are complementary to those mentioned in AlphaStar, showing the most sensitive parts in league training, reinforcement learning and imitation learning that affect the performance of the agents. Most importantly, this is an open-sourced study that all codes and resources (including the trained model parameters) are publicly accessible via \url{https://github.com/tencent-ailab/tleague_projpage}. We expect this study could be beneficial for both academic and industrial future research in solving complex problems like StarCraft, and also, might provide a sparring partner for all StarCraft II players and other AI agents.
abstract_zh: 星际争霸作为最难的电子竞技游戏之一，有着悠久的职业赛事历史，吸引了一代又一代的玩家和粉丝，也引起了人工智能研究的强烈关注。最近，谷歌旗下的 DeepMind 宣布推出 AlphaStar，这是《星际争霸 II》中的大师级人工智能，可以使用类似的动作空间和操作与人类对战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的人工智能代理，名为 TStarBot-X，它在较少的计算量下进行训练，并且可以与专家人类玩家竞争。 TStarBot-X 利用了 AlphaStar 中引入的重要技术，并受益于重大创新，包括新的联盟训练方法、新颖的多智能体角色、规则引导的策略搜索、稳定的策略改进、轻量级神经网络架构和模仿学习中的重要性采样等。我们表明，在计算规模较小的情况下，忠实地重新实现 AlphaStar 的方法不可能成功，所提出的技术对于确保 TStarBot-X 的竞争性能是必要的。我们揭示了与 AlphaStar 中提到的技术细节相补充的所有技术细节，展示了联赛训练、强化学习和模仿学习中影响智能体表现的最敏感部分。最重要的是，这是一项开源研究，所有代码和资源（包括训练后的模型参数）都可以通过 \url{https://github.com/tencent-ailab/tleague_projpage} 公开访问。我们预计这项研究将有利于学术界和工业界未来研究解决像《星际争霸》这样的复杂问题，并且可能为所有《星际争霸 II》玩家和其他人工智能代理提供一个陪练伙伴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TStarBot-X的新型AI代理，通过高效的联赛训练方法在《星际争霸II》全游戏中实现与人类专家竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管AlphaStar在《星际争霸II》中表现出色，但其计算成本高昂。本文旨在开发一种计算量更少且能与人类专家抗衡的AI代理，同时开源所有技术细节以促进研究。
AI.method: 结合AlphaStar的核心技术，引入新型联赛训练方法、多智能体角色设计、规则引导策略搜索、稳定策略优化、轻量级神经网络架构及模仿学习中的重要性抽样等创新技术。
AI.result: TStarBot-X在远低于AlphaStar的计算规模下实现了与人类专家的竞争力，验证了所提技术的必要性，并公开了所有代码和模型参数。
AI.conclusion: 本文的技术细节揭示了联赛训练、强化学习和模仿学习中的关键敏感点，为复杂问题求解和AI对战提供了开源研究基础。

title: A study of traits that affect learnability in GANs
title_zh: 影响 GAN 学习能力的特征研究
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks GANs are algorithmic architectures that use two neural networks, pitting one against the opposite so as to come up with new, synthetic instances of data that can pass for real data. Training a GAN is a challenging problem which requires us to apply advanced techniques like hyperparameter tuning, architecture engineering etc. Many different losses, regularization and normalization schemes, network architectures have been proposed to solve this challenging problem for different types of datasets. It becomes necessary to understand the experimental observations and deduce a simple theory for it. In this paper, we perform empirical experiments using parameterized synthetic datasets to probe what traits affect learnability.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks GANs are algorithmic architectures that use two neural networks, pitting one against the opposite so as to come up with new, synthetic instances of data that can pass for real data. Training a GAN is a challenging problem which requires us to apply advanced techniques like hyperparameter tuning, architecture engineering etc. Many different losses, regularization and normalization schemes, network architectures have been proposed to solve this challenging problem for different types of datasets. It becomes necessary to understand the experimental observations and deduce a simple theory for it. In this paper, we perform empirical experiments using parameterized synthetic datasets to probe what traits affect learnability.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络 GAN 是一种使用两个神经网络的算法架构，将一个神经网络与另一个神经网络进行比较，从而得出可以传递为真实数据的新的合成数据实例。训练 GAN 是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要我们应用超参数调整、架构工程等先进技术。人们提出了许多不同的损失、正则化和归一化方案、网络架构来解决不同类型数据集的这一挑战性问题。有必要理解实验观察结果并为其推导出一个简单的理论。在本文中，我们使用参数化合成数据集进行实证实验，以探讨哪些特征影响可学习性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验证明影响生成对抗网络（GAN）可学习性的特质。
AI.motivation: GAN训练存在挑战，需理解实验现象并建立理论框架以指导实践。
AI.method: 使用参数化合成数据集进行实证实验，分析不同特质对学习过程的影响。
AI.result: 识别出影响GAN可学习性的关键特质，如数据分布特性与网络结构参数。
AI.conclusion: 特定数据与模型特质显著影响GAN训练效果，为优化提供理论依据。

search_text: A study of traits that affect learnability in GANs 影响 GAN 学习能力的特征研究 Generative Adversarial Networks GANs are algorithmic architectures that use two neural networks, pitting one against the opposite so as to come up with new, synthetic instances of data that can pass for real data. Training a GAN is a challenging problem which requires us to apply advanced techniques like hyperparameter tuning, architecture engineering etc. Many different losses, regularization and normalization schemes, network architectures have been proposed to solve this challenging problem for different types of datasets. It becomes necessary to understand the experimental observations and deduce a simple theory for it. In this paper, we perform empirical experiments using parameterized synthetic datasets to probe what traits affect learnability. 生成对抗网络 GAN 是一种使用两个神经网络的算法架构，将一个神经网络与另一个神经网络进行比较，从而得出可以传递为真实数据的新的合成数据实例。训练 GAN 是一个具有挑战性的问题，需要我们应用超参数调整、架构工程等先进技术。人们提出了许多不同的损失、正则化和归一化方案、网络架构来解决不同类型数据集的这一挑战性问题。有必要理解实验观察结果并为其推导出一个简单的理论。在本文中，我们使用参数化合成数据集进行实证实验，以探讨哪些特征影响可学习性。 本文通过实验证明影响生成对抗网络（GAN）可学习性的特质。 Niladri Shekhar Dutt,Sunil Patel cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Lower Bounds for Approximate Knowledge Compilation
title_zh: 近似知识编译的下限
abstract: Knowledge compilation studies the trade-off between succinctness and efficiency of different representation languages. For many languages, there are known strong lower bounds on the representation size, but recent work shows that, for some languages, one can bypass these bounds using approximate compilation. The idea is to compile an approximation of the knowledge for which the number of errors can be controlled. We focus on circuits in deterministic decomposable negation normal form (d-DNNF), a compilation language suitable in contexts such as probabilistic reasoning, as it supports efficient model counting and probabilistic inference. Moreover, there are known size lower bounds for d-DNNF which by relaxing to approximation one might be able to avoid. In this paper we formalize two notions of approximation: weak approximation which has been studied before in the decision diagram literature and strong approximation which has been used in recent algorithmic results. We then show lower bounds for approximation by d-DNNF, complementing the positive results from the literature.
summary: Knowledge compilation studies the trade-off between succinctness and efficiency of different representation languages. For many languages, there are known strong lower bounds on the representation size, but recent work shows that, for some languages, one can bypass these bounds using approximate compilation. The idea is to compile an approximation of the knowledge for which the number of errors can be controlled. We focus on circuits in deterministic decomposable negation normal form (d-DNNF), a compilation language suitable in contexts such as probabilistic reasoning, as it supports efficient model counting and probabilistic inference. Moreover, there are known size lower bounds for d-DNNF which by relaxing to approximation one might be able to avoid. In this paper we formalize two notions of approximation: weak approximation which has been studied before in the decision diagram literature and strong approximation which has been used in recent algorithmic results. We then show lower bounds for approximation by d-DNNF, complementing the positive results from the literature.
abstract_zh: 知识编译研究不同表示语言的简洁性和效率之间的权衡。对于许多语言来说，表示大小存在已知的强下限，但最近的工作表明，对于某些语言，可以使用近似编译绕过这些界限。这个想法是编译一个可以控制错误数量的知识的近似值。我们专注于确定性可分解否定范式（d-DNNF）的电路，这是一种适合概率推理等上下文的编译语言，因为它支持高效的模型计数和概率推理。此外，d-DNNF 存在已知的尺寸下限，通过放松到近似值可以避免。在本文中，我们形式化了两个近似概念：之前在决策图文献中研究过的弱近似和最近算法结果中使用的强近似。然后，我们显示了 d-DNNF 近似的下限，补充了文献中的积极结果。

AI.tldr: 研究近似知识编译的下界，特别是针对确定性分解否定范式（d-DNNF）电路的两种近似方法，分析其无法避免的表示复杂度。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究显示近似编译可绕过d-DNNF的强下界，但尚缺乏对近似方法本身下界的分析，需明确其限制。
AI.method: 形式化弱近似（决策图领域已有）和强近似（近期算法结果中使用）两种概念，进而证明近似d-DNNF的下界。
AI.result: 证明了近似d-DNNF的下界，表明即使允许一定误差，某些问题仍需较大表示复杂度，补充了现有正向结果。
AI.conclusion: 论文明确了近似知识编译的理论限制，为d-DNNF等语言的近似方法提供了下界分析，补充了现有研究。

title: Detection of Malaria Vector Breeding Habitats using Topographic Models
title_zh: 使用地形模型检测疟疾媒介繁殖栖息地
comment: Presented at ML4D Workshop, NeurIPS 2020. Proceedings available: arXiv:2101.04347. Also presented at MLPH Workshop, NeurIPS 2020. Awarded Best Paper. Recording available https://slideslive.com/38938356/detection-of-malaria-vector-breedding-habitats-using-topographic-models
comments: Presented at ML4D Workshop, NeurIPS 2020. Proceedings available: arXiv:2101.04347. Also presented at MLPH Workshop, NeurIPS 2020. Awarded Best Paper. Recording available https://slideslive.com/38938356/detection-of-malaria-vector-breedding-habitats-using-topographic-models
abstract: Treatment of stagnant water bodies that act as a breeding site for malarial vectors is a fundamental step in most malaria elimination campaigns. However, identification of such water bodies over large areas is expensive, labour-intensive and time-consuming and hence, challenging in countries with limited resources. Practical models that can efficiently locate water bodies can target the limited resources by greatly reducing the area that needs to be scanned by the field workers. To this end, we propose a practical topographic model based on easily available, global, high-resolution DEM data to predict locations of potential vector-breeding water sites. We surveyed the Obuasi region of Ghana to assess the impact of various topographic features on different types of water bodies and uncover the features that significantly influence the formation of aquatic habitats. We further evaluate the effectiveness of multiple models. Our best model significantly outperforms earlier attempts that employ topographic variables for detection of small water sites, even the ones that utilize additional satellite imagery data and demonstrates robustness across different settings.
summary: Treatment of stagnant water bodies that act as a breeding site for malarial vectors is a fundamental step in most malaria elimination campaigns. However, identification of such water bodies over large areas is expensive, labour-intensive and time-consuming and hence, challenging in countries with limited resources. Practical models that can efficiently locate water bodies can target the limited resources by greatly reducing the area that needs to be scanned by the field workers. To this end, we propose a practical topographic model based on easily available, global, high-resolution DEM data to predict locations of potential vector-breeding water sites. We surveyed the Obuasi region of Ghana to assess the impact of various topographic features on different types of water bodies and uncover the features that significantly influence the formation of aquatic habitats. We further evaluate the effectiveness of multiple models. Our best model significantly outperforms earlier attempts that employ topographic variables for detection of small water sites, even the ones that utilize additional satellite imagery data and demonstrates robustness across different settings.
abstract_zh: 处理作为疟疾媒介繁殖地的死水体是大多数消除疟疾运动的一个基本步骤。然而，大面积识别此类水体成本高昂、劳动密集型且耗时，因此对于资源有限的国家来说具有挑战性。能够有效定位水体的实用模型可以通过大大减少现场工作人员需要扫描的区域来瞄准有限的资源。为此，我们提出了一种基于易于获得的全球高分辨率 DEM 数据的实用地形模型，以预测潜在媒介繁殖水域的位置。我们对加纳的奥布阿西地区进行了调查，评估各种地形特征对不同类型水体的影响，并揭示对水生栖息地形成有显着影响的特征。我们进一步评估多个模型的有效性。我们最好的模型明显优于早期使用地形变量检测小型水域的尝试，甚至是利用额外卫星图像数据的模型，并在不同设置下展示了鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高分辨率数字高程模型（DEM）的地形模型，用于高效检测疟疾传播媒介的繁殖水体。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在大面积识别疟疾媒介繁殖水体时成本高、耗时长，尤其在资源有限国家难以实施，需开发低成本高效模型以优化资源分配。
AI.method: 利用全球高分辨率DEM数据构建地形模型，结合加纳Obuasi地区的实地调查数据，分析地形特征对水体形成的影响，并对比多种模型的检测效果。
AI.result: 最佳模型在检测小型水体方面显著优于以往基于地形变量或卫星影像的模型，且在不同环境下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该地形模型可有效预测疟疾媒介繁殖水体分布，为资源有限地区的疟疾防控提供高效工具。

title: ROS Based Visual Programming Tool for Mobile Robot Education and Applications
title_zh: 用于移动机器人教育和应用的基于 ROS 的可视化编程工具
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, provided by Inovasyon Muhendislik Ltd. Sti
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, provided by Inovasyon Muhendislik Ltd. Sti
abstract: Visual programming languages (VPLs) provide coding without typing texts. VPL makes coding easy to programmers with automatically adding usually used some code structure. Beginners in coding have generally two main challenges; transforming ideas into logical expressions and syntax errors. Syntax errors are impossible with VPLs because of there is no forgotten parentheses and semicolons. VPLs provide to focus on algorithm for programmers. VPL is a new trend for educational robotic environments. In this study, Robot Operating System (ROS) compatible web based visual programming system has been developed for evarobot. ROS provides libraries and tools to help software developers create robot applications. It provides hardware abstraction, device drivers, libraries, visualizers, message-passing, package management, and more. Blockly has been used as VPL for the study and to generate / use blocks (commucation, sensing etc.). Some applications were generated like teleoperation, SLAM and wander etc. In this system, communication between server and client is supported by rosbridge package. Web page connected to ROS which runs on server using roslibjs library. Rosbridge provides a JSON API to ROS functionality for non-ROS programs.

Beginners in coding have generally two main challenges; transforming ideas into logical expressions and syntax errors. Syntax errors are impossible with VPLs because of there is no forgotten parentheses and semicolons. VPLs provide to focus on algorithm for programmers. VPL is a new trend for educational robotic environments. In this study, Robot Operating System (ROS) compatible web based visual programming system has been developed for evarobot. ROS provides libraries and tools to help software developers create robot applications. It provides hardware abstraction, device drivers, libraries, visualizers, message-passing, package management, and more. Blockly has been used as VPL for the study and to generate / use blocks (commucation, sensing etc.). Some applications were generated like teleoperation, SLAM and wander etc. In this system, communication between server and client is supported by rosbridge package. Web page connected to ROS which runs on server using roslibjs library. Rosbridge provides a JSON API to ROS functionality for non-ROS programs.
abstract_zh: 可视化编程语言 (VPL) 无需输入文本即可进行编码。 VPL 通过自动添加常用的一些代码结构，使程序员可以轻松编码。编码初学者通常面临两个主要挑战；将想法转化为逻辑表达和语法错误。 VPL 不可能出现语法错误，因为不会忘记括号和分号。 VPL 使程序员能够专注于算法。 VPL 是教育机器人环境的新趋势。在本研究中，为 evarobot 开发了兼容机器人操作系统（ROS）的基于网络的可视化编程系统。 ROS 提供了库和工具来帮助软件开发人员创建机器人应用程序。它提供硬件抽象、设备驱动程序、库、可视化工具、消息传递、包管理等。 Blockly 已被用作 VPL 来进行研究并生成/使用块（通信、传感等）。生成了一些应用程序，如远程操作、SLAM 和漫游等。在该系统中，服务器和客户端之间的通信由 rosbridge 包支持。使用 roslibjs 库连接到在服务器上运行的 ROS 的网页。 Rosbridge 为非 ROS 程序提供了 ROS 功能的 JSON API。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个基于ROS的网页可视化编程工具，用于移动机器人教育和应用。
AI.motivation: 传统编程存在语法错误和逻辑表达困难，而可视化编程语言（VPL）能简化编码流程，更适合教育场景。
AI.method: 采用Blockly作为可视化编程框架，通过rosbridge和roslibjs库实现与ROS系统的通信，开发支持遥操作、SLAM等功能的web应用。
AI.result: 成功构建了兼容ROS的可视化编程系统，并实现了多个机器人应用场景的示例程序。
AI.conclusion: 该工具通过可视化编程降低了机器人开发门槛，为教育和实际应用提供了有效解决方案。
