title: PCLs: Geometry-aware Neural Reconstruction of 3D Pose with Perspective Crop Layers
title_zh: PCL：使用透视作物层进行 3D 姿势的几何感知神经重建
abstract: Local processing is an essential feature of CNNs and other neural network architectures - it is one of the reasons why they work so well on images where relevant information is, to a large extent, local. However, perspective effects stemming from the projection in a conventional camera vary for different global positions in the image. We introduce Perspective Crop Layers (PCLs) - a form of perspective crop of the region of interest based on the camera geometry - and show that accounting for the perspective consistently improves the accuracy of state-of-the-art 3D pose reconstruction methods. PCLs are modular neural network layers, which, when inserted into existing CNN and MLP architectures, deterministically remove the location-dependent perspective effects while leaving end-to-end training and the number of parameters of the underlying neural network unchanged. We demonstrate that PCL leads to improved 3D human pose reconstruction accuracy for CNN architectures that use cropping operations, such as spatial transformer networks (STN), and, somewhat surprisingly, MLPs used for 2D-to-3D keypoint lifting. Our conclusion is that it is important to utilize camera calibration information when available, for classical and deep-learning-based computer vision alike. PCL offers an easy way to improve the accuracy of existing 3D reconstruction networks by making them geometry aware. Our code is publicly available at github.com/yu-frank/PerspectiveCropLayers.
summary: Local processing is an essential feature of CNNs and other neural network architectures - it is one of the reasons why they work so well on images where relevant information is, to a large extent, local. However, perspective effects stemming from the projection in a conventional camera vary for different global positions in the image. We introduce Perspective Crop Layers (PCLs) - a form of perspective crop of the region of interest based on the camera geometry - and show that accounting for the perspective consistently improves the accuracy of state-of-the-art 3D pose reconstruction methods. PCLs are modular neural network layers, which, when inserted into existing CNN and MLP architectures, deterministically remove the location-dependent perspective effects while leaving end-to-end training and the number of parameters of the underlying neural network unchanged. We demonstrate that PCL leads to improved 3D human pose reconstruction accuracy for CNN architectures that use cropping operations, such as spatial transformer networks (STN), and, somewhat surprisingly, MLPs used for 2D-to-3D keypoint lifting. Our conclusion is that it is important to utilize camera calibration information when available, for classical and deep-learning-based computer vision alike. PCL offers an easy way to improve the accuracy of existing 3D reconstruction networks by making them geometry aware. Our code is publicly available at github.com/yu-frank/PerspectiveCropLayers.
abstract_zh: 本地处理是 CNN 和其他神经网络架构的一个基本特征 - 这也是它们在相关信息在很大程度上是本地的图像上表现良好的原因之一。然而，传统相机中的投影产生的透视效果因图像中不同的全局位置而异。我们引入了透视裁剪层 (PCL) - 一种基于相机几何形状的感兴趣区域的透视裁剪形式 - 并表明考虑透视可以持续提高最先进的 3D 姿态重建方法的准确性。 PCL 是模块化神经网络层，当插入到现有的 CNN 和 MLP 架构中时，可以确定性地消除位置相关的透视效应，同时保持端到端训练和底层神经网络的参数数量不变。我们证明，PCL 可以提高使用裁剪操作（例如空间变换网络 (STN)）的 CNN 架构的 3D 人体姿势重建精度，并且有些令人惊讶的是，用于 2D 到 3D 关键点提升的 MLP。我们的结论是，对于经典和基于深度学习的计算机视觉，利用可用的相机校准信息非常重要。 PCL 提供了一种简单的方法，通过使现有 3D 重建网络具有几何感知能力来提高其准确性。我们的代码可在 github.com/yu-frank/PerspectiveCropLayers 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相机几何的透视裁剪层（PCLs），用于改进3D姿态重建的准确性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）依赖局部特征处理，但传统相机投影导致的透视效应会因图像位置不同而变化，影响3D姿态重建精度。
AI.method: 设计模块化神经网络层PCLs，通过裁剪感兴趣区域消除位置相关的透视效应，同时保持网络参数和端到端训练不变。
AI.result: PCLs显著提升了使用裁剪操作的CNN（如STN）和2D到3D关键点提升的MLP的3D人体姿态重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 利用相机标定信息可提升经典和深度学习方法的性能，PCLs为现有3D重建网络提供了一种简单有效的几何感知改进方案。

search_text: PCLs: Geometry-aware Neural Reconstruction of 3D Pose with Perspective Crop Layers PCL：使用透视作物层进行 3D 姿势的几何感知神经重建 Local processing is an essential feature of CNNs and other neural network architectures - it is one of the reasons why they work so well on images where relevant information is, to a large extent, local. However, perspective effects stemming from the projection in a conventional camera vary for different global positions in the image. We introduce Perspective Crop Layers (PCLs) - a form of perspective crop of the region of interest based on the camera geometry - and show that accounting for the perspective consistently improves the accuracy of state-of-the-art 3D pose reconstruction methods. PCLs are modular neural network layers, which, when inserted into existing CNN and MLP architectures, deterministically remove the location-dependent perspective effects while leaving end-to-end training and the number of parameters of the underlying neural network unchanged. We demonstrate that PCL leads to improved 3D human pose reconstruction accuracy for CNN architectures that use cropping operations, such as spatial transformer networks (STN), and, somewhat surprisingly, MLPs used for 2D-to-3D keypoint lifting. Our conclusion is that it is important to utilize camera calibration information when available, for classical and deep-learning-based computer vision alike. PCL offers an easy way to improve the accuracy of existing 3D reconstruction networks by making them geometry aware. Our code is publicly available at github.com/yu-frank/PerspectiveCropLayers. 本地处理是 CNN 和其他神经网络架构的一个基本特征 - 这也是它们在相关信息在很大程度上是本地的图像上表现良好的原因之一。然而，传统相机中的投影产生的透视效果因图像中不同的全局位置而异。我们引入了透视裁剪层 (PCL) - 一种基于相机几何形状的感兴趣区域的透视裁剪形式 - 并表明考虑透视可以持续提高最先进的 3D 姿态重建方法的准确性。 PCL 是模块化神经网络层，当插入到现有的 CNN 和 MLP 架构中时，可以确定性地消除位置相关的透视效应，同时保持端到端训练和底层神经网络的参数数量不变。我们证明，PCL 可以提高使用裁剪操作（例如空间变换网络 (STN)）的 CNN 架构的 3D 人体姿势重建精度，并且有些令人惊讶的是，用于 2D 到 3D 关键点提升的 MLP。我们的结论是，对于经典和基于深度学习的计算机视觉，利用可用的相机校准信息非常重要。 PCL 提供了一种简单的方法，通过使现有 3D 重建网络具有几何感知能力来提高其准确性。我们的代码可在 github.com/yu-frank/PerspectiveCropLayers 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于相机几何的透视裁剪层（PCLs），用于改进3D姿态重建的准确性。 Frank Yu,Mathieu Salzmann,Pascal Fua,Helge Rhodin cs.CV

authors_text: Elise Beck,Julie Dugdale,Carole Adam,Christelle Gaïdatzis,Julius Bañgate
title: A methodology for co-constructing an interdisciplinary model: from model to survey, from survey to model
title_zh: 共建跨学科模型的方法论：从模型到调查，从调查到模型
abstract: How should computer science and social science collaborate to build a common model? How should they proceed to gather data that is really useful to the modelling? How can they design a survey that is tailored to the target model? This paper aims to answer those crucial questions in the framework of a multidisciplinary research project. This research addresses the issue of co-constructing a model when several disciplines are involved, and is applied to modelling human behaviour immediately after an earthquake. The main contribution of the work is to propose a tool dedicated to multidisciplinary dialogue. It also proposes a reflexive analysis of the enriching intellectual process carried out by the different disciplines involved. Finally, from working with an anthropologist, a complementary view of the multidisciplinary process is given.
summary: How should computer science and social science collaborate to build a common model? How should they proceed to gather data that is really useful to the modelling? How can they design a survey that is tailored to the target model? This paper aims to answer those crucial questions in the framework of a multidisciplinary research project. This research addresses the issue of co-constructing a model when several disciplines are involved, and is applied to modelling human behaviour immediately after an earthquake. The main contribution of the work is to propose a tool dedicated to multidisciplinary dialogue. It also proposes a reflexive analysis of the enriching intellectual process carried out by the different disciplines involved. Finally, from working with an anthropologist, a complementary view of the multidisciplinary process is given.
abstract_zh: 计算机科学和社会科学应该如何合作建立一个共同的模型？他们应该如何收集对建模真正有用的数据？他们如何设计适合目标模型的调查？本文旨在在多学科研究项目的框架内回答这些关键问题。这项研究解决了涉及多个学科时共同构建模型的问题，并应用于地震后立即对人类行为进行建模。这项工作的主要贡献是提出了一种专用于多学科对话的工具。它还提出了对所涉及的不同学科所进行的丰富智力过程的反思性分析。最后，通过与人类学家的合作，给出了多学科过程的补充观点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨学科协作构建模型的方法论，旨在通过模型与调查的互动，解决计算机科学与社会科学在建模中的协作问题。
AI.motivation: 不同学科在构建模型时存在方法论差异，需解决如何有效协作及获取真实数据的问题，尤其在地震后人类行为建模中具有实际需求。
AI.method: 开发专用跨学科对话工具，结合反思性分析方法，并通过与人类学家合作获取补充视角。
AI.result: 提出了跨学科对话工具，验证了多学科协作的智力过程，并提供了地震后人类行为建模的案例分析。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科协作需通过工具支持和持续反思实现，该方法论为复杂社会技术系统的建模提供了可推广的框架。

title: Distributed Variational Bayesian Algorithms Over Sensor Networks
title_zh: 传感器网络上的分布式变分贝叶斯算法
abstract: Distributed inference/estimation in Bayesian framework in the context of sensor networks has recently received much attention due to its broad applicability. The variational Bayesian (VB) algorithm is a technique for approximating intractable integrals arising in Bayesian inference. In this paper, we propose two novel distributed VB algorithms for general Bayesian inference problem, which can be applied to a very general class of conjugate-exponential models. In the first approach, the global natural parameters at each node are optimized using a stochastic natural gradient that utilizes the Riemannian geometry of the approximation space, followed by an information diffusion step for cooperation with the neighbors. In the second method, a constrained optimization formulation for distributed estimation is established in natural parameter space and solved by alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). An application of the distributed inference/estimation of a Bayesian Gaussian mixture model is then presented, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms. Simulations on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms have excellent performance, which are almost as good as the corresponding centralized VB algorithm relying on all data available in a fusion center.
summary: Distributed inference/estimation in Bayesian framework in the context of sensor networks has recently received much attention due to its broad applicability. The variational Bayesian (VB) algorithm is a technique for approximating intractable integrals arising in Bayesian inference. In this paper, we propose two novel distributed VB algorithms for general Bayesian inference problem, which can be applied to a very general class of conjugate-exponential models. In the first approach, the global natural parameters at each node are optimized using a stochastic natural gradient that utilizes the Riemannian geometry of the approximation space, followed by an information diffusion step for cooperation with the neighbors. In the second method, a constrained optimization formulation for distributed estimation is established in natural parameter space and solved by alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). An application of the distributed inference/estimation of a Bayesian Gaussian mixture model is then presented, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms. Simulations on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms have excellent performance, which are almost as good as the corresponding centralized VB algorithm relying on all data available in a fusion center.
abstract_zh: 传感器网络背景下贝叶斯框架的分布式推理/估计由于其广泛的适用性而受到广泛关注。变分贝叶斯 (VB) 算法是一种用于逼近贝叶斯推理中出现的棘手积分的技术。在本文中，我们针对一般贝叶斯推理问题提出了两种新颖的分布式 VB 算法，它们可以应用于非常一般的共轭指数模型。在第一种方法中，每个节点的全局自然参数使用随机自然梯度进行优化，该梯度利用近似空间的黎曼几何，然后是与邻居合作的信息扩散步骤。第二种方法是在自然参数空间中建立分布式估计的约束优化公式，并通过乘子交替方向法（ADMM）进行求解。然后提出了贝叶斯高斯混合模型的分布式推理/估计的应用，以评估所提出算法的有效性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的模拟表明，所提出的算法具有出色的性能，几乎与依赖于融合中心中所有可用数据的相应集中式 VB 算法一样好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种分布式变分贝叶斯算法，用于传感器网络中的广义贝叶斯推断问题。
AI.motivation: 分布式贝叶斯推断在传感器网络中应用广泛，但现有方法在处理复杂模型时存在计算效率和通信开销问题。
AI.method: 第一种方法基于黎曼几何的随机自然梯度优化参数并进行信息扩散；第二种方法通过ADMM求解自然参数空间的约束优化问题。
AI.result: 仿真实验显示算法在合成数据和真实数据集上表现优异，性能接近集中式变分贝叶斯算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法适用于共轭指数模型，在分布式环境中实现了接近中心化方法的推断效果。

In the first approach, the global natural parameters at each node are optimized using a stochastic natural gradient that utilizes the Riemannian geometry of the approximation space, followed by an information diffusion step for cooperation with the neighbors. In the second method, a constrained optimization formulation for distributed estimation is established in natural parameter space and solved by alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). An application of the distributed inference/estimation of a Bayesian Gaussian mixture model is then presented, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms. Simulations on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the proposed algorithms have excellent performance, which are almost as good as the corresponding centralized VB algorithm relying on all data available in a fusion center. 传感器网络背景下贝叶斯框架的分布式推理/估计由于其广泛的适用性而受到广泛关注。变分贝叶斯 (VB) 算法是一种用于逼近贝叶斯推理中出现的棘手积分的技术。在本文中，我们针对一般贝叶斯推理问题提出了两种新颖的分布式 VB 算法，它们可以应用于非常一般的共轭指数模型。在第一种方法中，每个节点的全局自然参数使用随机自然梯度进行优化，该梯度利用近似空间的黎曼几何，然后是与邻居合作的信息扩散步骤。第二种方法是在自然参数空间中建立分布式估计的约束优化公式，并通过乘子交替方向法（ADMM）进行求解。然后提出了贝叶斯高斯混合模型的分布式推理/估计的应用，以评估所提出算法的有效性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的模拟表明，所提出的算法具有出色的性能，几乎与依赖于融合中心中所有可用数据的相应集中式 VB 算法一样好。 本文提出两种分布式变分贝叶斯算法，用于传感器网络中的广义贝叶斯推断问题。 Junhao Hua,Chunguang Li stat.ML,cs.AI

authors_text: Ibtissem Chouba,Lionel Amodeo,Farouk Yalaoui,Taha Arbaoui,David Laplanche
title: A Mixed Integer Linear Program For Human And Material Resources Optimization In Emergency Department
title_zh: 急诊科人力物力优化的混合整数线性规划
comment: ef:International Conference on Modeling, Optimization and Simulation (MOSIM 2020), Nov 2020, Agadir, Morocco
comments: ef:International Conference on Modeling, Optimization and Simulation (MOSIM 2020), Nov 2020, Agadir, Morocco
abstract: The discrepancy between patient demand and the emergency departments (ED) capacity, that mainly depends on human resources and on beds available for patients, often lead to ED's overcrowding and to the increase in waiting time. In this paper, we focus on the optimization of the human (medical and paramedical staff) and material resources (beds) in the ED of the hospital center of Troyes, France (CHT). We seek to minimize the total number of waiting patients from their arrival to their discharge. We propose a mixed integer linear program solved by a sample average approximation (SAA) approach. The program has been tested on a set of real data gathered from the ED information system. Numerical results show that the optimization of human and material resources leads to a decrease of total number of waiting patients.
summary: The discrepancy between patient demand and the emergency departments (ED) capacity, that mainly depends on human resources and on beds available for patients, often lead to ED's overcrowding and to the increase in waiting time. In this paper, we focus on the optimization of the human (medical and paramedical staff) and material resources (beds) in the ED of the hospital center of Troyes, France (CHT). We seek to minimize the total number of waiting patients from their arrival to their discharge. We propose a mixed integer linear program solved by a sample average approximation (SAA) approach. The program has been tested on a set of real data gathered from the ED information system. Numerical results show that the optimization of human and material resources leads to a decrease of total number of waiting patients.
abstract_zh: 患者需求与急诊科（ED）容量之间的差异（主要取决于人力资源和可供患者使用的床位）常常导致急诊科过度拥挤和等待时间增加。在本文中，我们重点关注法国特鲁瓦医院中心（CHT）急诊科的人力（医务人员和辅助医务人员）和物力资源（床位）的优化。我们力求最大限度地减少从到达到出院期间等待的患者总数。我们提出了一种通过样本平均近似（SAA）方法求解的混合整数线性程序。该程序已经在从 ED 信息系统收集的一组真实数据上进行了测试。数值结果表明，人力物力资源优化导致候诊患者总数减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合整数线性规划方法，用于优化医院急诊科的人力和物资资源。
AI.motivation: 急诊科患者需求与容量之间的差异常常导致拥挤和等待时间增加，因此需要优化人力资源和物资资源以减少等待患者总数。
AI.method: 本文采用混合整数线性规划方法，并通过样本平均近似（SAA）方法求解，使用实际数据进行测试。
AI.result: 优化人力资源和物资资源显著减少了等待患者的总数。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化人力和物资资源，可以有效减少急诊科的患者等待时间，提高效率。

title: Multi-objective Neural Architecture Search with Almost No Training
title_zh: 几乎无需训练的多目标神经架构搜索
abstract: In the recent past, neural architecture search (NAS) has attracted increasing attention from both academia and industries. Despite the steady stream of impressive empirical results, most existing NAS algorithms are computationally prohibitive to execute due to the costly iterations of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) training. In this work, we propose an effective alternative, dubbed Random-Weight Evaluation (RWE), to rapidly estimate the performance of network architectures. By just training the last linear classification layer, RWE reduces the computational cost of evaluating an architecture from hours to seconds. When integrated within an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm, RWE obtains a set of efficient architectures with state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-10 with less than two hours' searching on a single GPU card. Ablation studies on rank-order correlations and transfer learning experiments to ImageNet have further validated the effectiveness of RWE.
summary: In the recent past, neural architecture search (NAS) has attracted increasing attention from both academia and industries. Despite the steady stream of impressive empirical results, most existing NAS algorithms are computationally prohibitive to execute due to the costly iterations of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) training. In this work, we propose an effective alternative, dubbed Random-Weight Evaluation (RWE), to rapidly estimate the performance of network architectures. By just training the last linear classification layer, RWE reduces the computational cost of evaluating an architecture from hours to seconds. When integrated within an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm, RWE obtains a set of efficient architectures with state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-10 with less than two hours' searching on a single GPU card. Ablation studies on rank-order correlations and transfer learning experiments to ImageNet have further validated the effectiveness of RWE.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经架构搜索（NAS）越来越受到学术界和工业界的关注。尽管不断涌现令人印象深刻的实证结果，但由于随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练的迭代成本高昂，大多数现有 NAS 算法在计算上难以执行。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的替代方案，称为随机权重评估（RWE），以快速估计网络架构的性能。通过仅训练最后一个线性分类层，RWE 将评估架构的计算成本从几小时减少到几秒钟。当集成到进化多目标算法中时，RWE 获得了一组在 CIFAR-10 上具有最先进性能的高效架构，在单个 GPU 卡上的搜索时间不到两个小时。排序相关性的消融研究以及到 ImageNet 的迁移学习实验进一步验证了 RWE 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需大量训练的多目标神经网络架构搜索方法RWE，通过仅训练最后一层分类器快速评估网络性能。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS算法因依赖耗时的SGD训练迭代导致计算成本过高，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 设计Random-Weight Evaluation(RWE)方法，仅训练网络最后一层线性分类器，结合多目标进化算法进行架构搜索。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上以单GPU不到2小时搜索时间获得SOTA性能，ImageNet迁移学习验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: RWE通过显著降低评估成本，为高效神经网络架构搜索提供了可行方案，平衡了性能与计算资源消耗。

title: Road Scene Graph: A Semantic Graph-Based Scene Representation Dataset for Intelligent Vehicles
title_zh: 道路场景图：基于语义图的智能车辆场景表示数据集
abstract: Rich semantic information extraction plays a vital role on next-generation intelligent vehicles. Currently there is great amount of research focusing on fundamental applications such as 6D pose detection, road scene semantic segmentation, etc. And this provides us a great opportunity to think about how shall these data be organized and exploited. In this paper we propose road scene graph,a special scene-graph for intelligent vehicles. Different to classical data representation, this graph provides not only object proposals but also their pair-wise relationships. By organizing them in a topological graph, these data are explainable, fully-connected, and could be easily processed by GCNs (Graph Convolutional Networks). Here we apply scene graph on roads using our Road Scene Graph dataset, including the basic graph prediction model. This work also includes experimental evaluations using the proposed model.
summary: Rich semantic information extraction plays a vital role on next-generation intelligent vehicles. Currently there is great amount of research focusing on fundamental applications such as 6D pose detection, road scene semantic segmentation, etc. And this provides us a great opportunity to think about how shall these data be organized and exploited. In this paper we propose road scene graph,a special scene-graph for intelligent vehicles. Different to classical data representation, this graph provides not only object proposals but also their pair-wise relationships. By organizing them in a topological graph, these data are explainable, fully-connected, and could be easily processed by GCNs (Graph Convolutional Networks). Here we apply scene graph on roads using our Road Scene Graph dataset, including the basic graph prediction model. This work also includes experimental evaluations using the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 丰富的语义信息提取对下一代智能汽车起着至关重要的作用。目前有大量的研究集中在6D姿态检测、道路场景语义分割等基础应用上，这为我们思考如何组织和利用这些数据提供了很好的机会。在本文中，我们提出了道路场景图，一种智能车辆的特殊场景图。与经典数据表示不同，该图不仅提供对象建议，还提供它们的成对关系。通过将它们组织成拓扑图，这些数据是可解释的、完全连接的，并且可以通过 GCN（图卷积网络）轻松处理。在这里，我们使用道路场景图数据集（包括基本图预测模型）在道路上应用场景图。这项工作还包括使用所提出的模型进行实验评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义图的道路场景表示数据集Road Scene Graph，用于智能车辆领域，包含对象及其关系的拓扑结构，并应用图卷积网络进行处理。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于智能车辆的基础任务（如6D姿态检测、语义分割），但缺乏对多源语义数据组织与利用的系统性探索，需更结构化的场景表示方法。
AI.method: 构建包含对象提议及配对关系的场景图，通过拓扑结构组织数据，设计适用于图卷积网络（GCNs）的处理框架，并开发基础图预测模型。
AI.result: 基于Road Scene Graph数据集完成实验评估，验证了所提模型在道路场景语义理解任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Road Scene Graph为智能车辆提供了可解释、全连接的场景表示新范式，为后续基于图结构的高级语义推理任务奠定基础。

motivation: 现有研究聚焦于智能车辆的基础任务（如6D姿态检测、语义分割），但缺乏对多源语义数据组织与利用的系统性探索，需更结构化的场景表示方法。
method: 构建包含对象提议及配对关系的场景图，通过拓扑结构组织数据，设计适用于图卷积网络（GCNs）的处理框架，并开发基础图预测模型。
result: 基于Road Scene Graph数据集完成实验评估，验证了所提模型在道路场景语义理解任务中的有效性。
conclusion: Road Scene Graph为智能车辆提供了可解释、全连接的场景表示新范式，为后续基于图结构的高级语义推理任务奠定基础。
search_text: Road Scene Graph: A Semantic Graph-Based Scene Representation Dataset for Intelligent Vehicles 道路场景图：基于语义图的智能车辆场景表示数据集 Rich semantic information extraction plays a vital role on next-generation intelligent vehicles. Currently there is great amount of research focusing on fundamental applications such as 6D pose detection, road scene semantic segmentation, etc. And this provides us a great opportunity to think about how shall these data be organized and exploited. In this paper we propose road scene graph,a special scene-graph for intelligent vehicles. Different to classical data representation, this graph provides not only object proposals but also their pair-wise relationships. By organizing them in a topological graph, these data are explainable, fully-connected, and could be easily processed by GCNs (Graph Convolutional Networks). Here we apply scene graph on roads using our Road Scene Graph dataset, including the basic graph prediction model. This work also includes experimental evaluations using the proposed model. 丰富的语义信息提取对下一代智能汽车起着至关重要的作用。目前有大量的研究集中在6D姿态检测、道路场景语义分割等基础应用上，这为我们思考如何组织和利用这些数据提供了很好的机会。在本文中，我们提出了道路场景图，一种智能车辆的特殊场景图。与经典数据表示不同，该图不仅提供对象建议，还提供它们的成对关系。通过将它们组织成拓扑图，这些数据是可解释的、完全连接的，并且可以通过 GCN（图卷积网络）轻松处理。在这里，我们使用道路场景图数据集（包括基本图预测模型）在道路上应用场景图。这项工作还包括使用所提出的模型进行实验评估。 本文提出一种基于语义图的道路场景表示数据集Road Scene Graph，用于智能车辆领域，包含对象及其关系的拓扑结构，并应用图卷积网络进行处理。 Yafu Tian,Alexander Carballo,Ruifeng Li,Kazuya Takeda cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Representation of 2D frame less visual space as a neural manifold and its information geometric interpretation
title_zh: 二维无帧视觉空间的神经流形表示及其信息几何解释
comment: No. of pages 21, 6 figures and 1 Table
comments: No. of pages 21, 6 figures and 1 Table
abstract: Representation of 2D frame less visual space as neural manifold and its modelling in the frame work of information geometry is presented. Origin of hyperbolic nature of the visual space is investigated using evidences from neuroscience. Based on the results we propose that the processing of spatial information, particularly estimation of distance, perceiving geometrical curves etc. in the human brain can be modeled in a parametric probability space endowed with Fisher-Rao metric. Compactness, convexity and differentiability of the space is analysed and found that they obey the axioms of G space, proposed by Busemann. Further it is shown that it can be considered as a homogeneous Riemannian space of constant negative curvature. It is therefore ensured that the space yields geodesics into it. Computer simulation of geodesics representing a number of visual phenomena and advocating the hyperbolic structure of visual space is carried out. Comparison of the simulated results with the published experimental data is presented.
summary: Representation of 2D frame less visual space as neural manifold and its modelling in the frame work of information geometry is presented. Origin of hyperbolic nature of the visual space is investigated using evidences from neuroscience. Based on the results we propose that the processing of spatial information, particularly estimation of distance, perceiving geometrical curves etc. in the human brain can be modeled in a parametric probability space endowed with Fisher-Rao metric. Compactness, convexity and differentiability of the space is analysed and found that they obey the axioms of G space, proposed by Busemann. Further it is shown that it can be considered as a homogeneous Riemannian space of constant negative curvature. It is therefore ensured that the space yields geodesics into it. Computer simulation of geodesics representing a number of visual phenomena and advocating the hyperbolic structure of visual space is carried out. Comparison of the simulated results with the published experimental data is presented.
abstract_zh: 提出了二维无帧视觉空间作为神经流形的表示及其在信息几何框架中的建模。使用神经科学的证据来研究视觉空间双曲性质的起源。基于这些结果，我们提出，人脑中空间信息的处理，特别是距离的估计、感知几何曲线等可以在赋予Fisher-Rao度量的参数概率空间中建模。分析了空间的紧性、凸性和可微性，发现它们服从Busemann提出的G空间公理。进一步表明，它可以被视为恒定负曲率的齐次黎曼空间。因此，确保空间产生测地线。对代表多种视觉现象并倡导视觉空间双曲结构的测地线进行计算机模拟。给出了模拟结果与已发表的实验数据的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文将二维无框架视觉空间表示为神经流形，并通过信息几何框架进行建模，探讨其双曲性质的起源及数学特性。
AI.motivation: 理解人类大脑如何处理空间信息（如距离估计、几何感知）的几何机制，寻找符合神经科学证据的数学模型。
AI.method: 基于信息几何框架，结合费舍尔-劳度度量，分析空间的紧致性、凸性与可微性，并通过计算机模拟验证测地线与视觉现象的关联。
AI.result: 证明该空间符合Busemann的G空间公理，为常负曲率的齐性黎曼空间，模拟结果与实验数据一致，支持视觉空间的双曲结构假设。
AI.conclusion: 提出的神经流形模型有效解释了视觉空间的几何特性，为理解大脑空间信息处理机制提供了数学基础与计算验证。

authors_text: Margot Hanley,Apoorv Khandelwal,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Noah Snavely,Helen Nissenbaum
title: An Ethical Highlighter for People-Centric Dataset Creation
title_zh: 以人为本的数据集创建的道德荧光笔
comment: Part of the Navigating the Broader Impacts of AI Research Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
comments: Part of the Navigating the Broader Impacts of AI Research Workshop at NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Important ethical concerns arising from computer vision datasets of people have been receiving significant attention, and a number of datasets have been withdrawn as a result. To meet the academic need for people-centric datasets, we propose an analytical framework to guide ethical evaluation of existing datasets and to serve future dataset creators in avoiding missteps. Our work is informed by a review and analysis of prior works and highlights where such ethical challenges arise.
summary: Important ethical concerns arising from computer vision datasets of people have been receiving significant attention, and a number of datasets have been withdrawn as a result. To meet the academic need for people-centric datasets, we propose an analytical framework to guide ethical evaluation of existing datasets and to serve future dataset creators in avoiding missteps. Our work is informed by a review and analysis of prior works and highlights where such ethical challenges arise.
abstract_zh: 人们的计算机视觉数据集引起的重要伦理问题已受到广泛关注，因此许多数据集已被撤回。为了满足以人为中心的数据集的学术需求，我们提出了一个分析框架来指导现有数据集的伦理评估，并为未来的数据集创建者避免失误。我们的工作基于对先前工作的回顾和分析，并强调了出现此类道德挑战的地方。

AI.tldr: 提出一个分析框架，用于评估现有以人为本的计算机视觉数据集的伦理问题，并指导未来数据集的创建以避免伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 由于计算机视觉数据集中的伦理问题导致部分数据集被撤下，学术界需要一种方法来评估和创建符合伦理的数据集。
AI.method: 通过回顾和分析现有文献，构建了一个伦理评估框架，用于识别数据集创建中的伦理挑战。
AI.result: 该框架能够识别现有数据集中的伦理问题，并为未来数据集创建提供指导，从而减少伦理风险。
AI.conclusion: 本研究强调了在创建以人为本的数据集时进行伦理评估的重要性，并提供了实用的框架来支持这一过程。

title: A Sheaf and Topology Approach to Generating Local Branch Numbers in Digital Images
title_zh: 在数字图像中生成局部分支数的层和拓扑方法
abstract: This paper concerns a theoretical approach that combines topological data analysis (TDA) and sheaf theory. Topological data analysis, a rising field in mathematics and computer science, concerns the shape of the data and has been proven effective in many scientific disciplines. Sheaf theory, a mathematics subject in algebraic geometry, provides a framework for describing the local consistency in geometric objects. Persistent homology (PH) is one of the main driving forces in TDA, and the idea is to track changes of geometric objects at different scales. The persistence diagram (PD) summarizes the information of PH in the form of a multi-set. While PD provides useful information about the underlying objects, it lacks fine relations about the local consistency of specific pairs of generators in PD, such as the merging relation between two connected components in the PH. The sheaf structure provides a novel point of view for describing the merging relation of local objects in PH. It is the goal of this paper to establish a theoretic framework that utilizes the sheaf theory to uncover finer information from the PH. We also show that the proposed theory can be applied to identify the branch numbers of local objects in digital images.
summary: This paper concerns a theoretical approach that combines topological data analysis (TDA) and sheaf theory. Topological data analysis, a rising field in mathematics and computer science, concerns the shape of the data and has been proven effective in many scientific disciplines. Sheaf theory, a mathematics subject in algebraic geometry, provides a framework for describing the local consistency in geometric objects. Persistent homology (PH) is one of the main driving forces in TDA, and the idea is to track changes of geometric objects at different scales. The persistence diagram (PD) summarizes the information of PH in the form of a multi-set. While PD provides useful information about the underlying objects, it lacks fine relations about the local consistency of specific pairs of generators in PD, such as the merging relation between two connected components in the PH. The sheaf structure provides a novel point of view for describing the merging relation of local objects in PH. It is the goal of this paper to establish a theoretic framework that utilizes the sheaf theory to uncover finer information from the PH. We also show that the proposed theory can be applied to identify the branch numbers of local objects in digital images.
abstract_zh: 本文涉及一种结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）和层理论的理论方法。拓扑数据分析是数学和计算机科学中的一个新兴领域，涉及数据的形状，并已在许多科学学科中被证明是有效的。层理论是代数几何中的一门数学学科，为描述几何对象的局部一致性提供了一个框架。持久同源性（PH）是TDA的主要驱动力之一，其思想是跟踪不同尺度下几何对象的变化。持久图（PD）以多集的形式总结了PH的信息。虽然 PD 提供了有关底层对象的有用信息，但它缺乏有关 PD 中特定生成器对的局部一致性的精细关系，例如 PH 中两个连接组件之间的合并关系。层结构为描述 PH 中局部对象的合并关系提供了一种新颖的观点。本文的目标是建立一个理论框架，利用层理论从 PH 中揭示更精细的信息。我们还表明，所提出的理论可以应用于识别数字图像中局部对象的分支数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合叠层理论与拓扑数据分析的方法，用于从数字图像中生成局部分支数量。
AI.motivation: 传统持续同调（PH）的持久性图（PD）无法捕捉局部对象间的精细一致性关系（如连通分支的合并关系），而叠层理论可提供描述局部一致性的新视角。
AI.method: 通过整合拓扑数据分析与叠层理论，构建理论框架以追踪PH中局部对象的合并关系，并将其应用于数字图像的局部分支数量识别。
AI.result: 建立了基于叠层理论的理论框架，能够从PH中提取更精细的局部信息，并成功用于数字图像的局部分支数量计算。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析数字图像的局部结构提供了新思路，通过叠层理论补充了传统PH在局部一致性描述上的不足。

search_text: A Sheaf and Topology Approach to Generating Local Branch Numbers in Digital Images 在数字图像中生成局部分支数的层和拓扑方法 This paper concerns a theoretical approach that combines topological data analysis (TDA) and sheaf theory. Topological data analysis, a rising field in mathematics and computer science, concerns the shape of the data and has been proven effective in many scientific disciplines. Sheaf theory, a mathematics subject in algebraic geometry, provides a framework for describing the local consistency in geometric objects. Persistent homology (PH) is one of the main driving forces in TDA, and the idea is to track changes of geometric objects at different scales. The persistence diagram (PD) summarizes the information of PH in the form of a multi-set. While PD provides useful information about the underlying objects, it lacks fine relations about the local consistency of specific pairs of generators in PD, such as the merging relation between two connected components in the PH. The sheaf structure provides a novel point of view for describing the merging relation of local objects in PH. It is the goal of this paper to establish a theoretic framework that utilizes the sheaf theory to uncover finer information from the PH. We also show that the proposed theory can be applied to identify the branch numbers of local objects in digital images. 本文涉及一种结合拓扑数据分析（TDA）和层理论的理论方法。拓扑数据分析是数学和计算机科学中的一个新兴领域，涉及数据的形状，并已在许多科学学科中被证明是有效的。层理论是代数几何中的一门数学学科，为描述几何对象的局部一致性提供了一个框架。持久同源性（PH）是TDA的主要驱动力之一，其思想是跟踪不同尺度下几何对象的变化。持久图（PD）以多集的形式总结了PH的信息。虽然 PD 提供了有关底层对象的有用信息，但它缺乏有关 PD 中特定生成器对的局部一致性的精细关系，例如 PH 中两个连接组件之间的合并关系。层结构为描述 PH 中局部对象的合并关系提供了一种新颖的观点。本文的目标是建立一个理论框架，利用层理论从 PH 中揭示更精细的信息。我们还表明，所提出的理论可以应用于识别数字图像中局部对象的分支数。 本文提出一种结合叠层理论与拓扑数据分析的方法，用于从数字图像中生成局部分支数量。 Chuan-Shen Hu,Yu-Min Chung cs.CV,math.AT

authors_text: Sijie Mai,Songlong Xing,Jiaxuan He,Ying Zeng,Haifeng Hu
title: Analyzing Unaligned Multimodal Sequence via Graph Convolution and Graph Pooling Fusion
title_zh: 通过图卷积和图池化融合分析未对齐的多模态序列
abstract: In this paper, we study the task of multimodal sequence analysis which aims to draw inferences from visual, language and acoustic sequences. A majority of existing works generally focus on aligned fusion, mostly at word level, of the three modalities to accomplish this task, which is impractical in real-world scenarios. To overcome this issue, we seek to address the task of multimodal sequence analysis on unaligned modality sequences which is still relatively underexplored and also more challenging. Recurrent neural network (RNN) and its variants are widely used in multimodal sequence analysis, but they are susceptible to the issues of gradient vanishing/explosion and high time complexity due to its recurrent nature. Therefore, we propose a novel model, termed Multimodal Graph, to investigate the effectiveness of graph neural networks (GNN) on modeling multimodal sequential data. The graph-based structure enables parallel computation in time dimension and can learn longer temporal dependency in long unaligned sequences. Specifically, our Multimodal Graph is hierarchically structured to cater to two stages, i.e., intra- and inter-modal dynamics learning. For the first stage, a graph convolutional network is employed for each modality to learn intra-modal dynamics. In the second stage, given that the multimodal sequences are unaligned, the commonly considered word-level fusion does not pertain. To this end, we devise a graph pooling fusion network to automatically learn the associations between various nodes from different modalities. Additionally, we define multiple ways to construct the adjacency matrix for sequential data. Experimental results suggest that our graph-based model reaches state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark datasets.
summary: In this paper, we study the task of multimodal sequence analysis which aims to draw inferences from visual, language and acoustic sequences. A majority of existing works generally focus on aligned fusion, mostly at word level, of the three modalities to accomplish this task, which is impractical in real-world scenarios. To overcome this issue, we seek to address the task of multimodal sequence analysis on unaligned modality sequences which is still relatively underexplored and also more challenging. Recurrent neural network (RNN) and its variants are widely used in multimodal sequence analysis, but they are susceptible to the issues of gradient vanishing/explosion and high time complexity due to its recurrent nature. Therefore, we propose a novel model, termed Multimodal Graph, to investigate the effectiveness of graph neural networks (GNN) on modeling multimodal sequential data. The graph-based structure enables parallel computation in time dimension and can learn longer temporal dependency in long unaligned sequences. Specifically, our Multimodal Graph is hierarchically structured to cater to two stages, i.e., intra- and inter-modal dynamics learning. For the first stage, a graph convolutional network is employed for each modality to learn intra-modal dynamics. In the second stage, given that the multimodal sequences are unaligned, the commonly considered word-level fusion does not pertain. To this end, we devise a graph pooling fusion network to automatically learn the associations between various nodes from different modalities. Additionally, we define multiple ways to construct the adjacency matrix for sequential data. Experimental results suggest that our graph-based model reaches state-of-the-art performance on two benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了多模态序列分析的任务，旨在从视觉、语言和听觉序列中得出推论。大多数现有工作通常侧重于完成此任务的三种模式的对齐融合（主要是在单词级别），这在现实场景中是不切实际的。为了克服这个问题，我们寻求解决未对齐模态序列的多模态序列分析任务，该任务仍然相对未得到充分探索，也更具挑战性。循环神经网络（RNN）及其变体广泛应用于多模态序列分析，但由于其循环性质，它们容易受到梯度消失/爆炸和高时间复杂度问题的影响。因此，我们提出了一种称为多模态图的新模型，以研究图神经网络（GNN）对多模态序列数据建模的有效性。基于图的结构能够在时间维度上进行并行计算，并且可以在长未对齐序列中学习更长的时间依赖性。具体来说，我们的多模态图采用分层结构，以满足两个阶段的需求，即模内和模间动态学习。在第一阶段，每种模态都采用图卷积网络来学习模态内动力学。在第二阶段，考虑到多模态序列未对齐，通常考虑的词级融合不适用。为此，我们设计了一个图池融合网络来自动学习不同模式的各个节点之间的关联。此外，我们定义了多种方法来构造顺序数据的邻接矩阵。实验结果表明，我们的基于图的模型在两个基准数据集上达到了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过图卷积和图池化融合技术分析未对齐的多模态序列数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多关注对齐的多模态融合（如词级），但实际场景中多模态序列常存在未对齐问题，且传统RNN存在梯度消失和高时间复杂度问题。
AI.method: 提出分层图神经网络模型：1）各模态内使用图卷积学习时序特征；2）跨模态间通过图池化融合网络自动学习节点关联，并定义多种邻接矩阵构建方式。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了图模型在未对齐多模态序列分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络能有效建模未对齐多模态序列的长时依赖关系，为实际场景的多模态分析提供新思路。

title: Deep Active Learning for Sequence Labeling Based on Diversity and Uncertainty in Gradient
title_zh: 基于梯度多样性和不确定性的序列标记深度主动学习
abstract: Recently, several studies have investigated active learning (AL) for natural language processing tasks to alleviate data dependency. However, for query selection, most of these studies mainly rely on uncertainty-based sampling, which generally does not exploit the structural information of the unlabeled data. This leads to a sampling bias in the batch active learning setting, which selects several samples at once. In this work, we demonstrate that the amount of labeled training data can be reduced using active learning when it incorporates both uncertainty and diversity in the sequence labeling task. We examined the effects of our sequence-based approach by selecting weighted diverse in the gradient embedding approach across multiple tasks, datasets, models, and consistently outperform classic uncertainty-based sampling and diversity-based sampling.
summary: Recently, several studies have investigated active learning (AL) for natural language processing tasks to alleviate data dependency. However, for query selection, most of these studies mainly rely on uncertainty-based sampling, which generally does not exploit the structural information of the unlabeled data. This leads to a sampling bias in the batch active learning setting, which selects several samples at once. In this work, we demonstrate that the amount of labeled training data can be reduced using active learning when it incorporates both uncertainty and diversity in the sequence labeling task. We examined the effects of our sequence-based approach by selecting weighted diverse in the gradient embedding approach across multiple tasks, datasets, models, and consistently outperform classic uncertainty-based sampling and diversity-based sampling.
abstract_zh: 最近，一些研究调查了自然语言处理任务的主动学习（AL），以减轻数据依赖性。然而，对于查询选择，这些研究大多数主要依赖于基于不确定性的采样，通常不会利用未标记数据的结构信息。这会导致批量主动学习设置中的采样偏差，即一次选择多个样本。在这项工作中，我们证明，当主动学习在序列标记任务中纳入不确定性和多样性时，可以减少标记训练数据的数量。我们通过在多个任务、数据集、模型中选择梯度嵌入方法中的加权多样性来检查基于序列的方法的效果，并且始终优于经典的基于不确定性的采样和基于多样性的采样。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性和多样性的深度主动学习方法，用于减少序列标注任务中的标记数据需求。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法在序列标注任务中仅依赖不确定性采样，忽视了未标记数据的结构信息，导致批次采样偏差。
AI.method: 通过梯度嵌入空间中加权选择多样化样本，联合考虑不确定性与序列结构多样性指标进行查询选择。
AI.result: 在多个任务、数据集和模型上验证，该方法性能优于传统不确定性采样和多样性采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合不确定性和多样性的主动学习策略能有效提升序列标注任务的样本选择效率与模型性能。

authors_text: Tetsuya Fujie,Yuya Higashikawa,Naoki Katoh,Junichi Teruyama,Yuki Tokuni
title: Minmax Regret 1-Sink Location Problems on Dynamic Flow Path Networks with Parametric Weights
title_zh: 具有参数权重的动态流路网络的最小最大遗憾 1-汇点位置问题
abstract: This paper addresses the minmax regret 1-sink location problem on dynamic flow path networks with parametric weights. We are given a dynamic flow network consisting of an undirected path with positive edge lengths, positive edge capacities, and nonnegative vertex weights. A path can be considered as a road, an edge length as the distance along the road and a vertex weight as the number of people at the site. An edge capacity limits the number of people that can enter the edge per unit time. We consider the problem of locating a sink in the network, to which all the people evacuate from the vertices as quickly as possible. In our model, each weight is represented by a linear function in a common parameter $t$, and the decision maker who determines the location of a sink does not know the value of $t$. We formulate the sink location problem under such uncertainty as the minmax regret problem. Given $t$ and a sink location $x$, the cost of $x$ under $t$ is the sum of arrival times at $x$ for all the people determined by $t$. The regret for $x$ under $t$ is the gap between the cost of $x$ under $t$ and the optimal cost under $t$. The task of the problem is formulated as the one to find a sink location that minimizes the maximum regret over all $t$. For the problem, we propose an $O(n^4 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$ time algorithm where $n$ is the number of vertices in the network and $α(\cdot)$ is the inverse Ackermann function. Also for the special case in which every edge has the same capacity, we show that the complexity can be reduced to $O(n^3 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$.

We are given a dynamic flow network consisting of an undirected path with positive edge lengths, positive edge capacities, and nonnegative vertex weights. We formulate the sink location problem under such uncertainty as the minmax regret problem. Given $t$ and a sink location $x$, the cost of $x$ under $t$ is the sum of arrival times at $x$ for all the people determined by $t$. The regret for $x$ under $t$ is the gap between the cost of $x$ under $t$ and the optimal cost under $t$. The task of the problem is formulated as the one to find a sink location that minimizes the maximum regret over all $t$. For the problem, we propose an $O(n^4 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$ time algorithm where $n$ is the number of vertices in the network and $α(\cdot)$ is the inverse Ackermann function. Also for the special case in which every edge has the same capacity, we show that the complexity can be reduced to $O(n^3 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了具有参数权重的动态流路径网络上的最小最大后悔 1-汇位置问题。我们得到一个动态流网络，由一条具有正边长度、正边容量和非负顶点权重的无向路径组成。路径可以被视为一条道路，边长可以被视为沿路的距离，顶点权重可以被视为该地点的人数。边缘容量限制了单位时间内可以进入边缘的人数。我们考虑在网络中定位一个汇点的问题，使所有人员尽快从顶点疏散到该汇点。在我们的模型中，每个权重由公共参数 $t$ 中的线性函数表示，而确定汇点位置的决策者并不知道 $t$ 的值。我们将这种不确定性下的汇位置问题表述为最小最大遗憾问题。给定 $t$ 和接收位置 $x$，$t$ 下 $x$ 的成本是由 $t$ 确定的所有人员到达 $x$ 的时间总和。 $t$下$x$的遗憾是$t$下$x$的成本与$t$下的最优成本之间的差距。该问题的任务被表述为找到一个汇点位置，使所有 $t$ 的最大遗憾最小化。对于这个问题，我们提出了一个 $O(n^4 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$ 时间算法，其中 $n$ 是网络中的顶点数，$α(\cdot)$ 是逆阿克曼函数。此外，对于每条边具有相同容量的特殊情况，我们表明复杂度可以降低到 $O(n^3 2^{α(n)} α(n) \log n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态流路径网络中参数权重下的1-汇点定位问题，旨在找到一个汇点位置以最小化所有可能参数值下的最大遗憾。
AI.motivation: 在动态流网络中，节点权重可能受未知参数影响，导致传统最优解可能不稳健。本文通过最小化最大遗憾的方法，为不确定环境下的汇点选址提供鲁棒性解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种基于参数权重线性函数的算法，通过动态规划和网络流分析，结合逆阿克曼函数优化复杂度，处理一般情况及边容量相同特例。
AI.result: 设计出时间复杂度为O(n⁴ 2^α(n) α(n) log n)的算法，并在边容量相同情况下优化至O(n³ 2^α(n) α(n) log n)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效应对参数不确定性，为应急疏散等场景中的动态网络优化提供理论支持与计算工具。

title: Joint Extraction of Entity and Relation with Information Redundancy Elimination
title_zh: 实体与关系的联合抽取与信息冗余消除
abstract: To solve the problem of redundant information and overlapping relations of the entity and relation extraction model, we propose a joint extraction model. This model can directly extract multiple pairs of related entities without generating unrelated redundant information. We also propose a recurrent neural network named Encoder-LSTM that enhances the ability of recurrent units to model sentences. Specifically, the joint model includes three sub-modules: the Named Entity Recognition sub-module consisted of a pre-trained language model and an LSTM decoder layer, the Entity Pair Extraction sub-module which uses Encoder-LSTM network to model the order relationship between related entity pairs, and the Relation Classification sub-module including Attention mechanism. We conducted experiments on the public datasets ADE and CoNLL04 to evaluate the effectiveness of our model. The results show that the proposed model achieves good performance in the task of entity and relation extraction and can greatly reduce the amount of redundant information.
summary: To solve the problem of redundant information and overlapping relations of the entity and relation extraction model, we propose a joint extraction model. This model can directly extract multiple pairs of related entities without generating unrelated redundant information. We also propose a recurrent neural network named Encoder-LSTM that enhances the ability of recurrent units to model sentences. Specifically, the joint model includes three sub-modules: the Named Entity Recognition sub-module consisted of a pre-trained language model and an LSTM decoder layer, the Entity Pair Extraction sub-module which uses Encoder-LSTM network to model the order relationship between related entity pairs, and the Relation Classification sub-module including Attention mechanism. We conducted experiments on the public datasets ADE and CoNLL04 to evaluate the effectiveness of our model. The results show that the proposed model achieves good performance in the task of entity and relation extraction and can greatly reduce the amount of redundant information.
abstract_zh: 为了解决实体和关系抽取模型的冗余信息和关系重叠问题，我们提出了联合抽取模型。该模型可以直接提取多对相关实体，而不会产生不相关的冗余信息。我们还提出了一种名为 Encoder-LSTM 的循环神经网络，它增强了循环单元建模句子的能力。具体来说，联合模型包括三个子模块：命名实体识别子模块由预训练的语言模型和LSTM解码器层组成，实体对提取子模块使用Encoder-LSTM网络对相关实体对之间的顺序关系进行建模，关系分类子模块包括注意力机制。我们在公共数据集 ADE 和 CoNLL04 上进行了实验，以评估我们模型的有效性。结果表明，所提出的模型在实体和关系提取任务中取得了良好的性能，并且可以大大减少冗余信息量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合抽取实体和关系的模型，通过消除信息冗余提升抽取效果。
AI.motivation: 现有实体和关系抽取模型存在冗余信息生成和关系重叠问题，影响抽取准确性。
AI.method: 设计包含三个子模块的联合模型：基于预训练语言模型和LSTM的命名实体识别模块、使用Encoder-LSTM建模实体顺序关系的实体对抽取模块、结合注意力机制的关系分类模块。
AI.result: 在ADE和CoNLL04数据集实验中，模型显著减少冗余信息并取得良好抽取性能。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效解决了实体关系抽取中的冗余问题，提升了任务整体表现。

authors_text: Mingfu Xue,Shichang Sun,Zhiyu Wu,Can He,Jian Wang,Weiqiang Liu
title: SocialGuard: An Adversarial Example Based Privacy-Preserving Technique for Social Images
title_zh: SocialGuard：基于对抗性示例的社交图像隐私保护技术
comment: ef:Journal of Information Security and Applications, Vol. 63, 2021, 102993
comments: ef:Journal of Information Security and Applications, Vol. 63, 2021, 102993
abstract: The popularity of various social platforms has prompted more people to share their routine photos online. However, undesirable privacy leakages occur due to such online photo sharing behaviors. Advanced deep neural network (DNN) based object detectors can easily steal users' personal information exposed in shared photos. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial example based privacy-preserving technique for social images against object detectors based privacy stealing. Specifically, we develop an Object Disappearance Algorithm to craft two kinds of adversarial social images. One can hide all objects in the social images from being detected by an object detector, and the other can make the customized sensitive objects be incorrectly classified by the object detector. The Object Disappearance Algorithm constructs perturbation on a clean social image. After being injected with the perturbation, the social image can easily fool the object detector, while its visual quality will not be degraded. We use two metrics, privacy-preserving success rate and privacy leakage rate, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Experimental results show that, the proposed method can effectively protect the privacy of social images. The privacy-preserving success rates of the proposed method on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC 2007 datasets are high up to 96.1% and 99.3%, respectively, and the privacy leakage rates on these two datasets are as low as 0.57% and 0.07%, respectively. In addition, compared with existing image processing methods (low brightness, noise, blur, mosaic and JPEG compression), the proposed method can achieve much better performance in privacy protection and image visual quality maintenance.
summary: The popularity of various social platforms has prompted more people to share their routine photos online. However, undesirable privacy leakages occur due to such online photo sharing behaviors. Advanced deep neural network (DNN) based object detectors can easily steal users' personal information exposed in shared photos. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial example based privacy-preserving technique for social images against object detectors based privacy stealing. Specifically, we develop an Object Disappearance Algorithm to craft two kinds of adversarial social images. One can hide all objects in the social images from being detected by an object detector, and the other can make the customized sensitive objects be incorrectly classified by the object detector. The Object Disappearance Algorithm constructs perturbation on a clean social image. After being injected with the perturbation, the social image can easily fool the object detector, while its visual quality will not be degraded. We use two metrics, privacy-preserving success rate and privacy leakage rate, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Experimental results show that, the proposed method can effectively protect the privacy of social images. The privacy-preserving success rates of the proposed method on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC 2007 datasets are high up to 96.1% and 99.3%, respectively, and the privacy leakage rates on these two datasets are as low as 0.57% and 0.07%, respectively. In addition, compared with existing image processing methods (low brightness, noise, blur, mosaic and JPEG compression), the proposed method can achieve much better performance in privacy protection and image visual quality maintenance.
abstract_zh: 各种社交平台的流行促使更多人在网上分享自己的日常照片。然而，这种在线照片分享行为却导致了不良的隐私泄露。基于高级深度神经网络 (DNN) 的对象检测器可以轻松窃取共享照片中暴露的用户个人信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于对抗性示例的隐私保护技术，用于社交图像，以对抗基于对象检测器的隐私窃取。具体来说，我们开发了一种对象消失算法来制作两种对抗性的社交图像。一种可以隐藏社交图像中的所有对象，使其不被对象检测器检测到，另一种可以使定制的敏感对象被对象检测器错误地分类。对象消失算法在干净的社会图像上构建扰动。注入扰动后，社交图像可以轻松欺骗目标检测器，而其视觉质量不会下降。我们使用隐私保护成功率和隐私泄漏率两个指标来评估所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效保护社交图像的隐私。该方法在MS-COCO和PASCAL VOC 2007数据集上的隐私保护成功率分别高达96.1%和99.3%，而在这两个数据集上的隐私泄露率分别低至0.57%和0.07%。此外，与现有的图像处理方法（低亮度、噪声、模糊、马赛克和JPEG压缩）相比，该方法在隐私保护和图像视觉质量维护方面可以取得更好的性能。

AI.conclusion: 该方法在隐私保护效果与图像质量维护方面均优于现有技术，为社交图像隐私防护提供了有效方案。

search_text: SocialGuard: An Adversarial Example Based Privacy-Preserving Technique for Social Images SocialGuard：基于对抗性示例的社交图像隐私保护技术 The popularity of various social platforms has prompted more people to share their routine photos online. However, undesirable privacy leakages occur due to such online photo sharing behaviors. Advanced deep neural network (DNN) based object detectors can easily steal users' personal information exposed in shared photos. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial example based privacy-preserving technique for social images against object detectors based privacy stealing. Specifically, we develop an Object Disappearance Algorithm to craft two kinds of adversarial social images. One can hide all objects in the social images from being detected by an object detector, and the other can make the customized sensitive objects be incorrectly classified by the object detector. The Object Disappearance Algorithm constructs perturbation on a clean social image. After being injected with the perturbation, the social image can easily fool the object detector, while its visual quality will not be degraded. We use two metrics, privacy-preserving success rate and privacy leakage rate, to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Experimental results show that, the proposed method can effectively protect the privacy of social images. The privacy-preserving success rates of the proposed method on MS-COCO and PASCAL VOC 2007 datasets are high up to 96.1% and 99.3%, respectively, and the privacy leakage rates on these two datasets are as low as 0.57% and 0.07%, respectively. In addition, compared with existing image processing methods (low brightness, noise, blur, mosaic and JPEG compression), the proposed method can achieve much better performance in privacy protection and image visual quality maintenance. 各种社交平台的流行促使更多人在网上分享自己的日常照片。然而，这种在线照片分享行为却导致了不良的隐私泄露。基于高级深度神经网络 (DNN) 的对象检测器可以轻松窃取共享照片中暴露的用户个人信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于对抗性示例的隐私保护技术，用于社交图像，以对抗基于对象检测器的隐私窃取。具体来说，我们开发了一种对象消失算法来制作两种对抗性的社交图像。一种可以隐藏社交图像中的所有对象，使其不被对象检测器检测到，另一种可以使定制的敏感对象被对象检测器错误地分类。对象消失算法在干净的社会图像上构建扰动。注入扰动后，社交图像可以轻松欺骗目标检测器，而其视觉质量不会下降。我们使用隐私保护成功率和隐私泄漏率两个指标来评估所提出方法的有效性。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效保护社交图像的隐私。该方法在MS-COCO和PASCAL VOC 2007数据集上的隐私保护成功率分别高达96.1%和99.3%，而在这两个数据集上的隐私泄露率分别低至0.57%和0.07%。此外，与现有的图像处理方法（低亮度、噪声、模糊、马赛克和JPEG压缩）相比，该方法在隐私保护和图像视觉质量维护方面可以取得更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于对抗样本的隐私保护技术SocialGuard，通过生成对抗性社会图像来防止对象检测器泄露用户隐私。 Mingfu Xue,Shichang Sun,Zhiyu Wu,Can He,Jian Wang,Weiqiang Liu cs.CV,cs.LG
